AMIN AHMED, M.B.E., Barr., Bengal Judl. Dept. (Judge, small cause court).—Offg. Judge, small cause court, Calcutta, variously from 15th Apl., 1932; confd., Jan., 1935; M.B.E., Jan., 1938.

AMIN-UD-DIN, SHAIKH, M.Sc., Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Punjab) (b. 30th June, 1897).—Educ. at Punjab Univ. and Christ's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 25th Oct., 1923; arrived, 2nd Dec., 1923, and served in

the Punjab as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., Aug., 1928; dep. commr. (sub. provl.), Dec., 1931; confd., Dec., 1936.

AMINUDDIN, SAIYID (see Saiyid Aminuddin).

AMIR CHAND, M.B., Lt.-Col., I.M.S. (princl., medl. sch., Amritsar) (b. 9th Sept., 1889).—First commn. dated 1st Aug., 1914; in milty. employ to 15th Jan., 1921; profrr., King Edward medl. school, Lahore, Jan., 1921; princpl., medl. sch., Amritsar, April, 1926; offg. profrr. of medicine, King Edward Medical Coll., Lahore, Mar., 1936.

AMIR HUSAIN, KHAN BAHADUR SAIYID, B.A., United Provs., C.S. (mag. and collr.) (b. 30th Sept., 1881).—Joined the service as dep. collr. on probn., 2nd Oct., 1905; confd., Oct., 1907; offg. mag. and collr., Mar., 1903; confd., April, 1932; dep. commr., April, 1933.

AMIR, SAIYID ALI (see Saiyid Ali, Amir).

AMIR-UD-DIN, MIR (see Mir Amir-ud-din).

AMOLAK RAM, KHANNA, Indian Service of Engrs. (asst. exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 13th Oct., 1903).—Joined the service as apprentice engr., 19th Nov., 1927; proby. asst. exec. engr., Nov., 1928; confd., Nov., 1929.

AMOORE, HENRY JAMES, Indian Service of Engrs. (princl. Thomason engrg. coll., Roorkee) (b. 2nd Sept., 1884).—Joined the service as asst. engr. on 1st Oct., 1908; exec. engr., Oct., 1916; offg. dep. ch. engr., June, 1928; apptd. princpl. Thomason coll., Roorkee, Oct., 1932; confd., Oct., 1934.

AMU SAHIB, ELATT VALIAGATH, KHAN BAHADUR, O.B.E., Indian Police (dist. supt., Madras) (b. 5th June, 1885).—Joined the service, 14th Oct., 1907; asst. supt., Oct., 1923; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1916; bar to the medal, Jan., 1922; offg. dist. supt., May, 1924; confd., July, 1934; O.B.E., June, 1934.

ANAND, DHARM BIR, Ind. Service of Engrs. (b. 15th Nov., 1909).—Apptd. asst. exec. engr., Bombay, 29th April, 1933.

ANAND, HIRA SINGH, M.B., Ch.B., D.P.H., Lt.-Col., I.M.S. (Profr. King Edward Medical Coll., Lahore) (b. 17th Sept., 1889).—First commn., 9th Nov., 1917; Profr. of physiology, King Edward Medl. Coll., Lahore, Feb., 1931.

ANAND PRAKASH WATAL, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., United Provs.), (b. 21st Aug., 1892).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 3rd Oct., 1917; in milty. employ from 22nd June, 1918, to 7th Aug., 1919; asst. exec. engr., Dec., 1921; offg. exec. engr., Feb., 1925; confd., Oct., 1926.

ANANDA RAO, DHANVADA, RAO BAHADUR, B.Sc., late Indian Agric. Service (b. 20th Sept., 1882).—Joined the service as asst. dir. of agric., 5th Nov., 1909; dep. dir. of agric., Jan., 1922; princpl., agric. coll., Coimbatore, Aug., 1933; offg. dir. of agric., Madras, Jan., 1934; confd., June, 1935; retd., Sept., 1937.

ANANDA RAO, KRISHNASWAMI, RAO BAHADUR, M.A., Indian Educl. Service (b. 21st Sept., 1893).—Joined the service as profr., Presyd. Coll., Madras, July, 1919.

ANANDA RAO, UDIPIT, B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Madras), (b. 20th Feb., 1903).—Joined the service as appr. engr.,

1st July, 1926; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1927; exec. engr., Oct., 1936.

ANANTA ACHARYA, THATTAI, B.A., B.L., Judl. Dept., Madras (dist. and sess. judge) (b. 4th Aug., 1885).—Joined the service, 13th Nov., 1913; sub-judge, Sept., 1932; dist. and sess. judge, Feb., 1936.

ANANTA RAMAN, KALPATHY NARAYANA, Indian C.S. (sub-collr., Madras) (b. 28th July, 1909).—Educated at Madras University and the School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 10th October, 1932; arrived in India, November, 1932, and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr.; sub-collr., July, 1935.

ANANTAKRISHNA AYYAR, SIR CHITTOOR VAIDYALINGA, Kt., late Judl. dept., Madras, (b. 3rd Mar., 1874).—Joined the service as govt. pleader, 16th Feb., 1923; advocate-genl., Mar., 1928; judge, high ct., Dec., 1928; Knighted, Jan., 1934; retd., Mar., 1934.

ANANTANARAYANA SARMA, A. N., M.A., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Madras), (b. 22nd July, 1898).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 26th Oct., 1923; dep. consvr., Nov., 1927.

ANANTANARAYANAN, MADHAVIAH, Indian C.S. (sub-collr., Madras) (b. 1st May, 1907).—Educ. at University of Madras and Caius Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 15th October, 1929; arrived, Nov., 1929, and served in Madras as asst. coll. and mag.; sub-collr., April, 1931.

ANANTAPADMANABHA RAO, M.C.S., RAO BAHADUR, M.A., late Indian Educl. Service, (b. 5th Sept., 1874).—Joined the service, 22nd Aug., 1899; offg. princpl., govt. coll., Kumbakonam, Jan., 1927; confd., June, 1927; retd., Sept., 1929.

ANANTHANARAYANAN, AYYAR HARIHARAYYAR, Indian C.S. (sub-collr., Madras) (b. 24th Nov., 1907).—Educated at Madras University and the School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 8th Oct., 1932; arrived in India, Nov., 1932, and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr.; sub-collr., Sept., 1934.

ANDERSON, ALEXANDER CHARLES, Lt.-Col., I.M.S. (retd.), late Jail Dept., Madras (b. 12th Mar., 1883).—First commn. dated 31st July, 1909; in milty. employ to 25th Aug., 1920; offg. supt., central jail, Vallore, Jan., 1921; confd., July, 1921; offg. inspr. genl. of prisons, Madras, May, 1928; retd., Oct., 1931.

ANDERSON, EDMUND ROBERT, late Punjab Civil Service (b. 26th Sept., 1877).—Joined the service, 23rd Oct., 1897; sub. judge, Jan., 1923; offg. dist. and sess. judge, April, 1923; provl. ditto, Jan., 1927; confd., Oct., 1927; retd., Oct., 1932.

ANDERSON, FRANCIS GEOFFREY HARTNELL, M.A., late Indian C.S. (Bombay), (b. 23rd Dec., 1869).—Educ. at Bath Coll., and Balliol Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1892; arrived, 3rd Dec., 1893, and served in Bombay as asst. collr. and mag.; asst. pol. agent, Savanpur, June, 1896; transf. to fin. dept. as asst. comptr., Central Prov., Nov., 1899; dep. acctnt.-gen., Bengal, Oct., 1900; on depn. as acctnt.-gen., Jammu and Kashmir States, Feb., 1903; reverted to the Bombay service as 1st asst., March, 1905; offg. acctnt.-gen., Punjab, March to Nov., 1905; junr. collr. and collr. and dist. mag., Sept., 1909; junr. collr. and pol. agent, Surat, Nov., 1909; on

special duty for revising the rules under the Bombay, Land Revenue Code, March, 1914, to March, 1915; senr. collr., Oct., 1914; settl. commr. and dir. of land records and inspr.-gen. of registrn., &c., Oct., 1916; ret'd., June, 1929.

ANDERSON, FREDERICK, C.S.I., C.I.E., B.Sc., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 19th June, 1884).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1905, as asst. engr.; exec. engr., Oct., 1913; offg. suptg. engr., Mar., 1924; confd., Oct., 1926; C.I.E., Jan., 1925; ch. engr. and jt. secty. to govt. (P.W.D. Irrign.), Nov., 1931; C.S.I., Feb., 1937; ret'd., Dec., 1937.

ANDERSON, FREDERICK JASPER, M.C., M.B., Lt.-Col., I.M.S. (prof. of surgery, Medl. Coll., Calcutta) (b. 10th Mar., 1886).—First commn. dated 27th Jan., 1912; in milty. employ to 1st May, 1923; dist. medl. offr., Feb., 1925; offg. prinpl. and prof. of surgery, Vizagapatam, Apl., 1928; confd., June, 1929; offg. prof. of surgery, Mdl. Coll., Calcutta, June, 1934.

ANDERSON, SIR GEORGE, Kt., C.S.I., C.I.E., M.A. (Oxon.), late Indian Educl. Service (b. 15th May, 1876).—Joined the service, 11th Feb., 1909, as prof. of English and history, Elphinstone Coll., Bombay; junr. asst. sec. to govt. of India, eduen. dept., June, 1915; spl. duty as secy., Calcutta univ. commn., from Oct., 1917; C.I.E., Jan., 1920; dir. of public instrn., Punjab, Dec., 1920; Kt., Jan., 1924; ret'd., July, 1931; C.S.I., Jan., 1932; eduel. commr. with the Govt. of India, Oct., 1933, to May, 1936.

ANDERSON, GEORGE HENRY GARSTIN, D.S.O., M.C., late Indian C.S., India Office (principal, services and genl. dept.) (b. 22nd April, 1896).—Educ. at Perse Sch., and Caius Coll., Cambridge; on mil. service, April, 1915, to Oct., 1921; joined the service, 25th Oct., 1921; arrived 4th Jan., 1922, and served as personal asst. to chief commr. of Delhi and in the Punjab as asst. commr.; apptd. asst. principal, India Office, 1st Jan., 1925; actg. principal, Aug., 1930; confd., July, 1931.

ANDERSON, GERALD ALFRED, Indian Police (supt., United Provs.) (b. 26th Aug., 1892).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Nov., 1913; supt., April, 1925; on depn. as dep. dir.-genl., Hyderabad State, Nov., 1934.

ANDERSON, JAMES DRUMMOND, B.A., Indian C.S. (addl. jt. secty., legisl. dept., govt. of India) (b. 10th Aug., 1886).—Educ. at St. Paul's Sch., and Wadham Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1909; arrived in India, 5th Dec., 1910, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr., and asst. settl. offr.; on mil. duty from Oct., 1917, to Dec., 1918; under sec. to Punjab Govt., s.p.t., Jan., 1920; dep. commr. (provl.), Sept., 1924; addl. dist. and sess. judge, Nov., 1926; dist. and sess. judge, Feb., 1927; offg. secty. to govt., legislative dept., Punjab, April, 1931; confd., May, 1933; addl. jt. secty., legisl. dept., govt. of India, Oct., 1936; offg. jt. secty., ditto, Nov., 1936; secty., ditto, Nov., 1936.

ANDERSON, Rt. Hon. Sir JOHN, P.C., G.C.B., G.C.S.I., G.C.I.E. (b. 8th July, 1882).—Educ. at George Watson's Coll., Edinburgh, Edinburgh and Leipzig Univs. (M.A., B.Sc.); entered Colonial Office, 1905; secty., Northern Nigeria lands

comee., 1909; secty., W. African currency comee., 1911; prinpl. clerk, Office of Insurance Commrs., 1913; secty., Ministry of Shipping, 1917-19; addl. secty. to Local Govt. Bd., Apl., 1919; 2nd secty., Ministry of Health, 1919; chairman of Bd. of Inland Rev., 1919-22; jt. under-secty. to Lord Lieut. of Ireland, 1920; perm. under-secty. of state, Home Office, 1922; G.C.I.E., Mar., 1932; govr. of Bengal, Mar., 1932, to Nov., 1937; G.C.S.I., Dec., 1937.

ANDERSON, JOHN, M.B., Lt.-Col., I.M.S. (ret'd.) (b. 17th Dec., 1876).—First commn. dated 30th Jan., 1904; civil surg., Hazara, Apl., 1920; ditto, Sibi, Oct., 1922; ret'd., July, 1931.

ANDERSON, JOHN JAMES, B.A., late Indian C.S. (Burma) (b. 29th April, 1880).—Educ. at Dulwich Coll., and Christ's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1903; arrived, 28th Nov., 1904, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; asst. sec. to fin. commr., June, 1909; dep. commr., Apl., 1917; offg. commr., July, 1924; confd., Dec., 1929; ret'd., Aug., 1933.

ANDERSON, KENNETH, B.A., India Office (principal, finl. dept.) (b. 5th June, 1906).—Educ. at Swindon Secondary Sch. and Wadham Coll., Oxford; apptd. asst. principal, 22nd Oct., 1928; resdt. clerk, Jan., 1929, to Sept., 1932; secty., Indian delegation to London Naval conf., Jan.-Apl., 1930; jt. secty., Indian round table conf., London, 2nd Session, Sept.-Dec., 1931; 3rd Session, Nov.-Dec., 1932; jt. secty. Indian Federal Finance Expert Comee., Jan.-Apl., 1932; on duty with Imp. Econ. Conf., July-Aug., 1932; pte. secty. to perm. under-secty. of state, May, 1933; actg. prinpl., Dec., 1933; jt. secty., Niemeyer finl. enquiry, Oct., 1935; prinpl., Oct., 1936.,

ANDERSON, LAURENCE ALLROY PELHAM, M.A., M.D., Major, I.M.S. (dir., Pasteur inst., Rangoon) (b. 18th Apl., 1886).—First commn. dated 27th July, 1912; in milty. employ to 15th Mar., 1922; asst. dir., central research institute, Apl., 1928; offg. dir., Haffkine institute, Bombay, Apl., 1929; dir., Pasteur inst., Rangoon, Nov., 1931.

ANDERSON, VEN. NICOL KEITH, M.A., late Indian Eccles. Estabt. (b. 10th June, 1882).—Joined the service as jun. chaplain on 10th Oct., 1914; senr. chaplain, Oct., 1924; offg. archdeacon of Rangoon, June, 1930; confd., Dec., 1930; ret'd., Jan., 1936.

ANDERSON, WILLIAM ALEXANDER, A.M.I.C.E., Indian State Rlys. (exec. engr., N.W. Rly.) (b. 29th Jan., 1890).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1923; exec. engr., Dec., 1923; offg. divl. supt. (junr.), Aug., 1932.

ANDERSON, WILLIAM MAURICE, C.I.E., M.D., B.Sc., Lt.-Col., I.M.S. (ret'd.).—First commn., dated 29th Jan., 1901; resdy. surg., Gwaiior, Apl., 1912; civil surg., Quetta, Mar., 1914; C.I.E., June, 1919; chief medl. offr., N.W. Frontier Prov., Oct., 1920; resdy. surg., Hyderabad, Sept., 1924; ret'd., Dec., 1928.

ANDERSON, WILLIAM VIVIAN, Office of High Commr. for India (higher exec. officer, store dept.) (b. 21st July, 1883).—Educ. at Devonport High School; apptd. clerk, 2nd class, India Store Depôt, 9th Apl., 1901;

transfd. to office of high commr. for India, Oct., 1920; higher exec. officer, April, 1922.

ANDERTON, COAL CUTHBERT MURRELL, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., N.W.F.P.) (b. 22nd Dec., 1888).—Joined the service, 2nd Nov., 1915; asst. engr., April, 1918; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1920; exec. engr., April, 1927.

ANDREW, THOMAS ADAMS, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (ch. engr., Bombay) (b. 26th Nov., 1885).—Joined as asst. engr. on 1st Oct., 1908; exec. engr., Oct., 1916; under-sec. to govt., P.W.D. (Irrgn. and Rys.), May, 1927; dep. ditto, June, 1928; suptg. engr., Nov., 1934; confd., ch. engr., Feb., 1936.

ANDREWS, FREDERICK CHARLES, India Office (higher executive officer, acctnt.-gen.'s dept.), (b. 12th Feb., 1892).—Second div. clerk at General Register Office, April, 1911, to April, 1913; appointed second class clerk, India Office, 10th April, 1913, and attd. to record and registry dept.; transfd. to acctnt.-gen.'s dept., Sept., 1913; on mil. service from August, 1914, to Feb., 1919; exec. officer, April, 1922; higher ditto, May, 1927.

ANDREWS, ROBERT STUART, M.C., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Burma) (b. 25th Aug., 1894).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1922; offg. exec. engr., Dec., 1928; confd., Oct., 1930.

ANGELO, ALFRED, O.B.E., Major India Posts and Telegraphs (b. 10th Sept., 1883).—Joined the service, 1st Jan., 1900; supt., May, 1904; deputed to the I.E.F., Mesopotamia, from 16th Aug., 1917; O.B.E., Jan., 1919; asst. dir.-genl., Nov., 1921; offg. variously as dep. dir. genl., post office, from Dec., 1927; P.M.G., B. & O., Mar., 1929; dep. dir. genl., staff, Mar., 1930; offg. P.M.G., Punjab and N.W.F.P., April, 1931; confd., May, 1932; P.M.G., Bihar and Orissa, Dec., 1935; ditto, Bombay, Mar., 1936; ditto, United Provs., Oct., 1936.

ANGWIN, JAMES BADEN PENROSE, Capt., R.E. Survey of India (supt.) (b. 25th Sept., 1900).—First commn., 18th Dec., 1919; asst. supt., Oct., 1926; supt., May, 1931.

ANIL CHANDRA BANERJI, M.B., B.S. (Ald.), D.P.H., Public Health Dept., United Provs. (asst. dir. of public health) (b. 5th Feb., 1894).—Joined the service as asst. dir. of malariology, 1st July, 1922; asst. dir. of public health, 19th Nov., 1929; confd., Apl., 1930.

ANNAN, WILLIAM THOMAS, India Office (asst. princpl., public and judl. dept.) (b. 11th Feb., 1912).—Educ. at Kelvinside Academy, Glasgow Univ. and Magdalen Coll., Oxford; apptd. asst. inspr. of taxes, Midland Rev., 19th Nov., 1935; asst. princpl., India Office, 3rd Feb., 1936; resdt. clk., Sept., 1936.

ANNETT, HAROLD EDWARD, D.Sc. (Lond.), F.I.C., late Indian Agricultural Service (b. 5th Sept., 1884).—Joined the service 6th May, 1907, as supy. agric. chemist; agricultural chemist, May, 1912; opium research chemist from Dec., 1919, and actg. principal, agric. coll., Cawnpore, in addition from Aug., 1920; agricl. chemist, Central Provs., March, 1924; ret'd., June, 1929.

ANSARI, MUHAMMAD ABDUL GHANI (see Muhammad, A. G. A.).

ANSORGE, ERIC CECIL, C.I.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., Bihar) (b. 6th Mar., 1887).—Educ. at St. Paul's, St. John's Coll., Oxford, and Univ. Coll., London; apptd. after exam. of 1910; arrived in India, 5th Dec., 1911, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; transfd. to Bihar and Orissa, April, 1912; asst. to dir.-gen. of commercial intelligence, govt. of India, July, 1918; under-sec. to govt. of India, comm. and ind. dept., May, 1919, s.p.t.; dep. sec. to ditto, Aug., 1920; addl. dep. sec., govt. of India, fin. dept. (temp.), April, 1923, to July, 1924; offg. mag. and collr., Jan., 1925; confd., Decr., 1925; secy. to govt., edn. and dev. dept., March, 1926; regr., co-operative societies, Mar., 1930; offg. commr., Apl., 1935; C.I.E., May, 1937.

ANSTEAD, RUDOLPH DAVID, C.I.E., M.A., late Dept. of Agric., Madras (b. 2nd June, 1876).—Apptd. to dept., 16th April, 1909; dep. dir. of agric., planting districts, Coimbatore, Oct., 1914; offg. dir. of agric., Madras, Aug., 1922; confd., Dec., 1923; C.I.E., Jan., 1927; ret'd., June, 1931.

ANTHONY, ALEXANDER CYRIL, late Indian Finance Dept. (b. 22nd Oct., 1882).—Joined the service as probnr., fin. dept., 13th Nov., 1902; asst. acctnt.-gen., Madras, May, 1905; asst. comptr., Post Office, Jan., 1906; asst. acctnt.-gen., Bombay, Oct., 1908; ditto, United Prov., Feb., 1909; asst. comptr.-gen., Calcutta, Nov., 1913; asst. acctnt.-gen., Bihar and Orissa, Nov., 1914; dep. acctnt.-gen., Burma, Dec., 1916; ditto, Bihar and Orissa, Oct., 1918; ditto, posts and tels., April, 1922, and again Oct., 1926; dep. contr. of currency, Northern India, March, 1925; offg. acct.-gen., posts and tels., Feb., 1931; dep. ditto, Calcutta, Oct., 1931; ret'd., Aug., 1934.

ANTHONY, RICHARD WILLIAM, C.I.E., M.B., C.M., Maj.-Gen., I.M.S. (ret'd.), (b. 18th May, 1874).—First commn. dated 27th July, 1898; apptd. civil surgn., Bombay, June, 1906; on mil. duty from Nov., 1914, to Nov., 1919; offg. surgeon-gen. with the govt. of Bombay, July, 1925, and again Apl., 1927; confd., Jan., 1928; C.I.E., June, 1929; ret'd., Nov., 1929.

ANTIA, MERVANJI JAMSHEDJI, M.A. (Bom.), M.A., LL.B. (Cantab.), Barr., Indian Educl. Service (prof., Sydenham coll. of commerce Bombay) (b. 15th June, 1888).—Apptd. lecturer in English, coll. of commerce, 21st June, 1915; prof'r., ditto, Feb., 1919; I.E.S. from 5th Feb., 1921; offg. princpl., June, 1928; ditto and secty., Accountancy Diploma bd., Mar., 1932.

ANVERY, ASAD ALI, Indian Forest Service (asst. consvr.) (b. 23rd May, 1907).—Appointed asst. consvr., United Provs., Nov., 1932.

APEDAILE, EARNEST GORDON STACKHOUSE, Indian C.S. (under secty., defence dept., Burma) (b. 17th Dec., 1908).—Educ. at Christ's Hospital and Exeter College, Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1931; arrived in India, Dec., 1932, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; under secty., home and pol. dept., Burma, May, 1936; ditto, defence dept., Dec., 1937.

APPA RAO D., Judcl. Dept., Madras (master high ct., Madras) (b. 3rd Jan., 1889).—Joined the service, 22nd Aug., 1923; official referee, high ct., June, 1928; master high ct., July, 1934; offg. regr., variously, from July, 1935.

APPAJI RAO, KABAD, B.A., B.L., late Judl. dept., Madras (b. 9th Nov., 1877).—Held non-gazetted appt. from 13th Oct., 1900, to 9th Oct., 1906; offg. dist. munsif, Oct., 1906; confd., Mar., 1907; sub judge, Nov., 1925; dist. and sess. judge, July, 1930; retd., Nov., 1932.

APPANDA RAJ, SRIDHAR, Indian Police (asst. supt., Madras) (b. 10th Jan., 1912).—Joined the service, as asst. supt., Madras, on probn., 29th Jan., 1934; confd., Jan., 1936.

APPLEBY, KINLOCH ARTHUR, O.B.E., late India Posts and Telegraphs (b. 13th Feb., 1880).—Joined the service, 17th Mar., 1898; supt., April, 1906; dep. postmaster-genl., March, 1919; Affg. postmaster-genl., Punjab, etc., April, 1928; ditto, United Provs., Feb., 1932; retd., Feb., 1935.

ARBERRY, ARTHUR JOHN, Litt.D. (Cantab.) India Office (asst. librarian and asst. keeper of oriental books and MSS.) (b. 12th May, 1905).—Educ. at Portsmouth G.S. and Pembroke Coll., Camb., 1st class in Classical Tripos Parts I and II. Oriental languages Tripos, parts I and II, Fellow of Pembroke Coll., 1931; prof. of classics in the Egyptian Univ., 1932; asst. librarian, India Office, 1st Aug., 1934; author of various publications and translations including "Catalogue of Arabic MSS. in the India Office," Vol. II, part II, and "Catalogue of the India Office Library," Vol. II, Part VI, Persian Books.

ARBUTHNOT, CLIFFORD WILLIAM ERNEST, C.I.E., B.E. and B.A. (R.U.I.), Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Bombay) (b. 13th Feb., 1885).—Joined as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1908; in milty. employ from 23rd Sept., 1914, to 20th Nov., 1918; exec. engr., Oct., 1916; C.I.E., June, 1930; member, legis. council, Bombay, Nov., 1932.

ARCHBOLD, WILLIAM HUGH, Indian Police (supt. United Provs.) (b. 5th Jan., 1904).—Joined the service as asst. supt., United Provs., 20th Nov., 1923; offg. supt., Jan., 1927; and again, Nov., 1932; confd., Oct., 1936; inspr. genl., Kashmir, Aug., 1935.

ARCHER, WILLIAM GEORGE, Indian C.S. (it. mag. and dep. coll., Bihar) (b. 11th Feb., 1907).—Educ. at Strand School, Brixton, Emmanuel College, Cambridge, and School of Oriental Studies, London; apptd. after examination of 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1931; and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and coll.

ARDAGH, FREDERICK DAY, M.A., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Madras), (b. 7th Dec., 1893).—Joined the service, 22nd Mar., 1920, as asst. consvr.; dep. consvr., March 1921; on dept. to Forest Research Institute, Dehra Dun, Apl., 1926; offg. consvr., May, 1936.

ARDAGH, LESLIE VERNON, M.C., B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 7th Jan., 1896).—Educ. at Epsom Coll. and Wadham Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 25th Oct., 1920; arrived 6th Dec., 1920, and posted to United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag., Nov. 1921; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Mar., 1928; confd., Oct., 1929; elections petition commr., Ajmer, July, 1936; retd.

ARJAN DAS, AGGARWAL, LALA, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 1st,

Jan., 1897).—Joined the service, 23rd Nov. 1920; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1921; exec. engr., Oct., 1930.

ARJUN DAS, VASUDEV, RAI BAHADUR, LALA, M.A., LL.B., late Punjab Civil Service (b. May, 1881).—Joined the service, 1st April, 1903; extra asst. commr., April, 1906; asst. commr., inc. tax, Sept., 1921; offg. dir. of land records, Punjab, April, 1927; dep. commr., July, 1929; retd., May, 1936.

ARMOUR, JOHN STUART, M.A. (Glas.), B.A. (Oxon.), Indian Educl. Service (princl. Patna Coll.) (b. 25th Jan., 1885).—Educ. Glasgow Univ. and Balliol Coll., Oxford; joined the service as prof., Patna, 20th Oct., 1914; offg. princ. Patna training coll., July, 1915; on milty. service from 11th Oct., 1916 to 14th April, 1919; offg. asst. dir. of public instrn., Dec., 1920; prof. of English, Patna coll., Dec., 1921; offg. princ. Patna coll., Sept., 1929; offg. prinpl., Greer Bhumihar Brahman coll., July, 1931; confd., Aug., 1933; princpl., Patna Coll., July, 1935.

ARMSTRONG, ANDREW ROBERT BARRY, B.A.I., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 8th Sept., 1882).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1905, asst. engr., Punjab, Dec., 1905; exec. engr., Oct., 1913; transferred to Burma, P.W.D., from Mar., 1927; offg. supt. engr., Mar., 1927; retd., Sept., 1935.

ARMSTRONG, ARTHUR CAMPBELL, C.B.E., C.I.E., late Indian Police (b. 26th Nov., 1878).—Joined the service, Aug., 1895; dep. supt., Oct., 1907; awarded King's police medal, Nov., 1909; dist. supt., April, 1918; O.B.E., June, 1919; offg. dep. inspr.-genl., July, 1921; C.I.E., Jan., 1922; dep. inspr. genl., Jan., 1929; C.B.E., Jan., 1933; retd., Nov., 1933.

ARMSTRONG, JOHN ELLIOTT, C.I.E., O.B.E., late Indian Police Service (Bengal), (b. 21st Sept., 1875).—Joined the service, Jan., 1897, and served as asst. supt.; dist. supt., Dec., 1905; offg. dep. inspr.-gen. C.I.D., May, 1919; confd., June, 1920; O.B.E., Jan., 1923; awarded King's Police Medal, 1926; C.I.E., June, 1927; retd., May, 1929.

ARMSTRONG, WILLIAM HERBERT FLETCHER, M.A. (Cantab.), F.C.S., Indian Educl. Service (asst. dir. of public instrn.) (b. 25th Apl., 1892).—Joined the service, 20th Sept., 1917; prof., Khalsa coll., Amritsar, Mar., 1920; lecturer, Univ. coll., Rangoon, Feb., 1922; prinpl., govt. intermediate coll., Lyallpur, Sept., 1924; vice-prinpl., C.T. coll., Lahore, Dec., 1927; offg. prinpl. ditto, Mar., 1931; and again, July, 1933; inspr. of European schools, Oct., 1935; asst. dir. of public instrn., Oct., 1935; offg. dir., Nov., 1936.

ARNDT, LAURENCE HENRY, Barr., late Indian C.S. (Madras).—Educ. at St. Thomas' Coll., Colombo, King's Coll., and Univ. Coll., London; apptd. after exam. of 1911; arrived 6th Dec., 1912, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; sub-collr. and jt. mag., Oct., 1917; asst. collr. and mag., Nov., 1919; sub-collr. and jt. mag., Dec., 1919; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Nov., 1922; confd., April, 1926; retd., Nov., 1928.

ARNOLD, FREDERICK BLACKMORE, B.A., Indian C.S. (dep. secty., fin. dept., Burma) (b. 26th June, 1906).—Educ. at the College,

Bishop's Stortford, and Trinity Hall, Cambridge; joined the service, 10th Oct., 1929; arrived, Nov., 1929, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; under-secty. to govt., fin. dept., Sept., 1933; dep. secty., fin. dep., Dec., 1937.

ARORA, ALAKH BIHARI, B.A., Public health dept., Punjab (asst. dir.) (b. 2nd Mar., 1885).—Joined the service 12th Nov., 1914; asst. dir. of public health, May, 1927.

ARTE, VINAYAK BHASKAR, B.Sc., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 23rd Aug., 1895).—Joined the service, 20th June, 1916; asst. auditor, N.W. rly., May, 1925; asst. acct.-genl., Bombay, June, 1928, ext., local fund audit, Bengal, Dec., 1931; asst. dir., army audit, Southern Cmd., Nov., 1933; examr. outside audit dept., Bengal, Nov., 1937.

ARUNACHALAM, NELICHERI, SWAMINATHA, Indian Civil Service (sub coll. and jt. mag., Madras) (b. 15th Feb., 1903).—Educ. at University of Madras and Queen's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 8th Oct., 1928; arrived, December, 1928, and served in Madras as asst. coll. and mag.; sub-collr. and jt. magte., Nov., 1930; offg. mag. and collr., Nov., 1935.

ASADULLAH, KHALIFA MUHAMMAD, KHAN BAHADUR, B.A. (librarian, Impl. library) (b. 6th Aug., 1890).—Joined the service, 16th Nov., 1913; offg. librarian, Impl. library, Feb., 1929; confd., Dec., 1930.

ASANAND KUMAR, M.A., Incomx-tax Dept., Punjab (asst. commr. (b. 17th Apr., 1891).—Joined the service, Jan., 1917; held non-gaz. appts., Jan., 1917, to Aug., 1921; collr. of income-tax, Sept., 1921; income-tax officer, Oct., 1929; confd. as asst. commr. of income-tax, Mar., 1936.

ASERAPPA, RICHARD HUMBERT, F.C.H., late Indian State Railways (b. 27th Aug., 1874).—Trained at the R.I.E. Coll.; joined the service, 1st Oct., 1898, as asst. engr.; exec. engr., March, 1908; on foreign service to Gondal State from Feb., 1924; ret'd., June, 1929.

ASGHAR ABBAS, KHAN BAHADUR, M.B.E., late Indian Police Service (United Provs.) (b. 1876).—Joined the service, 2nd Apr., 1896, and held non-gazetted appts. to 27th Apr., 1909; dep. supt., Apr., 1909; apptd. to I.P.S. as supt., 24th May, 1928; ret'd., July, 1931.

ASGHAR ALL, SHAIKH. KANUNGO, C.B.E., B.A., Barr., late Indian C.S. (b., 4th April, 1872).—Educ. at Christ's Coll., Camb., and Univ. Coll., London; apptd. after exam. of 1895; called to the Bar, Middle Temple, 1896; arrived, 16th Dec., 1896, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr., and dist. judge; dep. commr., Dec., 1909; C.B.E., June, 1918; rendered valuable services in India in connection with the war (Gaz., 3rd June, 1918); addl. sec. to govt., Punjab, April, 1919; sec., home dept., Punjab, Jan., 1921; offg. commr., Feb., 1922; confd., Oct., 1927; offg. finl. commr. (dev.), July, 1931; ret'd. Dec., 1931.

ASGHAR. HAMID (see Hamid Asghar).

ASGHAR HASAN, SAIVID, B.A., LL.B., late United Provs. Civil Service (b. 9th Nov., 1877).—Joined the service, 1st Apr., 1905; munsif, Mar., 1907; sub-judge, June, 1916; sess. and sub-judge, Feb., 1928; dist. & sess. judge, Feb., 1929; ret'd., Nov., 1932.

ASH, FELIX, Indian Posts and Tels. (Contr. tels. stores) (b. 15th Nov., 1893).—Joined the service, 11th Mar., 1924; confd. as asst. contr. tel. stores, Apr., 1928; contr., ditto (provl.), Feb., 1932.

ASHA RAM SHARMA (see Sharma, A. R.).

ASHE, REGINALD WILLIAM ALAN, Income Tax dept., Bengal (asst. commr.) (b. 25th July, 1891).—Joined the service, 4th Dec., 1913; inc. tax officer, Oct., 1924; offg. asst. commr., Dec., 1926; confd., June, 1928.

ASHLEY-BROWN, REV. WILLIAM, L.Th., Indian Eccles. Estabt. (b. 22nd Feb., 1887).—Apptd. chaplain on probation, 9th Dec., 1917; junr. chaplain, Dec., 1919; senr. chaplain, Oct., 1927; offg. archdeacon, Bombay, Dec., 1933; confd., Oct., 1934.

ASHTON, GEORGE, O.B.E., late India Office (b. 6th Aug., 1866).—Clerk, 2nd class, 7th April, 1884; staff clerk, April, 1905; clerk for examn. of army non-effective accts., June, 1915; administrative officer for non-effective questions, April, 1921; O.B.E., June, 1929; ret'd., Aug., 1931.

ASKWITH, ARTHUR VIVIAN, Indian C.S. (secty. to Govt., home dept., Punjab) (b. 16th Nov., 1893).—Educ. Bedford Sch., apptd. asst. supt. of police in I.P.S., Nov., 1913; on mil. service, Aug., 1916, to Jan., 1919; joined the I.C.S., 4th March, 1921; asst. commr., Punjab, April, 1921; dep. commr. (provl.), Feb., 1927; ditto (perm.), Nov., 1931; offg. secty. to govt., Punjab, transfd. depts., May, 1934; secty. to govt., Punjab, home dept., May, 1935.

ASLI, HEHRAM DINSHAW, M.B.E., Office of High Commr. for India (b. 24th Nov., 1882).—Apptd. trade publicity officer, May, 1926; M.B.E., Jan., 1932.

ASPINALL, ROBERT STIVALA, C.I.E., Lt.-Col. I.M.S. (C.M.O., W. India agency) (b. 5th Feb., 1895).—First commn., 5th Oct., 1922; agency surg., Kurram, Dec., 1929; civil surg., New Delhi, Mar., 1930, and Oct., 1934; ditto, Simla East, July, 1932; civil surg., Aymer, and C.M.O., Rajputana, Apr., 1935; C.I.E., Jan., 1936; civil surg., Sibi, Oct., 1936; C.M.O., W. India Agency, Apr., 1937.

ASRANI, MOTOOMAL ASSUDAMAI, B.A., B.Sc., A.M.I.C.E., Indian State Rlys. (exec. engr., E.I. rly.) (b. 31st Dec., 1890).—Joined the service, 1st Aug., 1915; asst. engr., Jan., 1919; resdt. engr., Aug., 1924; exec. engr. (junr.), E.I. rly., Nov., 1927; ditto (senr.), July, 1934.

ASSHETON-SMITH, GUY COCHRAM, Indian State Rlys. (divl. mechl. engr., N.W. rly.) (b. 28th Sept., 1889).—Joined the service, 1st Apr., 1920, as asst. loco. supt.; asst. rolling stock officer, Oct., 1924; asst. works manager, Oct., 1927; divl. mechl. engr., N.W. rly., Aug., 1934.

ASTBURY, ARTHUR RALPH, C.S.I., C.I.E., M.I.C.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 5th June, 1880).—Trained at the R.I.E. Coll.; joined the service, 1st Oct., 1900; asst. engr., Dec., 1900; exec. engr., Oct., 1908; under-sec. to govt. buildin. and roads branch, P.W. Dept., Punjab, Nov., 1913; suptg. engr. (subs. provl.), Oct., 1919; confd., Jan., 1920; offg. chief engr. and sec. to govt., Nov., 1924; confd., Nov., 1925; C.I.E., Jan., 1928; C.S.I., Jan., 1933; ret'd., June, 1935.

ASTLE, GEORGE HARVEY, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Bombay) (b. 4th Jan., 1912).—Educated at Alleyne's Grammar School, Uttoxeter, King's College, London, and School of Oriental Studies, London; apptd. after exam. of 1934; arrived in India, Jan., 1936, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.

ASTON, ARTHUR HENRY SOUTHCOTE, M.A., Barr., late Judicial Dept., Bombay (b. 4th July, 1874).—Joined the service, 8th Jan., 1906, and served in Bombay as govt. pleader and public prosecutor; chief presy. mag. and rev. judge, April, 1907; offg. addl. judl. commr., Sind, June, 1920; confd., July, 1923; ret'd., July, 1934.

ASTON, HERBERT REID, B.A., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 22nd Mar., 1885).—Joined the service as asst. engr. on 1st Oct., 1908; exec. engr., May, 1917; offg. suptg. engr., Dec., 1927; confd., Sept., 1930; ret'd., May, 1935.

ASUNDI, ANANT KRISHNA, B.A., LL.B., Bombay Civil Service, late Judicial Branch. (b. 14th May, 1880).—Held non-gazetted appts. from 23rd Sept., 1909, to 11th July, 1912; sub-judge, July, 1912; asst. judge, Oct., 1927; offg. judge and sess. judge, May, 1928; confd., May, 1930; ret'd., May, 1935.

ATAL, JAI KUMAR, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., C.P.) (b. 19th Jan., 1914).—Educ. at Clayesmore School, Winchester, and Balliol Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 16th Sept., 1937; arrived in India Nov., 1937, and served in the C.P. as asst. commr.

ATAUR RAHMAN, KHAN BAHADUR, B.A. (b. May, 1879).—Apptd. asst. commr. of income tax, Bengal, 4th April, 1923; offg. commr., Nov., 1933; ret'd., May, 1934.

ATKINS, L. B. W. (see Walsh Atkins, L. B.).

ATKINSON, CHARLES MCCARTHY, late Indian Police (b. 2nd Nov., 1879).—Joined the service, 2nd Feb., 1903, as proby.; asst. supt., Sept., 1904; supt., Aug., 1911; on mil. duty, July, 1918, to Jan., 1919; ret'd., Feb., 1933.

ATKINSON, DENIS JACKSON, Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Burma) (b. 5th June, 1897).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1920; asst. consvr., Dec., 1921; divl. forest entomologist, Nov., 1925; dep. consvr., Nov., 1926.

ATKINSON, SIR EDWIN HENRY DE VERE, K.C.B., K.B.E., C.M.G., C.I.E., Lieut.-Gen., R.E.—First commn., 16th Sept., 1885; instr., R. M. Acad., Jan., 1896, to July, 1899; offg. principal, Thomason Coll., Nov., 1901; confd., Dec., 1902; C.I.E., Jan., 1913; temp. to mil. dept., Sept. 1915; mendl. in despatch, June, 1916; C.M.G., Jan., 1917; C.B., Jan., 1918; K.B.E., Feb., 1921; dir. of mil. works, India, 1921; master general of the ordnance, India, April, 1924; K.C.B., March, 1929.

ATKINSON, JOHN DOMVILLE, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (asst. exec. engr., Bombay) (b. 7th Aug., 1906).—Joined the service as proby. asst. exec. engr., Bombay, 1st Oct., 1929; confd., Feb., 1934.

ATKINSON, MONTAGUE PARKER, M.B., B.Ch., Major, I.M.S. (agency surg., Gilgit) (b. 23rd Nov., 1894).—Date of first commn., 29th Nov., 1923; in milty. employ to Mar., 1931; agency surg., Gilgit, Oct., 1935.

ATKINSON, THOMAS SINTON, B.A., Indian Civil Service (asst. commr., Burma) (b. 21st March, 1905).—Educ. at Methodist Coll., Belfast, and Trinity Coll., Dublin; joined the service, 15th Oct., 1928; arrived, Nov., 1928, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; asst. warden, oilfields, Jan., 1933; offg. dep. commr., Mar., 1934.

ATMA RAM, RAI BAHADUR, M.A., late Indian Educl. Service (b. 26th Dec., 1886).—Apptd. inspr. of schools, Punjab, 14th May, 1919; ret'd., Aug., 1931.

AUCOTT, ELLIOTT, late Office of High Commr. for India (b. 1st Apl., 1867).—Apptd. 2nd class clerk, India Office, 27th Feb., 1886, and attached to the funds dept., transf. to acct.-gen.'s dept., Dec., 1909; staff clerk, Oct., 1913; junr. clerk, March, 1919; services lent to high commr. for India from Oct., 1920; suptg. exec. officer, 1st April, 1922; asst. chief accounting officer, 21st April, 1922; ret'd., Oct., 1930.

AUGIER, ARTHUR REGINALD, Capt., Indian Posts and Telegraphs (Dep. P.M.G.) (b. 2nd Oct., 1887).—Joined the service, 1st Feb., 1908; supt. of post offices, Oct., 1910; on depn. to Field Service and Iraq, July, 1918 to Oct., 1930; dep. P.M.G., Aug., 1936.

AUGIER, DOUGLAS ERIC, O.B.E., Opium dept., United Provs. (jt. opium officer, Malwa) (b. 24th July, 1885).—Joined the service as proby. asst. opium agent, 16th April, 1906; confd., Feb., 1908; dist. opium agent, Dec., 1926; jt. opium officer, Malwa, Jan., 1927; O.B.E., Jan., 1933.

AUNG, U. SAN, late Burma Civil Service (b. 14th Jan., 1878).—Held non-gazetted appts. from 24th Mar., 1899; extra asst. commr., Sept., 1916; offg. dep. commr., Aug., 1928; confd., Aug., 1931; ret'd., Aug., 1934.

AUSTIN, THOMAS, Barr., Indian C.S. (collr., Madras) (b. 20th July, 1887).—Educ. at Plymouth Coll., and Jesus Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1910; arrived in India, 4th Dec., 1911, and served in Madras as asst. coll. and mag.; sub. coll. and jt. mag., July, 1917; on foreign service as supt., Pudukkottai estate, May, 1919, to Aug., 1920; collr., civil and mily. station, Bangalore, Feb. 1922; chairman, Assam labour board, Oct., 1924; offg. collr. and dist. magte., July, 1929; confd., Apl., 1930; regr. co-op. soc., Madras, June, 1934.

AVADH BEHARI GUPTA, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., United Provs.) (b. 15th Sept., 1893).—Joined the service, 28th Oct., 1916; asst. engr., Oct., 1917; asst. exec. engr., April, 1924; exe. engr., Oct., 1926.

AVRIL, SYDNEY, late Indian State Rlys. (b. 31st May, 1880).—Joined the service as asst. loco. supt., 11th Sept., 1915; asst. rolling stock officer, Oct., 1925; divl. ditto, Jan., 1927; senr. asst. (fuel), Nov., 1927; ret'd., Aug., 1934.

AWATI, PRALHAD RAOJI, B.A. (Bom. and Cantab.), Natural Science Tripos, Pts. I & II, class II (Cantab.), D.I.C. (Lond.), Indian Educl. Service, (b. 18th Dec., 1887).—Appointed prof. of zoology, Royal Institute of Science, Bombay, 1st June, 1922.

AYLING, SIR WILLIAM BOCK, Kt., late Indian C.S.—Educ. at Weymouth Coll., and Magdalene Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1886; arrived, 30th Jan., 1889, and served in Madras

as asst. collr. and mag.; head assist. Oct., 1895; sub-collr. and joint mag., Jan., 1900; dist. and sess. judge, June, 1904; judge, high ct., Madras, June, 1912; knighted, June, 1915; offg. chief judge, Madras high ct., July, 1921; ret'd., June, 1924.

AYLMER, EDMUND GEORGE, Printing and Stationery Dept. (manager, Govt. of India press) (b. 16th Mar., 1890).—Held non-gazetted appts., from 15th May, 1914; dep. supt., Govt. central press, Oct., 1920; manager ditto, Mar., 1923; offg. manager, Govt. of India press, Oct., 1930; confd., Oct., 1930.

AYUB BAKSH AWAN, B.Sc., Indian Police (b. 25th May, 1913).—Apptd. asst. supt., Punjab, on probn., 1st Feb., 1935; confd., Feb., 1937.

AYUB, MUHAMMAD, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 15th June, 1914).—Educ. at American High School, Baghdad, Col. Brown's School, Dehra Dun, University College, London, and School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 22nd Oct., 1936; arrived in India, Aug., 1936, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.

AYYADURAI AYYAR, VENKATAKRISHNA AYYAR, RAO BAHADUR, B.A., B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (dep. chief engr.) (b. 5th Dec., 1885).—Joined the service as appr. engr., 20th Feb., 1909; asst. engr., Feb., 1910; exec. engr., Feb., 1919; dep. ch. engr., Madras, May, 1933.

AYYANGAR, GANDHARVAKOTA R. R. (see Ramaswami Ayyangar, G. R.).

AYYANGAR, GIYARPURAM N. R. (see Rangaswami Ayyangar, G. N.).

AYYANGAR, KUPPUSWAMI RAMASWAMI (see Kuppuswami Ramaswami Ayyangar).

AYYANGAR, KOMBUR RAMASWAMI KRISHNASWAMI (see Krishnaswami Ayyangar, K. R.).

AYYANGAR, K. S. RAMASWAMI (see Ramaswami Ayyangar K. S.).

AYYANGAR, MALUR S. A. T. (see Tirumalai Ayyangar, M. S. A.).

AYYANGAR, NARASIMHA GOPALASWAMI (see Gopalaswami, A. N.).

AYYANGAR, NARASIMHA GOVINDARAJA (see Govindaraja, A. N.).

AYYANGAR, NUGGEHALLI RAMANUJA (see Ramanuja, A. N.).

AYYANGAR, NUGGIHALLI NARASIM, B.A., L.C.E., M.I.E. (Ind) late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 12th Sept., 1881).—Joined 13th March, 1906; asst. engr. (prov. service), April, 1907; exec. engr., April, 1915; under sec. to govt., P. W. D. (rds. and bldgs.), May, 1927; offg. dep. ch. engr., June, 1928; dep. sec. to govt., P. W. D. (rds. and bldgs.), Apl., 1929; ret'd., Sept., 1936.

AYYANGAR, RAJAGOPALA A. N. (see Narasimha Ayyangar, R. A.).

AYYANGAR, S. RANGASWAMI (see Rangaswami, S. A.).

AYYANGAR, SRINIVASA AYYANGAR PARTHASARATHI (see Parthasarathi Ayyangar, S. A.).

AYYANGAR, SRINIVASA RAGHAVA (see Raghava Ayyangar, S.).

AYYANGAR, VALAVARAM BHASHYAM (see Bhashyam Ayyangar, V.).

AYYAR (see also Aiyar).

AYYAR, ABHIRAMAPURAM KHRISHNAMURTI RAJA (see Raja Ayyar, A. K.).

AYYAR, ALLADI KRISHNASWAMI (see Krishnaswami, A. A.).

AYYAR, A. S. PANCHAPAKESA (see Panchapakesa Ayyar).

AYYAR, BATLAGUNDU S. A. R. (see Ramaswami Ayyar, B. S. A.).

AYYAR, CALIDAS V. K. (see Krishnaswami Ayyar, C. V.).

AYYAR, C. S. M., (see Mahadeva Ayyar Candamangalam Sitarama).

AYYAR, CHANDRASEKHARA SUBRAHMANYA (see Subrahmanya Ayyar C.).

AYYAR, C. V. A. (see Anantakrishna Ayyar, C. V.).

AYYAR, E. R. S. (see Seshu, Ayyar E. R.).

AYYAR, GOPALA A. R. (see Ramaswami Ayyar, G. A.).

AYYAR, GOPALA V. (see Venkateswara Ayyar, G.).

AYYAR, GOPALASWAMI N. (see Nagaratnam, A. G.).

AYYAR, HARIHARAYYAR ANANTHANARAYANAN (see Ananthanarayanan H. A.).

AYYAR, K. BALARAMA (see Balarama Ayyar).

AYYAR, K. R. V. (see Venkataramana Ayyar, K.).

AYYAR, KUNNISSAERI S.V. (see Venkatachala-Ayyar).

AYYAR, K. VENKATARAMA (see Venkatarama Ayyar, K.).

AYYAR, LAKSHMINARAYANA A. V. (see Venkatakrishna Ayyar, L. A.).

AYYAR, MADURA SUBBA AYYAR SUBRAHMANYA (see Subrahmanya Ayyar, M. S. A.).

AYYAR, MAHADEVA NILAKANTA (see Nilakanta, A. M.).

AYYAR, NARAYANA P. (see Padmanabha, N.).

AYYAR, NARAYANASWAMI A. D. A. (see Durairaja Ayyar, N. A.).

AYYAR, NARAYANASWAMY KUPPUSWAMY (see Kuppuswamy A.N.).

AYYAR, NARAYANA SWAMINATHA (see Swaminatha Ayyar, N.).

AYYAR, NILAKANTA MAHADEVA (see Nilakanta Mahadeva Ayyar).

AYYAR, OMBATHIVELI R. A. N. (see Narayanaswami Ayyar, O. R. A.).

AYYAR, PATHIAVADI SESHACHALA VISVANATHA (see Visvanatha Ayyar, P. S.).

AYYAR, P. N. N. (see Poyamani, N. N. A.).

AYYAR, P. N. RAMASWAMI (see Ramaswami Ayyar).

AYYAR, PERUMALAYYAR RAMAKRISHNA (see Ramakrishna Ayyar, P.).

AYYAR, P. V. BALAKRISHNA (see Balakrishna Ayyar).

AYYAR, R. RAJAGOPALA (see Rajagopala, A. R.).

AYYAR, RAJAPPAYA NARAYANA (see Narayana Ayyar, R.).

AYYAR, RAMA (see Rama, A.).

AYYAR, R. G. RAMASIVAMI (see Ramasivami Ayyar R.I.).

AYYAR, SANKARANARAYANA BHASKARA (see Bhaskara Ayyar, S.).

AYYAR T. S., SUBRAMANIA (see Subramania Ayyar).

AYYAR, SWAMINATHA AYYAR MUTHUSWAMI (see Muthuswami Ayyar, S.A.).

AYYAR, T. G. N. (see Tarakad Gopalakrishna Narayana, Ayyar).

AYYAR, TINNEVELLY SELLAMIER SANKARA (see Sankara, Ayyar, T. S.).

AYYAR, TIRUKKARUGAVUR N. A. V. (see Venkatarama Ayyar, T. N. A.).

AYYAR, T. SUBRAHMANYA V. (see Venkatarama Ayyar, T. S.).

AYYAR, T. V. SESHAGIRI (see Seshagiri Ayyar).

AYYAR, VENKATAKRISHNA A. A. (see Ayyadurai, V.A.).

AYYAR, V. KRISHNAMURTI (see Krishnamurti Ayyar, V.).

AYYAR, VENKATARAMA RAMACHANDRA (see Ramachandra Ayyar, V.).

AZAM, MUHAMMAD (see Muhammad Azam).

AZIZ, A. (see Abdul Aziz).

AZIZ, MUHAMMAD ABDUL (see Abdul Aziz, M.).

AZIZUR RAHMAN, MUHAMMAD, KHAN

BAHADUR, B.A., Assam C.S. (dep. commr.) (b. 16th Oct., 1884).—Joined the service, 21st May, 1910; extra asst. commr., Mar., 1913; dep. commr., July, 1934.

BA, U., late Indian Police (b. 24th Sept., 1880).—Held non-gazetted appts. from 1st Feb., 1904; asst. dist. supt., Jan., 1920; offg. dist. supt., June, 1920; confd., Jan., 1924; ret'd., Aug., 1934.

BACON, BERNARD MATTHEW, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag., United Provinces) (b. 5th Aug., 1909).—Educated at Cardinal Vaughan School, Kensington; Trinity Hall, Cambridge, and School of Oriental Studies, London; apptd. after exam. of 1932; arrived in India, Nov., 1933, and served in the United Provinces as asst. mag. and collr.; asst. pol. agent, Nasirabad, Oct., 1936.

BACON, ROGER NOEL, O.B.E., Capt., I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 25th Dec., 1900).—First commn., 16th July, 1920; in milty. employ to 15th Oct., 1927; asst. pol. agent, N. Waziristan, Nov., 1929; asst. commr., Charsadda, July, 1931, and again, Apr., 1933; asst. dir. intel., Govt. of India, Dec., 1933; on spl. duty with Mohmand force, Sept., 1935; O.B.E., June, 1936; dep. commr., Hazara, Sept., 1937; asst. pol. agent, S. Waziristan, Dec., 1937.

BADAMI, SURCHANDRA PURUSHOTTAMDAS, B.A., LL.B., late Judicial dept., Bombay (b. 25th June, 1875). Joined the dept. 12th Oct., 1905; sub. judge, Nov., 1907; judge, small causes ct., Oct. 1928; ret'd. June, 1930.

BADAN SINGH, M.Sc., LL.B., Indian Police (b. 23rd June, 1901).—Joined the service as asst. supt., United Provs., on 17th Aug., 1925; offg. supt., July, 1928; and again, Mar., 1933.

BADENOCH, ALEXANDER CAMERON, C.S.I., C.I.E., M.A., Indian C.S. (dep. auditor genl. in India) (b. 2nd July, 1889).—Educ. at Dunfermline High Sch., Edinburgh Univ., and Balliol Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1911; arrived, 23rd Nov., 1912, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; sec.,

municipal commee., Amritsar, April, 1917; spl. duty, Punjab civil sectt., May, 1918; offg. under-sec. to govt., finl. dept., June, 1918; confirmed, Dec., 1918; dep. acct.-gen., Punjab, March to May, 1919; offg. acct.-gen., Central Prov., Oct., 1919; ditto, Calcutta, Jan., 1923; acct.-genl., post and tels., Calcutta, Jan., 1926; ditto, Delhi, Oct., 1926; acct. genl., central revenues, Nov., 1928; offg. dir. of comml. audit, May, 1929; dir. rly. audit, Apr., 1930; C.I.E., June, 1931; offg. dep. auditor-genl. in India, Apr., 1931; and again, Nov., 1933; confd., May, 1932; offg. auditor genl. in India, Apr., 1933; and again, July, 1935; C.S.I., Feb., 1937.

BADHWAR, G. C. (see Gokul Chand Badhwar).

BADOCK, RONALD WALTER, Ind. Fin. Dept. (examr., local fund accts., Burma), (b. 21st Jan., 1886).—Joined the service, 20th Oct., 1910; asst. acct.-genl., Nov., 1911; examr., local fund accts., Burma, April, 1923.

BAGSHAWE, EDWARD LEONARD, C.I.E. D.S.O., O.B.E., late India Posts and Telegraphs (b. 15th Nov., 1876).—Trained at R.I.E. Coll.; joined the telegraph service, 1st Oct., 1897; as asst. supt.; supt., April, 1910; transferred to field service, March, 1915 (asst. dir. of telegraphs, Mesopotamia Field Force, April, 1915; dir. of telegraphs, ditto, May, 1916; mentioned in despatches; C.I.E., Aug., 1916; supt., Madras divn., May, 1919; O.B.E., June, 1919; dep. chief engr., telephones, April, 1922; dir. of tel. engrg., Western circle, May, 1925; offg. ch. engr., telegraphs, Aug., 1925; confd., Jan., 1926; ret'd., Oct., 1931.

BAGULEY, JOHN MINTY, B.A., Barr. Indian C.S. (judge, high ct., Rangoon) (b. 21st June, 1880).—Educ. at St. Paul's Sch., and Pembroke Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1903; arrived 28th Nov., 1904, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; dist. judge, Oct., 1916; actg. judge, high ct., Ran goon, May, 1924; confd., Sept., 1927.

BAHL, MOHAN LAL, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Bihar) (b. 10th Oct., 1900).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Bihar and Orissa, on 29th Mar., 1925; offg. exec. engr., Oct., 1931; confd., Oct., 1934.

BAIG, MIRZA OSMAN ALI, Capt., I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 9th Jan., 1904).—First commn., 31st Jan., 1924; in milty. employ until 11th Dec., 1930; asst. pol. agent, Sibi, Feb., 1933; ditto, Zhob, Oct., 1934; asst. pol. agent, Mekran, May, 1935.

BAIG, MIRZA SIKANDER ALI, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 22nd Sept., 1909).—Educ. at Clifton College, Trinity College, Cambridge, and the School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 10th Oct., 1934; arrived in India, Nov., 1934, and served in Punjab as asst. commr.; sub-divl. offcr., Mar., 1937.

BAIJNATH KHATTRI, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., United Provs.)—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., United Provs., 31st Oct., 1925; offg. exec. engr., Feb., 1931; confd., Oct., 1935.

BAIKIE, HUGH MACANDREW, B.Sc., Indian State Rlys. (exec. engr., E.B. Rly.) (b. 7th Sept., 1889).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1913; on milty. duty from April, 1916, to May,

1919; asst. exec. engr., Feb., 1921; exec. engr., Nov., 1922; offg. dep. agent (works), E.B. rly., Apl., 1935; offg. dep. ch. engr., Apl., 1936.

BAILEY, ARTHUR CHARLES JOHN, C.I.E., Indian Police (dep. inspr.-genl., Bombay) (b. 2nd Oct., 1886).—Joined the service as asst. supt. of police, 24th Nov., 1906; supt. of police, Jan., 1918; awarded King's Police Medal, 1st Jan., 1920; offg. dep. inspr.-genl., Feb., 1930; and again, July, 1933; confd., Jan., 1934; C.I.E., June, 1931.

BAILEY, ARTHUR HERBERT, late Central Provs., C.S., (b. 20th Feb., 1875).—Joined the service, 2nd March, 1897; sub-judge, Jan., 1908; dep. commr., Dec., 1924; ret'd., Feb., 1930.

BAILEY, CHARLES HUGH VERNON, late Indian State Rlys. (G.I.P. Rly.) (b. 6th April, 1875).—Joined the service, 6th July, 1893; offg. asst. traffic supt., April, 1909; confd., Jan., 1911; dist. traffic supt., July, 1917; asst. transportation supt., Nov., 1922; offg. divl. ditto, Oct., 1927; confd., Mar., 1929; ret'd., Apl., 1932.

BAILEY, FREDERICK MARSHMAN, C.I.E., Lt.-Col., I.A., late Indian Political Service (b. 3rd Feb., 1882).—First commn. dated 28th July, 1900; on mil. duty until Dec., 1905, when appointed offg. British trade agent, Gyantse; asst. to pol. officer in Sikkim and asst. pol. officer, Chumbi, Dec., 1906; British trade agent, Gyantse, Jan., 1908; asst. to agent to gov.-gen. in Rajputana, July, 1909; pol. officer, United Prov., Aug., 1911; served with Abor expedn. from Oct., 1911, to Mar., 1912; pol. officer, Assam, Nov., 1912, to May, 1914; C.I.E., Jan., 1915; asst. commr., Kohat, Jan., 1916; ditto, Thal sub-divn., Mar., 1916; ditto, Kohat, May, 1916; ditto, Charsada, Aug., 1916; on spl. duty, Persian Gulf, March, 1917; spl. duty with Kashgar Mission, from Feb., 1918, to May, 1920; pol. officer in Sikkim, June, 1921; pol. agent in Baghelkhand, Oct., 1930; offg. resdt., Baroda, Mar., 1932; ditto, Kashmir, July, 1932; H.B.M.'s minister, Nepal, Feb., 1935; ret'd., Apl., 1938.

BAILEY, GEORGE HUBERT PARKE, Indian Police (supt., Madras) (b. 2nd Jan., 1902).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Madras, on 31st Dec., 1922; offg. dist. supt., Apl., 1929; offg. dep. commr., Jan., 1934; supt., Dec., 1935; Indian Police Medal, Jan., 1936.

BAILEY, WILLIAM ALFRED, B.A., Indian Forest Service (consvr., United Provs.) (b. 10th June, 1888).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., on 13th Dec., 1912; dep. consvr., Dec., 1920; services placed at disposal of railway board, Simla, from Oct., 1927, to Novr., 1929; offg. consvr., Mar., 1931; services placed at disposal of the Govt. of India, dept. of educn., health and lands, Feb.-Oct., 1935; offg. consvr., May, 1936; confd., Mar., 1937.

BAINES, CUTHBERT EDWARD, B.A., late India Office (b. 12th June, 1879).—Educ. at St. Paul's Sch., and Corpus Christi Coll., Oxford; apptd. junr. clerk, finl. dept., 13th March, 1903; resdt. clerk, April, 1904, to March, 1906; transf. to mil. dept., Jan., 1910; reading clerk to council, Jan., 1910, to March, 1911; senr. clerk, mil. dept., March, 1911; ditto, rev. and stat. dept., Oct., 1911; on mily. service July, 1916; attached to the Ministry of Food, Feb. to Nov., 1918; principal, April, 1921; transferred to public and judl. dept., June, 1923; ditto, economic and overseas dept., Aug., 1926; ret'd., Mar., 1936.

BAINI PRASHAD, D.Sc. (Edin. and Punjab) F.R.S.E., F.L.S., F.Z.S., Zoological Survey of India (dir.), (b. 13th Mar., 1894).—Apptd. supt. of fisheries, Bengal, Bihar and Orissa, 1917; offg. dir. ditto, 1918; asst. supt., zoological survey of India, 1920, and again 1921; offg. supt. ditto, 1920, and again 1923; offg. dir. ditto, 1924, 1927, and again Mar., 1929; confd., Apl., 1933.

BAIRD, ROY FEARON, M.R.C.S., L.R.C.P., B.A., Col., I.M.S. (ret'd.).—First commn., 28th Jan., 1898; apptd. offg. civil surgn., United Provs., July, 1906; asst. plague officer, ditto, Aug., 1907; chief plague officer, Feb., 1908; civil surgn. (temp.) and ditto, March, 1909; civil surgn. (temp.) and supt., dist. jail, April, 1909; confd. as civil surgn., Aug., 1909; on mil. duty Sept., 1914, to March, 1920; offg. inspr.-gen. of civil hosp., United Provs., Nov., 1923, to July, 1924, and again, Oct., 1926; confd., March, 1927; ret'd., Mar., 1929.

BAJPAI, SIR GIRJA SHANKAR, K.B.E., C.I.E., B.A., B.Sc., Indian C.S. (sect. to govt. of India, dept. of educ., &c.) (b. 3rd April, 1891).—Educ. at Allahabad and Merton Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1914; arrived, 25th Nov., 1915, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr. (jt. mag.). May, 1918; on special duty as sec. to the Right Hon. V. S. Srinivasa Shastri, April, 1921, to Nov., 1922; C.B.E., Jan., 1923; under-sec. to govt. of India, dept. of educ., health and lands, Sept., 1923; offg. dep. sec., ditto, March, 1924; confd., June, 1926; C.I.E., July, 1926; offg. sec., ditto, Dec., 1927; jt. secty., ditto, Nov., 1929; jt. secty., British Indian delegation, round-table conf., London, Nov., 1930-Jan., 1931; mag. and collr., Oct., 1931; on spl. duty to S. Africa, Dec., 1931; secty. to govt. of India, dept. of educn., Aug., 1932; K.B.E., June, 1935; temp. member, govr.-genls.' exec. council, Sept., 1935 to Jan., 1936.

BAJPAI, SARDA SHANKAR, Indian C.S. (jt. mag., United Provs.) (b. 14th Aug., 1900).—Educ. at Dulwich and Balliol Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 22nd Oct., 1925; arrived 21st Dec., 1925, and served in the United Provinces as asst. mag.; jt. mag., March, 1928; asst. collr., Madras, Aug., 1929; ditto, Calcutta, Oct., 1930; offg. sess. and sub-judge, Sept., 1932; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Apl., 1934.

BAJPAI, UMA SHANKAR, Judicial Dept., United Provs. (judge, high ct., Allahabad) (b. 22nd Aug., 1884).—Joined the service as govt. advocate, 6th Apl., 1927; offg. judge, high ct., Allahabad, Mar., 1931; and again, Oct., 1932; addl. judge, ditto, variously from July, 1933; judge, ditto, Apl., 1937.

BAKER, ALFRED HENRY, O.B.E.—Apptd. prinpl. engr. and ship-surveyor and suptg. engr. to govt. of Burma, 14th April, 1924; ret'd., Oct., 1928.

BAKER, ERNEST BRIAN HINDLEY, B.A. (Oxon), Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 13th Sept., 1904).—Educ. at Westminster, and Christ Church Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 19th Oct., 1927; arrived, Dec., 1927, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. mag. and collr., Aug., 1933; offg. dist. and sess. judge, June, 1934; and gain, Feb., 1936; attd. govt. of India legisl. dept., Nov., 1937.

BAKER, HUGH CUTHBERT, B.A., Indian C.S. (secty., lands and rev. dept., Burma) (b. 16th Nov., 1901).—Educ. at Campbell Coll., Belfast, and Trinity Coll., Dublin; joined the service, 22nd Oct., 1926; arrived Dec., 1926, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; offg. under secty. to govt., home and pol. dept., Mar., 1929; offg. settlement officer, Moultmein, Apl., 1932; dep. secty., fin. dept., Burma, Dec., 1936 to Dec., 1937; secty., lands and rev. dept., Dec., 1937.

BAKER, JOHN ALFRED, C.I.E., M.Sc., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 14th May, 1882).—Trained at the R.I.E. Coll.; apptd. asst. engr., Central Provs., 1st Oct., 1904; under-sec. to chief commr. in public works dept., March, 1908, to July, 1911; exec. engr., Oct., 1912; supt. engr., Sept., 1920; offg. chief engr. to govt., Central Provs., Feb., 1925; C.I.E., June, 1927; retd., Mar., 1935.

BAKER, JOHN LAW, late Indian Forest Service (b. 5th Nov., 1878).—Arrived, 13th Dec., 1900, and served as asst. consvr., prov. sub. dep. consvr., Aug., 1905; confd., Jan., 1909; offg. consvr., Burma, June, 1920; confd., April, 1922; retd. June, 1929.

BAKER, LEONARD YORK, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr.) (b. 30th Jan., 1903).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., United Provs., 18th Oct., 1926; exec. engr., Oct., 1935.

BAKER, PERCY NEVILLE HUMPHREY, A.M.I.C.E., A.M.I.M.E., Indian State Ry's. (transpn. supt.) (b. 19th Dec., 1888).—Joined the service, 7th July, 1922; asst. supt., Feb., 1925; transpn. supt. (power) E.I. Ry., Aug., 1934.

BAKER, Sir WILLIAM THOMAS WEBB, Kt., B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 6th Dec., 1873).—Educ. at Rugby, and Exeter Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1896; arrived, 11th Dec., 1897, and served in Bombay as asst. collr. and mag.; 2nd asst., Feb., 1906; 1st asst., Jan., 1910; judge and sess. judge, May, 1914; services lent to govt. of Central Prov. from March, 1923; judl. commr., Central Prov., Sept., 1923; offg. judl. commr., Bombay, April, 1926; addl. judge, high ct., Bombay, Nov., 1926; offg. judge, ditto, June, 1927; confd., Jan., 1929; offg. ch. justice, high ct., Bombay, Feb., 1933; retd., Dec., 1933; knighted, Jan., 1934.

BAKHLE, DATTAPRASANNA SADASHIVA, B.A., Indian C.S. (under secty., home dept., govt. of India) (b. 5th Dec., 1907).—Educ. at Bombay University, London School of Economics and London School of Oriental Studies; joined the service, 10th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; under secty., home dept., govt. of India, Mar., 1935.

BAKHT YAWAR ALI, M.A., Indian Police (b. 29th June, 1901).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Punjab, on 11th July, 1924; offg. supt., Dec., 1932.

BAKSH, ALLAH (see Allah Baksh).

BAKSH, RAHIM (see Rahim Baksh).

BAKSH, SHAHABUDDIN KHUDA (see Shahabuddin, K.B.).

BAKSHI, JAGANANDA, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Orissa) (b. 15th Oct., 1897).—Joined the service, 1st Nov., 1921; asst. exec. engr., Nov., 1922; offg. exec. engr., May, 1928; confd., Oct., 1931.

BAKSHI SINGH, SIDHU BHAI, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab, (b. 3rd Sept., 1892).—Joined the service, Sept., 1914; asst. engr., Sept., 1915; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1924.

BAKSI, GIRIJA BHUSHAN, M.A. (Cal.), B.A. (Oxon), Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Central Provs.), (b. 15th Jan., 1895).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 30th Nov., 1923; dep. consvr., Sept., 1927.

BAKSI, NAGENDRABHUSAN, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. dollr., Bihar) (b. 30th Nov., 1901).—Educ. at Calcutta Univ. and St. Catherine's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 28th Oct., 1925; arrived 6th Dec., 1925, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. dep. commr., Dec., 1933; spec. offer., co-op. dept., Jan., 1937.

BAL, NARAYANA KRISHNA, Lt.-Col., M.C., I.M.S. (dist. medl. officer, Madras) (b. 10th Sept., 1885).—First commn. dated 25th Jan., 1913; in milty. employ until 19th Nov., 1923; civil surg., Nov. 1926; dist. medl. officer, April, 1927.

BALACHANDRA KOMAN, MALIKAYAL CHANDAPPA, B.A., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Madras) (b. 14th May, 1897).—Educ. at Madras Univ. and Queen's Coll., Camb.; joined the service, 1st Nov., 1923; arrived, 23rd Nov., 1923, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; under sec. to govt., development dept., Mar., 1928; offg. dep. secty., local self-govt. dept., Mar., 1931; sub-collr., Jan., 1932; dist. and sess. judge, May, 1935.

BALAKRISHNA AYYAR, PANDUKARAN VENKU, B.A., Indian C.S. (sub. collr. and jt. mag., Madras) (b. 26th Sept., 1900).—Educ. at Madras Univ. and Oxford (non-collegiate); joined the service, 7th Dec., 1925, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; sub. collr. and jt. mag., Jan., 1927.

BALAKRISHNA PILLAI, VELLAYAMBALAM KRISHNA, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Orissa) (b. 27th Sept., 1901).—Educ. at Madras Univ. and Exeter Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 22nd Oct., 1925; arrived, 7th Dec., 1925, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. mag. and collr., May, 1932; offg. dep. commr., Nov., 1935; cane commr., Nov., 1937.

BALAKRISHNAMURTI, DUVVURI, Indian Agric. Service (b. Dec., 1876).—Joined the service, 18th Sept., 1901; offg. asst. dir. of agric., Dec., 1915; confd., Nov., 1916; prof. of agric., Coimbatore, June, 1922; I.A.S. from 29th Oct., 1924; dep. dir. of agric., Oct. 1925.

BALARAMADAS, NYAPATI, late Judicial dept., Madras (b. 24th Oct., 1878).—Joined the service as offg. dist. munsif., 24th June, 1904; confd., July, 1905; sub-judge, Oct., 1922; dist. and sess. judge, Dec., 1928; retd., Oct., 1933.

BALBIR SINGH, KUNWAR, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., United Provs.) (b. 12th Oct., 1894).—Joined the service, 14th Sept., 1918; asst. engr., Sept., 1919; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1924; exec. engr., Sept., 1928.

BALBIR SINGH, SARDAR, Indian Police (b. 20th Sept., 1912).—Apptd. asst. supt. Punjab, on probn., Feb., 1937.

BALDOCK, WILLIAM HENRY, Indian Police (supt., United Provs.) (b. 6th Aug., 1895).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 15th March, 1921; offg. supt., May, 1924; confd., Sept., 1930.

BALDWIN, ARTHUR CHARLES JOHN, M.A., late Indian Educ. Service (b. 21st Sept., 1882).—Educ. at Cheltenham, St. John's Coll., Oxford, and La Sorbonne, Paris; joined the service, 16th Dec., 1911, and served as principal, Rangoon, Collegiate Sch.; on mil. duty, Apl., 1915, to Feb., 1919; educ. inspr., Rangoon, Feb., 1919; asst. dir. of public instrn., Burma, Apl., 1924; retd., Oct., 1936.

BALKISHAN KAPUR, LALA, B.A., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 27th Nov., 1896).—Joined the service, 22nd Nov., 1920; asst. exec. engr., Nov., 1921; offg. exec. engr., April, 1929; confd., Oct., 1932.

BALL, EDMUND LANCASTER, B.A., India Audit Office (auditor) (b. 24th April, 1883).—Educ. at City of London School, and Christ Church, Oxford; apptd. junior clerk, store dept., 1st March, 1907; transf. to India audit office, Aug., 1907; senr. clerk, Feb., 1915; asst. to auditor, Dec., 1921; auditor, Mar., 1934.

BALL, GEORGE FALCONER, M.C., B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Burma) (b. 7th Apl., 1893).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 26th Jan., 1921; dep. consvr., Feb., 1924; offg. consvr., Nov., 1936.

BALL, GEORGE WILFRED MORTON, B.Sc., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 1st June, 1886).—Joined the service as asst. engr. on 1st Oct., 1908; exec. engr., Oct., 1916; under-sec. to govt., irrigation branch, Nov., 1927; retd., Mar., 1933.

BALL, Rev. HENRY, M.A. Indian Eccles. Establ. (junr. chaplain, Bombay) (b. 28th Aug., 1899).—Apptd. chaplain on probation, 30th Nov., 1928; confd., Nov., 1930.

BALL, HENRY FREDERICK, M.C., M.A., late Indian C.S. (Bombay) (b. 13th May, 1891).—Educ. at Blundell's School, Tiverton, and Sidney Sussex Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1913; arrived, 28th Nov., 1914, and served in Bombay as asst. collr. and mag.; on mil. duty, March, 1915, to April, 1919; under-sec. to govt., rev., &c., depts., July, 1920; asst. regtr. Co-operative Societies, Nov., 1921; actg. supt., Land Records, Aug., 1923; offg. collr., dist. mag. and pol. agent, March, 1926; offg. collr. of Bombay and supt. of stamps, June, 1927; offg. dep. sec., to govt., finance dept., April, 1928; confd. Sept., 1930; retd., Nov., 1931.

BALLARD, BASIL WOODS (see Woods-Ballard).

BALMUKUND, RAI BAHADUR, Indian Service of Engrs. (suptg. engr., Bihar) (b. 1st Mar., 1884).—Joined the service, 23rd Sept., 1906; asst. engr., Sept., 1907; exec. engr., Sept., 1918; offg. suptg. engr., Feb., 1933; confd., Mar., 1934; temp. dep. ch. engr., irrig. dept., Bihar and Orissa, Mar., 1934.

BALWANT NAG SINGH, Indian Service of Engineers (asst. exec. engr., United Provs.).—Joined the service as engr. student, 25th Aug., 1930; asst. exec. engr., Aug., 1931.

BALWANT SINGH, GAREWAL, SARDAR SAHIB SARDAR, B.A., Punjab Civil Service (b. 2nd Nov., 1892).—Extra asst. commr., Punjab, Oct., 1915; sub-div. offcr. (subs. Prov.), Oct., 1936.

BALWANT SINGH, SHIHN, SARDAR A.M.I.E.(Ind.), late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 30th Aug., 1889).—Joined the service, 15th Sept., 1913; asst. engr., Sept., 1914; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1923; retd., Sept., 1936.

BAMBAWALE, BHARGAO AMRIT, B.A., Indian Civil Service (asst. commr., Central Provs.) (b. 3rd Nov., 1903).—Educ. at Univ. of Allahabad, and St. John's Coll., Cambridge. Joined the service 26th Oct., 1926; arrived 5th Dec., 1926, and served in the Central Provs. as asst. commr.; under-sec. to govt., C.P., March, 1930; offg. dep. commr., Feb., 1933.

BAMBAWALE, TRIMBAK AMRIT, Indian Police (dist. supt. Central Provs.) (b. 23rd Mar., 1899).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt. on 5th May, 1920; offg. dist. supt., April, 1923; confd., Aug., 1928.

BAMBERGER, ALBERT EDWARD, India Office (asst. to pol. A.D.C.) (b. 7th Feb., 1894).—Apptd. clerical officer, 28th Oct., 1921; higher clerical officer, July, 1935; asst. to pol. A.D.C., July, 1935.

BAMFORD PERCIVAL CLIFFORD, C.I.E., Indian Police (dep. inspr.-genl., Bengal) (b. 28th April, 1886).—Joined the service as asst. supt. on 8th Dec., 1906; supt., July, 1917; on deputation as dep. dir. intell. bureau, govt. of India, from Nov., 1924; offg. dir., ditto, Apl., 1934; awarded King's Police Medal, 1925; C.I.E., June, 1931; dep. inspr.-genl., Nov., 1931.

BAMJEE, SORAB DINSHAW, B.Sc., Indian State Railways (exec. engr., E.I. rly.) (b. 30th Nov., 1889).—Joined the service, 4th Mar., 1914; resdt. engr., E.I. rly., Mar., 1922; exec. engr., ditto, Jan., 1928.

BAN, BINDRA (see Bindra Ban).

BANARJI, AGHORE NATH, B.L., Judl. dept., Orissa (b. 16th Mar., 1888).—Apptd. dist. and sess. judge, 5th Nov., 1929.

BANARJI, AMIYA CHARAN, M.A., M.Sc., Indian Educl. Service (b. 23rd Sept., 1891).—Apptd. prof. of mathematics, Muir Central Coll., Allahabad, 19th July, 1920; with Allahabad Univ. from 1st July, 1922.

BANARJI, BHOLA NATH, M.A., B.L., Rai Bahadur, Indian Police (supt., Bengal) (b. 5th Dec., 1883).—Joined the service as proby. dep. supt., 20th May, 1908; confd. May, 1910; supt. (s.p.t.), Dec., 1919; confd., Feb., 1921; offg. dep. inspr.-genl., Apl., 1932; Indian Police Medal, 1937.

BANARJI, BHUPENDRA NATH, Rai Bahadur, late Indian Police (b. 1882).—Joined the service 22nd May, 1905; held non-gazetted appt., prior to 13th Mar., 1919; offg. asst. commr., Mar., 1919; confd., Aug. 1920; offg. dep. commr., Apl., 1926; confd., Dec., 1926; awarded King's Police Medal, Jan., 1934; retd. Oct., 1937.

BANARJI, DURGADAS, M.A., A.I.E.E., late India Posts and Telegraphs (b. 22nd Mar., 1875).—Joined the service as apprentice asst. supt., 28th May, 1897; asst. supt., May, 1898; supt.,

April, 1911; dep. postmaster-genl., Jan., 1915; divl. engr., tels., March, 1923; dir., tel. engrg., Oct., 1925; offg. postmaster genl., Bombay, March, 1927; dir. tele. engrg., Bengal and Assam Circle; ret'd., Mar., 1930.

BANARJI, JATINDRA MOHAN, Rai Bahadur, late Bengal Civil Service (b. Aug., 1881).—Joined the service as proby. dep. magte. and dep. collr., 26th Aug., 1902; confd., May, 1903; magte. and collr., Aug., 1929; ret'd., Aug., 1934.

BANARJI, KSHIROD GOPAL (see Kshirod Gopal, B.).

BANARJI, RAGHABENDRA NATH, B.A., B.L., Indian Police (supt.) (b. 2nd April, 1893).—Joined the service, 20th Jan., 1917; apptd. to I.P. as supt., Bengal, Oct., 1935.

BANARJI, SHAILENDRA NATH, RAI BAHADUR, B.A., B.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 13th Jan., 1881).—Joined the service 30th Jan., 1905; asst. engr., Jan., 1906; exec. engr., Jan., 1914; offg. suptg. engr., March, 1921; confd., April, 1926; offg. ch. engr., Feb., 1931; ret'd., Jan., 1936.

BANARJI, TRIDIB NATH, M.B. (prof. med. coll., Patna) (b. 18th Mar., 1890).—Joined the service as asst. surg., 1st Sept., 1915; prof., med. coll., Patna, Dec., 1925.

BANARSI DAS, P.M.S. Supt. Mental Hospital, Agra (b. 1st Apl., 1887).—Civil surg. Mar., 1933; supt., Mental Hospital, Agra, May, 1934.

BANERJEE, ABHAYA CHARAN, M.A., late India Posts and Tels. (b. 10th Sept., 1876).—Joined the service, 2nd June, 1899; asst. supt., June, 1900; supt., March, 1912; divl. engr., tels., Aug., 1920; offg. dep. chief engr., tels., Feb., 1925; dir. tel. engrg., Dec., 1925; dep. ch. engr. (phones), Dec., 1927; offg. postmaster-genl. March, 1928; dir. tel. engrg. eastern circle, Nov., 1928; dep. ch. engr., tels., Apl., 1930; ret'd. Sept. 1931.

BANERJEE, BAMA CHARAN, M.A., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 3rd Nov., 1893).—Joined the service, 2nd Sept., 1916; asst. acct.-genl., posts and tels., Mar., 1929; dep., ditto, Feb., 1930; exr. local fund accts., Central Provs., Sept., 1930; exr., local fund accts., Bihar and Orissa, Apl., 1934; dep. acct.-genl., Bengal, Sept., 1936.

BANERJEE, BHABO NATH, M.Sc., Ph.D., late Meteorological Dept. (b. 15th Aug., 1895).—Joined the service as meteorologist, 11th Jan., 1923; ret'd., April, 1935.

BANERJEE, HIRANMAY, B.A. (Cal.), Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. coll., Bengal) (b. 5th Sept., 1905).—Educ. at University of Calcutta and School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 9th Oct., 1929; arrived Nov., 1929, and served in Bengal as asst. coll. and mag.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Nov., 1930; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Apl., 1936.

BANERJEE, NARENDRA NATH, India Posts and Tels. (dir., tels.) (b. 25th Sept., 1885).—Joined the service, 26th Sept., 1907; asst. supt., Aug., 1910; asst. divl. engr., Feb., 1921; divl. engr., Feb., 1926; offg. dir. tel. engrg., June, 1931; ditto, Bombay, Sept., 1932; ditto, Punjab, May, 1934; offg. dir. tels., Mar., 1935; confd., May, 1935.

BANERJEE, RABINDRA NATH, M.A. (Cal.), B.A. (Cantab.), Indian C.S. (secty. to govt., local self govt. dept., Central Provs.) (b. 1st Feb., 1895).—Educ. at Calcutta Univ. and Emmanuel Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 22nd March, 1920; arrived, 20th May, 1920, and served in Central Provs. as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., April, 1925; regr. of co-op. societies and of indus., Jan., 1929; dep. commr. and ditto, Feb., 1930; secty. to govt., C.P., rev. dept., Dec., 1933; ditto, local self govt. dept., Nov., 1936; secty. to govt., Apl., 1937.

BANERJEE, SANTOSH KUMAR, Rai Bahadur, Dept. of Indus. and Labour (asst. secty., lab. dept.) (b. 7th Sept., 1883).—Joined the service, 14th Nov., 1904; offg. asst. secty., Govt. of India dept. of indus. and labour, Sept., 1928; confd., June, 1930; ditto, lab. dept., Nov., 1937.

BANERJEE, SATYENDRA MOHAN, M.A., Indian C.S. (secty., bd. of rev., Bengal) (b. 14th Dec., 1898).—Educ. at Calcutta Univ. and Cambridge Univ. (non-collegiate); joined the service, 25th Oct., 1923; arrived, 3rd Dec., 1923 and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and coll.; and sub-divl. officer, May, 1925; offg. magte. and coll., Mar., 1929; offg. secty., bd. of rev., Bengal, Feb., 1935; confd., Aug., 1935.

BANERJEE SHAMANANDA, B.A., B.Sc. (Cal.), B.Sc. (Tech., Manchester Univ.) (div. engr., wireless) Indian Posts and Telegraphs (b. 29th May, 1897).—Joined the service, 2nd Apl., 1925, as asst. div. engr., wireless (on probn.), confd., Oct., 1925; div. engr., wireless, Apl., 1928.

BANERJEE, SUDHANU KUMAR, M.Sc., D.Sc. (Calcutta), Meteorological Dept., (meteorologist) (b. 27th Apl., 1893).—Apptd. dir., Bombay and Alibagh observatories, 11th Apl., 1922; meteorologist, Jan., 1927; offg. dir.-gen. of observatories, Mar., 1933; and again, July, 1936.

BANERJEE, SURENDRA NATH, RAI BAHADUR, I.S.O., B.A., Commerce Dept., Govt. of India (dep. dir. of comm. intelligence and statistics) (b. Nov., 1881).—Held ministerial appts. from 5th June, 1905; supt., Mar., 1911; asst. secty., bd. of industries and munitions, Mar., 1920; ditto, dept. of industries, Feb., 1921; ditto, commerce dept., Mar., 1924; dep. dir. of comm. intelligence and statistics, May, 1932; I.S.O., May, 1937.

BANERJEE, SURENDRA NATH, Rai Bahadur, B.A. (b. 20th Mar., 1883).—Apptd. asst. commr. of income tax, Bengal, Feb., 1926; offg. commr., Feb., 1935.

BANERJEE, UPENDRA LAL, M.A., DIWAN BAHADUR, late Indian Finance Dept.—Joined the service, 2nd May, 1894; asst. acct.-genl., Bengal, July, 1914; dep. ditto, May, 1925; offg. comptroller, Assam, Feb., 1927; ret'd., July, 1928.

BANERJEE, UPENDRA NATH, Indian State Rlys. (dist. loco. supt., E.B. rly.) (b. 2nd Nov., 1892).—Joined the service, 4th Jan., 1920, as asst. loco. supt.; dist. loco. supt. E.B. rly. (prov.), Aug., 1934.

BANERJI, SIR ALBION RAJ KUMAR, Kt., C.S.I., C.I.E., M.A., late Indian C.S.—Educ. at Calcutta Univ., and Balliol Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1894; arrived, 19th Dec., 1895, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; head asst., Oct., 1904; transfed. to foreign service, as diwan of Cochin, May, 1907;

C.I.E., Dec., 1911; collr., and dist. mag., Jan., 1915; addl. ordinary member of council of H.H. the Maharajah of Mysore, from March, 1916; C.S.I., June, 1921; retd., May, 1922; Kt., June, 1925.

BANERJI, AMRITA LAL, RAI BAHADUR, I.S.O., B.A., Legis. dept. Govt., of India, (asst. regr.) (b. 20th Jan., 1880).—Joined the service, 28th Nov. 1904, and held non-gazetted appts. to 31st Oct. 1914; supt., Nov. 1914; asst. secty., Aug., 1927; I.S.O., June, 1936; asst. regr. fed. ct., India, Nov., 1937.

BANERJI, ANIL CHANDRA (see Anil C.B.).

BANERJI, BIBHUTI BHUSHAN, B.A., Indian Police (asst. supt., Orissa).—Apptd. asst. supt. on probn., Bihar and Orissa, 27th Jan., 1934; confd., Dec., 1934.

BANERJI, JYOTIR MOY, Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr.) (b. 24th Oct., 1904).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., Madras, 19th Nov., 1928; dep. consvr., Nov., 1933.

BANERJI, RADHA BINODE, M.A., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 10th Mar., 1866).—Joined the service, 12th May, 1919; attd. officr., acct.-genl., C.P., June and Nov., 1930; asst. A.G., C.P., June 1930; deputy acct.-genl., Bengal, Oct., 1937.

BANERJI, SHISHIR KUMAR, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., C.P.) (b. 21st Oct., 1913).—Educ. at D.A.V. Intermediate College, Dehra Dun, and Allahabad Univ.; joined the service, 27th Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Oct., 1937, and served in the C.P. as asst. commr.

BANNERMAN, SIR ARTHUR D'ARCY GORDON, Bart., K.C.V.O., C.I.E., Lieut.-Col., Indian Army (retd.).—First commn., 29th Aug., 1885; from April, 1893, offd. as asst. to govr.-genl.'s agent in Central India; confd., Nov., 1896; 1st asst. to ditto, May, 1897; 1st asst. to govr.-genl.'s agent in Rajputana, and chief commr., Ajmer-Merwara, Oct., 1899; offg. pol. agent in Kotah and Jhalawar, April, 1903; C.I.E., June, 1903; confd., Feb., 1905; resdt. at Jaipur and pol. agent in Alwar, Sept., 1910; special duty from Feb., 1911; C.V.O., Dec., 1911; pol. agent, E. States of Rajputana, Nov., 1913; resdt., Kashmir, Dec., 1917; retd. from I.A., Feb., 1921; pol. A.D.C. to sec. of state for India, Sept., 1921, to Sept., 1928; K.C.V.O., Jan., 1928; gentleman usher in ordinary to H.M. the King, Oct., 1928.

BANWARI LAL, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Orissa) (b. 16th Feb., 1903).—Joined the service, 5th Nov., 1924; asst. exec. engr., Nov., 1925; offg. exec. engr., July, 1931; confd., Oct., 1934.

BANWELL, GODWIN EDWARD, O.B.E., M.C., Indian Police (dist. supt., Burma) (b. 31st July, 1897).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., on 26th Jan., 1920; offg. dist. supt., Feb., 1925, confd. Nov., 1928; O.B.E., Dec., 1930; awarded King's Police Medal, Jan., 1931; pers. asst. to dep. insp.-genl. rlys., Sept., 1937.

BAPAT, SHYRAM BALKRISHNA, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 22nd Aug., 1906).—Educ. at Bombay University, Emmanuel College, Cambridge, and School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 12th Oct., 1931; arrived in India, Nov., 1931, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Mar., 1934.

BARBER, CHARLES GORDON, C.I.E., M.B.E., A.C.G.I., Indian Service of Engrs. (suptg. engr., Madras) (b. 18th Jan., 1885).—Joined the service 1st Oct., 1908, as asst. engr.; exec. engr., May, 1919; M.B.E., June, 1919; C.I.E., Jan., 1935; suptg. engr., Sept., 1936.

BARBER, CHARLES HARRISON, D.S.O., M.D., Lt.-Col., I.M.S. (retd.) (b. 10th March, 1877).—First commn., dated 30th Jan., 1904; in milty. employ to 3rd April, 1912; profir. King George's medl. coll., Lucknow, Aug., 1919; civil surg., Mar., 1921; retd., Mar., 1932.

BARBER, LEWIS, A.M.I.E.E., Indian State Rlys. (ch. electrical engr., G.I.P. Rly.) (b. 4th Mar., 1885).—Joined the service as asst. electrical engr., 22nd Nov., 1912; offg. ch. electrical engr., Sept., 1931; confd., May, 1936.

BARBER, ROBERT CECIL, Dept. of Land Records, Burma (asst. dir.) (b. 5th May, 1888).—Joined the service, 16th Dec., 1909, as asst. supt.; supt., Apl., 1914; offg. asst. dir., Nov., 1934; confd., Feb., 1935.

BARCLAY, ARCHIBALD GEORGE GRANT, A.M.I.C.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Madras) (b. 6th Aug., 1887).—Joined the service as asst. engr. on 1st Oct., 1911; exec. engr., Oct., 1919.

BARCLAY, FRANCIS CYRIL, B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 10th Oct., 1887).—Educ. at Winchester, and New Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1910; arrived in India, 2nd Dec., 1911, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; offg. asst. collr. of customs, Rangoon, June, 1917, to Jan., 1919; offg. dep. commr., from March, 1919, to April, 1920, and from Aug., 1920; retd., Dec., 1929.

BARCLAY, JOHN BUCHANAN, Indian State Rlys. (goods supt., G.I.P. Rly.) (b. 20th Aug., 1890).—Joined the service as traffic probationer, 14th Oct., 1911; asst. traffic supt., Oct., 1914; asst. traffic manager, Nov., 1922; divl. traffic manager, Aug., 1924; goods supt., Jan., 1931.

BARDSWELL, HUGH ROSSER, M.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 10th June, 1874).—Educ. at King's Coll. Sch., London, and Lincoln Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1897; arrived, 15th Dec., 1898, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; head asst. collr. and mag., Nov., 1908; sub. collr. and joint mag., May, 1910; dist. and sess. judge, July, 1915; offg. judge, high ct., Madras, July, 1930, and again, July, 1932; confd., May, 1933; retd., June, 1934.

BARING, HON. EVELYN, late Indian C.S. (b. 29th Sept., 1903).—Educ. at Winchester and New Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 22nd Oct., 1926; arrived, Dec., 1926, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and coll.; secty. to agent of govt. of India in S. Africa, July, 1929; retd., March, 1934.

BARKAT ALI, KHAN BAHADUR, Indian Railway Accts. Service (dep. chief accts. officer, N.W. Rly.) (b. 2nd Feb., 1883).—Held non-gaz. appts. from 5th June, 1903; confd. as supt., Rly. Board, Dec., 1919; accts. officer, gr. I., E.I. Rly., Nov., 1925; officer on spec. duty, N.W. Rly., Dec., 1926; Khan Bahadur, June, 1929; confd. as accts. officer, gr. I., N.W. Rly., Apl., 1929; confd. as dep. dir. of fin., Rly. Board, Apl., 1932; dep. chief accts. officer, N.W. Rly., Feb., 1937.

BARKAT ALI, MUHAMMAD, KHAN BAHADUR, B.A., India Posts and Tels. (dep. p.m.g.) (b. Aug., 1885).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1907; supt., Jan., 1909; asst. p.m.g., Punjab, July, 1930; dep. p.m.g., Bombay, May, 1934.

BARKER, ARTHUR NEAL, B.Sc., A.I.C., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Burma), (b. 15th Sept., 1898).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., on 31st Dec., 1923; dep. consvr., Nov., 1930.

BARKER, BASIL HYDE, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 24th Oct., 1906).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Burma, 23rd Nov., 1928.

BARKER, FREDERICK ALLAN, C.I.E., O.B.E., M.A., M.D., Lt.-Col., I.M.S., Jail Dept., Punjab (inspr. genl. of prisons) (b. 17th Oct., 1882).—First commn., 27th July, 1907; in mil. employ till July, 1910, when he was apptd. jail supt.; on mil. service in Egypt, Oct., 1914, to Dec., 1919; O.B.E., June, 1919; senior medical officer and civil surgeon, Port Blair, Jan., 1920; offg. inspr. genl. of prisons, Central Provs., Dec., 1925; inspr. genl. of prisons, Punjab, Oct., 1927; offg. dir. genl., I.M.S., Feb., 1935; on special duty, home dept., Govt. of India, Aug., 1935; C.I.E., Jan., 1938.

BARKER, RAYMOND THOMAS, M.B.E., late Indian Police service, (b. 22nd Oct., 1877).—Joined the service, 1st June, 1901; awarded King's Police medal, Feb., 1917; M.B.E., Jan., 1919; asst. supt., Aug., 1919; offg. supt., April, 1922; confd., Oct., 1926; ret'd., Oct., 1932.

BARKER, Sir RAYNER CHILDE, Kt., C.I.E., India Office, late Indo-European Telegraph Dept. —Entered the Indian Telegraph dept., 22nd Sept., 1879, and served as asst. supt. and supt., C.I.E., April 1889; transf'd. to I.-E. tel. dept., May, 1896, as engineer and electrician; dir., Persian section, Sept., 1898; ret'd., Nov., 1912; dir. in-chief, Indo-Euro. tel., P.W.D., India Office, Nov., 1912 to July, 1923; Kt., June, 1923.

BARKER, ROBERT, Indian Police (dist. supt.) (b. 2nd Nov., 1894).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., Burma, on 24th Nov., 1921; dist. supt., June, 1926.

BARKER, RONALD WILLIAM, O.B.E., B.A., Lt.-Col., I.A., Burma Commn. (dep. commr.), (b. 20th Sept., 1883).—Arrived 10th Oct., 1907, and employed in mil. dept. to Feb., 1912; asst. commr., Feb., 1912; on mil. service April, 1917, to Jan., 1920; offg. dep. commr., June, 1924; confd., Oct., 1924; addl. dep. commr., Port Blair, June, 1924; offg. dep. commr., ditto, June, 1924; confd., Jan., 1929; O.B.E., June, 1932.

BARKER, Sir WILBERFORCE ROSS, K.C.I.E., C.B. (b. 19th Sept., 1874).—Educ. at Marlborough Coll., and Worcester Coll., Oxford, Chancellor's English Essay Prize, 1899; Barr., Gray's Inn, 1897; served in Bd. of Educn., 1903-25; C.B., 1919; chairman, public services commn., May, 1926 to Nov., 1932; K.C.I.E., June, 1930.

BARLEE, Sir KENNETH WILLIAM, B.A., Barr., late Indian C.S. (b. 29th Nov., 1877).—Educ. at Warwick Sch. and Dublin Univ.; apptd. after exam. of 1900; arrived,
