DAS, ARJAN (see Arjan Das).

DAS, ATULANANDA, late Indian Forest Service (b. 10th Dec., 1879).—Joined the service, 14th Jan., 1900; asst. consvr., Aug., 1921; dep. consvr., Sept., 1924; retd., Dec., 1934.

DAS, BHAGWAN (see Bhagwan Das).

DAS, BHUBAN MOHAN, B.E., Rai Bahadur, late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 16th July, 1878).—Joined the service, 20th Dec., 1902; asst. engr., Dec., 1917; offg. exec. engr., Dec., 1920; confd., Sept., 1926; retd., Aug., 1933.

DAS, CEDRIC PERCY MAYA, M.A., B.Sc., Indian Agric. Service (dep. dir. of agric., United Provs.) (b. 8th Aug., 1893).—Joined the service as asst. dir. of agric. on 1st Sept., 1917; prof., agric. coll., Cawnpore, Nov., 1921; prinpl. ditto, Dec., 1925; dep. dir. of agric., United Provs., May, 1934; confd. in sel. grade, Apl., 1936.

DAS, DAYANIDHI, B.A., Rai Bahadur, late Bihar and Orissa Civil Service.—Joined the service, 29th July, 1901; dep. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1902; mag. and collr., Nov., 1924; retd., July, 1929.

DAS, DEBES CHANDRA, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Assam) (b. 1st July, 1911).—Educ. at Mitra Institution, Calcutta, University of Calcutta and School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the Service, 9th Oct., 1934; arrived in India, Nov., 1934, and served in Assam as asst. commr.

DAS, DHARM (see Dharm Das).

DAS, GOVINDA CHARAN, M.A., late Indian Finance Dept. (b. June, 1892).—Joined the service as prob., 4th Mar., 1915; asst. acct.-genl., Bombay, July, 1918; ditto, United Provs., Feb., 1921; ditto, Punjab, April, 1924; ditto, Bengal, Dec., 1926; dep. ditto, June, 1928; ditto, C.P., Sept., 1928; retd., Sept., 1934.

DAS, GURCHARN (see Gurcharn Das).

DAS, JYOTIS RANJAN, Barr., late Burma Judicial Dept. (b. 9th Mar., 1874).—Apptd. offg. judge, high ct., Rangoon, from 12th March, 1925; judge, high ct., Rangoon, Sept., 1925; retd., Mar., 1934.

DAS, MATHRA (see Mathra Das).

DAS, NABAGOPAL, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 20th Feb., 1910).—Educ. at Calcutta University, the School of Economics, London, and the School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 10th Oct.,

1932; arrived in India, Nov., 1932, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1934.

DAS, NARSINGH (see Narsingh Das).

DAS, NIRANJAN (see Niranjn Das).

DAS, PRAFULLA RANJAN, Barr., late Judl. Dept., Bihar and Orissa (b. 28th Apl., 1881).—Apptd. judge, high ct., Patna, 12th Feb., 1919; retd., Oct., 1930.

DAS, PRIA (see Pria Das).

DAS, PULIN BEHARI, M.A., late Indian Finance Dept. (b. 20th Feb., 1884).—Joined the service, 28th Feb., 1908; asst. acct.-gen., May, 1910; dep. acct.-gen., Jan., 1917; offg. dep. auditor genl. (inspn.), Feb., 1928; retd., Aug., 1934.

DAS, RADHA CHARAN, RAI BAHADUR, B.A. (dep. commr., Sambalpur) (b. 23rd Jan., 1883).—Sub.-dep. collr., Feb., 1906; dep. collr., June, 1915; magte. and collr., May, 1937.

DAS, RAM (see Ram Das).

DAS, SARADA PRASANNA, M.A., late Indian Educl. Service (Bengal) (b. July, 1876).—Held appts. in the provl. service from 15th July, 1898; apptd. profr., Presdy. Coll., Calcutta, 23rd Feb., 1921; retd., July, 1931.

DAS, SUDHANSHU KUMAR, B.A., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Bihar) (b. 3rd Sept., 1898).—Educ. at Calcutta Univ. and Sch. of Oriental Studies, London Univ.; joined the service, 30th Oct., 1922; arrived, 21st Dec., 1922, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. magte. and collr., Mar., 1929; addl. dist. and sess. judge, Feb., 1930; dist. and sess. judge, July, 1933.

DAS, SUNDER, K. (see Sunder Das, K.J.)

DAS, SURENDRA NATH, B.A., Rai Bahadur, late India Posts and Tels. (b. 18th Apl., 1877).—Joined the service, 13th April, 1898; proby. supt., Aug., 1901; supt., Feb., 1903; offg. dep. postmaster-genl., May, 1921; confd., Jan., 1923; offg. dep. dir.-genl., Mar., 1930; retd., Feb., 1931.

DAS GUPTA, KULADA CHARAN, B.A., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Bengal) (b. 3rd Jan., 1900).—Educ. at Calcutta Univ., and Magdalene Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 25th Oct., 1923; arrived, 3rd Dec., 1923, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr. and sub-divl. officer; jt. mag. and dep. collr., July, 1925; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Feb., 1929, and again, Apl., 1933; addl. ditto, Oct., 1932; confd. as dist. and sess. judge, Dec., 1934.

DAS GUPTA, PRITHWISH CHANDRA, M.A., A.C.A., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 3rd Aug., 1897).—Joined the service, 5th Dec., 1925; offg. ch. auditor, Burma rlys., May, 1935; exr., outside audit dept., Bombay, Oct., 1935; again, Apl., 1937; dep. acct.-genl., Bombay, Mar., 1937.

DAS GUPTA, SACHINDRA CHANDRA, M.A., Indian Finance Dept. (b. 2nd Aug., 1888).—Joined the service, 5th July, 1911, as profr., Dacca Coll.; asst. compt., India treasuries, March, 1916; asst. acct.-gen., posts and tels., June, 1916; dep. acct.-gen., ditto, Central Provs., May, 1926; dep. dir. of audit, May, 1927; offg. ch. pay and accts. officer, United Provs., April, 1928; offg. dep. acct.-genl.,

Punjab, May, 1930; offg. dep. ch. auditor, N.W. Rly., Mar., 1931; offg. ch. accts. officer, E.B. Rly., Sept., 1932; offg. dep. ch. accts. officer, Burma rlys., April, 1934; offg. acct. genl., Burma, June, 1935; offg. ch. auditor, N.W. rly., Mar., 1936; dep. ch. accts. officer, ditto, June, 1936; offg. acct.-genl., Bengal, Oct., 1936.

DAS GUPTA, SURENDRA NATH, M.A., Ph.D. (Cantab.), Indian Educl. Service (prinpl. Sanskrit coll.) (b. Oct., 1887).—Apptd. prof., Presdy. Coll., Calcutta, 22nd March, 1924; prinpl. Sanskrit coll., Apr., 1931.

DASH, ARTHUR JULES, C.I.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (commr., Bengal) (b. 24th Apl., 1887).—Educ. at Worcester Cathedral King's Sch., and Christ Church, Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1909; arrived in India, 30th Nov., 1910, and served in E. Bengal and Assam as asst. collr. and mag.; transf. to Bengal, April, 1912; jt. mag. and dep. collr., March, 1916; I.A.R.O. from Aug., 1915, to Dec., 1918; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Oct., 1921; dist. judge (temp.), Jan., 1923; mag. and collr., Oct., 1924; secty. to govt., dept. of educn., Dec., 1928; offg. commr., Apl., 1932; confd., Mar., 1937; C.I.E., Jan., 1938.

DASTUR, SIR HORMAZDIAR PHIROZ, Kt., B.A., LL.B., Barr., Bombay, Judicial Dept. (chief presdy. mag.) (b. 20th Mar., 1877).—Joined the dept., 4th Aug., 1923; 5th presdy. mag., Aug., 1923; 4th ditto, Feb., 1924; 3rd ditto March, 1925; chief presdy. magte., April, 1929; Kt., June, 1932.

DASTUR, JEHANGIR FARDUNJI, M.Sc., D.I.C., Indian Agric. Service (mycologist, Central Provs.). (b. 12th Sept., 1886).—Joined the service, 14th May, 1910; mycologist, Dec., 1923.

DATT, DEV (see Dev Datt).

DATT, GURU, SONDEHI (see Guru Datt, S.).

DATTA (see also Dutt).

DATTA, ABINASH CHANDRA, Income tax dept., Assam (asst. commr.) (b. 30th Jan., 1888).—Joined the service, 24th Oct., 1915; income tax officer, Jan., 1927; asst. commr., June, 1934.

DATTA, AMBICA CHARAN, Rai Bahadur, late Bengal Civil Service (b. 14th July, 1879).—Joined the service, 27th Nov., 1901; dep. magte., Nov., 1902; magte. and collr., Nov., 1928; retd., July, 1934.

DATTA, DINES CHANDRA, Indian Police (asst. supt., Assam) (b. 1st July, 1904).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., 15th May, 1928; confd., July, 1930; asst. to pol. officer, Sadiya frontier tract, Apl., 1932; offg. supt., Jan., 1936.

DATTA, GURU SADAY (see Dutt, G. S.).

DATTA, NARENDRA NATH, Babu, B.A., Bihar C.S. (dep. mag. and dep. collr.) (b. 16th April, 1883).—Joined the service, 6th Aug., 1904; dep. collr., Oct., 1906; offg. dep. commr., May, 1933.

DATTA, PARES CHANDRA, M.B., Ch.B., M.R.C.S., L.R.C.P., Indian State Railways (dist. medl. officer) (b. 31st July, 1892).—Apptd. dist. medl. officer on probn., 1st May, 1925; confd., May, 1928.

DATTA, PRAPHULLA CHANDRA, Babu, B.L., late Bengal Judl. Dept.—Joined the service, 17th May, 1904; judge, Calcutta small cause ct., Dec., 1926; retd., June, 1930.

DATTA, PROMODE CHANDRA, Rai Bahadur, C.I.E.—Apptd. member, govr's. exec. council, Assam, 31st Mar., 1934; vacated office, Mar., 1937.

DATTA, RABINDRA NATH, B.A. (Oxon.), M.Sc. (All.), Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Central Provs.) (b. 15th Sept., 1902).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., Central Provs., 14th Oct., 1927; dep. consvr., Nov., 1931.

DATTA, SISIR KUMAR, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Assam) (b. 27th Nov., 1911).—Educ. at Govt. High School Silchar, Assam; Calcutta Univ., and London School of Economics; joined the service, 14th Jan., 1937; arrived in India, 19th Feb., 1937, and served in Assam as asst. commr.

DATTA, SUDHINDRA MOHAN, B.A., Indian Police (b. 18th Mar., 1910).—Apptd. asst. supt., Assam, on probn., 15th Feb., 1934; confd., Feb., 1936.

DATTATRAYA VAMAN REGE (see Rege, D. V.).

DAUBENY, RONALD GILES, Indian Police (b. 19th July, 1907).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bihar and Orissa, 21st Nov., 1926; offg. A.D.C. to GOVR., May, 1929; pte. secy. to ditto, Apl., 1932; A.D.C. to the Viceroy, Oct., 1933; under secty. to A.G.G., Eastern States, Apl., 1936; asst. magte. and collr., Moradabad, Nov., 1936; under secty. to resdt. for Eastern States, Nov., 1937.

DAUKES, SIR CLENDON TUBERVILLE, Kt., C.I.E., Lt.-Col., I.A., retd. (b. 24th Dec., 1879).—First commn. dated 12th Aug., 1899; in mil. emp. to Dec., 1903; sup. asst. commr., Dec., 1903; pol. asst., Nov., 1904; pol. agent, Loralai, Dec., 1904; H.B.M.'s vice-consul for Seistan and Kain, March, 1906; H.B.M.'s consul, Tujbat-i-Haidari, Feb., 1907; pol. asst., Meshed, Oct., 1907; asst. to H.B.M.'s consul for Seistan and Kain, Nov., 1907; asst. for Mekran to pol. agent in Kalat, March, 1911; asst. pol. agent, Chilas, Oct., 1911; pol. agent, Gilgit, Nov., 1911; asst. pol. agent, Zhor, May, 1916; temp. reverted to mil. duty, July, 1918; on spl. duty under chief commr., Baluchistan, June, 1919; C.I.E., June, 1920; pol. agent, Loralai, April, 1921; offg. British envoy at court of Nepal, Nov., 1929; confd., June, 1931; envoy extraordinary and minister plenipotentiary at Katmandu, July, 1934; retd., Aug., 1935; knighted, Jan., 1935.

DAULATRAM, DAYALMAL (see Dayalmal, D.).

DAVE, KARUNASHANKAR NANDLAL, B.A., LL.B., Income Tax Dept., Central Provs. (asst. commr.) (b. Sept., 1885).—Joined the service, 1st Aug., 1914; income tax officer, May, 1925; offg. asst. commr., Jan., 1926; confd., Feb., 1932.

DAVID, ALAN MICHAEL, B.A., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Punjab) (b. 18th Aug., 1898).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., on 11th Dec., 1923; dep. consvr., Nov., 1924.

DAVIDSON, DAVID ALEXANDER GIBB, Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Bengal) (b. 15th May, 1898).—Joined the service, 19th May, 1922; asst. consvr., 1st Nov., 1922; dep. consvr., Nov., 1926.

DAVIDSON, JOHN, C.I.E., O.B.E., B.A. (Cantab.), late Indian Finance Dept. (b. 31st Aug., 1878).—Joined the finance dept., govt. of India, 22nd Feb., 1902; asst. acct.-gen., Burma, April, 1905; ditto, Bengal, March, 1907; ditto, and examr. of local funds accts., United Provs., May, 1908; ditto, ditto, Punjab, Oct., 1909; dep. comptr., Assam, May, 1912; on mil. service, March, 1916, to Feb., 1919; offg. dep. comptr.-gen., Feb., 1919; O.B.E., June, 1919; auditor, Govt. of India sanctions (mily.), Jan., 1922; services placed at disposal of govt. of Punjab from Sept., 1923; offg. acct.-genl., Bihar and Orissa, Nov., 1926; ditto, Burma, April, 1927; C.I.E., June, 1933; ret'd., Aug., 1933.

DAVIDSON, Sir LIONEL, K.C.S.I., B.A., late Indian C.S.—Educ. at Univ. Coll. Sch., and Balliol Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1886; arrived, 22nd Dec., 1889, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag., and acting asst. and under sec.; head asst., Feb., 1895; spl. asst. collr. and mag., Oct., 1895; under sec. to govt., Oct., 1896; sub-collr. and joint mag., Feb., 1899; sec. to land rev. commrs. Jan., 1900; commr. and dist. judge, Coorg, Nov., 1902; dist. and sess. judge, Madras, Oct., 1905; collr. and mag., March, 1906; offg. sec. to govt., rev. dept., March, 1912; C.S.I., Jan., 1913; sec. to govt., local, munpl., &c., depts., July, 1913; ditto, rev. dept., Oct., 1914; acting chief sec. to govt., Madras, April, 1916; an addl. member, govr.-genl.'s legisl. council; temp. member of exec. council, Madras, Nov., 1918; confirmed, Feb., 1919; K.C.S.I., Jan., 1921; ret'd., Aug., 1924.

DAVIES, ANDREW EVAN, Indian Police (asst. supt., Bombay) (b. 24th Mar., 1914).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt. of police, Bombay, Nov., 1933; confd., Apl., 1936.

DAVIES, ARTHUR, M.A., Barr., late Educational Dept., Madras.—Joined the service, 21st July, 1902, as offg. dep. regr., High Court, Madras; dep. regr., Dec., 1907; ditto, and sec., Madras students advisory ettee., Nov., 1912; principal, and senr. prof., Law Coll., Madras, Dec., 1913; K.-i.-H. medal, 1st class, June, 1914; ret'd., June, 1928; temp. adviser, education dept., High Commr.'s Office, Aug., 1928-Jan., 1929.

DAVIES, ARTHUR CECIL, C.I.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (secty. to govt., judl. dept., Bihar) (b. 28th May, 1889).—Educ. at St. Andrew's Coll., Dublin, and Trinity Coll., Dublin; apptd. after exam. of 1912; arrived, 13th Dec., 1913, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; under-sec. to govt., finl. and munpl. depts., Oct., 1917; offg. dep. commr., Dec., 1920; offg. dist. and sess. judge, April, 1926, confd., Sept., 1929; offg. secty. to govt., judl., dept., and supt. and remembr. legal affairs, Jan., 1932; confd., Nov., 1934; C.I.E., Feb., 1937.

DAVIES, Miss Edith ELIZABETH, late Indian Educl. Service (b. 27th Feb., 1875).—Apptd. principal, Dow Hill girls' school, Darjeeling, 1st April, 1922; ret'd., Feb., 1930.

DAVIES, EDWARD LLOYD, Office of High Commr. for India (executive officer, store dept.) (b. 18th Dec., 1883).—Apptd. 2nd class clerk, 18th Sept., 1906; transf. to office of high commr. for India, Oct., 1920; exec. officer, April, 1922.

DAVIES, HAROLD ESCOTT, B.A., Burma Office (asst. princpl.) (b. 5th Nov., 1915).—Educ. at Aldernham School, and King's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. asst. princpl., 11th Oct., 1937.

DAVIES, HENRY MERSON, V.D., Indian State Rys. (dep. ch. mechl. engr., E.I. Rly.) (b. 2nd June, 1884).—Joined the service as asst. dist. loco. supt., 2nd Nov., 1907; in milty. employ from 2nd July, 1915; mech. engr., July, 1925; pers. asst. to dep. ch. mech. engr., Nov., 1925; fuel economy officer, Nov., 1926; divl. rolling stock officer, June, 1930; offg. dep. ch. mech. engr., Nov., 1929; confd., Nov., 1933; offg. dep. ch. operating supt., power, E.I. Rly., Nov., 1933.

DAVIES, JOHN HUGH RATHBONE, Indian Police (b. 16th June, 1918).—Apptd. asst. supt. United Provs., on probn., Dec., 1937.

DAVIES, P. W. WILTON (see Wilton Davies).

DAVIES, POWYS, A.M.I.C.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 27th Jan., 1882).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1905, as asst. engr.; exec. engr., Oct., 1913; offg. suptg. engr., July, 1917; confd., May, 1928; ret'd., Sept., 1930.

DAVIES, ROBERT WILLIAM HOME, B.A., Indian C.S. (judge and sess. judge) (b. 10th Nov., 1896).—Educ. at Haileybury Coll., and Pembroke Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 30th Jan., 1922; arrived, 18th March, 1922, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; offg. collr. and supt. of stamps, May, 1924; offg. collr. and dist. mag., March, 1925; asst. magte. and collr., April, 1928; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Oct., 1932; confd., Oct., 1933; dist. and sess. judge, Aden, Oct., 1934; ditto, Kathiawar, Sept., 1936.

DAVIES, ROLAND GWYNNE, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Bombay) (b. 11th Feb., 1906).—Educ. at the Grammar School, Bradford, and Queen's College, Oxford; joined the service, 14th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.

DAVIES, VINCENT ELLIS, B.A. (Cantab.), Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bihar) (b. 3rd June, 1903).—Educ. at St. John's School, Leatherhead, and Peterhouse Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 26th Oct., 1926; arrived, 20th Dec., 1926, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. mag. and collr., May, 1933.

DAVIES, WILLIAM FREDERICK MANT, Indian Police (b. 11th July, 1907).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., Central Provs., 16th Nov., 1927; A.D.C. to govr., Central Provs., Mar., 1935.)

DAVIES-LEIGH (see under Leigh).

DAVIS, ARNOLD PERCIVAL, late Indian Forest Service (b. 18th July, 1887).—Arrived, 18th Dec., 1909, and served as asst. consvr.; dep. consvr., Dec., 1914; on mil. service, May, 1918, to June, 1919; offg. consvr., June, 1927; ret'd., Sept., 1933.

DAVIS, CHARLES KENNETH, late Burma Comm. (b. 2nd Aug., 1877).—Apptd. dep. commr. from 15th Dec., 1923, and remain

seconded for service under Rangoon dev. trust; land officer, dev. trust, March, 1924; ret'd., Oct., 1930.

DAVIS, DAVID, Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., United Provs.) (b. 11th Oct., 1893).—Joined the service as asst. consvr. on 13th Dec., 1921; dep. consvr., Oct., 1925; instructor, forest coll., Dehra Dun, Oct., 1930, to May, 1933.

DAVIS, GODFREY, Barr., Indian C.S. (judl. commr., Sind) (b. 23rd Oct., 1890).—Educ. at Univ. Coll. Sch. and Univ. Coll., London; apptd. after exam. of 1913; arrived, 28th Nov., 1914, and served in Bombay as asst. magte. and collr., asst. rembr. of legal affairs, Jan., 1920; asst. judge and addnl. sess. judge, Dec., 1922; secy. to cttee. on Bombay Stock Exchange, Sept., 1923, to Jan., 1924; offg. judge and sess. judge, June, 1924; ditto, and agent for sardars in the Deccan, Aug., 1925; offg. judge and sess. judge, June, 1926; confd., Jan., 1929; secty. to govt., legal dept., Bombay, and remembr., legal affairs, Jan., 1932; member, legisl. council, Feb., 1932; judl. commr., Sind., Dec., 1935.

DAVIS, HAROLD PERCY WHITTON, B.A., B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Bombay) (b. 7th Dec., 1893).—Joined the service, 11th Dec., 1921, as asst. consvr.; dep. consvr., Dec., 1923; instr., forest research coll., June, 1926, to Apr., 1929; offg. consvr., June, 1935.

DAVIS, Percival William, M.C., B.A., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Madras) (b. 19th July, 1897).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., on 11th Dec., 1922; dep. consvr., Nov., 1926; offg. princpl., Madras forest coll., June, 1933.

DAVIS, PERCY, Stationery and Printing Dept., Punjab (supth.) (b. 22nd Apr., 1890).—Joined the service, 3rd July, 1924, as works manager, central jail press, on probn.; confd., July, 1925; supt., Govt. printing, May, 1935.

DAVIS, REGINALD TREBY, M.R.C.V.S., Indian Veterinary Service (prin., vety. coll., Patna) (b. 10th June, 1883).—Joined the service, 31st March, 1922; vice-prin., B.V. coll., Nov., 1924; offg. dir., June, 1927; offg. princpl., B.V. coll., April, 1929; princpl. vety. coll., Patna, April, 1930; offg. dir., vety. services, Bihar and Orissa, Apr., 1934.

DAVIS, WILLIAM JOHN, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (supth. engr., Madras) (b. 1st Dec., 1884).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1907, as asst. engr.; exec. engr., Oct., 1915; on mil. duty from Aug., 1916, to Jan., 1920; offg. suptg. engr., Sept., 1933; confd., Feb., 1936.

DAVY, HORACE FREDERICK, A.M.I.C.E., Indian Stores dept. (contr. of inspn.) (b. 19th Aug., 1887).—Joined the service as asst. laby. officer, 2nd Dec., 1913; dep. supt. of local manufactures, Dec., 1918; contr. of inspn. (tempy.), May, 1923; confd., Jan., 1925; offg. dir. of inspn., June, 1928.

DAWKINS, CLINTON GEORGE EVELYN, B.A., late Indian Forest Service (b. 16th June, 1882).—Arrived 19th Dec., 1908, and served as asst. consvr.; dep. consvr., Mar., 1914; offg. consvr., July, 1925; confd., June, 1929; ret'd., Nov., 1936.

DAWSON, ERNEST STANLEY, Indian Forest Engineering Service (b. 25th Nov., 1895).—Joined the service as forest engr., Madras, 26th Jan., 1922.

DAWSON, Miss EUNICE, M.A., late Indian Educl. Service (Bihar and Orissa) (b. 23rd May, 1881).—Joined the service, 1st Jan., 1914; offg. inspectress of schools, Oct., 1918; confd. Oct., 1919; princpl., girls' high school, Bankipur Oct., 1921; ditto, Patna, Oct., 1924; dep. directress of public instrn., July, 1926; ret'd., Aug., 1931.

DAWSON, GEOFFREY WILLIAM, Indian State Rlys. (b. 14th Oct., 1882).—Joined the service, 20th Oct., 1899; 3rd asst. secty. G.I.P. Rly., March, 1914; publicity supt., E.I. Rly., April, 1920; publicity officer, ditto, April, 1927; ditto, E.B. Rly., Feb., 1928; asst. ch. publicity officer, Feb., 1928; on depn. to publicity bureau Indian rlwys., London, Jan., 1931.

DAWSON, JAMES ALEXANDER, C.I.E., M.A., Indian C.S. (ch. secty. to govt., Assam) (b. 4th May, 1880).—Educ. at Gordon's Coll. and the Univ., Aberdeen; apptd. after exam. of 1903; arrived, 28th Nov., 1904, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; transfld. to E. Bengal and Assam, Oct., 1905; joint mag. and dep. collr., April, 1911; asst. commr., Assam, April, 1912; dep. commr., Nov., 1920; C.I.E., Jan., 1931; commr. of excise, Mar., 1932; ch. secty. to govt., Assam, Nov., 1933; offg. as member rev. tribunal since May, 1937.

DAWSON, LIONEL EDWARD, B.A., M.A.I., Indian Service of Engrs. (supthg. engr., United Provs.) (b. 16th Jan., 1887).—Joined the service as asst. engr. on 1st Oct., 1910; in mil. employ from 14th Feb., 1918, to 7th Feb., 1920; exec. engr., 1st Oct., 1918; pers. asst. to ch. engr., and under-sec. to govt., P.W. dept. (I.B.), April, 1927; offg. suptg. engr., Apr., 1931; confd., July, 1936.

DAWSON, STEPHEN, B.A., B.C.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 28th July, 1879).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1903; arrived Feb., 1904; exec. engr., Oct., 1911; offg. suptg. engr., Sept., 1923; confd., June, 1926; chief public works officer, F.S.S., March, 1927; ret'd., Aug., 1932.

DAWSON, SIR VERNON, K.C.I.E., B.A., late Indian C.S., India Office (asst. secty., public and judl. dept., seconded for spl. duty in reforms dept.) (b. 22nd Feb., 1881).—Educ. at St. Paul's Sch., and Corpus Christi Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1904; arrived, 2nd Dec., 1905, and served in E. Bengal and Assam as asst. mag. and collr.; under sec. to govt., rev. and appt. dept., Aug., 1909; under sec. to govt. of India, Home Dept., July, 1910; transfld. to Bengal, 1912; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Dec., 1913; dist. and sess. judge, April, 1916; on spl. duty, home dept., govt. of India, Sept. to Dec., 1916; on spl. duty, Calcutta high ct. Jan. to Mar., 1917; on spl. duty, legisl. dept., govt. of India, April to Aug., 1917; temply. empd. in rev. and stats. dept., India Office, from July, 1918, and in judl. and public dept. from Aug., 1918; sec., India Office Reforms Committee, Aug., 1918, to Dec., 1919; acting asst. sec. in judl. and public dept. from Dec., 1919; C.I.E., Jan., 1920; resigned from Indian C.S., Jan., 1921; senr. clerk, India Office, March, 1921; principal, April, 1921; asst. secty., public and judl. dept., Apr., 1930; jt. secty. to British delegation, Indian round table conf., London, Nov., 1930-Jan., 1931; 2nd session, Sept.-Dec., 1931; 3rd session, Nov.-Dec., 1932; K.C.I.E., Jan., 1934.

DAWSON, WILLIAM MAURICE GRANT, M.C., A.M.I.C.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., United Provs.) (b. 11th Nov., 1891).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1919; asst. engr., Dec., 1919; asst. exec. engr., Sept., 1922; exec. engr., Oct., 1932; prof. civil engrg. Thomason Coll. Roorkee, Oct., 1935 to Oct., 1936.

DAY, BINGLEY WALDEMAR, Indian C.S. (sub. collr., Madras) (b. 2nd Feb., 1908).—Educ. at Stowe and Corpus Christi College, Cambridge; joined the service, 13th October, 1930, arrived in India, Nov., 1930, and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr.; sub-collr., Nov., 1932.

DAY, Rev. EDWARD RIDLEY, M.A., late Eccles. Dept., Central Provs. (b. 21st Aug., 1882).—Apptd. chaplain on probn., 16th Aug., 1920; junr. chaplain, Aug., 1922; senr. chaplain, Aug., 1932; retd., Aug., 1937.

DAY, FRANCIS EDWARD, India Audit Office (exec. officer) (b. 22nd July, 1915).—Apptd. exec. officer, 23rd Jan., 1936.

DAY, JOHN THOMAS, Indian State Rlys. (divl. transport supt., G.I.P. Rly.) (b. 18th Dec., 1884).—Joined the service, 27th May, 1910; asst. traffic supt., Mar., 1919; ditto, Jan., 1922; asst. traffic manager, G.I.P. rly., Aug., 1923; goods supt., G.I.P. rly., May, 1926; divl. transport supt., Dec., 1933.

DAYA KRISHNA, KHANNA, RAI SAHIB LAIA, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 19th Aug., 1892).—Joined the service, 24th Sept., 1915; asst. engr., Sept., 1916; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1925.

DAYAL, BISHAMBHAR (see Bishambhar Dayal).

DAYAL DEVI (see Devi Dayal).

DAYAL, HARISHWAR, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., B. & O.) (b. 15th July, 1915).—Educ. at Govt. Intermediate Coll., Allahabad, and Allahabad Univ.; joined the service, 30th Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Nov., 1937, and served in B. & O. as asst. mag. and collr.

DAYAL, ISHWAR (see Ishwar, D.).

DAYAL, MADHU SUDAN (see Madhu Sudan, D.).

DAYAL, RAGHUBAR, M.Sc., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge) (b. 26th Oct., 1900).—Educ. at Allahabad Univ., an Sidney Sussex Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 26th Oct., 1925; arrived, 17th Nov., 1925, and served in the United Provinces as asst. mag.; offg. sess. and sub-judge, Jan., 1932; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Nov., 1933; confd., Sept., 1936.

DAYAL, RAJESHWAR (see Rajeshwar Dayal).

DAYAL, SHAMBHU (see Shambhu Dayal).

DAYAL, SHANKAR (see Shankar Dayal).

DAYALMAL, DAULATRAM, B.A., LL.B., late Bombay C.S., Judl. Branch.—Joined the service, 17th Feb., 1901, as sub-judge; asst. judge, Oct., 1926; ditto and addl. sess. judge, Dec., 1926; retd. Nov., 1928; compiler of "The Sind Sadar Court Reports for 1902 & 1905."

DAYA RAM SAHNI, RAI BAHADUR, C.I.E., M.A., late Archaeological Survey Dept. (b. 1st Dec., 1879).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 1st Sept., 1907; supt., Feb., 1920; jt. dep. dir.-genl., Dec., 1925; dir.-genl., May, 1931; C.I.E., Jan., 1935; retd., June, 1935.

DAYARAM, THAWARDAS, B.A., LL.B., late Bombay Civil Service, Judicial Branch (b. 8th Jan., 1875).—Joined the service 1st Dec., 1903; sub-judge, Mar., 1904; asst. judge, Nov., 1928; offg. judge and sess. judge, May, 1929; retd., Jan., 1930.

D'CUHNA, MARCEL DOMINIC, O.B.E., B.A., late Imp. Customs Service. (b. 2nd June, 1881).—Held non-gazetted appt. from 1st May, 1903; offg. asst. collr., Bombay, Mar., 1917; confd., Apl., 1920; ditto, Madras, Oct., 1921; ditto, Bombay, Feb., 1930; O.B.E., June, 1936; retd., June, 1936.

DE, ANATH BANDHU, B.A., Rai Bahadur, late Bengal Civil Service (b. 30th Dec., 1876).—Joined the service as proby. dep. collr., May, 1897; offg. dep. magte. and dep. collr., Oct., 1897; confd., April, 1900; offg. magte. and collr., March, 1927; confd., Aug., 1927; retd., Jan., 1932.

DE, BIRENDRA NATH, C.I.E., B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 27th Mar., 1882).—Educ. at Collegiate School, Midnapur, Calcutta Univ., and St. John's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1905; arrived, 22nd Dec., 1906, and served in the United Provs. as asst. commr. and settl. offr.; excise commr., April, 1919; dep. commr., Dec., 1919; excise commr. and supt. of stamps, April, 1925; dep. commr. and rev. sec. to govt., Central Provs., Jan., 1926; finl. secty. to ditto, March, 1927; offg. commr., Nov., 1928; confd., Nov., 1932; C.I.E., Jan., 1931; retd., Mar., 1934.

DE, GOSHTO BIHARI, B.A., B.L., late Central Provs. C.S. (Judl.) (b. Mar., 1881).—Joined the service as munisif, 1st Sept., 1905; sub-judge, Nov., 1923; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Feb., 1931; confd., Jan., 1933; retd., Mar., 1936.

DE, INDRA NATH, Indian Police (asst. supt., Orissa) (b. 20th Dec., 1900).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bihar and Orissa, on 24th Apl., 1925; offg. supt., Mar., 1933.

DE, INDU BHUSAN, B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Bengal) (b. 18th Jan., 1902).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Bengal, Dec., 1926; exec. engr., Dec., 1935.

DE, JIBAN KRISHNA, B.Sc., B.E. (Cal.), A.M.I.E., Indian P. and T. (div. engr.) (b. 31st Dec., 1894).—Joined the service as asst. div. engr., 19th June, 1922; div. engr., Aug., 1930.

DE, JNANANKUR, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Bengal) (b. 21st Sept., 1892).—Educ. at Calcutta Univ., and University Coll., London; apptd. to I.C.S. by nomination; arrived in India, 18th Dec., 1917, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dy. collr., Jan., 1922, and sub. divl. officer, May, 1922; offg. mag. and collr., Nov., 1923; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Jan., 1927; confd., Dec., 1928.

DE, KALI CHURUN, B.Sc., Indian State Rlys. (dist. contr. of stores, E.I. Rly.) (b. 17th Apl., 1888).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 8th Jan., 1920; asst. dir. (technical) rly. bd., Apl., 1924; dist. contr. of stores (temp.), July, 1927; offg. dep. contr. of stores, variously from Mar., 1929.

DE, KIRAN CHANDRA, C.I.E., B.A., late Indian C.S.—Educ. at Calcutta Univ., and St. John's Coll., Cambridge apptd. after exam.

of 1892; arrived, 23rd Dec., 1893, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; joint mag and dep. collr., April, 1900; transf. to E. Bengal and Assam, Oct., 1905; mag. and collr., Jan., 1906; re-transf. to Bengal, April, 1912; on spl. duty in connection with educ. survey of Calcutta, Aug., 1914; C.I.E., Jan., 1915; offg. sec. to govt., gen. dept., April, 1915, to May, 1916; on spl. duty as general press censor, poll. dept., Nov., 1914, to April, 1915; offg. sec., govt. of Bengal, gen. dept., April, 1915; offg. commr., Chittagong div., May, 1916; confd. as commr., April, 1919; addl. member of govr.-gen.'s legislative council, Jan., 1920; offg. member, bd. of revenue, June, 1923, and again, Nov., 1924; confd., July, 1925; member, council of state (temp.) Jan., 1928; ret'd., Dec., 1928.

DE, MAKHANLAL, M.A., late Indian Educl. Service (b. 4th Dec., 1882).—Joined the dept., 1st July, 1907; asst. profr., Nagpur, July, 1909; profr., Oct., 1916; offg. princpl., coll. of science, Nagpur, July, 1934; confd., Apl., 1937; ret'd., Dec., 1937.

DE, PROBODH CHANDRA, B.A., Indian C.S. (dist. and sessions judge, Bengal) (b. 12th Jan., 1884).—Educ. at Central Coll. Sch., Calcutta, Calcutta Univ., and Downing Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1907; arrived, 11th Dec., 1908, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Feb., 1915; dist. and sessions judge, Nov., 1922.

DE, RAJENDRA NATH, B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Assam) (b. July, 1891).—Joined the service, 1st July, 1914; proby. extra asst. consvr., July, 1916; confd., July, 1917; apptd. to I.F.S. as dep. consvr., 3rd Nov., 1928.

DEAN, ARTHUR WILLIAM HENRY, B.Sc., M.C., A.M.I.C.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., central P.W.D.) (b. 7th Feb., 1892).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 3rd Oct., 1919; asst. exec. engr., April, 1921; exec. engr., Oct., 1924; transf. to Indore, Jan., 1933; temp. suptg. engr., aviation circle, Feb., 1935; offg. suptg. engr., construction circle, Apl., 1936.

DEAN JOHN MARTIN, Indian Police (b. 9th July, 1917).—Apptd. asst. supt., Punjab, on probn., Nov., 1936.

DEAN, VINCENT LEE, V.D., M.Inst.T., Indian State Rlys. (divl. transp. officer, N.W. Rly.) (b. 21st Mar., 1891).—Joined the service as asst. traffic supt., 8th Nov., 1914; asst. dist. traffic supt., Jan., 1922; offg. dist. traffic supt., Apl., 1925; divl. transp. officer, Apl., 1928.

DEANE, DONALD VICTOR, Captain, R.E. (b. 19th Oct., 1902).—Mil. employ up to 21st Dec., 1932; dep. mint master on probn., 30th Dec., 1932; confd., Oct., 1934; offg. mint master variously from Feb., 1934.

DEANE, LANCELOT VICTOR, Indian Police (asst. supt.) (b. 14th Dec., 1904).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Punjab, on 22nd Nov., 1925; asst. commr., Port Blair, Jan., 1930.

DEANE, MAHOMED KHAIRUD, B.Sc., Factory Dept., Bombay (inspr.) (b. 16th Apr., 1891).—Apptd. inspr. of factories, Bombay, 20th Nov., 1923; offg. ch. inspr., Feb., 1931.

DEANE, NIVILLE BERNARD, O.B.E., Indian Finance Dept. (auditor-genl., Burma) (b. 12th June, 1885).—Joined the service, 3rd Jan., 1908; asst. acct.-genl., June, 1909; dep. ditto, Jan., 1926; offg. acct.-genl., Burma, Apl., 1930; O.B.E., Dec., 1930; dep. auditor-genl. (inspn.), Nov., 1930; acct.-genl., Bombay, Nov., 1931; ditto Central Revs., Oct., 1934; ditto, Burma, Oct., 1936; auditor-genl., Burma, Apl., 1937. (on foreign service).

DEANS, HARRY SCOTT, B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Punjab) (b. 29th Mar., 1898).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., on 15th Dec., 1922; on deputation to the Kashmir State from 4th March, 1924; dep. consvr., Nov., 1927.

DEAS, LEONARD JOSEPH MONTAGUE, M.B., Col., I.M.S. (ret'd.) (b. 12th July, 1873).—First commn., 28th June, 1900; agency surg., Eastern Rajputana States, Jan., 1912; ditto, Bhopawor, April, 1912; resdy. surg. Jaipur, Oct., 1919; civil surg., Ajmer, April, 1920; agency surg., Kotah, Oct., 1921; resdy. surg. and C.M.O., Baluchistan, March, 1923; reverted to milty, employ, Jan., 1928; ret'd., July, 1930.

DEASE, RICHARD EDMUND, Indian Police (b. 19th Feb., 1897).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Punjab, on 14th Oct., 1923; offg. supt., Sept., 1931; offg. addl. ditto, Mar., 1933.

DEB, BIRENDRANATH, Office of the High Commr. for India (asst. to Indian trade publicity officer) (b. 13th Aug., 1881).—Apptd. to Office of H.C. for I., April, 1921; clerical officer, Feb., 1924; exec. officer, Feb., 1927; asst. to Indian trade publicity officer, Nov., 1929.

DEB, MUNINDRA NATH, B.A., B.E. late Indian Service of Engrs. (Bihar and Orissa) (b. 16th Feb., 1878).—Joined the service, 20th Jan., 1904; asst. engr., Jan., 1905; exec. engr., Jan., 1918; offg. suptg. engr., Mar., 1925; ret'd., Feb., 1930.

DEBENDRA NATH SEN GUPTA (see Sen Gupta, D. N.).

DEBIDAT PANDYA, D.P.H., L.R.C.P. & S., L.F.P. and S., Rai Bahadur (late Dept. of Public Health, United Provs. (b. 8th Aug., 1876).—Joined the service as addl. dep. san. commr., July, 1912; asst. dir. of public health, Nov., 1921; ret'd., Feb., 1933.

DEBI DATTA MAI, RAI BAHADUR, B.A., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., United Provs.) (b. 23rd Feb., 1884).—Joined the service as temp. engr. on 27th May, 1910; asst. engr., U.P. Engrg. service, March, 1922; I.S.E., Oct., 1923; exec. engr., Oct., 1923; prof. civil engrg. coll., Feb., 1933; P.A. to ch. engr., and under-secty., p.w.d., I.B., Nov., 1935; again 1936; again Jan., 1937.

DEBI LAL SAH, B.A., M.Sc., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., United Provs.) (b. 7th Mar., 1901).—Joined the service as asst. working plan officer on 26th Dec., 1925; asst. consvr., July, 1926; dep. consvr., Feb., 1933.

DE CHAZEL, JOHN ROBERT, Indian Police (b. 19th Feb., 1916).—Apptd. asst. supt., Madras, on probn., 26th Nov., 1936.

DE GALE, HUGH OTWAY, Indian Police (dep. inspr.-genl., Punjab) (b. 9th Jan., 1891).—Joined the service, 17th Nov., 1911; asst. supt., May, 1913; on mil. duty from 15th Nov., 1917 to 28th Feb., 1919; King's police medal, Jan., 1921; supt., Jan., 1924; awarded bar to King's police medal, Jan., 1925; princel. police training school, Phillour, April, 1922; offg. dep. inspr.-genl., Feb., 1933; ditto, (prov. subs.), June, 1935; offg. inspr.-genl., Feb., 1935.

DEHEJIA, VENILAL TRIBHOVANDAS, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (asst. coll., Bombay) (b. 23rd July, 1908).—Educ. at Bombay University, Rl. College of Science, London, and School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 12th Oct., 1931; arrvd. in India, Nov., 1931, and served in Bombay as asst. coll. and supt. salt and excise.

DE KRETSEK, CLAUDE BERTRAM, B.A., Barr., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Burma), (b. 23rd Oct., 1892).—Educ. at University Coll., London, and Wadham Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1916; arrived, 17th Jan., 1918, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; services placed at disposal of govt. of India, offg. asst. collr. of customs, Jan., 1920, to July, 1921; services re-placed at disposal of govt. of Burma, July, 1921; offg. dist. and sess. judge, May, 1923; confd., Sept., 1927.

DE LA FOSSE, SIR CLAUDE FRASER, Kt., C.I.E., M.A., late Educ. Dept., United Provs.—Educ. at Trinity Coll., Oxford; apptd. prof. of English literature and logic, Queen's Coll., Benares, 18th Feb., 1896; inspr. of schools, Jan., 1897; asst. dir. of public instrn., Nov., 1902; dir., Nov., 1906; member of lieut.-govr.'s legis. council; C.I.E., June, 1918; Vice-Chancellor of Allahabad University, April, 1922; knighted, June, 1922; ret'd., 1923.

DELAHAY, VEN. WILLIAM, Indian Eccles. Estabt. (archdeacon of Rangoon) (b. 25th Jan., 1884).—Apptd. chaplain on probn., 13th Dec., 1919; junr. chaplain, Dec., 1921; senr. chaplain, Dec., 1929; archdeacon of Rangoon, Mar., 1937.

DE LA HEY, MISS DOROTHY CISLEY, late Indian Educl. Service (b. 6th Feb., 1884).—Joined the service as prinpl., coll. for women, Madras, 1st July, 1914; prinpl. Queen Mary's coll., Madras, May, 1923; ret'd., Feb., 1936; K.i.H. medal, 1st class, May, 1937.

DE LA NOUGEREDÉ, FREDERICK ADAIR, Indian State Rlys. (dist. contr. of stores, E.B. rly.) (b. 15th Sept., 1890).—Joined the service, 16th July, 1915; asst. contr. of stores, E.B. rly., July, 1918; offg. dist. contr. of stores variously from Jan., 1919; confd., Mar., 1931; offg. contr. of stores, E.B. rly., Feb., 1935.

DELL, PERCY BERTRAM, Office of High Commr. for India (higher clerical officer, store dept.) (b. 15th Nov., 1888).—Second class clerk, bd. of trade, Sept., 1908, to Sept., 1909; ditto, bd. of edn., Sept., 1909, to June, 1911; apptd. second class clerk, India Office, 9th June, 1911, and attd. to registry and record dept.; transfed. to store dept., Jan., 1917; on mil. service from Aug., 1914, to July, 1919; transfed. to office of high commr. for India, Oct., 1920; exec. officer, April, 1922; higher clerical officer, Jan., 1926.

DE MONTE, FRANK THOMAS, C.I.E., late India Posts and Telegraphs (b. 1st Dec., 1879).—Trained at R.I.E. coll.; joined the telegraph service, 1st Oct., 1899 as asst. supt.; supt., Nov., 1910; dep. postmr.-gen. (traffic), April, 1914; asst. dir.-gen., telegraph traffic, April, 1919; offg. dep. dir.-gen.; postmr.-gen. and dir., telegraph traffic, Burma, June, 1923; dep. dir.-gen., telegraph traffic, March, 1925; offg. ch. engr., tels., April, 1928; P.M.G., Bengal and Assam, Dec., 1928; offg. ch. engr., posts and tels., April, 1930; confd., Oct., 1931; C.I.E., June, 1934; ret'd., Dec., 1934.

DE MONTMORENCY, SIR GEOFFREY FITZHERVEY, G.C.I.E., K.C.S.I., K.C.V.O., C.B.E., B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 23rd Aug., 1876).—Educ. at Malvern Coll., and Pembroke Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1899; arrived, 6th Dec., 1900, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; asst. colonization offr., Chenab Canal Colony, Oct., 1903; special duty for delimiting the River Ravi, Nov., 1903, to July, 1904; junr. sec. to finl. commr., April, 1911; on special duty in connection with transfer of capital to Delhi, Feb., 1912; transfed. to Delhi as personal asst. to chief commr., Oct., 1912; C.I.E., June, 1915; acting dep. commr., Delhi, April, 1917; offg. chief commr., Delhi, Oct., 1917; dep. commr., Punjab, April, 1918; C.B.E., Dec., 1919; addl. dep. sec. to govt. of India, Foreign and Pol. Dept., Feb., 1920; pte. sec. to the Viceroy, March, 1922; K.C.I.E., July, 1926; member of govr.'s exec. council, Punjab, July, 1926; govr. of Punjab, Aug., 1928, to Apl., 1933; K.C.S.I., Oct., 1928; G.C.I.E., Jan., 1933; ret'd., Aug., 1935.

DEMPSEY, EDWARD, India Office (actg. hr. exec. officer, military dept.) (b. 25th Mar., 1900).—Apptd. asst. clerk, 25th Aug., 1919; clerical officer, Jan., 1920; exec. officer, Jan., 1928; actg. hr. exec. officer, Oct., 1936.

DENCH, WILLIAM GEORGE, B.A., B.A.I., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 1st Dec., 1888).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1912; exec. engr., Oct., 1921; under-secty. to govt., irrigation branch, Punjab, April, 1931; under-secty. (North), Punjab irrigation sectt., Jan., 1933; offg. suptg. engr., May, 1933, and again, Feb., 1936.

DENHAM, GODFREY CHARLES, C.I.E., C.B.E., late Bengal Police Dept.—Joined the service, 4th Dec., 1902; supt., Feb., 1911; services placed at disposal of Govt. of India, home dept., Dec., 1912; C.I.E., 1915; C.B.E., 1919; has received King's police medal; ret'd., April, 1923; inspr.-genl. of police, Straits Settlements, 1923.

DENNEHY, HAROLD GEORGE, C.I.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Assam) (b. 18th Dec., 1890).—Educ. at Clifton and Emmanuel Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1913; arrived, 6th Dec., 1914, and served in Assam as asst. commr.; on mil. duty (I.A.R.O.), Aug. 1915, to March, 1919; under sec. to govt. of Assam, April, 1923; offg. chief sec., ditto, April, 1924; offg. dep. commr., Jan., 1925; confd., June, 1933; offg. secty. to govt. in transferred depts., Assam, June, 1929; confd., June, 1933; offg. ch. secty., Assam, Sept., 1936; C.I.E., Feb., 1937.

DENNING, Sir HOWARD, Kt., C.I.E., B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 20th May, 1885).—Educ. at Clifton, and Caius Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1908; arrived, 22nd Nov., 1909, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; municipal commr., Surat, May, 1915; dep. acctnt.-gen., Bengal, Oct., 1916; ditto, Punjab, June, 1917; ditto, Bombay, Jan., 1918; under-sec. to govt. of India, fin. dept., Nov., 1918; on deputn. to England from April, 1919; sec. to commee. on Indian exchange and currency, June to Dec., 1919; offg. dep. contr. of currency, Bombay, May, 1920; confd., July, 1920; offg. contr. of currency, Calcutta, March, 1923; confd., March, 1924; C.I.E., Jan., 1927; addl. secty. to govt. of India, fin. dept., Oct., 1929; Kt., June, 1932; adviser to Indian delegation to monetary and economic conf., London, June, 1933; member, Ind. res. bank ctee., July, 1933; ret'd., Dec., 1934.

DENNIS, REGINALD BURTON, B.Sc. (Eng.), A.C.G.I., A.M.I.E.E., F.R.A.I., F.R.G.S.—Indian p. and t. (divl. engr.) (b. 25th Apl., 1900).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1923, as asst. divl. engr.; divl. engr., Jan., 1931.

DENT, THOMAS VALENTINE, Indian Forest service. b. 4th Apl., 1909).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., Bengal, 11th Oct., 1929.

DEO, Sir RAJENDRA NARAYAN BHANJA, Raja, Kt., O.B.E.—Member of govr.'s exec. council, Bihar and Orissa, Jan., 1929, to Jan., 1934; vice-presdt., ditto, Dec., 1931; O.B.E., June, 1918; knighted, June, 1933.

DE QUADROS, J.P., B.A., LL.B., late Bombay Judicial Dept.—Joined the dept., 17th Aug., 1922; judge, small cause court, Aug., 1922; ret'd., Oct., 1928.

DERBYSHIRE, Sir HAROLD, Kt., M.C., Bengal Judl. Dept. (ch. justice, high ct., Calcutta).—Apptd. ch. justice, high ct., Calcutta, 12th Nov., 1934.

DE ROSARIO, Miss AGNES, B.A., late Indian Educl. Service (b. 14th Aug., 1881).—Apptd. offg. inspectress of schools in I.E.S., 5th Feb., 1919; confd., Aug., 1922; ret'd., Aug., 1936.

DE ROSARIO, LEONARD GRAVES, L.R.C.P., L.R.C.S., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 8th Sept., 1875).—Joined the service as dist. medl. officer, E. I. Rly., 20th Mar., 1917; ret'd., Sept., 1931.

DERRY, ROBERT LAWRIE, Indian Forest Service (b. 17th Dec., 1898) (dep. consvr., Bihar).—Joined the service as asst. consvr. on 17th Dec., 1921; dep. consvr., Nov., 1930.

DESAI, BECHARBHAI PURSOTAMDAS, B.A. (Ind.), B.Sc. (Bom.), D.P.H. (Lond.), A.M.I.E.E. (Eng.), Indian P. and T. (divl. engr.), (b. 23rd Nov., 1898).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1923, as asst. divl. engr.; divl. engr., June, 1932.

DESAI, CHANDULAL CHUNILAL, B.A., Cantab), Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Central Provs.) (b. 27th April, 1900).—Educ. at Bombay Univ. and Cambridge Univ. (non-collegiate); joined the service, 25th Oct., 1923; arrived, 26th Nov., 1923, and served in Central Provs. as asst. commr., offg. dep. commr., June, 1927; and again, Feb., 1931; regr. co-op. society and div. of indus, Mar., 1937; dep. commr., Nov., 1937.

DESAI, DAYABHAI PRANBHAI, Rao Bahadur late Income Tax Dept., Bombay (b. 12th Dec., 1876).—Held temp. and permanent non-gazetted appts. from 15th Nov., 1899, to 30th April 1918; income tax collr. for Sind, May, 1918; dep. collr., May, 1919; income tax officer Ahmedabad City, April, 1922; asst. commr. of income tax, Aug., 1923; ret'd. Dec., 1931.

DESAI, MANILAL JAGDISHBHAI, B.A., LL.B., Indian C.S. (asst. coll., Bombay) (b. 4th Jan., 1904).—Educ. at University of Bombay and Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 8th Oct., 1928; arrived, Dec., 1928, and served in Bombay as asst. coll.; offg. dir. of land records, etc., Bombay, Oct., 1935.

DESAI, MANULAL CHUNILAL, Indian C.S. (jt. magte. United Provs.) (b. 25th Feb., 1904).—Educ. at Univ. of Bombay and Cambridge (non-collegiate).—Joined the service, 18th Oct., 1926; arrived, Nov., 1926, and served in the United Provinces as asst. mag. and collr.; asst. commr., March, 1928; jt. magte., Nov., 1930; offg. magte. and collr., May, 1933; offg. dep. commr., Jan., 1934.

DESAI, NAGINLAL VENILAL, B.A., LL.B., late Bombay Civil Service, Judicial Branch (b. 13th Nov. 1872).—Joined the dept., 10th May, 1902; asst. judge and addl. sess. judge, March, 1923; offg. judge and sess. judge, May, 1925, and again, May, 1926; confd., Oct., 1927; ret'd., May, 1929.

DESAI, SHANKAR PANDURANG, B.A., Indian C.S. (secty., fin. dept., Assam) (b. 17th Nov., 1890).—Educ. at Bombay and Sidney Sussex Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1914; arrived, 7th Dec., 1915, and served in Assam as asst. commr.; under sec. to govt. of Assam, July, 1921, to July, 1923; asst. commr. and settlt. officer, Oct., 1923; offg. dep. commr., Feb., 1929, and again, Dec., 1932; confd., Dec., 1933; offg. secty. fin. and rev. depts., June, 1931; and again, Mar., 1934; offg. secty., transf. depts., Assam, April, 1933; offg. dir. of land records, etc., Assam, Jan., 1934; and again, Nov., 1934; secty., fin. dept., Assam, Apl., 1936.

DE SALIS, Rev. ANDREW AUGUSTINE FANE, B.A., late Indian Eccles. Estabt. (b. 17th Jan., 1901).—Apptd. chaplain on probation, 5th Oct., 1928; junr. chaplain, Oct., 1930; ret'd. Oct., 1933.

DESENNE, OSCAR HENRI, M.I.E. (Ind.), late Indian Service of Engrs. (Assam) (b. 2nd Nov., 1875).—Trained at R.I.E. Coll.; joined the service, 1st Oct., 1898, as asst. engr.; exec. engr., March, 1908; under sec. to govt., E.B. and Assam, Jan., 1912; ditto, Assam, April, 1912; suptg. engr., Dec., 1917; offg. chief engr. and sec. to govt., April, 1919; confd. as chief engr. and sec. to govt., Nov., 1924; ret'd., Nov., 1929.

DESHMUKH, CHINTAMAN DWARKANATH, C.I.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (fin. secty. and secty. p.w.d.) (b. 14th Jan., 1896).—Educ. at Bombay Univ. and Jesus Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 3rd Nov., 1919; arrived, 20th Apl., 1920, and served in Central Provs. as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., Apl., 1925; confd., July, 1929; jt. secty., Indian round table conf., London, 2nd session, Sept.-Dec., 1931; offg. rev. sec. to govt., Cent. Provs., Feb., 1932;

finl. secty., ditto, June, 1933; C.I.E., Feb., 1937; fin. secty. and secty. p.w.d., Nov., 1937.

DE SMIDT, GERALD EWALD OVERBECK, D.S.O., India Posts and Tels. (dir.-genl. posts and tels., Burma) (b. 1st June, 1885).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 1st Oct., 1906; on field service with Mesopotamia Expedit. Force from 15th Dec., 1915; dir. of tels. with M.E.F., April, 1919; on foreign service with Irak Admn., Nov., 1919; on deputation at India Office from 7th Aug., 1923; ditto, with N.W. Rly., from 23rd March, 1925; ditto, with Indo-European Tel. Dept., from 28th Mar., 1928; offg. dir., tel. engrg., Aug., 1933; confd., Sept., 1933; dep. dir.-genl., tels., May, 1934; p.m.g., Burma, Mar., 1936; dir.-genl. posts and tels., Burma, Apl., 1937.

DE SOUZA, FRANCIS XAVIER, M.A., LL.D., Barr. (1899), late Indian C.S. (Bombay).—Educ. at St. John's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1892; arrived, 20th Jan., 1894, and served in Bombay as asst. collr. and mag.; asst. judge and sess. judge, Jan., 1899; acting joint judge, March, 1900; 2nd asst., July, 1900; 1st asst., July, 1904; judge and sess. judge, Dec., 1904; on dept. under govt. of India as member, civil justice cttee., from Feb., 1924; 1st grade judge, Aug., 1925; offg. addl. commr. of Sind, Oct., 1926; confd., Dec., 1926; ret'd., Jan., 1929.

DE SOUZA, FRANK AUGUSTUS, late Land Records Dept., Burma (b. 6th Aug., 1878).—Joined the service, 22nd Aug., 1900; supt., June, 1904; asst. dir., Oct., 1925; ret'd., Aug., 1934.

DE'SOUZA, F. J., B.Sc., A.M.I.C.E., Indian State Railways (exec. engr., N.W. Rly.) (b. 29th Sept., 1892).—Asst. exec. engr., 24th Oct., 1916; exec. engr., Oct., 1935.

DEV DATT, B.Sc., Indian State Ryis. (exec. engr., E.I. Rly.) (b. 3rd Sept., 1891).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1915; exec. engr., Oct., 1924.

DEVADOSS, SIR MUTHIAH DAVID, Kt. Barr., late Madras Jud. Dept.—Apptd. judge, Madras high ct., 17th Nov., 1921; ret'd., Dec., 1928; Kt., Jan., 1932.

DEVASAHAYAM, JACOB, B.A., Indian Police (dist. supt.) (b. 9th June, 1899).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Madras, on 7th June, 1923; offg. dist. supt., June, 1929; confd., July, 1936.

DEVENISH, Rev. ROBERT CECIL SYLVESTER, B.A., Indian Eccles. Estabt. (senr. chaplain) (b. 22nd Nov., 1888).—Apptd. chaplain on probation, 27th Oct., 1919; junior chaplain, Oct., 1921; on mil. duty from 24th Nov., 1921, to 30th Nov., 1922; senr. chaplain, March, 1928; offg. archdeacon, Apl., 1933.

DEVI DAYAL, B.A., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Assam) (b. Oct., 1890).—Joined the service, 15th Oct., 1914; asst. engr. Feb., 1916; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1921; exec. engr., Oct., 1923; asst. ch. engr. and under-secty. to govt., p.w.d., Assam, July, 1932.

DEVI DAYAL DHAWAN, RAI BAHADUR LALA, M.Sc., LL.B., Punjab Civil Service (dist. and sess. judge) (b. 15th Oct., 1888).—Extra asst. commr., Jan., 1934; sub judge, Nov., 1920; dist. and sess. judge, Sept., 1935.

DEVIDAYAL SAIGAL, B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Punjab) (b. 10th Dec., 1901).—Joined the service as asst. consvr. on 8th Dec., 1924; dep. consvr., Novr., 1928.

DEVI SINGH, M.A., Lala, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 12th Dec., 1884).—Joined the service as temp. engr., 27th Oct., 1908; asst. engr., 1st Jan., 1923; apptd. to the I.S.E., as sst. exec. engr., 1st Jan., 1928; exec. engr., Jan., 1933.

DEVIN, NINA GRACE, late India Office (b. 29th Oct., 1874).—Apptd. clerical officer, 22nd Nov., 1921; higher clerical officer (acting), April, 1922; confd., Dec., 1924; ret'd., Jan., 1935.

DE VINE, JAMES CHANCELLOR.—Indian Police (dist. supt.) (b. 9th Aug., 1898).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., Burma, on 21st Oct., 1921; offg. dist. supt., March, 1927; confd., Aug., 1932.

DEVLIN, Rev. THOMAS STAFFORD, M.A., Indian Eccles. Estabt. (senr. chaplain) (b. 27th May, 1892).—Apptd. chaplain on probation, Jan., 1923; junior chaplain, 5th Jan., 1925; senr. chaplain, Apl., 1933.

DEW, Sir ARMINE BRERETON, K.C.I.E., C.S.I., Lieut.-Col., I.A. (ret'd.).—First commn., 9th Nov., 1888; att'd. to Gilgit agency, Nov., 1894; joined pol. dept., Dec., 1897; pol. asst., April, 1898; pol. agent, Sept., 1905; pol. agent, Gilgit, May, 1908; C.I.E., Dec., 1911; pol. agent, Kalat, and in charge of the Bolan Pass, Aug., 1912; C.S.I., June, 1915; res'dt., and rev. and judl. commr., Baluchistan, Dec., 1917; agent to the govr.-gen. and chief commr., Baluchistan, Sept., 1919; K.C.I.E., June, 1921; ret'd., Sept., 1922; war service, Black Mountain expdn., 1891.

DEY, BIMAN BEHARI, M.Sc.(Cal.), D.Sc.(Lon.), Indian Educl. Service (prof., presdy. coll., Madras) b. 1st Nov., 1889).—Joined the service, 2nd Nov., 1916, and served in Bengal to 9th April, 1920; addl. prof. of chemistry, presdy. coll., Madras, Jan., 1924; prof. of chem., Feb., 1937.

DEY, GEORGE GOODAIR, C.I.E., M.I.E. Ind., late Indian Service of Engrs. (Bengal) (b. 13th Sept., 1876).—Trained at R.I.E. Coll.; joined the service, 1st Oct., 1899, and employed as asst. engr.; exec. engr., March, 1908; and under-sec. to govt. from March, 1909, to June, 1910; suptg. engr., July, 1915; offg. chief engr. and sec. to govt., April, 1921; confd., Dec., 1923; C.I.E., June, 1928; ret'd., Feb., 1931.

DEY, PROMODE KUMAR, B.Sc., Indian Agric. Service (plant pathologist, United Provs.) (b. 25th Oct., 1892).—Joined the service as plant pathologist on 1st March, 1920.

DEY, RATI NATH, M.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag., United Provs.) (b. 16th Jan., 1898).—Educ. at Allahabad Univ., and Selwyn Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 25th Oct., 1923; arrived, 28th Nov., 1923, and served in United Provs., as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag., June, 1926; offg. dep. commr., April, 1928; offg. mag. and collr., Mar., 1930; official repres. of U.P. govt. in central legis. assembly, Aug., 1936.

DEY, SUSHIL KUMAR, B.A. Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 16th Feb., 1907).—Educ. at Calcutta University, London School of Economics and London School of Oriental Studies; joined the service, 10th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930, and served in Bengal, as asst. collr. and mag; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Nov., 1931.

DHAND, MILKHI RAM, B.A., Indian State Ry.s. (exec. engr., N.W. Ry.) (b. 13th March, 1892).—Joined the service as apprentice engr., 1st Oct., 1914; asst. engr., Oct., 1915; asst. exec. engr., Dec., 1925; exec. engr., Aug., 1927.

DHANI RAM VERMA, RAI SAHIB, late Survey of India (b. 4th Aug. 1875).—Joined the service as sub-assst. supt. on 20th Nov., 1897; extra asst. supt., Dec., 1905; dep. supt., July, 1925; supt., Jan., 1926; ret'd., Aug., 1932.

DHANPAT RAI, RAI SAHIB LALA (asst. secty., dept. of educ., health and lands) (b. 25th July, 1882).—Joined the service, 18th Apl., 1901; supt., dept. of E. H. and L., July, 1928; asst. secty., Mar., 1937.

DHANVADA ANANDA RAO (see Ananda Rao, D.).

DHAR, NIL RATAN (see Nil Ratan Dhar).

DHAR, SATYENDRA MOHAN, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., Bihar) (b. 25th Mar., 1897).—Educ. at Mayurbhanj Sch., Orissa, Univ. Coll. and Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 27th Oct., 1921; arrived 18th Jan., 1922, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. dep. commr., Apl., 1928; offg. dist. magte. and collr., Dec., 1931; dir. of industries, Bihar and Orissa, Apl., 1935; mag. and collr., Jan., 1936.

DHARM DAS, JAINI, LALA, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 16th Mar., 1897).—Joined the service, 26th Nov., 1920; asst. exec. engr., Nov., 1921; exec. engr., Oct., 1930.

DHAVLE, SANKARA BALAJI, B.A., Indian C.S. (judge, high ct., Patna) (b. 3rd Oct., 1882).—Educ. at Rajaram High School, Kolapur, Bombay Univ., and St. John's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1905; arrived, 28th Dec., 1906, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; transfed. to Bihar and Orissa, April, 1912; under sec. to govt. fin. and munpl. depts., Nov., 1912; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Jan., 1914; dist. and sess. judge; also supt. and membr. of legal affairs, July, 1919; ditto and sec. to Bihar and Orissa legisl. council, April, 1920; offg. judge, high ct., Patna, Apl., 1929, and again, Nov., 1930; addl. judge, ditto, March, 1931, and again, Jan., 1932; offg. judge, ditto, March, 1932, and Mar., 1933; confid., July, 1933.

DHAWAN, PURUSHOTTAM LAL, RAI BAHADUR, M.A., Indian State Ry.s. (member, fed. public services commn.) (b. 1st Oct., 1883).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 4th Oct., 1907; exec. engr., Oct., 1915; profrr., C.E. coll., Roorki, Oct., 1922; asst. dep. agent, Nov., 1923; offg. dep. chief engr., Dec., 1926; confid., Jan., 1934; offg. divl. supt., Oct., 1931; confid., May, 1934; offg. sentr. govt. inspr. of ry.s., Bombay, July, 1934; offg. ch. engr., Apl., 1935; confid., Oct., 1935; member, fed. public services commn., May, 1935.

DHIR, RAM DAS, Ind. Service of Engrs. (asst. exec. engr.) (b. 29th Dec., 1906).—Apptd. asst. exec. engr., Bombay, 3rd Aug., 1932.

DHIRAJLAL, DAYABHAI NANAVATI (see Nanavati, D. D.).

DHODY, MANGAL SEN (see Mangal Sen D.).

DHUNJIBHOY, JAL EDALJI, M.B., Lt.-Col. I.M.S., Civil Medl. Dept., Bihar (supt., Indian mental hosp., Ranchi) (b. 17th July, 1891).—First commn. dated 1st Nov., 1920; supt., Indian mental hosp., Ranchi, April, 1927.

DHURANDHAR, JAGANNATH RAVJI, O.B.E., B.A., LL.B., Judl. Dept., Bombay (dep. secty. to Govt., legal dept.) (b. 8th Mar., 1884).—Held non-gazetted appts. from 23rd Feb., 1918; sub-judge, June, 1919; offg. asst. secty. to Govt., Bombay, legal dept., June, 1919; offg. dep. ditto, Apl., 1928; addl. dep. ditto, June, 1932; asst. judge, Oct., 1933; judge and sess. judge, May, 1935; dep. secty. to govt., legal dept., Bombay, May, 1935; O.B.E., May, 1937.

DIAS, ANTHONY LANCELOT, B.A., B.Sc., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Bombay) (b. 13th March, 1910).—Educ. at St. Vincent's High Sch., Poona, Univ. of Bombay, the Sch. of Economics, London, and Magdalen Coll., Cambridge; joined the service 9th Oct., 1934; arrived in India, Nov., 1934, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.

DIBAKAR MAHANTY, RAO BAHADUR, Madras C.S. (sub.-collr.) (b. 10th Dec., 1889).—Joined the service, 19th Mar., 1917; dep. collr., Jan., 1924; offg. collr., Aug., 1931; sub.-collr. (provl. subs.), Aug., 1932; confid., May, 1934.

DIBDIN, AUBREY, M.A., India Office (asst. secty., reforms dept. (tempy.)) (b. 4th Mar., 1892).—Educ. at Tonbridge and Christ Church, Oxford; apptd. junr. clerk, 26th Jan., 1920; war service—served in India with 1/4th Bn The Queen's (R.W.S.R.), Oct., 1914, to Nov. 1919; asst. principal and pte. sec. to perm't under-sec. of state, Apl., 1921; principal (actg.), Jan., 1924; confid., Apl., 1924; Internatl. labour conf., Geneva, 12th, 15th, 16th, 17th, 18th, 19th and 20th sessions; adviser to Indian Govt. delegation; 21st and 22nd sessions, delegate; jt. secty., R.C. on Indian labour, Apl., 1929, to May, 1931; dep. clerk of the council, Sept., 1934, to July, 1936; asst. secty., reforms dept. (tempy.), July, 1936.

DIBLE, WILLIAM CUTHBERT, B.A., Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., United Provs.) (b. 18th June, 1886).—Educ. at Charterhouse Sch., Corpus Christi Coll., Oxford, and University Coll., London; apptd. after exam. of 1909; arrived in India, 3rd Dec., 1910, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag.; dep. commr., Nov., 1918; mag. and collr., Nov., 1925; offg. commr., Apl., 1934.

DI CADILHAC, ARTHUR MARIO AGRICOLA COLLIER GALLETTI, late Indian C.S. (b. 25th March, 1877).—Educ. at Cheltenham Coll. and Trinity Coll., Oxford; apptd. after the exam. of 1899; arrived, 10th Dec., 1900, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; asst. sec. to govt., Nov., 1904; under-sec., rev. dept., May, 1906; ditto, dept. under chief sec., March, 1909; sub.-collr. and jt. mag., May, 1910; collr. and dist. mag., March, 1920; ret'd., Dec., 1935; author of lunacy and ecclesl. manuals and transln. of "Vinodya Tarangiri."

DI CADILHAC, ROBERT GALLETTI, Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and sub.-collr., Madras) (b. 27th July, 1908).—Educ. at Cheltenham and Balliol Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1930; arrvd. in India, Nov., 1931, and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and sub.-collr., May, 1933.

DICK, ALAN MACDONALD, C.B.E., M.B., M.R.C.S., L.R.C.P., Lt.-Col. I.M.S. (prof. King Edward medical coll., Lahore) (b. 30th July, 1884).—First commission, 31st July, 1909; O.B.E., Feb., 1921; apptd. principal medical sch., Amritsar, Sept., 1922; prof. of ophthalmology, King Edward medl. coll., Lahore, Oct., 1923; C.B.E., Jan., 1936.

DICKENS, DOUGLAS GLEN, late Indian State Rlys. (b. 8th July, 1880).—Joined the service, 14th Aug., 1896; asst. supt., E.I. rly., July, 1920; supt., June, 1926; ret'd., Nov., 1936.

DICKESON, CHARLES FREDERICK, India Audit Office (higher exec. officer) (b. 23rd Feb., 1893).—Apptd. 2nd class clerk, 24th Sept., 1914, and attached to store dept.; transfed. to India audit office, Jan., 1915; exec. officer, April, 1922; higher clerical officer, Aug., 1926; higher exec. officer, Aug., 1930.

DICKINS, CYRIL EDWARD, Indian State Railways (dist. signal engr., E.I. Rly.) (b. 4th Dec., 1889).—Asst. signal engr., 28th July, 1922; dist. ditto, 29th Nov., 1934.

DICKINS, KENNETH FREDERICK ROY, B.A., late Indian Forest Service (Burma) (b. 15th May, 1893).—Joined the service as asst. consvr. on 23rd Dec., 1921; dep. consvr., Nov., 1924; ret'd., Nov., 1931.

DICKINSON, E.C., Punjab Educ. Service (prof. of English, govt. coll.) (b. 12th May, 1892).—Joined the service, 31st Dec., 1927; apptd. prof. of English, govt. coll., from 31st Dec., 1927.

DICKINSON, FRITZ GEORGE, M.C., B.E., A.M.I.C.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Madras) (b. 11th June, 1894).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr. on 1st Oct., 1919; exec. engr., 1st Oct., 1926.

DICKINSON, JULIAN FINNIMORE, late Indian Police (b. 12th May, 1881).—Joined the service as asst. supt. of police, 21st Dec., 1903; supt., Bihar, Dec., 1909; ret'd., May, 1936.

DICKS, ALBERT REGINALD, late Indian Forest Service (Central Provs.) (b. 30th June, 1874).—Joined the service, 28th Nov., 1895, as asst. consvr., Assam; dep. consvr., Jan., 1900; services lent to govt. of United Provs., Sept., 1918; consvr. (Provl. subs.), Feb., 1919; services lent to govt. of Bihar and Orissa, Oct., 1922; ret'd., Oct., 1928.

DICKSON, ARTHUR NORMAN, M.C., Lt.-Col., I.M.S., ret'd. (b. 27th Nov., 1880).—First commn. dated 27th July, 1907; in milty. employ to 3rd June, 1914; offg. agency surg., Maskat, June, 1914; in milty. employ from 21st Oct., 1914; offg. M.O., N.W. Militia, Dec., 1919; offg. civil surg., July, 1920; ditto, Kurram, Oct., 1920; ditto, D.I. Khan, March, 1921; M.O., Sistan, Sept., 1924; agency surg., Bundelkhand, Jan., 1926; resdy. surg., Hyderabad, April, 1927; ditto, Bushire, Sept., 1924; civil surg., Hazara, July, 1930; resdy. surg. and C.M.O., Baluchistan, Mar., 1931; ret'd., Feb., 1934.

DIGBY, KENELM GEORGE, B.A., Barr., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Central Provs.) (b. 23rd March, 1890).—Educ. at Haileybury and Trinity Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1913; arrived in India, 29th Nov., 1914, and served in the Central Provs. as asst. commr.; serving under govt. of India, army dept., from July, 1916; sub-judge, June, 1920; offg. dist. and sess. judge, April, 1924; confd., Feb., 1928.

DIKSHIT, KASHINATH NARAYAN, Rao Bahadur, M.A., Archaeological Survey Dept. (dir.-genl.) (b. 21st Oct., 1889).—Joined the service, 29th Mar., 1917; supt., Sept., 1922; dep. dir.-genl., Feb., 1935; dir.-genl., Sept., 1937.

DIKSHIT, MADHAV JAGANNATH, M.A., B.Sc., Bombay C.S. (dep. collr. and magte.) (b. 31st Oct., 1884).—Joined the service, 9th Dec., 1909; dep. collr., July, 1911; offg. senr. income tax officer, Apr., 1922; offg. collr., Mar., 1931.

DILAWAR HUSAIN KHAN, M.A., Indian Forest Service (asst. consvr., Bihar) (b. April, 1896).—Joined the service as proby. extra-asst. consvr., 5th Apr., 1922; confd., Apr., 1923; asst. consvr., Jan., 1929.

DILLON, HENRY VERE SHIRLEY, B.A.I., Indian Service of Engrs. (suplg. engr., United Provs.) (b. 9th Nov., 1884).—Joined the service as asst. engr., Oct., 1906; exec. engr., Oct., 1914; off. dep. ch. eng., Mar., 1927; offg. suptg. engr. and secty., P.W.D. Rajputana, Mar., 1931; suptg. engr., Feb., 1937.

DILLON, WILLIAM, B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 2nd June, 1892).—Educ. at Trinity Coll., Dublin; joined the service, 6th Feb., 1920; arrived, 7th May, 1920, and served in Bombay as asst. collr. and magte.; offg. collr. and dist. magte. and pol. agent, Jan., 1925; offg. dir. of information and labour intell., April, 1927; offg. collr. of Bombay and supt. of stamps, April, 1928; member legisl. council, March, 1930; offg. collr. and pol. agent Rewa Kantha, Mar., 1932; collr. and mag. May, 1935; ret'd., June, 1937.

DIMOND, WILLIAM ELLIOT RANDAL, Lt.-Col., I.M.S. (asst. dir. p.h.) (b. 29th Sept., 1893).—First commn., dated 27th Sept., 1919; in mil. employ to July, 1925; asst. dir. of public health, N.W.F.P. (civil), July, 1925.

DIN MUHAMMAD, KHAN BAHADUR, Shaikh, M.A., Punjab C.S., Judl. Bch. (judge high ct., Lahore) (b. Mar., 1884).—Joined the service 1st July, 1907; sub-judge, Oct., 1915; offg. dist. and sess. judge, May, 1924; confd., June, 1933; addl. judge, high ct., Lahore, Mar., 1934; and again, July, 1936; member. Ind. delimitn. ctee., Aug., 1935; judge, high ct., Lahore, Mar., 1937.

DIPPIE, HERBERT, C.I.E., D.S.O., M.A., Indian Educ. Service (dir. of public instn., Orissa) (b. 10th Dec., 1885).—Joined the service, 3rd Dec., 1920; inspr. of schools, Aug., 1923; C.I.E., Jan., 1936; dir. of public instn., Orissa, Apr., 1936.

DIVATIA, HARSIDHBHAI VAJUBHAI, M.A., I.L.B., Judl. Dept., Bombay (judge, high ct.).—Apptd. addl. judge, high ct., Bombay, 19th June, 1933; judge, ditto, June, 1934.

DIVATIA, SHRINIVAS SATYENDRA, B.E.,
Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Bombay)
(b. 21st Dec., 1898).—Joined the service,
as apprentice engr., 1st Nov., 1922; asst.
exec. engr., Nov., 1923; offg. exec. engr.,
June, 1927; confd., Nov., 1932.

DIVATIA, VIRMITRA BHIMRAV, B.A., late
Indian Educl. Service (b. 24th Apr., 1882).—
Apptd. prof. of science, Gujarat Coll., Ahmeda-
bad, 16th July, 1912; I.E.S., from 5th Feb.,
1921; ret'd., Apl., 1937.

DIX, ALFRED GILBERT, B.Sc., late Indian
Educl. Service (Central Provs.) (b. 18th Mar.,
1884).—Joined the service, 18th Oct., 1914;
offg. inspr. of schools, Jan., 1915; prinpl.
training coll., Jubbulpore, July, 1920; dep. dir.
of public instrn., Nov., 1922; inspr. of schools,
Nov., 1928; secty., public service commn.,
Oct., 1929 to Aug., 1931; tutor to Maharaja
of Nabha, Sept., 1931; ret'd., Aug., 1937.

DIXON, ALGERNON DREW, Indian C.S. (jt.
mag., United Provinces) (b. 17th Oct., 1907).—
Educated at Bedford School, Corpus Christi
College, Oxford, and the School of Oriental
Studies, London; apptd. after exam. of 1931;
arrived in India, Nov., 1932, and served in the
United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; exec.
offcr., Cawnpore improvement trust, Apl.,
1937; jt. magte., Oct., 1937.

DIXON, ARTHUR FREDERIC WILLIAM, M.A.,
Indian C.S. (collr. and dist. mag., Madras)
(b. 11th May, 1892).—Educ. at Christ's Coll.,
Cambridge; joined the service, 18th Aug., 1920;
arrived, 3rd Dec., 1920, and served in Madras as
asst. collr. and mag.; sub-collr. and jt. mag.,
July, 1922; temp. dep. secty. to govt., law
and educn. dept., Sept., 1929; offg. collr. and
dist. mag., Aug., 1933; confd., Mar., 1935;
officer in ch., reforms (Orissa) dept., Mar., 1936;
secty. educ. dept., Apl., 1936.

DIXON, GEORGE GRAHAM, B.A., Burma
Office (acting asst. secty.) (b. 9th Dec.,
1895).—Educ. at Merchant Taylor's Sch.,
and St. John's Coll., Oxford; on mil. service (9th
Essex Regt.), Aug., 1914, to March, 1916;
temp. junr. clerk, H.M. Customs and Excise,
1916-18; history master, Sherborne Sch., 1918-
20; apptd. junr. clerk, rev. and stat. dept.,
India Office, 12th Apl., 1920; sec. to Indian delega-
tion to Assembly of League of Nations, 1921
and 1931; pte. sec. to permanent under-sec. of
state, Nov., 1924; actg. principal, June, 1926;
confd., Aug., 1927; delegate of India to Inter-
national Copyright Conf., 1928; adviser to
Indian del. to International Labour Conf.,
1930; adviser to del. of India to International
Conf. on drugs, 1931; secty. to British del. to
Burma Round Table Conf., 1931-32; dep. clerk
of the Council, July, 1936, to Mar., 1937;
acting asst. secty., Apl., 1937.

DIXON, MARTIN JOSEPH, B.A., Barr., late
Indian C.S. (b. 4th Feb., 1890).—Educ. at Univ.
Coll., Dublin; apptd. after exam. of 1913; arrived,
17th Dec., 1914, and served in Bihar and Orissa
as asst. mag. and collr.; temp. to mil. dept.
(A.D.C. to pol. resdt., Aden), Jan., 1917, to
Apl., 1919; jt. mag., Nov., 1922; offg. mag.
and collr., March, 1924; confd., Nov., 1929;
ret'd., Feb., 1933.

DIXON, Rev. THOMAS HAROLD, M.A., late
Indian Eccles. Estabt. (b. 30th Sept., 1873).—
Joined the service, 21st March, 1907; chaplain
on probation, Aug., 1908; junr. chaplain,
March, 1910; senr. chaplain, March, 1920;
ret'd., Aug., 1929.

DIXON, THOMAS INGHAM, B.A., B.A.I.,
M.I.C.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b.
17th Oct., 1879).—Joined the service, 6th Jan.,
1904; asst. engr., Oct., 1915; exec. engr.,
Nov., 1916; ret'd., Oct., 1934.

DOBBS, ARTHUR CONWAY, B.A., late Indian
Agricl. Service (b. 1st Nov., 1874).—Apptd.
prinpl., Agric. coll., Punjab, 17th Oct., 1906;
ditto, Bengal, Aug., 1908; asst. inspr.-gen. of
agric. in India, June, 1911; asst. to the agricl.
adviser to govt. of India, April, 1912; dep. dir.
of agric., Bihar and Orissa, May, 1915; dir. of
agric. (s.p.t.), Jan., 1920; confd. as dir. of agric.,
Nov., 1921; ret'd., Nov., 1929.

DOBBS, WILLIAM EVELYN JOSEPH, B.A.,
LL.B., late Indian C.S. (United Provs.) (b.
3rd July, 1880).—Educ. at Shrewsbury Sch.
and Trinity Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam.
of 1903; arrived, 30th Nov., 1904, and served
in the United Provs. as asst. magte and collr.; jt.
magte., Oct., 1913; on mil. duty, Aug., 1916, to
Apl., 1919; magte. and collr., May, 1921; dep.
commr., April, 1927; ret'd., May, 1931.

DOBSON, BERNARD HENRY, C.I.E., C.B.E.,
B.A., Indian C.S. (finl. commr. (rev.), Punjab) (b.
1st Jan., 1881).—Educ. at Clifton Coll., and
Emmanuel Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam.
of 1903; arrived, 30th Nov., 1904, and served
in the Punjab as asst. commr. and settl. offr.;
employed in directorate of mil. intell., War Office,
from Dec., 1915, to July, 1919; dep. commr.,
Nov., 1919; C.B.E., Jan., 1920; offg. home
sec. to govt., Dec., 1925; confd., Dec., 1926;
offg. commr., April, 1929; confd., Dec., 1930;
offg. finl. commr. (dev.) Punjab, Jan., 1935;
offg. finl. commr. (rev.) and secty. rev. dept.,
Jan., 1936; confd., Oct., 1936; C.I.E., Jan.,
1938.

DODD, Rev. GEORGE EDWARD, M.A., B.D.,
late Indian Eccles. Estabt. (b. 21st Mar., 1884).
Apptd. chaplain on probation, 11th Nov., 1912;
junr. chaplain, Jan., 1914; on milty. duty
from Sept., 1914, to April, 1925; senr. chaplain,
Jan., 1924; offg. presdy. senr. chaplain, Nov.,
1929; confd., Oct., 1933; ret'd., Mar., 1935.

DODD, SIR ROBERT JOHN SHERWOOD, Kt.,
C.S.I., late Indian Police (b. 26th July, 1878).—
Joined the service, 11th Dec., 1899, and posted
to United Provs.; asst. supt., April, 1906;
supt., May, 1911; awarded King's police
medal, Jan., 1919; offg. dep. inspr.-gen., April,
1923; confd., Sept., 1924; offg. inspr.-gen.,
Nov., 1925; confd., Aug., 1927; C.S.I., Jan.,
1928; Kt., June, 1931; ret'd., July, 1933.

DODD, RODERIC JAMES SHUTER, B.A. (Oxon),
India Civil Service (secty., elec. and indus.
depts.) (b. 19th June, 1894).—Educ. at Harrow
and Balliol Coll., Oxford; joined the service,
4th Oct., 1919, and served in the Punjab as asst.
commr. from 1st Dec., 1919; sec., municipal
commee., Delhi, Oct., 1923; asst. colonization
offr., Nili Bar, Nov., 1925; offg. dep. commr.,
May, 1926; ditto (provl.), July, 1927; confd.
Oct., 1931; dep. regr. co-op. societies, Oct.
1927; offg. regr., ditto, Feb., 1929; reform

commr., and jt. secty. to govt., Punjab, transf. depts., Jan., 1935; secty., elec. and indus. depts., Mar., 1937.

DODSWORTH, OWEN ALARIC, I.S.O., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Orissa) (b. 13th Sept., 1883).—Held non-gazetted appt. from 14th Sept., 1904; proby. extra asst. consvr., July, 1908; confd., July, 1913; dep. consvr., Dec., 1928; I.S.O., May, 1937.

DODWELL, DAVID WILLIAM, M.A., Ph.D. (Columbia), Indian C.S. (sub-collr., and jt. mag., Madras) (b. 13th Dec., 1898).—Educ. at Banbury County Sch. and Balliol Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 1st Nov., 1922; arrived, 13th Dec., 1922, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; sub. collr., and mag., Jan., 1924; tutor to minor Maharaja of Travancore, June, 1925, to Apl., 1928; offg. collr. and mag., Sept., 1931; addl. dep. secty., fin. dept., Madras (temp.), Nov., 1935; and again, Aug., 1936.

DOGRA, HANS RAJ, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (suplg. engr., Madras) (b. 23rd Dec., 1885).—Joined the service as asst. engr. on 1st Oct., 1909; exec. engr., Oct., 1919; suptg. engr., Jan., 1937.

DOIG, EDWARD WILLIAM, late Indian C.S. (b. 4th April, 1896).—Educ. at Jarrow Secondary School and Durham University; joined the service, 7th Sept., 1923; arrived, 1st Nov., 1923, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; sub-collr. and jt. magte., Nov., 1928; retd. Mar., 1932.

DONALD, ARTHUR ALEXANDER, Indian Police (dist. supt., Burma) (b. 1st April, 1899).—Joined the service on 5th June, 1920; offg. dist. supt., April, 1928; confd., Dec., 1931.

DONALD, CHARLES HILLIARD (b. 21st Sept., 1873).—Apptd. warden of fisheries, Punjab, 25th Nov., 1915; retd., Nov., 1932.

DONALD, SIR JAMES, Kt., C.S.I., C.I.E., M.A., LL.M., Barr., late Indian C.S. (b. 26th Dec., 1873).—Educ. at Aberdeen Univ., and St. John's Coll., Camb.; apptd. after exam. of 1895; arrived, 7th Dec., 1896, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; transfed. to Assam as asst. commr., May, 1898; sub-divl. offr., April, 1899; under-sec. to chief commr., April, 1901, to April, 1904; joint mag. and dep. collr., Bengal, Jan., 1905; transfed. to E. Bengal and Assam, Oct., 1905, as offg. mag. and collr.; mag. and collr., March, 1908; provl. supt. of census operations, April, 1910; commr. of excise and salt, and inspr.-genl. of registration, E. Bengal and Assam, Sept., 1911; transfed. to Bengal, April, 1912, and apptd. commr. of excise and salt; offg. sec. to govt., finl., appt. and munpl. depts., from Nov., 1912; spl. duty in connection with the Public Service Commission, Oct. to Dec., 1913; mag. and collr., April, 1914; offg. sec. to govt. of Bengal, finl. dept., April, 1915; confd., Oct., 1915; member of the Bengal legisl. council, June, 1916; C.I.E., Jan., 1918; chairman, corpn. of Calcutta, April, 1919; offg. chief sec. to govt., Bengal, April, 1921; member of exec. council, Bengal, Nov., 1922; C.S.I., Jan., 1924; Kt., June, 1927; retd., Feb., 1929.

DONALD, JOHN OMMANNEY STEWART, Capt., I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 10th Oct., 1905).—First commn., 29th Jan., 1925; in milty. employ until 19th Jan., 1931; asst.

pol. agent, Chitral, Sept., 1932; ditto, 5th. Waziristan, June, 1933; asst. commr., Mansehra, Mar., 1936; asst. pol. agent N. Waziristan, Apl., 1937.

DONALD, SIR JOHN STUART, K.C.I.E., C.S.I., late Indian Pol. Dept.—Joined the service, April, 1882; extra asst. commr., May, 1884; asst. commr., Nov., 1890; accompanied mission to Kabul under Sir H. M. Durand, 1893; C.I.E., Jan., 1894; on special duty on the N.W. Frontier, 1894; was British commr. for demarcation of Kurram-Afghan boundary, May-Dec., 1894; dep. commr., Aug., 1900; on special duty with British-Afghan commn., from March, 1903 to Feb., 1904; pol. agent, Feb., 1906; resdt., Waziristan, July, 1908; special duty with Anglo-Afghan Border Offences commn., May to Nov., 1910; C.S.I., Dec., 1911; offg. chief commr. and agent to govr.-gen., N.W. Frontier Prov., Aug., 1913, to Jan., 1915; K.C.I.E., June, 1915; an addl. member of govr.-genl.'s legisl. council from Aug., 1916; chief pol. offr. with the Waziristan field force, in addn. to his own duties, from May, 1917; retd., April, 1920.

DONALDSON, EION PELLY, Burma Office (principal) (b. 15th Apl., 1896).—Educ. at Cheltenham Coll. and Oriel Coll., Oxford (classical scholar); apptd. asst. principal, secretary's office, Inland Revenue, 8th Sept., 1920; transfed. to India Office, 1st Oct., 1924; pte. secty. to parly. under-secty. of state, Dec., 1927; pte. secty. to perm. ditto, Apl., 1930; principal, Sept., 1930; on depn. for the course of instrn. at Impl. Defence Coll., Jan. to Dec., 1936; War service—served in France with Machine Gun Corps, Mar., 1916, to Mar., 1919; Major Reserve of Officers, June, 1919.

DONALDSON, JAMES DUFF, Indian Railway Accts. Service (accts. officer) (b. 9th Jan., 1884).—Held non-gaz. appts. from 5th Dec., 1905; confd. as asst. auditor, E.I. Rly., June, 1921; confd. as accts. officer, gr. I., Nov., 1929.

DONALDSON, JOHN COOTE, M.C., B.A., Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., United Provs.) (b. 24th May, 1895).—Educ. at Felsted, and Trinity Coll., Dublin; joined the service, 23rd Oct., 1920; arrived, 5th Dec., 1920, and served in United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag., Feb., 1924; offg. mag. and collr., March, 1925; confd., July, 1932; offg. dep. secty. to govt., industries and revenue branches, Oct., 1927; dir. of ind. U.P., Oct., 1930; ditto Malerkotla State, Sept., 1935; secty. to govr. U.P., Apl., 1937.

DONNISON, FRANK SIEGFRIED VERNON, B.A., Indian C.S. (secty. to fin. commrs., Burma) (b. 3rd July, 1898).—Educ. at Marlborough Coll., and Corpus Christi Coll., Oxford; joined the service 30th Oct., 1922; arrived, 25th Dec., 1922, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; warden, oil-fields, March, 1924; offg. dep. commr., Dec., 1929; secty. to fin. commrs., Mar., 1937.

DONOVAN, JOHN THOMAS, C.I.E., B.A., Barr., late Indian C.S. (b. 12th Dec., 1885).—Educ. at Clongowes Wood Coll., Royal Univ., Ireland (Queen's Coll., Galway), and Trinity Coll., Dublin; apptd. after exam. of 1909; arrived in India, 30th Nov., 1910, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; asst. settlt. officer, Sept., 1914; jt. mag. and dep. collr., April, 1916; regr., co-op. soc.,

Bengal, June, 1917; offg. dy. commr., Nov., 1921; offg. sec., agri. and indus. dept., govt. of Bengal, Nov., 1922; mag. and collr., March, 1925; C.I.E., June, 1931; retd., Nov., 1933.

DOOG, JOHN MYLES GREGORY, Indian State Ry's. (exec. engr., Burma Ry's.) (b. 22nd Aug., 1884).—Joined the service as apprentice engr., 5th Feb., 1910; asst. engr. (temp.), Aug., 1910; ditto (perm.), Aug., 1911; on milty. duty from 18th July, 1917, to 3rd April, 1919; dist. engr., Jan., 1927.

DORAB N. D. KHANDALAVALA (see Khandalavala, D. N. D.).

DORAN, ALFRED JOHN, Indian State Ry's. (transpn. supt., E.I. rly.) (b. 21st Sept., 1890).—Joined the service, 23rd Mar., 1908; asst. supt., Jan., 1922; transpn. supt. (traffic comm.) E.I. rly., May, 1934.

DORMAN, WILLIAM STEWART, B.A., B.E., M.I.C.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (Punjab) (b. 5th Feb., 1876).—Joined the service, 5th Jan., 1901, as temp. engr., Punjab; asst. engr., July, 1906; exec. engr., Jan., 1910; under sec. to govt., Punjab, bldgs. and roads branch, April, 1911, to July, 1912, from April to July, 1917, and from Nov. to Dec., 1918; offg. supt. engr., May, 1922; confd., July, 1925; offg. ch. engr., March, 1927; retd., Feb., 1931.

DOSSETOR, Rev. FRANCIS ERNEST, M.A., Indian Eccles. Estabt. (senr. chaplain, Bombay) (b. 16th Dec., 1885).—Apptd. chaplain on probation, 18th June, 1921; junr. chaplain, June, 1923; senr. chaplain, June, 1929.

DOUGLAS, Rev. PERCY SHOLTO DOUGLAS, M.A., Indian Eccles. Estabt. (United Provs.) (senr. chaplain) (b. 13th Mar., 1887).—Apptd. chaplain on probation, 15th Feb., 1921; junr. chaplain, Feb., 1923; senr. chaplain, Nov., 1930.

DOUGLAS, WILLIAM CHALMERS, M.A. (Edin.), B.A. (Oxon.), late Indian Educl. Service (b. 27th July, 1884).—Joined the service, 12th Jan., 1914; offg. prin. govt. arts coll., Rajahmundry, Jan., 1926; offg. prof. presdy. coll., Madras, Dec., 1926; confd., Dec., 1931; offg. principl., ditto, Dec., 1932; retd., Jan., 1935.

DOW, HUGH, C.S.I., C.I.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (secty., govt. of India, dept. of commerce) (b. 8th May, 1886).—Educ. at Aske's Sch., Hatcham, S.E., and University Coll., London; apptd. after exam. of 1909; arrived in India, 24th Nov., 1910, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; munpl. commr., Surat, from Oct., 1916; asst. commr. in Sind for civil supplies and recruiting, July, 1918; dep. contr. of prices, Sind, Sept., 1919, to April, 1920; dep. sec. to govt., fin. dept., May, 1921; in addn., passport officer from Jan. to July, 1923; actg. sec. to govt., fin. dept., Oct., 1923; dep. sec., ditto, Nov., 1923 (temp.); fin. advr. to P.W.D. in Sind (temp.), Dec., 1925; offg. dep. sec. to govt., fin. dept., May, 1926; rev. offr., Lloyd barrage project (temp.), Jan., 1927; C.I.E., June, 1932; jt. secty., to govt. of India, dept. of commerce, Oct., 1934; addl. secty., ditto (temp.), June, 1936; offg. secty. ditto, Oct., 1936; confd., Mar., 1937; C.S.I., May, 1937.

DOW, THOMAS MILLER, M.A., Indian C.S. (secty. educ. dept. Govt. of Bengal) (b. 30th Dec., 1890).—Educ. at Kilmarnock Academy, George Watson's Coll., Edinburgh, and Edinburgh
