Frontier Prov., Dec., 1901; sec. to chief commr., Oct., 1909; offg. dep. sec., govt. of India, fin. dept., Dec., 1911, confd., March, 1912; C.I.E., Dec., 1911; C.S.I., June, 1913; specl. duty, fin. dept., Oct. to Nov., 1913; member, committee on co-operation in India, from Nov., 1914, to June, 1915; temply. employed in Ministry of Munitions, London, from August, 1915, to June, 1917; on spl. duty under the agent to the govt.-gen. in Baluchistan, from April, 1918; offg. rev. and judl. commr., Baluchistan, Feb., 1919; spl. duty in sectt., fin. dept., govt. of India, Aug., 1919; resdt., Baluchistan, and rev. and judl. commr., Sept., 1919; resat. agent to the govr.-genl., and chief commr. in Baluchistan, Sept., 1923; K.C.I.F., June, 1927; offg. pol. resdt. in Persian Gulf, Nov., 1928; ret'd., Mar., 1931.

JOHNSON, Rev. Canon GEORGE FREDERICK, B.A., Indian Eccles. Estabt. (senr. chaplain) (b. 17th Apl., 1884).—Apptd. chaplain on probation, 29th Oct., 1919; junr. chaplain, Oct., 1921; chaplain, Quetta, Oct., 1927; senr. chaplain, Feb., 1928.

JOHNSON, JAMES HALCRO, B.Sc., A.M.I.C.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 8th May, 1891).—Joined the service as asst. engr., Oct., 1914; asst. exec. engr., March, 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1923.

JOHNSTON, JOHN, M.A., Indian Civil Service (jt. mag., United Provs.) (b. 13th July, 1904).—Educ. at Anderson Educational Institute, Lerwick, Univ. of Edinburgh, and Jesus Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 26th Oct., 1927; arrived, Dec., 1927, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag., Mar., 1932; offg. mag. and collr., Mar., 1933.

JOHNSTON, JOHN PIM WATSON, Indian Police (supt., Bihar) (b. 20th May, 1896).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 20th March, 1921; offg. supt., Feb., 1925; confd., June, 1928.

JOHNSTON, MALCOLM KENNETH, Indian Police (b. 22nd April, 1907).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bengal, on 17th Nov., 1926; offg. supt., Jan., 1933, and again, May, 1933; offg. dep. commr., Oct., 1936.

JOHNSTON, ROBERT LENG, Indian Police (dist. supt., Central Provs.) (b. 4th Mar., 1888).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., Dec., 1907; dist. supt., Feb., 1919; offg. dep. inspr.-genl., Apl., 1933.

JOHNSTON, RONALD HILARY GRAVES, Indian C.S. (jt. mag.) (b. 26th Jan., 1898).—Educ. at Aldenham Sch.; joined the service, 4th Sept., 1923; arrived in India, 14th Nov., 1923, and served in United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. magte. and collr., Mar., 1929; services placed at disposal of govt. of Bengal, Apl., 1935.

JOHNSTON, WILFRID, M.C., B.A., India Office (principal, econ. and overseas dept.) (b. 9th Oct., 1892).—Educ. at Methodist Coll., Belfast, and Trinity Coll., Dublin (scholar); apptd. junr. clerk, 20th Jan., 1920, and attd. to acctnt.-gen.'s dept.; asst. principal, April, 1921; acting principal clerk, Jan. to March, 1922; resdt. clerk, March, 1922; asst. pte. sec. to sec. of state, Sept., 1924; actg. principal, Aug., 1927; confd., June, 1929; war service—served in R.F.A., Nov., 1915, to April, 1919 (M.C., Sept., 1917).

JOHNSON, WILLIAM, M.A., Indian C.S. (commr. of income tax, Bengal) (b. 13th May, 1888).—Educ. at Royal Sch., Dunganon, St. Andrews' Univ., and Lincoln Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1910; arrived in India, 1st Dec., 1911, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; transfed. to Bihar and Orissa, April, 1912; offg. mag. and collr., Jan., 1921; confd., Aug., 1925; commr. of income tax, March, 1926; transfed. to Bengal, May, 1932.

JOHNSTONE, DONALD, B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 17th Dec., 1884).—Educ. at Fettes Coll., Edin., and King's Coll., Camb.; apptd. after exam. of 1907; arrived, 17th Nov., 1908, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; transfed. to Delhi as city mag., Oct., 1912; addl. dist. mag., May, 1913; city mag., July, 1913; asst. commr., Punjab, April, 1914; on spl. duty, Delhi, Jan., 1917; persl. asst. to chief commr., Delhi, from April, 1917; addl. dist. mag., Delhi, Oct., 1917; under-sec. to govt., pol. dept., Punjab, Oct., 1917, to April, 1919; sec., jail commtee. from April, 1919, to Sept., 1920; offg. dist. and sessions judge, March, 1922; confd., April, 1925; actg. judge, Lahore high ct., June, 1927, and again, April, 1928; addl. ditto, Apl., 1929; and again Oct., 1930, to May, 1931; ret'd., Sept., 1933.

JOHNSTONE, THOMAS WHITE, O.B.E., A.R.C.Sc. D.I.C., Factory Dept., Bombay (ch. inspr.) (b. 31st Aug. 1887).—Joined the service as inspr. of factories, Bombay, 28th Mar., 1913; offg. ch. inspr., June, 1920; confd., May, 1923; O.B.E., Jan., 1936.

JOLLY, EVELYN HUGH PARKER, B.A., Bar-at-Law, late Indian C.S. (b. 18th Apl., 1886).—Educ. at Framlingham Coll., and St. John's Coll., Cambridge; appt. after exam. of 1908; arrived 22nd Nov. 1909, and served in Bombay as asst. collr. and mag., asst. settl. officer and asst. judge; on mil. duty from July, 1916, to Aug., 1919; dep. sec. to govt., legal dept. (temp.), Jan., 1923; judl. asst. to the agent to the govr. in Kathiawar, Sept., 1923; offg. judge and sess. judge, Jan., 1926; confd., Sept., 1927; judl. commr. N.W.F.P., Mar., 1929; ditto, States of W. India, Oct., 1930; ret'd., Nov., 1934.

JOLLY, GORDON GRAY, C.I.E., M.B., Ch.B., D.P.H., D.T.M. and H., Lt.-Col., I.M.S., Burma Medl. Dept. (dir. public health, Burma) (b. 6th Apl., 1886).—First commn. dated 1st Aug., 1908; C.I.E., June, 1919; in mil. employ to 7th March, 1922; asst. dir. of public health, Burma, March, 1922; offg. dir. of public health, March, 1927; confd., Feb., 1928; dep. dir.-genl., I.M.S., Dec., 1933; offg. public health commr. with the Govt. of India, Nov., 1935; dir. pub. health Burma, July, 1937.

JOLLYE, HUMPHREY CYPRIAN BEVERLY, B.A., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Orissa) (b. 26th Sept., 1888).—Joined the service as asst. consvr. on 5th Dec., 1912; with army dept. from 24th Sept., 1916, to 6th March, 1919; dep. consvr., Jan., 1920; employed under Govt. of India, rly. dept. as timber advisory officer, Oct., 1931.

JONES, ALFRED JOSEPH, Indian Police (dist. supt.) (b. 25th July, 1901).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., Burma, on 27th Nov., 1922; offg. dist. supt., July, 1932; confd., Feb., 1937.

JONES, ARTHUR DOUGLAS, Indian Police (b. 23rd Feb., 1917).—Apptd. asst. supt., Bengal, on probn., Dec., 1937.

JONES, ASHLEY NORMAN POSTANCE, Indian Police (b. 5th Apl., 1899).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., Central Provs., on 2nd July, 1923; offg. dist. supt., March, 1927.

JONES, CHARLES EVAN WILLIAM, C.I.E., M.A. (Oxon), late Indian Educi. Service (b. 9th July, 1879).—Apptd. principal, Morris Coll., Nagpur 4th Aug., 1906; offg. dir. of public instrn., N.-W.F. Prov., April to Oct., 1913, and from July to Dec., 1915; ditto, Central Provs., from Jan. to Nov., 1916; dir. of public instrn., N.-W. Frontier Prov., Nov., 1917; offg. as dir. of public instrn., Central Provs., from Nov., 1921; ditto and sec. to govt. of Central Provs., education dept., Aug., 1922; C.I.E., June, 1924; ret'd., July, 1934.

JONES, CYRIL EDGAR, C.I.E., Indian C.S. (secty. to govt., fin. dept., Madras) (b. 29th Dec., 1891).—Educ. at Jesus Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam of 1914; arrived, 10th Dec., 1915, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag. and spl. asst. settlt. offr.; on mil. duty from Oct., 1917, to Jan., 1919; sub.collr. and jt. mag., Sept., 1918; special settlt. officer, Nov., 1920;

dep. secty. to govt., fin. dept., Nov., 1929; offg. addl. secty., ditto, Apl., 1932; ditto, public dept., Apl., 1933; collr. (provl. subs.), Aug., 1933; secty. to govt., finance dept., Madras, July, 1934; collr., Oct., 1934; C.I.E., Feb., 1937.

JONES, EDMUND BRYAN, Indian Police (dep. inspr.-genl., Bengal) (b. 3rd June, 1889).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 26th Nov., 1909; supt., Dec., 1919; asst. to inspr.-genl., Nov., 1927; offg. dep. inspr.-genl., Oct., 1932; ditto (provl. subs.), July, 1934.

JONES, EDMUND DOUGLAS JOHN, Indian Police (dist. supt., Central Provs.) (b. 13th Mar., 1892).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., Nov., 1911; dist. supt., July, 1924; employed as dep. supt., watch and ward depot, E.I. Rly., April, 1928.

JONES, EDWARD ELLIS, Indian State Rlys. (bridge engr., E.B. rly.) (b. 23rd May, 1883).—Held non-gazetted appt. from 5th May, 1915, to 31st March, 1919; asst. bridge engr., April, 1919; bridge engr., E.B. Rly., July, 1928.

JONES, FREDERICK THEODORE, C.I.E., M.V.O., Indian Service of Engrs. (suptg. engr., central public wks. dept.) (b. 30th July, 1885).—Joined the service, 18th Sept., 1907; asst. engr., Sept., 1908; M.V.O., Dec., 1911; exec. engr., May, 1917; C.I.E., Jan., 1931; offg. suptg. engr. variously since May, 1925; confd., Aug., 1933; offg. ch. engr., Nov., 1932; and again, Apl., 1936; K.-I.-H. medal, 1st class, Jan., 1936.

JONES, Rev. GRYFFYDD WATCYN, B.A., Indian Eccles. Estabt. (senr. chaplain, Punjab) (b. 2nd May, 1889).—Apptd. chaplain on probation, 12th May, 1921; junr. chaplain, May, 1923; senr. ditto, Sept., 1929.

JONES, HAROLD GORDON, Indian State Rlys. (transpn. (power) supt., E.I. rly.) (b. 5th Apl., 1890).—Joined the service, 4th Apl., 1920; asst. rolling stock officer, Feb., 1925; transpn. (power) supt., E.I. rly., Aug., 1934; offg. dep. ch. mechl. engr. Apl., 1936.

JONES, HERBERT ARNOLD, late Opium Dept., United Provs. (b. 22nd Apl., 1886).—Joined the service, 11th April, 1901; dist. opium officer, June, 1922; ret'd., Aug., 1934.

JONES, HUBERT CECIL, A.R.S.M., A.R.C.S., F.G.S., late Geological Survey of India (b. 2nd Dec., 1881).—Joined the service 2nd Dec., 1906, as asst. supt.; on mil. service from May, 1915, to Sept., 1917; supt., March, 1923; ret'd., June, 1933.

JONES, Rev. HUGH, M.A., B.D., late Indian Eccles. Estabt. (b. 13th May, 1878).—Joined the service, 27th April, 1910; junr. chaplain, April, 1913; senr. chaplain, April, 1923; ret'd., May, 1933.

JONES, IVAN ELLIS, Indian Civil Service (dep. commr., Punjab) (b. 26th June, 1903).—Educ. at The High School, Harcourt Street, Dublin, and Trinity College, Dublin; joined the service, 18th Oct., 1927; arrived, Dec., 1927, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; under-secty. to govt., home dept., Nov., 1929; offg. dep. commr., Oct., 1931; dep. commr. (subs. provl.), Oct., 1934; chairman, Lahore improvement trust, Nov., 1935; variously to Oct., 1937.

JONES, IVOR DAVENPORT, M.D. (Lond.), M.R.C.S. (Eng.), L.R.C.P. (Lond.), F.C.P.S. (Bom.), Lt.-Col., I.M.S. ret'd. (b. 9th Sept., 1879).—Joined, 30th Jan., 1904, and served in mil. dept. prior to Jan., 1910; civil surg., Aug., 1913; on mil. duty from 4th Oct., 1914, to 28th Mar., 1920; ret'd., Sept., 1934.

JONES, MONTAGU EDWARD NIGEL, late India Posts and Telegraphs (b. 7th June, 1876).—Trained at R.I.E., Coll.; joined the telegraph service, 1st Oct., 1898, as asst. supt.; supt., Aug., 1910; transf'd. to field service, Waziristan fd. force, from June to Aug., 1917; dir. tel. engrg., May, 1922; dep. ch. engr., Nov., 1928; dir., tel. engrg., Madras circle, Apl., 1929; offg. P.M.G., Madras, Jan., 1930; ret'd., June, 1931.

JONES, PHILIP NORTON, Indian Police (supt., Bengal) (b. 27th Mar., 1903).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bengal, on 7th Dec., 1922; offg. addl. supt., Jan., 1929; awarded King's police medal, Oct., 1933; supt., Mar., 1933; offg. dep. commr. of police, Calcutta, June, 1935; confd.

JONES, REGINALD TREVOR, M.C., A.M.I.C.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr.) (b. 19th Dec., 1888).—Joined the service, Oct., 1912, as asst. engr.; I.A.R.O. from 16th June, 1915, to 29th March, 1919; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1921; under-secty. to govt., public wks. dept., Nov., 1927; offg. supt. engr., variously from July, 1932.

JONES, THOMAS HENRY BERTRAM, Indian State Rlys. (divl. mech. engr., N.W. Rly.) (b. 3rd Oct., 1900).—Asst. loco. supt., junr. scale, 11th Dec., 1922; divl. mech. engr. (provl.), senr. scale, Feb., 1937.

JONES, THOMAS KIRKHAM, M.C., Indian Service of Engineers (b. 11th Aug., 1893).—Joined the service as forest engr., Punjab, on 27th Nov., 1921; under-secty. to govt., pub. wks. dept. (elect.), Punjab, Jan., 1930; apptd. to I.S.E. irrig. bch., Punjab, Jan., 1935; prinpl., govt. sch. of engrg., Rasul, Apl., 1936.

JONES, WILLIAM JOHNSTONE, Indian Finance Dept. (b. 2nd Apl., 1884).—Joined the service, 28th March, 1904; asst. acctnt.-gen., May, 1913; dep. acctnt.-gen., Central Provs., May, 1924; ditto, posts and tels., April, 1925; dep. contr., Assam, Oct., 1926; audit officer, N.W.F.P., Apl., 1929; offg. pay and accts. officer, N.W.F.P., Aug., 1929; dep. govt. exr., B.N. Rly., Jan., 1932; offg. acct.-genl., Central Provs., Apl., 1933; dep. govt. exr. of accts., B.N. rly., Apl., 1934; and again, Oct., 1934; offg. acct.-genl., Central Provs., July, 1934; ditto, United Provs., Mar., 1935; offg. ch. accts. officer, E.B. rly., Oct., 1935; acct. genl., Bengal, Apl., 1937.

JORDAN, HENRY PAUL, M.Sc., late Indian Educl. Service (b. 30th Oct., 1886).—Joined the service, 30th Oct., 1910, and apptd. profr. of mechanical engrg., Thomason Coll., Roorkee; in mil employ from May to Oct., 1915; prof., Queen's Coll., Benares, Oct., 1922; actg. prof. of structural design, coll. of engrg., Poona, Nov., 1922; confd., Aug., 1924; ret'd., Jan., 1933.

JOSCELYNE, ALAN HOPE, V.D. late Indian State Railways (b. 6th July, 1880).—Joined the service, 18th Oct., 1901, as asst. loco. supt., state rlys.; dist. loco. supt., April, 1906; on mil. duty with Indian expedy. force 'B', from Sept., 1914, to Jan., 1915; dep. loco. supt., June, 1917; offg. loco. supt., May, 1926; confd., Jan., 1929; ch. mechl. engr., Jan., 1932; ret'd., July, 1935.

JOSCELYNE, HAROLD AVELING, B.Sc., A.M.I.C.E., Indian State Rlys. (ch. engr.) (b. 9th Mar., 1886).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1908; exec. engr., Oct., 1916; offg. suptg. engr., Apl., 1929; offg. dep. ch. engr., Nov., 1930; offg. contr. of stores, Feb., 1931; offg. dep. ch. engr., Feb., 1932; confd., May, 1934; offg. ch. engr., Sept., 1932; offg. senr. govt. inspr. of rlys., Sept., 1934; ch. engr., Dec., 1935.

JOSEPH, NADUVATHUSERI JOSEPH, B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Madras) (b. 22nd Apl., 1897).—Joined the service as appr. engr., 19th June, 1919; asst. exec. engr., June, 1920; offg. exec. engr., April, 1927; confd., June, 1929.

JOSEPH, PALAKUNNATH MATHAI, M.A., B.L., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 24th Apl., 1897).—Joined the service, 4th Apl., 1921; asst. acct.-genl., Bombay, Aug., 1922; asst. dir. of audit, United Provs., Apl., 1929; dep. acct.-genl., Burma, June, 1930; asst. dir., army audit, western cmd., May, 1931; dep. contr., Assam, Aug., 1932; dep. dir. of comml. intell. and statistics, commerce dept., govt. of India, June, 1934; reverted to Indian Audit dept. from Apl., 1937 and posted to Madras as dep. acct. genl.

JOSHI, DATTATRAYA SHRIDHAR, B.A., Indian C.S. (under secty. home pol. deptts., Bombay) (b. 11th October, 1908).—Educ. at the New English School, Poona, Bombay Univ., the School of Economics, London, and the School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 6th October, 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1933, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; under secty., home pol. depts. and passport offic., Dec., 1937.

JOSHI, GAJANAN KRISHNA, B.A., Indian C.S. (collr., Bombay) (b. 27th Oct., 1899).—Educ. at Bombay Univ. and Oxford Univ. (non-coll.); joined the service, 24th Oct., 1924; arrived, 5th Dec., 1924, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; offg. collr., dist. magte. and pol. agent, Nov., 1925; under-secty. to govt., rev. dept., March, 1928; collr., Nov., 1936.

JOSHI, JAGANNATH VISHWANATH, M.A. (Cantab.), Commerce Dept., Govt. of India (dep. dir. of statistical research) (b. 21st May, 1898).—Apptd. asst. secty. to the Govt. of Bombay, finance dept., on probn., Jan., 1924; confd., Jan., 1925; dep. dir. of comml. intelligence and statistics, on probn., Dec., 1928; confd., Dec., 1929; apptd. dep. dir. of statistical research, Jan., 1933.

JOSHI, KESHO DAT (see Kesho Dat Joshi).

JOSHI, KRISHNA RAO RAMBAHU, B.A., Central Provs. C.S. (dep. commr.) (b. 11th Aug., 1887).—Joined the service as probv. extra asst. commr., 5th June, 1912; confd., June, 1913; dep. commr., Feb., 1930; senr. dep. regr., Co-op. societies, Dec., 1931.

JOSHI, KRISHNAJI GANESH, B.A., late Indian Edul. Service.—Joined the service, 14th May, 1919; edul. inspr., Jan., 1922; retd., Jan., 1929.

JOSHI, Sir MOROPANT VISHWANATH, K.C.I.E.—Member of govr.'s exec. council, Central Provs., 17th Dec., 1920, to 16th Dec., 1925; Kt., June, 1923; K.C.I.E., Jan., 1926.

JOSHI, VINAYAK MAHADEO, B.A., B.Sc., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Bombay) (b. 10th July, 1914).—Educ. at New English School, Poona, Bombay Univ., and Causs College, Cambridge; joined the service, 20th Sept., 1937; arrived in India Oct., 1937, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.

JOTISH, CHANDRA GHOSH, Indian Police (b. 28th Nov., 1912).—Apptd. asst. supt. Bihar and Orissa, on probn., Jan., 1937.

JOYCE, ALEC HOUGHTON, India Office (information officer) (b. 5th Mar., 1894).—On mil. service from Dec., 1914, to Sept., 1919; apptd. clerical officer, Feb., 1922; higher clerical officer, Aug., 1924; asst. to information officer, Mar., 1930; jt. publicity officer, Indian round table conf., London, Nov., 1930-Jan., 1931; 2nd Session, Sept.-Dec., 1931; 3rd Session, Nov.-Dec., 1932; ditto, Burma round table conf., London, Dec., 1931; pers. asst. to prime minister, monetary and econ. conf., London, June-Aug., 1933; officer on spl. duty under Govt. of India, home dept., Apl.-Nov., 1935; asst. information officer, Nov., 1935; again on spl. duty with the Govt. of India, home dept. from Oct., 1936 to Nov., 1937; information officer, Dec., 1937.

JOYCE, ALFRED ERNEST, late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 21st Mar., 1884).—Trained at R.I.E. Coll.; joined the service, 1st Oct., 1905, as asst. engr.; exec. engr., Oct., 1913; suptg. engr., Dec., 1924; offg. ch. engr. and secty. to govt., June, 1929; retd., Mar., 1933.

JOYCE, CLIVE EARDLEY, Indian Police (supt., N.W.F.P.) (b. 18th Feb., 1899).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 14th June, 1920; addl. supt., Sept., 1924; offg. supt., Feb., 1927; confd., May, 1929; offg. dep. inspr.-genl., Oct., 1934.

JOYCE, GARRETT JOSEPH, Major, I.M.S. (b. 5th Mar., 1904).—Date of first commn., 22nd Dec., 1923. Civil surgeon and supt. dist. jail, Punjab, Apl., 1937.

JUDGE, DIGBY THOMAS BENJAMIN, Indian Police (asst. supt., Bombay) (b. 9th July, 1891).—Held non-gazetted appts. from 13th April, 1910, to 19th July, 1915, and from 7th Dec., 1920, to 3rd Dec., 1924; on milty. duty from Sept., 1915, to June, 1920; asst. supt., Dec., 1924; offg. supt., Feb., 1932, and again, Apl., 1933.

JUDGE, HARRY FREDERICK PERCEVAL, late Indian Finance Dept. (b. 16th Mar., 1880).—Joined the service, 10th Dec., 1907, as asst. examr.; dep. examr., June, 1906; asst. auditor, N.W. Rly., March, 1922; dep. auditor, N.W. Rly., Oct., 1923; offg. dep. ch. account officer, E.I. Rly., April, 1926; offg. dep. auditor, clearing house accounts, Jan., 1927; offg. ch. auditor, N.W. Rly., July, 1927; offg. audit officer, rly. clearing accts., Oct., 1927; offg. dep. auditor, ditto, Feb., 1928; offg. ch. auditor, E.I. Rly., Aug., 1928. ditto, E.B. Rly., Nov.,

1928; services placed temporarily at disposal of commr., rlwys., 1st May, 1930; ch. auditor, G.I.P. rly. and govt. exr. of accts., B.B. and C.I. rly., Nov., 1932; retd., Mar., 1935.

JUDGES, FREDERICK CYRIL, late Indian State Rlys. (b. 13th Nov., 1890).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1914; offg. exec. engr., July, 1923; confd., Oct., 1923; retd., Nov., 1934.

JUGAL KISHORE, THAKUR, B.A., LL.B., Indian Police Service (b. 23rd Aug., 1901).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., Central Provs., 1st May, 1926; offg. dist. supt., May, 1932.

JUKES, JOHN EDWIN CLAPHAM, C.S.I., C.I.E., late Indian C.S. (b. 12th Nov., 1878).—Educ. at Aldenham Sch., and Pembroke Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1901; arrived, 28th Nov., 1902, and served in Bombay as asst. collr. and mag. and supt. of land records; under sec. to govt., fin. and rev. depts., March, 1908; under sec. to govt. of India, fin. dept., March, 1909, to Jan., 1912; talukdari settlt. offr., May 1913; temp. dep. sec. to govt. pol., jud., &c. depts., Bombay, April, 1915; offg. dep. sec. to govt. of India, finance dept., Dec., 1918, to April, 1919; jt. sec., fin. dept., Dec., 1919; C.I.E., June, 1921; on special duty in fin. dept. from Nov., 1923, and again from Oct., 1925; actg. auditor general, June, 1925; offg. sec. to govt. of India finance dept., Mar. 1926; offg. auditor-genl., Sept., 1926; contr. of civil accts., Sept., 1927; C.S.I., June, 1930; temp. member, govr.-genl.'s council, Oct., 1930; retd., Aug., 1933.

JUPP, STANLEY DERRINGTON, Indian Police (asst. supt.) (b. 2nd May, 1909).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., Burma, 6th Dec., 1928; confd., Dec., 1930.

JWALA PRASAD, Raja, B.A., late Indian Service of Engrs. (United Provs.) (b. 22nd Nov., 1876).—Trained at T.C.E. Coll., and apptd. as asst. engr., 13th Oct., 1901; exec. engr., Oct., 1911; offg. suptg. engr., May, 1922; confd. as suptg. engr., May, 1923; offg. chief engr. and sec. to govt., Feb., 1925; confd., April, 1926; retd., Nov., 1931.

JYOTSANATH GHOSAL (see Ghosal, J.).

KABIR, ALAMGIR MAHNUDDIN AMIRE, B.A., Indian Police (b. 25th Nov., 1911). Apptd. asst. supt., Bengal, on probn., 1st Mar., 1935; confd. 1937.

KABRAJI, KAEKHUSHRO JEHANGIR, M.Sc., Ph.D., Meteorological dept. (Meteorologist) (b. 28th Sept., 1895).—Joined the service as meteorologist on probn., 15th Feb., 1927; confd., Feb., 1929.

KADRI, JALALUDIN SAIYID MIAN, B.A., late Indian Edul. Service (b. 15th Nov., 1873).—Held non-gazetted appts., temp. and permanent, from 1st Jan., 1896, to 14th April, 1920; edul. inspr., April, 1920; retd., Nov., 1928.

KADRI, MAHHUB MIAN IMAM BAKSH, O.B.E., B.A., LL.B., late Bombay C.S.—Served in non-gazetted appts. from 11th Jan., 1893, to 14th June, 1898; actg. sub-judge to Dec., 1905; confd., 17th Dec., 1905; asst. judge and jt. judge, Feb., 1923; O.B.E., June, 1924; offg.

judge and sess. judge, July, 1924; confd., Nov., 1924; retd., Nov., 1928; author of a Gujarati legal work, 'The Conciliators' Guide,' and also 'A Sketch of the Life of Sri Saiyid Ahmedkhan.'

KAJI, HIRALAL LALLUBHAI, M.A., B.Sc., Indian Educl. Service (prof., coll. of commerce, Bombay) (b. 8th Apl., 1886).—Held non-gazetted appts. in Rajkot from 11th April, 1910, to 2nd Aug., 1916; lecturer in geography, Bombay, 3rd Aug., 1916; prof. ditto, Feb., 1919; I.E.S. from 5th Feb., 1921; prof. of statistics, Feb., 1921; K.-i.-H. medal, 2nd class, June, 1930.

KALE, CHINTAMAN GOVIND, B.A., B.Sc., B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Bombay) (b. 5th Oct., 1890).—Joined the service, 25th Aug., 1917; asst. engr. (prov. service), Aug., 1918; asst. exec. engr., Aug., 1919; offg. exec. engr., July, 1923; confd., Aug., 1927.

KALUMAL PAHLUMAL, B.A., LL.B. (b. 18th April, 1877).—Officiated as judge, small cause ct., Karachi, from 3rd Dec., 1927, to 25th Mar., 1929; confd., Mar., 1929; retd., Dec., 1935.

KALYANARAMAN, CHELLAMIER, B.A., B.L., Indian C.S. (it. mag., and dep. collr., Orissa) (b. 21st Sept., 1906).—Educ. at School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 12th Oct., 1931; arrived in India, Nov., 1931, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. magte. and collr.; offg. under-secty. to govt., fin. dept., Bihar and Orissa, Oct., 1935; under-secty. to govt., Orissa, Apl., 1936 to Mar., 1937.

KALYANA SUNDARAM, KUTHUR VAIDYANATHA, B.A. (Mad.), Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Central Provs.) (b. 1st Jan., 1904).—Educ. at Univ. of Madras and Christ's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 14th Oct., 1927; arrived 15th Dec., 1927, and served in the Central Provs. as asst. commr., sub-judge, Dec., 1931; regr. judl. commr.'s court, June, 1932; offg. dist. and sess. judge, May, 1934; ditto (subs. provl.), Jan., 1936; offg. regr., high ct., Jan., 1936; attd. legisl. dept., govt. of India, May, 1936; on spec. duty, reforms office, govt. of India, Sept., 1936.

KAMA KAKA, BURJORJI HORMASJI, M.C., Lt.-Col., I.M.S. (emo. Baluchistan) (b. 24th Aug., 1883).—First commn., 25th Feb., 1921; civil surg., Dera Imail Khan, May, 1930; agency surg., S. Waziristan, Mar., 1933; civil surg., Kurram, Oct., 1933; C.M.O., Baluchistan, Mar., 1937.

KAMALA PATI ROY (see Roy, K. P.).

KAMAL-UD-DIN AHMAD, SHAMS-UL-ULAMA, M.A., late Indian Educl. Service (b. 20th Jan., 1882).—Apptd. prin. Chittagong Madrasah, 1st Apl., 1915; offg. prinpl., Calcutta Madrasah, Dec., 1926; ditto, Krishnagar coll., July, 1928; inspr. of schools, Nov., 1932; prin., Krishnagar coll., Dec., 1934; retd., Jan., 1937.

KAMAT DWARKANATH DHARMAJI, B.A., L.M. and S. (Bom.), L.R.C.P. and S. (Edin.), L.F.P.S. (Glas.), Lt.-Col. I.M.S., retd. (b. 29th Feb., 1880).—Joined 2nd Feb., 1907, and served in mil. dept. prior to 5th Feb., 1914; on mil. duty from 11th Aug., 1914, to 12th Aug., 1920; civil surg., Oct., 1918; retd., Mar., 1935.

KAMAT, GAJANAN RAOJI, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Assam) (b. 26th Dec., 1908).—Educ. at Bombay University, R.I. College of Science and Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 12th Oct., 1931; arrived in India, Nov., 1931, and served in Assam as asst. commr.; offg. under-secty. to govt., Assam, in the depts. under the chief secty., Nov., 1934; confd., Mar., 1935; headquarters asst. to collr. of salt rev., Madras, May, 1937.

KAMATH, HUNDI SRINIVASA, B.A. (Mad.) Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Central Provs.) (b. 21st Jan., 1905).—Educ. at Univ. of Madras, University Coll. and Sch. of Economics, London, and St. John's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 8th Oct., 1928; arrived, 16th Nov., 1928, and served in the Central Provs. as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., Dec., 1935.

KAMATH, HUNDI VISHNU, Indian C.S. (under secty. to govt., Central Provs.) (b. 15th July, 1907).—Educ. at Madras University, London School of Economics and London School of Oriental Studies; joined the service, 13th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930, and served in the Central Provs., as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., June, 1936; under secty. to govt., Central Provs., Oct., 1936.

KAMESHAR NATH, RAI BAHADUR BABU, B.A., LL.B., late United Provs. Civil Service (b. 29th Oct., 1874).—Joined the service as offg. munsif., 6th July, 1902; confd., June, 1905; offg. sub-judge, April, 1915; confd., Sept., 1916; dist. and sess. judge, July, 1927; retd., Oct., 1929.

KAMLAKAR DUBE, Pandit, Rai Bahadur, M.A., late United Provs. C.S. (b. 10th Feb., 1881).—Joined the service, 1st Dec., 1904; dep. collr., Dec., 1906; mag. and collr., July, 1931; retd., May, 1935.

KAMTA PRASHAD, M.Sc., B.A., Indian Educl. Service (prof. of physics, science coll., Patna) (b. 11th Feb., 1890).—Joined the service 9th Dec., 1919; prof. of physics, Patna, July, 1920; prcf., Ravenshaw Coll., March, 1922.

KAMTE, NARAYANRAV MARUTIRAV, B.A., Indian Police (b. 11th Sept., 1900).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bombay, 18th Aug., 1923; offg. supt. variously from May, 1929; dep. commr., Bombay (crimes).

KANCHI PRASAD, Indian State Rlys. (exec. engr., E.I. Rly. (b. 17th Nov., 1890).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 13th Sept., 1914; exec. engr., Oct., 1923.

KANETKAR, V. G., Indian Police.—Apptd. asst. supt., Bombay, on probn., 30th Jan., 1934.

KANGA, DARAB DINSHAH, A.I.C., M.A., A.I.I.Sc., F.C.S., late Indian Educl. Service (b. 24th Nov., 1879).—Joined the service, 1st Sept., 1923; prof. of chemistry, Gujarat Coll., June, 1924; retd., Nov., 1934.

KANGA, SIR JAMSHEDJI BEHRAMJI, Kt., M.A., LL.B., Barr., late Judl. Dept., Bombay.—Advocate-general, 16th April, 1922, to Feb., 1935; Kt., June, 1928; services placed at disposal of Govt. of India, Oct., 1932.

KANIA, HARILAL JAYKISANDAS, LL.B., Judicial dept., Bombay (judge, high ct., Bombay).—Apptd. offg. judge, high ct., Bombay, 17th June, 1930; actg. addl. judge, Oct., 1932; judge, high ct., Bombay, June, 1933.

KANJILAL, PROPHULLA C. (see Prophulla, C. K.).

KANWAR SAIN, LALA RAI SAHIB, Indian Service of Engrs. (under-secty. (Haveli), Punjab) (b. 2nd Jan., 1899).—Joined the service, 9th Oct., 1922; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1923; exec. engr., Oct., 1932; under-secty. (Haveli), May, 1937. Author of "A Guide for the Young Men" (in Urdu) regarding social reforms.

KAPADIA, DINSHAH DORABJI, M.A., B.Sc., late Indian Educl. Service (Bombay) (b. 22nd July, 1875).—Joined the service, 8th Sept., 1919; prof. of maths., Deccan Coll., Sept., 1919; offg. prin., ditto, June, 1927; retd., July, 1930.

KAPADIA, JAMSHED DINSHAH, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Bombay) (b. 15th Feb., 1908).—Educ. at Cambridge University (Non-Collegiate); joined the service, 12th Oct., 1931; arrived in India, Dec., 1931, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.

KAPADIA, MANEKSHA PHIROZSHAH, B.A., Income Tax Dept., Bombay (asst. commr. of income tax) (b. 12th Oct., 1887).—Held temp. and permanent non-gazetted appts. from 21st Dec., 1908, to 7th Feb., 1924; income tax officer, Bombay City, Feb., 1924; asst. commr. of income tax, April, 1925; on spec. duty with Central Bd. of Rev., June, 1937.

KAPUR, BALKISHAN (see Balkishan Kapur).

KAPUR SINGH, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 2nd March, 1909).—Educ. at the Khalsa High School, Lyallpur, the Punjab Univ. and St. Catherine's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 6th Oct., 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1933; and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; sub-divl. offer., May, 1936.

KARAKA, FRAMJI JAHANGIR DORABHAI FRAMJI, B.A., late Impl. Customs Service (b. 14th Aug., 1882).—Held non-gaz. appts. from 1st Oct., 1907, to 14th May, 1913; asst. collr., May, 1913; offg. ltr., June, 1934; retd., Aug., 1937.

KARAMATULLAH, MUHAMMAD, Indian C.S. (under secty., dev. dept., Madras) (b. 1st May, 1904).—Educ. at University of Madras. and Christ's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 3rd Oct., 1928; arrived, Dec., 1928, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and magte.; sub. collr. and jt. magte., Nov., 1930; under-secty., dev. dept., Madras, Apl., 1935.

KARANDIKAR, SHANKAR KESHAV, B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr.) (b. 6th April, 1901).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Bombay, 9th Feb., 1926; offg. exec. engr., Mar., 1930; confd., Feb., 1935.

KARAN SINGH, RAI BAHADUR THAKUR, B.A., LL.B. late Indian Police (b. 26th July, 1882).—Joined the service as dep. supt., 6th July, 1906; supt., Oct., 1922; retd., July, 1937.
KARIM, A. (see Abdul Karim).

KARIM, FAZL AHMAD, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 5th Dec., 1907).—Educated at Allahabad University and New College, Oxford; joined the service, 10th Oct., 1932; arrived in India, Nov., 1932, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1934.

KARIM, MUHAMMAD FAZLUL, see MUHAMMAD, F. K.

KARM CHAND, late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 8th Feb., 1882).—Joined the service, 21st Sept., 1905; asst. engr., Sept., 1906; exec. engr., Sept., 1914; off. dep. chief engr., Aug., 1925, Nov., 1927, Jan., 1929, and again Sept., 1930; confd., Nov., 1930; retd., Feb., 1937.

KARTAR SINGH, BHAI, Sardar Bahadur, Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Punjab) (b. 2nd Oct., 1885).—Joined the service, 1st April, 1912; asst. consvr., Jan., 1923; dep. consvr., Dec., 1925; on depn. to Chamba State, Dec., 1930.

KASHI RAM BERY (see Bery, K. R.).

KATHPALIA, K. N. (see Krishna Narayan K.).

KAUL, H. K. (see Hari Kishan Kaul).

KAUL, MAHESHWAR NATH, M.A. (Cantab), Barr. (b. 16th Sept., 1901).—Apptd. dep. secty., Legis. Assembly dept., Sept., 1937.

KAUL, PRADYUMNA KRISHNA, B.A., Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Punjab) (b. 14th Jan., 1900).—Educ. at Punjab Univ. and Queen's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 15th Oct., 1923; arrived, 10th Dec., 1923, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; dep. commr. (subs. provl.), Apl., 1931; confd., Mar., 1935.

KAUL, TRILOKI NATH, B.A., LL.B., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., U.P.) (b. 27th Dec., 1912).—Educ. at S.P. High School, Srinagar, Kashmir, Punjab Univ., Allahabad Univ., and King's College, London; joined the service, 15th Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Nov., 1937, and served in U.P. as asst. mag. and collr.

KAULA, GANGARAM, C.I.E., B.A., late India Finance Dept. (b. 9th May, 1877).—Joined the service, 3rd Jan., 1896, as asst. examr., p.w. accts.; dep. examr., Feb., 1900; examr., Jan., 1906; dept. comptr., Central Prov., April, 1909; dep. acctnt.-gen., United Prov., April, 1912; ditto, Punjab, Oct., 1914; on spl. duty in connection with revision of P.W. Code, from April, 1918, to March, 1920; acctnt.-gen., May, 1923; chief auditor, O.R. Rly., Dec., 1923; offg. acctnt.-gen., Central Provs., June, 1924; acctnt.-gen., central revenues, May, 1925; acct.-gen., rlys., Feb., 1929; dir. of rly. audit, rly. bd., Apl., 1929; C.I.E., June, 1930; offg. contr. of civil accts., Apl., 1930; retd., Oct., 1932.

KAYANI, MALIK RUSTUM, Indian Civil Service (dist and sess. judge, Punjab) (b. 18th Oct., 1902).—Educ. at Univ. of the Punjab and Trinity Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 29th Oct., 1927; arrived, Nov., 1927; and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; addl. dist. and sess. judge, Apl., 1934; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Mar., 1935; confd., Nov., 1936.

KAYE, JOHN FREDERIC BARKER, Indian Police (supt., Madras) (b. 29th Aug., 1895).—Joined the service, 22nd April, 1919; asst. supt., Apl., 1921; offg. dist. supt., March, 1924; confd., May, 1930; pers. asst. to inspr.-genl. of rlwys., and C.I.D., May, 1931; prin. police training sch., June, 1934.

KAZIJI, ABDEALI MUHAMMAD ALI (see Abdeali M. A. Kaziji).

KAZIM RAZA, SAIYID, Indian Police (supt., United Provs.) (b. 25th Jan., 1898).—Joined the service, 18th Feb., 1921; offg. supt., April, 1924, and again April, 1927; confd., Nov., 1932; asst. to D.I.G., C.I.D., April, 1925; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1930.

KEALY, Sir EDWARD HERBERT, Kt., C.I.E., M.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 7th June, 1873). Educ. at Felsted, and Univ. Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1896; arrived, 9th Dec., 1897, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. asst. commr., Merwara, March, 1902; ditto, Ajmer, April, 1904; 1st asst. to govr.-genl.'s agent in Central India, Sept., 1904; asst. sec., foreign dept., govt. of India, Aug., 1905; on special duty in foreign dept., Dec., 1905; pol. asst., Jan., 1907; asst. commr., Ajmer, May, 1907; pol. agent, N.W.F. Prov., July, 1908; divl. and sess. judge, Feb., 1909; supt., census operations, Rajputana and Ajmer-Merwara, from May, 1910; transfed. to Bihar, April, 1912; addl. divl. and sess. judge, Derajat, Oct., 1914; ditto, Peshawar, Feb., 1915; sec. to chief commr., N.-W. Frontier Prov., May, 1915; pol. agent in Baghalkhand, March, 1922; and resdt. at Gwalior, May, 1922; resdt. at Baroda, Aug., 1924; C.I.E., July, 1926; offg. agent to gov. gen. in C.I., March, 1927; ditto, in States of Western India, Oct., 1927; confd., April, 1928; Kt., June, 1932; ret'd., Dec., 1932.

KEARNS, CYRIL SEYMOUR VERE, late Indian Police (b. 28th Apl., 1893).—Joined the service, 4th Nov., 1913; asst. supt., Dec., 1914; offg. supt., June, 1926; confd., Jan., 1930; ret'd., Mar., 1934.

KEARSEY, STEPHEN HENRY, late Indian Police (b. 6th May, 1882).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., 12th Nov., 1921; offg. dist. supt., March, 1926; confd., March, 1928; supt., rly., police, eastern seen., Feb., 1932; ret'd., Jan., 1936.

KEATES, HENRY CREWE, M.D., B.S., Lt.-Col., I.M.S. (ret'd.).—First commission, 31st Jan., 1903; in mil. employ till Nov., 1907, when he was apptd. asst. plague medical officer, Punjab; dist. plague medical officer, Aug., 1919; on mil. duty, Aug., 1914, to Jan., 1920; civil surg., Punjab, Dec., 1918; ret'd., June, 1928.

KEDAR NATH AGARWAL, Indian Service of Engrs. (asst. exec. engr., United Provs.) (b. 30th June, 1890).—Joined the service as temp. engr., 1st Nov., 1921; asst. engr., Aug., 1923; apptd. to I.S.E. as asst. exec. engr., 1st Jan., 1930; offg. exec. engr., Aug., 1929.

KEEGAN, DENIS FRANK, M.B.E., Impl. Customs Service (asst. collr.) (b. 2nd Dec., 1896).—Apptd. prob., Impl. Customs Service, 18th Feb., 1924; asst. collr., Madras, Feb., 1926; secty., tariff bd., cotton textile industry enquiry, July, 1926; asst. collr., Bombay, Jan., 1928; and Aug., 1924; ditto, Rangoon, Mar., 1928; and again, Dec., 1932; ditto, Karachi, June, 1931; ditto, Bombay, Aug., 1934; offg. collr., Karachi, Oct., 1936; M.B.E., Feb., 1937.

KEELAN, CYRIL JOHN, Indian State Rlys. (exec. engr., G.I.P. Rly.) (b. 8th June, 1885).—Joined the service as temp. engr., 5th Nov., 1908; asst. engr., July, 1912; resdt. engr., July, 1916; divl. engr., June, 1926.

KEELAN, DOUGLAS HUGH, V.D., late Indian State Railways (b. 27th Feb., 1870).—Joined the service, 17th June, 1901, as asst. traffic supt.; dist. traffic supt., April, 1910; dep. traffic manager, O. & K. Rly., Oct., 1918; offg. chief operating supt., March, 1925; dep. ch. comml. manager, E.I. Rly., July, 1925; offg. ch. comml. manager, April, 1927; ret'd., June, 1934.

KEELAN, ESMOND HARDING, late Indian State Rlys. (b. 28th Sept., 1882).—Joined the service as asst. loco. supt., 26th Oct., 1903; dist. carr. and wagon supt., Feb., 1916; offg. dep. ditto, Feb., 1925; divl. rolling stock officer and offg. dep. ch. operating supt., Oct., 1927; dep. ch. mechl. engr., Mar., 1932; ret'd., Oct., 1936.

KEELING, Sir HUGH TROWBRIDGE, Kt., C.S.I., A.M.I.C.E., late Madras Public Works Dept.—Trained at R.I.E. Coll.; apptd. asst. engr., Oct., 1887; exec. engr., Oct., 1898; suptg. engr. March, 1912; on deputr. as chief engr. and sec. to the chief commr. in the P.W.D., Delhi, Nov., 1912; member, Impl. Delhi Cttee., 1913; C.S.I., June, 1915; ret'd., April, 1920; re-employed as chief engr. for five years from 14th April, 1920; Kt., June, 1923.

KEENE, Hugh, Indian Police (dist. supt., Madras) (b. 22nd Nov., 1897).—Joined the service, 7th Oct., 1920; confd. asst. supt., July, 1922; offg. dist. supt., Apl., 1928; confd., Oct., 1930; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1924; asst. inspr.-genl., Nov., 1935.

KELLY, HENRY GERALD, V.D., late Indian State Rlys. (G.I.P. Rly.) (b. 3rd Feb., 1874).—Joined the service as draughtsman, 21st Feb., 1896; asst. loco. supt., March, 1898; dist. ditto, July, 1901; dep. transportation supt., Nov., 1922; offg. ch. transportation supt., March, 1926; confd., June, 1927; ret'd., Feb., 1932.

KEITH, ROBERT FARQUHARSON, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Bombay) (b. 22nd June, 1912).—Educ. at Fettes College, Gonville and Caius College, Cambridge, and the School of Oriental Studies, London; appointed after exam. of 1935; arrived in India, Jan., 1937, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.

KEKRE, BALKRISHNA BHASKAR, B.A., late Income Tax Dept., Central Provs. (b. 5th Feb., 1878).—Held acting and permanent non-gazetted appts. from 1st Oct., 1901, to 1st Sept., 1902; extra asst. commr., Feb., 1909; asst. commr. of income tax, March, 1922; ret'd., Jan., 1932.

KELLAWAY, HERBERT FRANK, Office of High Commr. for India (higher clerical officer, store dept.) (b. 7th Feb., 1883).—Apptd. clerk, 2nd class, India store depot, 27th Dec., 1901; on mil. service, Oct., 1917, to Feb., 1919; transfed. to office of high commr. for India, Oct., 1920; higher clerical officer, April, 1922.

KELLY, CHARLES SPENCER, Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Burma) (b. 15th June, 1907).—Educ. at King Edward's School, Stafford and Balliol College, Oxford; appointed after examination of 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1931, and served as asst. commr. in Burma.

KELLY, JAMES, M.A., late Indian Educl. Service (b. 31st Aug., 1880).—Apptd. asst. princpl., Aitchison Coll., Lahore, 18th March, 1904; princpl., ditto, Oct., 1917; retd., Aug., 1935.

KELLY, JOHN WILLIAM, C.I.E., B.A., Indian Finance Dept. (contr. of currency, Bombay) (b. 25th Sept., 1885).—Joined the service, 14th Oct., 1910; asst. acctnt-gen., United Prov., May, 1912; ditto, Madras, Dec., 1913; asst. acctnt-gen., United Prov., May, 1915; ditto, Central Prov., May, 1921; currency officer, Bombay, April, 1922; offg. dep. contr. of currency, Calcutta, Sept., 1925; ditto, Bombay, Oct., 1926; offg. contr. of the currency, Apl., 1931; June, 1932, and again, Feb., 1933; confd., Feb., 1935; C.I.E., June, 1934; dir., res. bank of India, Nov., 1935.

KELLY, PATRICK JOSEPH, M.B., Ch.B. (N.U.I.), L.M. (Dub.), Major, I.M.S. (D.M.O., Madras) (b. 7th Apl., 1902).—First commn., 7th Mar., 1927; in mil employ until 4th July, 1934; dist. med. officer, July, 1934.

KELLY, Sir PATRICK ALOYSIUS, Kt., C.I.E., late Indian Police (b. 14th July, 1880).—Joined the service, 22nd Nov., 1902, and posted to Bombay; supt. of police, Sept., 1912; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1921; commr. of police, Sept., 1922; C.I.E., Jan., 1926; Kt., Jan., 1930; bar to King's police medal, Jan., 1931; presy.-magte., Bombay, Jan., 1932; retd., Apl., 1935.

KELLY, PHILIP DESMOND LORNE, Indian Police (supt., Bengal) (b. 13th Sept., 1897).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 22nd Dec., 1919; offg. supt., July, 1924; confd., Apl., 1930.

KELSALL, ROBERT, D.S.O., M.D., Lt.-Col., I.M.S. (retd.), late Burma Medl. Dept. (b. 18th Oct., 1875).—First commn. dated 31st Aug., 1903; in mil. employ to 3rd Mar., 1905; spl. plague officer, Rangoon, March, 1905; offg. civil surg., April, 1909; on mil. service from 3rd Dec., 1914, to 28th April, 1919; civil surg., May, 1919; offg. medl. supt., gen. hosp., Rangoon, Nov., 1919; confd., Feb., 1921; physician, gen. hosp., Rangoon, June, 1926; retd., Oct., 1930.

KEMM, ARCHIBALD HENRY, B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 7th June, 1891).—Educ. at Radley Coll., and Merton Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1914; arrived, Dec., 1915, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr., and settlt. officer; apptd. to the I.A.R.O., August, 1916, to March, 1919; offg. mag. and collr., May, 1926; confd., Dec., 1927; addl. dep. secty. to govt. of Bengal, pol. dept., Feb., 1928; retd., July, 1933.

KEMP, ARTHUR HUGH, Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. coll., Bihar) (b. 28th Feb., 1905).—Educ. at Portsmouth Grammar Sch., and Emmanuel Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 6th Oct., 1928; arrived, Nov., 1928, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. coll. and mag.; jt. mag., Nov., 1928; offg. mag. and collr., Mar., 1935.

KEMP, CYRIL KENNETH, India Police (supt.) (b. 2nd April, 1903).—Joined the service as asst. supt., United Provs., 2nd Dec., 1922; awarded King's medal, Jan., 1932; offg. supt., Nov., 1933; confd., Mar., 1934.

KEMP, Sir KENNETH MCINTYRE, late Judl. dept., Bombay (b. 13th Dec., 1883).—Joined the service as profir., govt. law school, 1st June, 1919; editor, Indian law reports, June, 1921; offg. judge, high ct., Bombay, June, 1928; retd., May, 1931; apptd. advocate-genl., Bombay, Feb., 1935; knighted, May, 1937; resigned, Dec., 1937.

KENNAWAY, FREDERICK WALTER, B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 13th Sept., 1874).—Educ. at Dulwich and King's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1897; arrived, 27th Dec., 1898, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; under sec. to govt., April, 1902; junr. sec. to finl. commr., May, 1902, to March, 1906; asst. settlmt. offr., Aug., 1906; dep. commr., Nov., 1913; dist. and sess. judge, Oct., 1915; rev. and public wks. minister, Bahawalpur State, Feb., 1924; offg. commr., Feb., 1928; temp. member of exec. council, Punjab, Aug., 1928; retd., July, 1929.

KENNEDY, ALWYNE JOSEPH, Indian Police (supt., Bengal) (b. 13th Sept., 1895).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 27th Nov., 1920; offg. supt., May, 1924; confd., April, 1929.

KENNEDY, ROBERT STEWART, India Office (suptg. exec. officer, acctnl.-gen.'s dept.) (b. 29th Dec., 1879).—Educ. at George Watson's Coll., Edinburgh, and Madras Coll., St. Andrews; apptd. 2nd class clerk, registry and record dept., 10th Feb., 1904; transfld. to finl. dept., April, 1905; temp. asst. to resdnt. clerks, Aug., 1914; temp. addl. resdnt. clerk, Oct., 1914, to Sept., 1915; on mil. service, Sept., 1915, to Oct., 1919; transfld. to Indo-European Tel. Dept., 1920; transfld. to acctnt.-gen.'s dept., Feb., 1922; higher exec. officer, April, 1922; also assessor of income tax; suptg. exec. officer, Jan. 1928.

KENNEDY, WILLIAM GEORGE, Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 29th Jan., 1909).—Educ. at Calday Grange Grammar School, West Kirby, Cheshire, and Jesus College, Cambridge; apptd. after examination of 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1931, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., Apl., 1936.

KENNEDY-MINARDS, W. I., B.Sc., A.M.I. Chem.E., Major, late His Majesty's Mint, Bombay (b. 20th Oct., 1887).—Apptd. dep. assay master (on probn.), Jan., 1920; confd., July, 1920; offg. assay master, Jan., 1922; confd., April, 1922; retd., Feb., 1934.

KENNY, DICK EDWARD COURTENAY, Lt.-Col., I.A., late Burma Commn. (b. 20th Nov., 1885).—Arrived in India, 5th Nov., 1905; Lt. 98th infy., Aug., 1913; asst. commdnt., Southern Shan States, Sept., 1913; reverted to mil. duty from May, 1917, to March, 1919; apptd. to Burma commn., 6th Feb., 1922, as asst. commr.; sub. divnl. officer and asst. supt. in addn., June, 1923; offg. dep. commr., Sept., 1926; confd., Oct., 1930; dep. commr., &c., Port Blair, Dec., 1927; offg. ch. commr., ditto, Aug., 1931; retd., Jan., 1937.

KENNY, PATRICK ARTHUR THEODORE, O.B.E., F.S.I., late Survey of India (b. 18th Apl., 1878).—Joined the service as sub-assst. supt., 21st Nov., 1898; extra asst. supt., Dec.,

1906; O.B.E., Sept., 1921; in charge No. 5 Party, and asst. dir. of surveys, C.P., March, 1927; retd., Sept., 1932.

KEOUGH, JOHN EVERARD, late Punjab Civil Service (b. 19th July, 1878).—Held non-gazetted appts. from 24th Dec., 1900; extra asst. commr., Oct., 1911; offg. dep. commr., Sept., 1924; confd., Nov., 1931; retd., July, 1933.

KER, CHARLES MURRAY, Indian C.S. (under secty. to the govt. of India, dept. of lab.) (b. 2nd Sept., 1906).—Educ. at Rugby and Hertford College, Oxford; joined the service, 17th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; secty., spl. tariff bd., Oct., 1935; under secty. to the govt. of India, dept. of indus. and lab., Nov., 1936; under-secty. dept. of lab., Nov., 1937.

KER, JAMES CAMPBELL, M.P., C.S.I., C.I.E., M.A., late Indian C.S. (Bombay) (b. 2nd Jan., 1878).—Educ. at Irvine Acad., Glasgow Univ., and Caius Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1901; arrived, 28th Nov., 1902, and served in Bombay as asst. collr. and mag., and in Sind as asst. collr.; serving under govt. of India, home dept., as personal asst. to dir., criminal intelligence, Aug., 1907, to Dec., 1913; on mil. duty from Oct., 1914, to Feb., 1917; on spl. duty in office of dir. of criminal intell., Simla, Feb. to Nov., 1917; offg. dep. sec. to govt., pol., judl. and spl. depts., Bombay, Dec., 1917; offg. collr. and dist. mag. and pol. agent, Cambay, April, 1918; offg. sec. to govt. genl., etc., depts., March, 1920; confirmed, June, 1920; collr., Jan., 1923; C.I.E., Jan., 1924; pte. sec. to H.E. the govt. of Bombay, April, 1924; C.S.I., June, 1928; retd., May, 1930; M.P. for Western division of Stirling and Clackmannan, Oct., 1931.

KER, NALINI BEHARI, Office of High Commr. for India (educ. officer, exec. grade, educn. dept.) (b. 4th Jan., 1891).—Apptd. educ. officer, 15th July, 1929.

KER, STANLEY DARLING, Indian State Railways (exec. engr., N.W. rly.) (b. 31st Mar., 1888).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1910; exec. engr., N.W. rly., Mar., 1931.

KERMODE, CHARLES WILLIAM DALY, B.A., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Burma) (b. 19th Sep., 1899).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 27th Dec., 1924; dep. consvr., Nov., 1928; Sylviculturist Apl., 1935.

KERR, PERCIVAL JAMES, M.R.C.V.S., Indian Veterinary Service (dir., civil vety. dept., Bengal) (b. 2nd Feb., 1885).—Joined the service, 22nd Jan., 1911; supt., Oct., 1912; in mil. employ from July, 1915 to Mar., 1920; offg. dir., C.V.D., Bengal, Oct. 1924; confd., July, 1927.

KERR, WALTER JOULE, B.A., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 1st Dec., 1880).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1905; arrived 19th Nov., 1905, and served as asst. engr.; under-sec. to govt. of Bengal, public works dept., June, 1910; exec. engr., Oct., 1913; offg. suptg. engr., Oct., 1921; confd., Oct., 1926; offg. ch. engr., April, 1931; confd., Aug., 1933; retd., Dec., 1935.

KERSHAW, HENRY OWEN, B.Sc., late Indian Educ. Service (b. 16th Mar., 1881).—Joined the service 8th Feb., 1909, and apptd.

actg. vice-prl. teachers' coll., Saidapet; inspr. of schs., Madras, March, 1909; retd., June, 1932.

KERSHAW, LIONEL EDWARD, late Income tax dept., Madras (b. 2nd Aug., 1876).—Apptd. to income tax dept., central board of revenue, 12th Aug., 1918; asst. commr., central range, Madras, March, 1925; retd., Aug., 1931.

KERSHAW, Sir LOUIS JAMES, K.C.S.I., C.I.E., late Indian C.S., and India Office (b. 20th Dec., 1869).—Educ. at Belfast Methodist Coll. and Trinity Coll., Dublin; apptd. after exam. of 1888; arrived 31st Oct., 1890, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; transf. to Assam as asst. commr., April, 1892; dep. commr., April, 1898; sec. to govt., judl. and genl. dept., E. Bengal and Assam, Oct., 1905; ditto, fin. and municipl. dept., Feb., 1906; mag. and collr. Feb., 1907; C.I.E., Dec., 1911; transf. to Bihar and Orissa, April, 1912; sec. to govt., finl. and munpl. depts., April, 1912; offg. sec. to govt. of India, dept. of rev. and agric., March, 1914; confirmed, June, 1914; retd. from Indian C.S., Nov., 1915; apptd. sec., rev. and stat. dept., India Office, Nov., 1915; C.S.I., Jan., 1918; on special duty at Peace Conference, Paris, 1918; delegate at 1st and 2nd internl. labour conferences at Washington, 1919, and Genoa, 1920; delegate at internl. conference on communications and transit, Barcelona, 1920; K.C.S.I., Jan., 1921; sec. industries and overseas dept., May, 1921; on depn. to India, Oct., 1921, to March, 1922; delegate at 4th, 5th, 6th and 7th internl. labour conferences, Geneva, 1922, 1923, 1924 and 1925; representative of India on gov. body internl. labour office, 1923; asst. under sec. of state, Jan., 1924; member, Indian Federal Finance Expert comm., Jan.-Apl., 1932; member, Ind. staty. rly. bd. ctee., June, 1933; ditto, Ind. res. bank ctee., July, 1933; dep. under-sec. of state, Dec., 1933; retd., Dec., 1934.

KESAVANUNNI NAYAR, M.B.A., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Madras) (b. 25th June, 1899).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 9th Nov., 1923; dep. consvr., Nov., 1927.

KESHAVA RAO, NEELAMANGALA, B.A., B.E. (C.E.), Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Madras) (b. 29th Mar., 1889).—Joined the service as appr. engr., 4th July, 1913; asst. engr., July, 1914; exec. engr., July, 1923.

KESHO DAT JOSHI, B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., United Provs.) (b. 29th Nov., 1890).—Joined the service as proby. extra asst. consvr., July, 1915; confd., Apl., 1917; promoted to I.F.S., 15th Apl., 1931; dep. consvr., Apl., 1931.

KESWANI, GOPALDAS HASSANAND, M.B.E., DIWAN BAHADUR, L.C.E., Indian Service of Engineers (exec. engr.) (b. 7th Mar., 1883).—Held non-gazetted appts. from Feb., 1905; asst. engr., Feb., 1921; I.S.E. as asst. exec. engr., 1st Jan., 1932; offg. exec. engr., Jan., 1932; confd. Jan., 1937; M.B.E., Jan., 1938.

KEWALRAMANI, RAMCHAND MALHANDAS, India Posts and Tels. (dir., tels.) (b. 3rd Oct., 1883).—Joined the service as apprentice asst. supt., 24th Sept., 1907; asst. divl. engr., Aug.,

1920; divl. engr., Feb., 1926; offg. dir. tel. engrg., Nov., 1932; and again, Sept., 1933; confd., June, 1935.

KEYES, Sir TERENCE HUMPHREY, K.C.I.E., C.S.I., C.M.G., Brig.-Gen., I.A., ret'd., late Pol. Dept., Govt. of India (b. 28th May, 1877).—First commn. dated 20th Jan., 1897; in mil. emp. to 24th Jan., 1903, when he was apptd. probationer, pol. dept., govt. of India; asst. commr., Punjab, Feb., 1903; pol. asst., Seistan, Nov., 1903, and asst. to H.B.M.'s vice-consul, Seistan and K in; H.B.M.'s consul, Turbat-i-Haidari, April, 1906; pol. asst. and asst. to agent to govr.-gen. in Baluchistan, Nov., 1908; asst. pol. agent in Baluchistan, Nov., 1909; ditto and asst. pol. agent, Quetta-Pishin, April, 1911; asst. pol. agent, Mekran, and commdt., Mekran Levy Corps, Feb., 1912; pte. sec. to lieut.-govr., Punjab, June, 1912; under-sec. to govt. of India, for. dept., Oct., 1912; asst. pol. agent, Mekran, and commdt., Mekran Levy Corps, Dec., 1912; pol. agent, Bahrein, May, 1914; on spl. duty, Mekran Border, March, 1916, to April, 1917; C.I.E., June, 1917; on special duty under War Office, June, 1917, to Nov., 1919, and under Foreign Office, Nov., 1919, to June, 1920; C.M.G., Nov., 1919; asst. pol. agent, Sibi, Jan., 1921; pol. agent, Kalat, Nov., 1922; rev. and judl. commr., Baluchistan, July, 1927; C.S.I., Jan., 1928; offg. British envoy at court of Nepal, March, 1928; offg. resdt., Gwalior, Oct., 1928; offg. agent to govr. genl., W.I. States, Apl., 1929; offg. resdt., Hyderabad, Feb., 1930; confd., Aug., 1930; ret'd., Oct., 1933; K.C.I.E., Jan., 1933.

KHAIRAZ, GULAM HUSSAIN RAHIMULLA, Barr., Bombay Judicial Dept. (presy. mag.) (b. 24th Dec., 1882).—Joined the dept., 1st April, 1913; 4th presy. mag., April, 1913; 3rd ditto, Feb., 1924; 2nd ditto, March, 1925.

KHALEELI, ABBAS, Indian C.S. (under secty. to govt., dev. dept., Madras) (b. 14th Sept., 1908).—Educ. at Brasenose College, Oxford; joined the service, 13th Oct., 1931; arrived in India, Nov., 1931; and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr.; sub-collr., Feb., 1935; under secty., dev. dept., Madras, May, 1936.

KHALIK, MUHAMMAD ABDUL (see Muhammad A. K.).

KHAMBATA, RATANSHAW BOMANJI, M.R.C.S., L.R.C.P., D.P.H. Public Health Dept., Bengal (dir. of public health) (b. 23rd Aug., 1879).—Joined the service, 18th Jan., 1913; asst. dir. of public health, Bengal, April, 1921; dir. of public health laboratory, Jan., 1927; offg. dir. of public health, Bengal, June, 1929; confd., Feb., 1931.

KHAN, ABBAS ALI (see Abbas Ali Khan).

KHAN, ABDUL ALI (see Abdul Ali Khan).

KHAN, ABDUL GHAFOOR (see Abdul Ghafoor Khan).

KHAN, ABU ABDULLAH MUHAMMAD ZAKA-ULLAH (see Abu Abdullah M.Z.K.).

KHAN, ABDUL HAMID (see Abdul Hamid Khan).

KHAN, A.K. (see Abdul Kaiynn Khan).

KHAN, ABDUL MAJID (see Abdul Majid Khan).

KHAN, ABDUL RASHEED (see Rasheed Khan, Abdul).

KHAN, A. S. (see Abdus Samad Khan).

KHAN, AITIZAZ-UD-DIN AHMAD (see Aitizaz-ud-Din Ahmad Khan).

KHAN, ALLAH YAR (see Allah Yar Khan).

KHAN, AURELIUS DAVID, B.A. (Cantab.), Indian Civil Service (jl. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 21st March, 1903).—Educ. at Univ. of Calcutta, and Selwyn Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 21st Oct., 1927; arrived, Dec., 1927, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. addl. dist. and sess. judge, Mar., and again, Oct., 1933.

KHAN, DILAWAR HUSAIN (see Dilawar Husain Khan).

KHAN, FAZL MUHAMMAD (see Fazl, M. K.).

KHAN, GHAZANFUR, A. (see Ghazanfur Ali Khan).

KHAN, GHULAM AHMAD (see Ghulam. A. K.).

KHAN, INAYAT ULLAH (see Inayat Ullah Khan).

KHAN, ISLAM AHMAD (see Islam Ahmad Khan).

KHAN, K. B. ABDUL RASHID (see Abdul. R. K.).

KHAN KHURSHED AHMAD (see Khurshed Ahmad Khan).

KHAN, KURBAN ALI (see Kurban A. K.).

KHAN, MAQSUD ALI (see Maqsud Ali Khan).

KHAN, MIR SAEED ALAM, Nawabzada (see Mir, S. A. K.).

KHAN, MUHAMMAD HAYAT (see Muhammad Hayat K.).

KHAN, MUHAMMAD INAMULLAH (see Muhammad I. K.).

KHAN, MUHAMMAD MOOSA (see Muhammad M. K.).

KHAN, MUNSHI MAQSUD ALI (see Maqsud Ali Khan M.).

KHAN, NIAZ MUHAMMAD, see Niaz, M. K.

KHAN, SAADAT-UL-LAH (see Saadat-ul-lah Khan).

KHAN, SAHIBZADA SARDAR MUHAMMAD (see Muhammad Khan, S.S.).

KHAN, SAID ULLAH (see Said Ullah Khan).

KHAN, SAID-UZ-ZAFAR (see Said-uz-Zafar Khan).

KHAN, SHAMSHAD ALI (see Shamshad Ali K.).

KHAN, SHUJA-UD-DIN (see Shuja-ud-din K.).

KHAN, TALIA MUHAMMAD (see Talia Muhammad Khan).

KHAN, ZAHID HASAN (see Zahid Hasan Khan).

KHAN, ZAMAN MEHDI (see Zaman Mehdi Khan).

KHANDALAVALA, DORAB N. D., B.A., LL.B., Barr., Bombay Judicial Dept. (presy. mag.) (b. 14th June, 1884).—Joined the dept., 4th Sept., 1919; 5th presdy. mag., Feb., 1924; 4th ditto, March, 1925; offg. ch. ditto, Apl., 1933.

KHANDEKAR, SADASHIV BALVANT, Income Tax dept., Bombay (asst. commr.) (b. 21st July, 1884).—Joined the service, 20th Feb., 1906; asst. commr., Aug., 1934.

KHANNA, RATAN CHAND, M.A., F.R.E.S., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 21st Mar., 1899).—Joined the service, 17th Feb., 1922; asst. auditor, E.B. rly., Apl., 1927; asst. dir., army audit, E. Cmd., Apl., 1932; asst. acct.-genl., Central revs., Apl., 1936.

KHARAK SINGH, SARDAR SAHIB, M.A. (Punjab) late Indian Agricul. Service (b. 23rd Nov., 1881).—Joined the service as asst. prof., Punjab agric. coll., 6th Aug., 1908; associate prof., ditto, Dec., 1921; apptd. to I.A.S., 6th Aug. 1922; dep. dir. of agric., March, 1927; retd., Nov., 1936.

KHAREGAT, P. M. (see Pheroze Merwan Kharegat).

KHAREGAT, RUSTAM MERWAN, M.B., Lt.-Col., I.M.S. (agency surgeon) (b. 3rd Feb., 1889).—First commn. dated 23rd Jan., 1917; civil surg., Ajmer, July, 1924; offg. agency surg., Bundelkhand, Apl., 1927; confd., July, 1927; ditto, Sistan, Feb., 1928; ditto, Bannu, Jan., 1930; civil surg., Hazara and supt., jail, Abbottabad, Mar., 1931; C.M.O., in C.I., and resdy. surg., Indore, June, 1934; agency surgeon, Bundelkhand, Oct., 1934.

KHAREGHAT, M. P. (see Mancherji Pestan Khareghat).

KHARKAR, SHANKAR GOVIND, B.A., LL.B., late Bombay C.S., Judl. Branch (b. 29th Dec., 1875).—Held non-gazetted appts. from 4th Jan., 1901, to 25th March, 1907; sub-judge, March, 1907; asst. judge, Oct., 1925; ditto, and addl. sess. judge, Nov., 1925; jt. judge and ditto, July, 1926; offg. judge and sess. judge, Oct., 1927; confd., May, 1929; retd., Dec., 1930.

KHARSHEDJI, EDALJI KOTVAL (see Kotval K.E.).

KHATTRI, BAIJNATH (see Baijnath K.).

KHER, RAO SAHIB PANDIT L. S. R. (see Lachman Sitaram Kher).

KHER, GOPAL SAKHARAM, B.A., LL.B., Judl. Dept., Central Provs. (dist. and sess. judge) (b. 16th Nov., 1885).—Joined the service, 11th Oct., 1910; sub-judge, Nov., 1923; dist. and sess. judge, Dec., 1933.

KHIN, HENRY AUNG, M.B., Lt.-Col., I.M.S., Burma Medl. Dept. (civil surg.) (b. 8th Dec., 1887).—First commn. dated 1st Nov., 1920; asst. medl. supt., Rangoon gen. hosp., Oct., 1922; civil surg., Aug., 1924.

KHIN MAUNG YIN (see Yin, Khin Maung).

KHINE, MAUNG KYAW, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Burma) (b. 10th Dec., 1907).—Educ. at Rangoon University and School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 12th Oct., 1931; arrived in India, Nov., 1931, and served in Burma as asst. commr.

KHINE, OO KYAW, B.Sc., Indian Civil Service (asst. commr., Burma) (b. 9th Jan., 1904).—Educ. at govt. high sch., Rangoon, and New Coll., Oxford; arrived 4th Nov., 1928, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., Apl., 1935.

KHONDKAR, FAZLE SOBHAN, Indian Police (asst. supt., Bengal) (b. 5th Jan., 1905).—Joined the service as proby asst. supt., 17th Dec., 1925; confd., Apl., 1928; offg. addl. supt., April, 1932; dep. commr. of police, Calcutta, Nov., 1937.

KHONDKAR, FAZLUR RAHMAN (see Fazlur, R. K.).

KHONDKAR GHOLAM MURSHED, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 25th Jan., 1901).—Educ. at Calcutta Univ. and Oxford Univ. (non-coll.); joined the service, 24th Oct., 1924; arrived, 8th Dec., 1924; and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr., offg. dist. and sess. judge, Feb., 1930; and again, Sept., 1933; offg. mag. and collr., May, 1931; and again, May, 1933; addl. dist. and sess. judge, Oct., 1933.

KHOSLA, GOPAL DAS, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 15th Dec., 1901).—Educ. at Univ. of Edinburgh, and Emmanuel Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 21st Oct., 1926; arrived, Nov., 1926, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Oct., 1930; and again, Jan., 1934; confd., Jan., 1937.

KHOSLA, RAM PRASHAD, B.A., late Indian Educl. Service (b. 16th Aug., 1881).—Apptd. prof. of history, Muzaffrapur Coll., 7th Nov., 1918; on for service as prinpl. T.N. Jubilee Coll., Bhagalpur, July, 1930; prinpl., Greer Bhumihar Brahmin Coll., July, 1935; retd., Aug., 1936.

KHOT, GAJANAN WAMAN, B.A., LL.B., Indian Police. (asst. supt.) (b. 24th July, 1908).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., Bombay, 1st Mar., 1932; confd., Apl., 1933.

KHUNDHAR, NURAL AZEEM, B.A., LL.B., Barr., Judl. Dept., Bengal (judge, high ct., Calcutta) (b. 17th Mar., 1890).—Joined the service, 27th Oct., 1921; dept. supt. and membr. of legal affairs, Jan., 1924; offg. judge, high ct., Calcutta, variously from Apl., 1934; confd., Nov., 1937.

KHURANA, DWARKA NATH, Indian Service of Engrs. (asst. exec. engr., Central Provs.) (b. 5th June, 1904).—Joined the service as appr. engr., 18th Nov., 1927; asst. exec. engr. (proby.), Nov., 1928; confd., July, 1930.

KHURSHAIID MUHAMMAD, KHAN BAHADUR, Shaikh, M.A., Punjab Civil Service (dep. commr.) (b. 7th Jan., 1883).—Joined the service as proby. extra asst. commr., 11th Jan., 1907; confd., Sept., 1911; junr. secty. to finl. commrs., Aug., 1927; dep. commr., Aug., 1931; offg. dep. secty., govt. of India, dept. of educn., health and lands, Oct., 1932, to Dec., 1933.

KHURSHED AHMAD KHAN, B.A., Indian C.S. (joint. mag., United Provs.) (b. 15th March, 1897).—Educ. at Trinity Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 12th Dec., 1921; served in United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr. from 31st Jan., 1922; jt. mag., Oct., 1924; offg. mag. and collr., variously from Sept., 1925; offg. dep. commr., Apl., 1928; repres. of U.P. Govt. in Central legis. assembly, Jan., 1931.

KHUSHI RAM, SUD, Lala, B.A., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 14th Dec., 1898).—Joined the service 9th Oct., 1922; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1923; offg. exec. engr., April, 1932; confd., Oct., 1932.

KHURSHID, MOHAMMED, Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Assam) (b. 8th Dec., 1907).—Educated at the Punjab University and St. Catherine's College, Cambridge; joined the service, 8th Oct., 1932; arrived in India, Nov., 1932, and served in Assam as asst. commr.

KHURSHID, SAHIBZADA MUHAMMAD, Capt., I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 21st July, 1901).—First commn., 31st Aug., 1922; in milty. employ. to 29th June, 1927; asst. pol. agent and asst. commr., Sibi, Jan., 1929; ditto, Zhoib, May, 1929; ditto, Loralai, Apl., 1931; asst. for Mekran to pol. agent in Kalat, Apl., 1932; adjt. Mekran levy Corps, in addn., from Oct., 1933, to Nov., 1933; asst. pol. agent and comdt. refugees camp, Quetta, June, 1935; transfld. to for. service in Kalat State, Aug., 1935; addtl. asst. pol. agent, S. Waziristan, Dec., 1937.

KHWAJA MUHAMMAD AKRAM KHAN (see Muhammad Akram Khan, K.).

KHWAJA MUHAMMAD HUSAIN (see Muhammad Husain, K.).

KIDD, FREDERIC WILLIAM, Indian Police (supt., Bengal) (b. 1st Sept., 1890).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., 4th Dec., 1911; confd., May, 1914; supt. and dep. commr. of Police, Calcutta, Oct., 1923; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1931; on depn. under G. of I. Home dept., intell. bureau, from Dec., 1937.

KIDD, HUGH BERESFORD, Indian Police (supt., Bombay) (b. 20th July, 1894).—Joined the service, 20th Nov., 1914; on mil. duty from 23rd July, 1918, to 24th March, 1919; supt., Mar., 1926; cent. intell. offer., Bengal and Assam, Dec., 1937.

KIDWAI, IKBAL MUSHIR (see Ikbāl M.K.).

KIERNANDER, ARTHUR LESLIE DOBSON, late Impl. Customs Service (b. 27th Sept., 1882).—Held non-gazetted appts. from 3rd Apl., 1902; offg. curator, comml. museum, Calcutta, May, 1919; confd., Feb., 1921; offg. asst. collr., Calcutta, Aug., 1923; confd., Aug., 1925; ditto, Bombay, Nov., 1925; ditto, Rangoon, Nov., 1926; and again, Dec., 1928; ditto, Calcutta, Aug., 1928; retd., June, 1932.

KILBURN, DENYS, Indian Police (supt., Punjab) (b. 12th Sept., 1899).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 15th March, 1921; asst. to dep. inspr. gen., C.I.D., Punjab, April, 1926; offg. supt., Dec., 1926; confd., Oct., 1931.

KILROE, ERNEST GILBERT GEORGE, M.A. (Oxon), late Indian Educl. Service (b. 19th Mar., 1881).—Joined the service, 10th Feb., 1909; inspr. of schools, April, 1909; asst. dir. of public instrn., Central Provs., March, 1913; on mil. service, Sept., 1918, to April, 1919; retd., Apl., 1932.

KINDERSLEY, ARTHUR FASKEN, B.A., late Indian C.S.—Educ. at Marlborough Coll., and New Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1902; arrived, 21st Nov., 1903, and served in Sind as asst. collr. and mag. and asst. and sessions judge; under sec. to govt., Bombay, pol., judl. and spl. depts., Aug., 1913; offg. dep. sec. to govt., ditto, Nov., 1918; regr., Bombay high ct., appellate side, Dec., 1919; offg. judl. asst. to govr. in Kathiawar, June, 1920; dep. sec. to govt., legal dept., Dec., 1920; judge and sess. judge, Dec., 1923; retd., May, 1930.

KINDERSLEY, JAMES BENJAMIN, B.A., D.S.O., M.C., Indian C.S. (dir. of land records and surveys, Bengal) (b. 28th May, 1893).—Educ. at Clifton Coll., and Exeter Coll., Oxford; on mil. service from Sept., 1914; appointed, 8th Oct., 1919; arrived, 3rd Dec., 1919, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr. and settlt. officer;

offg. magte. and collr., Oct., 1924; confd., June, 1930; offg. dir. land records, Jan., 1931; confd., July, 1931; offg. secty. to govt., rev. dept., Bengal, Jan., 1936.

KING, ALBERT JOHN, O.B.E., B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Bengal) (b. 11th Sept., 1886).—Joined the service, 26th Jan., 1912; asst. engr., Jan., 1913; exec. engr., Jan., 1922; offg. suptg. engr., Mar., 1933; O.B.E., June, 1933.

KING, ARCHIBALD JOHN, Indian C.S. (judge, high court, Madras) (b. 27th July, 1887).—Educ. at Liverpool Coll., and Lincoln Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1910; arrived in India, 22nd Nov., 1911, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; sub-collr. and jt. mag., Feb., 1917; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Dec., 1923; confd., April, 1926; offg. judge, high ct., Madras, July, 1934; confd., Jan., 1935.

KING, ARNOLD JESSE, Indian Police (supt., Madras) (b. 18th Aug., 1895).—Joined the service, 4th Dec., 1920; asst. supt., Dec., 1924; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1923; offg. supt., Mar., 1927; confd., Apl., 1930; supt. special branch, Apl., 1936.

KING, SIR CARLETON MOSS, Kt., C.I.E., late Indian C.S. (b. 17th July, 1878).—Educ. at Brighton and Balliol Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1901; arrived, 15th Nov., 1902, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; asst. commr., Lucknow, Nov., 1907; city mag., Lucknow, Sept., 1910; jt. mag., Feb., 1913; sess. and sub-judge, Sept., 1916; dist. and sess. judge, May, 1918; dep. sec. to govt. of United Provs. March, 1921; offg. judl. sec. to govt. and legal remembr., Oct., 1921; C.I.E., Jan., 1926; offg. puisne judge, high ct., Allahabad, April, 1926; offg. legal remembr., Aug., 1926; offg. judge, ch. ct., Lucknow, Oct., 1926; actg. judge, high ct., Allahabad, March, 1928; confd., Oct., 1929; ch. judge, ch. ct., Oudh, May, 1934; knighted, June, 1935; retd., Dec., 1937.

KING, CUTHBERT, M.A., Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Punjab) (b. 27th Jan., 1889).—Educ. at Sherborne, Christ Church Coll., Oxford, and Göttingen; apptd. after exam. of 1912; arrived, 22nd Nov., 1913, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; on mil. duty from Feb., 1917; on spl. duty under H.B.M.'s consul-gen. and agent to the govt. of India, Khorasan, from Jan., 1919, to April, 1920; dep. commr. (provl.), April, 1926.

KING, EVA FANNY, M.B.E., late India Office (b. 23rd July, 1870).—Apptd. clerical officer, 12th July, 1922; higher clerical officer (acting), July, 1922; confd., Oct., 1925; M.B.E., Jan., 1932; retd., July, 1935.

KING, FRANK JEROME MAITLAND, Col., R.E., Survey of India (dir.) (b. 30th Mar., 1884).—First commn. dated 10th Jan., 1903; apptd. asst. supt., survey dept., 27th March, 1907; on mil. duty from Oct., 1914, to Nov., 1916; dep. supt., March, 1922; supt., Jan., 1926; offg. dir., U.P., Apl., 1931; ditto, Frontier circle, Oct., 1931; dir., Oct., 1933.

KING, FREDERICK CHARLES, B.A., Barr., Indian C.S. (commr., Northern India salt rev.) (b. 6th Jan., 1888).—Educ. at Clongowes Wood Coll., and Trinity Coll., Dublin; apptd. after exam. of 1911; arrived, 7th Jan., 1913, and

served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. mag. and collr., April, 1922; confd., July, 1927; offg. dep. commr., Nov., 1925; chairman, Assam labour bd., April, 1928; commr., Northern India salt rev., May, 1933.

KING, GERALD STANLEY WEATHERAL, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 14th Feb., 1884).—Joined the service, 25th Aug., 1904; asst. engr., Sept., 1915; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1920; exec. engr., Sept., 1924; offg. suptg. engr., Dec., 1933.

KING, HAROLD HOLMES, C.I.E., M.B., Lt.-Col., I.M.S., ret'd. (b. 17th Aug., 1884).—First commn., dated 30th Jan., 1909; apptd. offg. dir. King Institute, Guindy, 1st Jan., 1926; confd., Apl., 1928; C.I.E., June, 1934; ret'd., Aug., 1936.

KING, WALTER GAWEN, late Indian Posts and Telegraphs (b. 23rd Mar., 1880).—Joined the service as proby. supt., 1st Jan., 1904; confd., Oct., 1906; dep. P.M.G., Dec., 1927; asst. dir. genl., post office, Dec., 1927; ret'd., Mar., 1931.

KINGSLEY, EDWIN MAXIMILIAN, Burma Frontier Service (dep. commr.) (b. 11th July, 1884).—Held ministerial appts. from Jan., 1907; apptd. extra asst. commr., Nov., 1909; asst. supt. (B.F.S.), Sept., 1930; supt., Oct., 1934; dep. commr., June, 1936.

KIRBY, HAROLD LEPINE, M.C., Indian Forest Service (depy. consvr., Burma) (b. 13th July, 1893).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 14th Dec., 1922; dep. consvr., Dec., 1925.

KIRBY, WALTER, B.Sc., Dept. of Mines in India (inspr.) (b. 6th Dec., 1891).—Joined the service as junr. inspr., 27th April, 1921; inspr., Oct., 1925.

KIRK, RICHARD THOMAS FRANCIS, B.A., LL.B., Barr., late Indian C.S.—Educ. at King Edward VI's Sch.; and the Univ., Birmingham, and London Univ.; apptd. after exam. of 1904; arrived, 24th Nov., 1905, and served in Bombay as asst. collr. and mag. and asst. judge; jt. judge, June, 1916; actg. judge and sess. judge, May, 1919; confd., Aug., 1925; ret'd., Apl., 1929.

KIRKBRIDE, GEORGE, Capt., I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 16th Apl., 1894).—First commn. dated 1st June, 1915; joined pol. dept., 22nd March, 1922; asst. commr., Nowshera, March, 1924; secty., British Legation, Kabul, Dec., 1926; asst. commr., Mansehra, Dec., 1928; and again, July, 1929; dep. commr., Hazara, Apl., 1929; dist. judge, Peshawar, Oct., 1929; secty. to resdt. in Mysore, Mar., 1931; pol. agent, Gilgit, Sept., 1934.

KIRKE-SMITH, A., late Legisl. dept., govt. of India.—Apptd. solicitor to govt. and public prosecutor, 1st Mar., 1925; solicitor to the govt. of India, legisl. dept., 1932; ret'd., Apl., 1937.

KIRKHOPE, KENNETH MACLEAY, C.I.E., V.D., A.M.I.C.E., late Indian Stores dept. (b. 9th Apl., 1877).—Joined the service 11th Dec., 1899, as asst. loco. supt.; dist. supt., April, 1907; on mly. duty as supt. of rly. recruitment, from April to Sept., 1916, and as asst. adjutant-general (technical) from April, 1917,

to Dec., 1919; C.I.E., June, 1919; dir. of inspection, Indian Stores dept., May, 1923; offg. ch. contr. of stores, June, 1928; ret'd., Aug., 1932.

KIRKNESS, LEWIS HAWKER, C.I.E., O.B.E., D.S.O., Indian State Rlys. (secty., rly. bd.)—Joined the service, 15th Aug., 1929; dir., estabt., rly. bd., Dec., 1932; secty., rly. bd., Feb., 1933; C.I.E., June, 1936.

KIRKPATRICK, WILLIAM, B.E., B.A., M.INST.C.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (suptg. engr., Sind) (b. 15th Sept., 1886).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1910; in milty. employ from 29th July, 1916, to 31st Jan., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1918; offg. suptg. engr., April, 1925, April, 1928, and again April, 1929; confd., May, 1936.

KIRKWOOD, Lt.-Col. JAMES, I.M.S., ret'd. (b. 11th Dec., 1879).—Joined the service, 31st Jan., 1903; D.M.O., South Kanara, Dec., 1923; D.M.O., Ootacamund, March, 1926; ditto, Bellary, Nov., 1928; ret'd., Dec. 1934.

KIRPALANI, HIRANAND KHUSHIRAM, C.I.E., M.A., Barr., Indian C.S. (ch. secty. to govt., Sind) (b. 28th Jan., 1888).—Educ. at Schs. in India, Bombay Univ., and Merton Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1911; arrived, 15th Nov., 1912, and served in Bombay as asst. collr. and mag.; munpl. commr., Surat, June, 1918, to Jan., 1920; dep. munpl. commr., Bombay, April to Nov., 1921; offg. collr., dist. magte. and pol. agent, May, 1923; dep. sec. to govt., rev. dept. (tempy.), March, 1924; ditto (permanent), Aug., 1925; actg. munpl. commr. for city of Bombay, April to Dec., 1926; on deputation out of India as dep. secty. to Indian Central Comee. to Indian Statutory commn., Apl., 1929; municipal commr. for City of Bombay, July, 1931; offg. secty. to govt., Bombay, genl. and eduel. depts., Apl., 1935; ch. secty. to govt., Sind, Apl., 1936; C.I.E., Feb., 1937.

KIRPALANI, MOTIRAM KHUSHIRAM, B.A. (Oxon), Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr. Bengal) (b. 15th Aug., 1901).—Educ. at Univ. of Bombay, New College, Oxford, and School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 25th Oct., 1926; arrived, Dec., 1926, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. magte. and dep. collr., Dec., 1927; offg. mag. and collr., Jan., 1932; and again, Feb., 1936; addl. dist. and sess. judge, Oct., 1932; offg. dist. and sess. judge, July, 1934.

KIRPALANI, SANTDAS KHUSHIRAM, B.A., Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Punjab) (b. 7th April, 1899).—Educ. at Bombay Univ., and New Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 31st Oct., 1922; arrived, 20th Dec., 1922, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr., offg. dep. commr., May, 1926; dep. commr. (provl.), Dec., 1929; confd., Mar., 1933; junr. secty. to finl. commrs., Dec., 1929; offg. rev. secty. to govt., Punjab, Dec., 1931; settlement offcr., Jan., 1936; secty., unempl. cttee, Dec., 1937.

KIRPA RAM, RAI BAHADUR, B.A. (dep. dir. of admin. and intell.) (b. 20th June, 1890).—Joined the service on 27th Oct., 1913, and held non-gaz. posts up to 9th May, 1930; asst. chief contr. of stores, Ind. Stores Dept., May, 1930 and asst. dir. of admin. and intell., June, 1930; dep. ditto, June, 1937.

KIRWAN, ERNEST WILLIAM O'GORMAN, Lt.-Col., I.M.S. (prof. ophth. surg., med. coll., Calcutta) (b. 18th May, 1887).—Joined the service, 29th Jan., 1910; apptd. prof. of ophthal. surg., med. coll., Calcutta, Oct., 1930.

KISCH, BARTHOLD SCHLESINGER, C.I.E., B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 25th Oct., 1882).—Educ. at St. Paul's Sch., Exeter Coll., Oxford, and Univ. Coll., London; apptd. after exam. of 1905; arrived, 26th Nov., 1906, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; joint mag., Apl., 1915; sess. and sub-judge, Mar., 1919; employed under govt. of India commerce dept., from July, 1920, as contr. local clearing office (enemy debts); dist and sessions judge, Nov., 1922 (on deputn.); C.I.E., Jan., 1926; offg. judge, high ct., Allahabad, Apr., 1930; and again, Oct., 1932; offg. judge, ch. ct. of Oudh, Lucknow, Jan., 1931; confd., Dec., 1932; actg. addl. judge, high ct., Allahabad, Jan., 1933; judge, ditto, May, 1934; retd., July, 1935.

KISCH, Sir CECIL HERMANN, K.C.I.E., C.B., M.A., India Office (asst. under-sec. of state) (b. 31st Mar., 1884).—Educ. at Clifton and Trinity Coll., Oxford; served in Secty.'s office at Post Office until 27th July, 1908, when he was apptd. junior clerk, India Office; resdt. clerk, March to Sept., 1910; pte. sec. to under sec. of state, May, 1911; sent. clerk, finl. dept., April, 1914; acting as pte. sec. to under sec. of state from June, 1915, and to parly. under sec. of state (in addn.) from Dec., 1915; pte. sec. (temp.) to the sec. of state, May, 1917, to June, 1919; on deputn. to India in connection with visit of sec. of state, Oct., 1917, to May, 1918; C.B., Jan., 1919; sec. to commte. on Indian exchange and currency, June to Dec., 1919; assist. sec. British Empire Delegation at Peace Conference, Paris, 1918-19; dep. sec., finl. dept., Dec., 1919; sec. finl. dept., April, 1921; acting under-secty. of state, Jan.-Apl., 1932; K.C.I.E., June, 1932; member, Ind. staty. rly. bd. ctee., June, 1933; ditto, Ind. res. bank ctee., July, 1933; adviser to Ind. delegation to monetary and economic conf., London, June, 1933; asst. under sec. of state, Dec., 1933; commr. of inc. tax, Dec., 1933.

KISHAN, RAM (see Ram Kishan).

KISHEN, RADHA (see Radha Kishen).

KISHOR, CHANDRA (see Chandra, K.).

KISHORE, NAND (see Nand Kishor).

KISHORE, THAKUR JUGAL (see Jugal Kishore T.).

KITCHEN, HUGH MELVILLE, M.C., Indian State Rlys. (transpn. supt.) (b. 13th Dec., 1894).—Joined the service 9th Dec., 1919; asst. supt. E. I. Rly., Nov., 1926; transpn. supt. (traffic comm.), May, 1935.

KITCHIN, ERIC ROBERT, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. pte. secty. to Viceroy) (b. 31st Mar., 1911).—Educ. at Malvern, Christ's College, Cambridge, and New College, Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1934, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; apptd. asst. pte. secty. to Viceroy, Jan., 1938.

KITCHINGMAN, GERALD DAWSON, M.A., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Punjab) (b. 6th Mar., 1895).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., March, 1921; dep. consvr., Nov., 1926; offg. consvr., variously from July, 1934.

KNAPP, Sir ARTHUR ROWLAND, K.C.I.E., C.S.I., C.B.E., late Indian C.S.—Educ. at Westminster, and Christ Church, Oxford; apptd., after exam. of 1889; arrived, 20th Nov., 1891, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; under sec. to govt., Feb., 1899; sub-collr. and joint mag. Nov., 1904; collr. and mag., Nov., 1908; acting sec. to govt., rev. dept., Jan., 1917; confirmed, April, 1918; C.B.E., June, 1919; chief sec. to govt., Aug., 1919; C.S.I., Jan., 1922; member of exec. council of Govr. of Madras, April, 1922, to March, 1925; K.C.I.E. Jan., 1924; retd., Jan., 1927.

KNAPP, GEORGE ERNEST CRISFORD, late Indian Forest Engrg. Service (b. 19th Feb., 1895).—Joined the service as forest engr., Burma, 30th Nov., 1921; retd., Mar., 1934.

KNASTER, ROLAND MARCUS JULIUS, B.A., Office of High Commr. for India (educ. officer, prinpl. exec. grade, education dept.) (b. 19th July, 1890).—Educ. at the Perse School and Sidney Sussex Coll., Cambridge; apptd. asst. to local adviser to Indian students, London, Sept., 1919; warden, 21, Cromwell Road, S.W.7, Feb., 1920, to July, 1923; transfld. to office of high commr. for India as asst. to joint secs., Indian students' dept., Oct., 1920; principal exec. officer, education dept., April, 1925.

KNIGHT, GORDON GRAHAM VERDON, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag., United Provs.) (b. 28th July, 1910).—Educ. at Dulwich College, Magdalene College, Cambridge, and the School of Oriental Studies, London; apptd. after exam. of 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1934, and served in the United Provinces as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. magte., Mar., 1937; under secty. to A.G.G., Resdt. and Chief Commr., Baluchistan, Nov., 1937.

KNIGHT, HENRY FOLEY, C.I.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (secty. to govt., Bombay, home and ecclesi. debts.) (b. 19th Jan., 1886).—Educ. at Haileybury Sch. and Caius Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1909; arrived in India, 24th Nov., 1910, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; on mil. duty from July, 1916, to Mar., 1919; under sec. to govt. rev. and fin. depts., Oct., 1919; temp. dep. sec., ditto Jan., 1920; dir. of comml. intellig., Bombay, Jan., 1922; addl. dep. sec. to govt., fin. dept. Oct., 1922; dir. of industries, May, 1923; actg. collr. and dist. magte., Nov., 1924, March, 1926, and June, 1928; confd., Jan., 1929; secty., home and eccl. depts., Jan., 1929 and again, Apl., 1935; offg. secty., genl. and educ. depts., Bombay, Feb., 1934; confd., May, 1934; secty., home and eccles. depts., Apl., 1935; C.I.E., June, 1936; offg. commr. of excise, Bombay, Sept., 1936; commr., Dec., 1936.

KNOX, KENNETH NEVILLE, C.I.E., M.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 21st July, 1878).—Educ. at Winchester Sch. and Edinburgh Univ.; apptd. after exam. of 1900; arrived, 18th Nov., 1901, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; asst.
