RITCHIE, WILLIAM DUNCAN, M.B., Lt.-Col., I.M.S., retd. (b. 4th April, 1877).—First commn., 27th June, 1901; in mil. employ to July, 1904; civil surgn., Assam, Sept., 1904; on mil. service from Oct., 1914, to Oct., 1920; offg. inspr.-genl., April, 1929; retd., Apr., 1932.

RIVAZ, CECIL ARTHUR GLENCAIRN, B.A., late Indian Finance Dept. (b. 5th Nov., 1876).—Joined the Indian fin. dept., 22nd Feb., 1902; asst. acct.-gen., Punjab, May, 1902; ditto, United Provs., Sept., 1904; ditto, Punjab, Nov., 1905; asst. comptr., Central Provs., April, 1907; asst. acctnt.-gen., E. Bengal and Assam, May, 1908; ditto, paper currency, Bombay, Oct., 1912; examr. of govt. press accts., Calcutta, March, 1915; offg. dep. comptr.-gen., May, 1918, to Feb., 1919; dep. contr. of currency, Bombay, Aug., 1920; ditto, Calcutta, Jan., 1921; contr. of currency, Northern India, April, 1922; comptr., Assam, May, 1923; acctnt.-gen., Central Provs., Nov., 1925; ditto, Burma, April, 1926; retd., Aug., 1929.

RIVETT-CARNAC, HERBERT GORDON, Lt.-Col., Indian Political Service (b. 13th Feb., 1892).—First commn. dated 6th Sept., 1911; in milty. employ prior to 3rd Dec., 1923; asst. resdt., Kolhapur, Dec., 1923; asst. to agent to Madras States, Nov., 1927; British trade agent, Gyantse, and asst. to pol. offr. in Sikkim, May, 1928; asst. pol. agent in Southern states of C.I. and in Malwa, Nov., 1929; under-secty. to resdt., Hyderabad, Sept., 1930; secty., ditto, Aug., 1931; civil secty. to ch. commr. at Aden, Nov., 1932; vice-consul, Zabidan, Sept., 1934.

RIVETT-CARNAC, JOHN CLAUDE THURLOW, M.C., late Indian Police Service (United Provs.) (b. 14th June, 1888).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Nov., 1909; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1923; supt., May, 1923; retd., May, 1928.

RIZAWI, SAIYID MUHAMMAD SHUAIB, Khan Bahadur (see Saiyid, M.S.R.).

ROBBINS, CHARLES ROBINSON, M.C., D.F.C., M.A., late Indian Forest Service (Burma).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., Dec., 1921; dep. consvr., April, 1925; ret'd., March, 1929.

ROBERT, ARTHUR WILLIAM, late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 28th March, 1880).—Apptd. asst. engr., Madras, 12th Sept., 1903; exec. engr., Oct., 1911; offg. suptg. engr., Feb., 1928; confd., Nov., 1930; ret'd., Mar., 1935.

ROBERTS, ALLAN ARBUTHNOT LANE, C.I.E., B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 11th Oct., 1884).—Educ. at Cheltenham Coll., and St. John's Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1908; arrived, 29th Nov., 1909; and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; under-sect. to govt., Punjab, Sept., 1915, to Nov., 1917; sec., municipal commee., Delhi, March, 1918; dep. commr. (provl.), Nov., 1923; ditto (perm.), Feb., 1927; C.I.E., Jan., 1932; ret'd., Mar., 1934.

ROBERTS, The Ven. ARTHUR BETTON, late Eccles. Dept., Central Provs. (b. 27th Dec., 1880).—Joined the service, 13th May, 1913, as junr. chaplain; senr. chaplain, May, 1923; offg. archdeacon, April, 1928; ret'd., Jan., 1934.

ROBERTS, DAVID EDWARD, M.Sc., late Indian Educl. Service (b. 14th Jan., 1888).—Joined the service, 24th Feb., 1914; I.A.R.O. from 7th Sept., 1918, to 15th Feb., 1919; prin., Murarichand Coll., Sylhet, Dec., 1926; offg. dir. of public instrn., Assam, June, 1933; prin., Cotton coll., Gauhati, Mar., 1934; ret'd.

ROBERTS, Sir ERNEST HANDFORTH GOODMAN, Kt., Barr., Burma, Judl. Dept. (ch. justice, high ct., Rangoon).—Apptd. ch. justice high ct., Rangoon, 28th Apl., 1936; knighted, June, 1936.

ROBERTS, FRANCIS LANE, Major, I.A. (ret'd.) late Burma Commn. (b. 24th April, 1886).—Arrived in India, 16th Nov., 1905; asst. commdt., July, 1913; reverted to military duty from April, 1917, to Oct., 1919; asst. commr., July, 1920; sub. divl. officer (in addn.), Nov., 1923; offg. dep. commr., April, 1924; ret'd., Sept., 1930.

ROBERTSON, ALAN CRAIGIE, late Indian State Rlys. (b. 11th Jan., 1883).—Joined the service as asst. loco. supt., 13th Nov., 1907; dist. ditto, June, 1914; spl. fuel officer, E.I. Rly., Oct., 1926; supt., May, 1929; offg. dep. ch. operating supt., E.I. rly., Jan., 1933; confd., July, 1933; offg. dep. ch. mechl. engr. (running), E.I. rly., Nov., 1933; ret'd., July, 1936.

ROBERTSON, ALLAN NELSON MCINNES, B.A., B.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 25th Nov., 1881).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1905; asst. engr., Dec., 1905; exec. engr., Oct., 1913; offg. suptg. engr., March, 1926; confd., April, 1931; ret'd., Mar., 1934.

ROBERTSON, ANTHONY WILLIAM, D.F.C., Indian Police (supt., United Provs.) (b. 1st Dec., 1896).—Joined the service, 17th April, 1919; offg. supt., Sept., 1923; confd., Nov., 1932; asst. commr. in the Andamans from 16th Oct., 1923, to 7th Feb., 1927; Diwan, Bundi State, Sept., 1936.

ROBERTSON, ARTHUR WILLIAM, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Burma) (b. 24th Nov., 1905).—Educ. at High School, Dublin and Trinity Coll., Dublin; joined the service, 16th Oct., 1929; arrived Dec., 1929; and served in Burma as asst. commr.

ROBERTSON, Sir BENJAMIN, K.C.S.I., K.C.M.G., C.I.E., LL.D., late Indian C.S.—Educ. at the Inst., Elgin, the Gr. Sch. and Univ. of Aberdeen, and Balliol Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1883; arrived, 28th Nov., 1885, and served in Bombay as asst. collr. and mag.; transf. to Central Prov. as provl. supt. of census operations, April, 1890; asst. commr., Oct., 1892; commr. of excise, Oct., 1894; dep. commr., Nov., 1894; C.I.E., Jan., 1898; chief sec. to chief commr., May, 1902, to March, 1903, and Dec., 1903, to Jan., 1906; commr., Berar, July, 1907; offg. sec. to Govt. of India, dept. of commerce and industry, Feb. to Nov., 1907, and March to July, 1908; sec., ditto, July, 1908, to March, 1912; C.S.I., Jan., 1910; addl. member of govr.-gen.'s legisl. council, March, 1910; temp. member of govr.-gen.'s council, March to Nov., 1910; K.C.S.I., Dec., 1911; chief commr., Central Provs., 3rd August, 1912; special duty in S. Africa, Jan. to April, 1914; K.C.M.G., June, 1914; ret'd., Feb., 1920; member of the Council of India, Nov., 1922, to Nov., 1927.

ROBERTSON, CHARLES ROBERTSON OVENS, Indian Police (supt.) (b. 10th Dec., 1902).—Joined the service as asst. supt., United Provs., 22nd Nov., 1922; offg. supt., April, 1920; confd., June, 1934.

ROBERTSON, DONALD MURRAY SLADEN, V.D., Indian State Rlys. (ch. opertg. supt. E.I. Rly.) (b. 19th Oct., 1882).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 26th Sept., 1903; dist. supt., April, 1917; offg. dep. ch. operating supt., March, 1926; offg. divl. supt., March, 1927; offg. ch. operating supt., Mar., 1933; ch. comml. mgr., E.I. rly., Mar., 1934; ch. opertg., supt., E.I. rly., Oct., 1935.

ROBERTSON, EDMUND GEORGE, late salt rev. dept., Burma (b. 22nd Sept., 1885).—Apptd. collr. of salt revenue, May, 1928; offg. commr., Apl., 1933; ret'd., Nov., 1934.

ROBERTSON, EDWARD GEORGE DONALD, Indian Police (b. 22nd Dec., 1916).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Burma, on probn., Dec., 1936.

ROBERTSON, FRANCIS CALDER FORD, B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., United Provs.) (b. 19th March, 1901).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 21st Feb., 1924; dep. consvr., April, 1929.

ROBERTSON, FREDERICK EWART, V.D., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 13th March, 1881).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 13th Nov., 1901; dist. supt., Jan., 1912; on milty. service from 5th Dec., 1914, to 1st Jan., 1920; chief supt., April, 1920; jt. dep. agent, June, 1923; divl. supt., Feb., 1925; offg. ch. operating supt., Jan., 1926; offg. agent, E.I. Rly., April, 1929; offg. ch. operating supt., Apl., 1929; confd., Apl., 1929; ret'd., June, 1933.

ROBERTSON, FREDERICK WYNNE, C.I.E., B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 3rd Feb., 1885).—Educ. at Charterhouse Sch.; Real Gymnasium, Hildersheim (Hanover), and

Trin. Coll., Dublin; apptd. after exam. of 1908; arrived, 13th Dec., 1909, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; ditto, and asst. settlt. offr., Nov., 1913; jt. mag. and dep. collr., April, 1915; on mil. duty, Aug. to Oct., 1918; mag. and collr., April, 1922; sec. board of rev., Bengal, Feb., 1923; offg. commr., Mar., 1930; confd., June, 1933; C.I.E., June, 1935; ret'd., Mar., 1937; chairman pub. serv. comm., Bengal, Apl., 1937.

ROBERTSON, GEORGE STRAFFORD, B.A.I., B.A., A.M.I.C.E., A.M.I.E. (Ind.), late Indian State Ry. (b. 29th May, 1886).—Joined the service as junr. engr., 14th Oct., 1909; resdt. engr., Sept., 1919; exec. engr., May, 1925; pers. asst. to ch. engr., Oct., 1929; ret'd., Oct., 1937.

ROBERTSON, HENRY FERGUSON, B.Sc., Indian Agric. Service (dep. dir. of agric., Burma) (b. 31st May, 1895).—Joined the service as dep. dir. of agric., Burma, 16th Dec., 1921; prof. of agric. and mycologist, July, 1927; offg. princpl., agric. coll., Mandalay, Apl., 1932; dep. dir. of agric., Burma, Mar., 1933.

ROBERTSON, JAMES PERCY WYNNE, Indian Police (dist. supt., Burma) (b. 17th Aug., 1894).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., 18th April, 1920; dist. supt., April, 1924.

ROBERTSON JOHN, C.B.E., V.D., B.A., B.A.I., late Indian State Ry. (b. 3rd June, 1878).—Joined the service as junr. engr., 15th Aug., 1902; resdt. engr., May, 1913; in milty. employ from 9th May, 1916, to 2nd Aug., 1919; C.B.E., June, 1919; dist. engr., Oct., 1920; supt. of works, surveys and construction, Oct., 1927; offg. dep. ch. engr., Apl., 1930; ret'd., Sept., 1932.

ROBERTSON, MURRAY, Indian State Ry. (junr. dep. agent, E.I. Ry.) (b. 15th June, 1887).—Joined the service as asst. secty. to agent, 20th Aug., 1920; jt. secty. to agent, Aug., 1924; secty. to agent, Jan., 1925; offg. junr. dep. agent, Oct., 1930; confd., Nov., 1931.

ROBERTSON, THOMAS HENRY, Office of High Commr. for India (executive officer, store dept.) (b. 8th June, 1895).—Apptd. 2nd class clerk, 4th Feb., 1915, and attached to store dept.; on mil. service from May, 1915, to Aug., 1919; transf. to office of high commr. for India, Oct., 1920; exec. officer, April, 1922.

ROBERTSON, WHEATLEY ALEXANDER, F.R.G.S., late Indian Forest Service (b. 4th Aug., 1885).—Arrived, 29th Oct., 1906, and served as asst. consvr., dep. consvr., Nov., 1911; instructor, forest coll., Nov., 1918; offg. consvr., July, 1925; confd., Sept., 1926; ret'd., June, 1933.

ROBEY, EDWARD BEAUMONT, late Indian State Ry. (b. 30th Dec., 1880).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 29th Sept., 1903; exec. engr., Sept., 1911; offg. dep. ch. engr., Oct., 1925; suptg. engr., Sept., 1927; offg. ch. engr., Feb., 1928; Apl., 1930, and again, Apl., 1933; ditto, E.B. rly., Oct., 1933; confd., Jan., 1934; offg. senr. govt. inspr. of ry. s., April, 1929; confd., Oct., 1934; ret'd., Dec., 1935.

ROBINS, LESLIE CYRIL FREDERICK, Indian Police (b. 4th Dec., 1907).—Joined the service as asst. supt., United Provs., 24th Nov., 1928; confd., Nov., 1930; offg. supt., June, 1933; police asst. to A.G.G. in C.I., Mar., 1937.

ROBINSON, EDWARD CHARLES, Indian Police (supt., United Provs.) (b. 5th Nov., 1892).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Nov., 1912; supt., July, 1925.

ROBINSON, GILBERT CRESCENS, B.A., Indian Forest Service (consvr., Madras) (b. 12th March, 1891).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 23rd Nov., 1914; dep. consvr., Nov., 1919; chief forest officer, Coorg, May, 1925; offg. consvr., Oct., 1933; confd., June, 1937.

ROBINSON, HAROLD WOOD, Indian State Ry. (dep. ch. engr., N.W. Ry.) (b. 7th Jan., 1895).—Joined the service as asst. exec. bridge engr., 2nd Feb., 1923; bridge engr., N.W. Ry., Mar., 1931; services loaned to M. and S.M. Ry. from Feb., 1929; offg. dep. ch. engr. (bridges), N.W. rly., Mar., 1935; confd., Aug., 1935.

ROBINSON, STEPHEN ERIC, Indian Police (asst. supt.).—Apptd. asst. supt., Punjab, on probn., 24th Nov., 1934; confd., Nov., 1936.

ROBINSON, SYDNEY HERBERT, Office of High Commr. for India (med. offr., India store dept.) (b. 31st May, 1876).—Apptd. med. offr., India store depot, 1st Jan., 1909.

ROBINSON, SIR SYDNEY MADDOCK, Kt., Barr. (1888).—Apptd. offg. junior govt. advocate, chief court, Punjab, Aug., 1889; govt. advocate, April, 1899; has offd. as legal rememberer on several occasions since 1902; offg. judge, chief court, Lower Burma, April, 1909; confd., Dec., 1911; Kt., Jan., 1922; chief justice, high ct., Rangoon, Dec., 1922; ret'd., Dec., 1925.

ROBINSON, TOM, late Indian Police (b. 29th Sept., 1883).—Held non-gaz. appts. from 8th Oct., 1909, to 22nd July, 1922; apptd. to I.P.S., as asst. supt., July, 1922; offg. supt., Nov., 1925; confd., Feb., 1932; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1931; ret'd., Nov., 1937.

ROBINSON, THOMAS MIDDLETON, Indian State Ry. (divl. mech. engr., N.W. Ry.) (b. 4th Feb., 1894).—Asst. carriage and wagon supt., junr. scale, 28th Feb., 1922; divl. mech. engr., senr. scale, Nov., 1936.

ROBINSON, WILLIAM DOUGLAS, Indian Police (b. 5th Nov., 1907).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Punjab, 16th Nov., 1927.

ROBSON, HENRY WILLIAM CUMINE, O.B.E., Lt.-Col., I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 8th Dec., 1886).—First commn., 29th Aug., 1906; apptd. to pol. dept., govt. of India, as asst. pol. agent, June, 1919; pol. agent, Chagai, April, 1921; second asst. to resdt. in Kashmir, April, 1923; sec. to resdt. at Hyderabad, March, 1925; O.B.E., June, 1929; administrator Bharatpur State, March, 1930; pol. agent, Bhopal, Nov., 1933, and again, Jan., 1936; offg. A.G.G. in C.I., Aug., 1935; ditto, Punjab States, Apl., 1936; resdt. for E. States, Mar., 1937.

ROBSON, HUBERT ALAN HIRST, M.B., Lt.-Col., I.M.S. late Burma Medl. Dept. (b. 17th April, 1885).—First commn., dated 29th Jan., 1910; services placed at disposal of govt. of Burma from 13th Dec., 1920; supt., mental hosp., Rangoon, Dec., 1920; ret'd., May, 1933.

ROBSON, WILLIAM RAYMOND, A.M.I.C.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 29th Nov., 1898).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., 4th Oct., 1921; exec. engr., Oct., 1930; ret'd., Mar., 1935.

ROCH, ERNEST TWINING, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Bombay) (b. 24th May, 1892).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1919; asst. exec. engr., March, 1920; offg. exec. engr., Dec., 1923; confd., Oct., 1924.

ROCHE, WILLIAM, C.I.E., B.A., B.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 20th Oct., 1880).—Joined the service, 6th Sept., 1905, as temp. engr.; asst. engr., Jan., 1907; exec. engr., Jan., 1915; offg. supt. engr., Oct., 1926; confd. Jan., 1927; C.I.E. Jan., 1927; offg. ch. engr. and jt. secty. to govt., U.P., Apl., 1931; ch. engr., Bengal, Oct., 1931; rettd., Sept., 1935.

RODGER, Sir ALEXANDER, Kt., O.B.E., late Indian Forest Service (b. 11th Aug., 1875).—Joined the service, 29th Nov., 1898, and served in Burma as asst. consvr. of forests; dep. consvr., Oct., 1905; impl. forest economist, impl. research inst., March, 1911; instr., forest coll., Nov., 1911; services placed at disposal of Indian munitions board, in addition to own duties, from March, 1917, to Jan., 1920; O.B.E., Jan., 1919; consvr., July, 1921; pres., forest research inst., Dehra Dun, Jan., 1925; inspr. genl. of forests, Sept., 1926; Kt., Jan., 1930; rettd., Feb., 1931; apptd. member, Forestry Commn., May, 1932.

RODGER, JOHN, O.B.E., M.C., M.B., Lt.-Col. I.M.S. (C.M.O., Baluchistan) (b. 19th Dec., 1891).—First commn., dated 30th July, 1920; in milty employ to Jan., 1929; resdy. surg., Mewar, 7th Jan., 1929; civil surgeon, Sibi, Oct., 1932; offg. resy. surg. and C.M.O., Baluchistan, Feb., 1933; and again, Sept., 1935; civil surgeon, Sibi and Loralai, in addn., Apl., 1934, and again, Oct., 1936; O.B.E., May, 1937.

RODGER, ROBERT CRUDEN, M.C., D.C.M., Indian Police (supt., Bombay) (b. 7th June, 1895).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bombay, 11th Nov., 1923; offg. supt., May, 1928; confd., Apl., 1935.

RODGERS, E. W. F., Dept. of Industries and Labour, Civil Aviation Dir. (admin. officer) (b. 21st Nov., 1889).—Apptd. senior supt., 1st Mar., 1931; asst. secty. to govt., Mar., 1932; admin. officer, April, 1936.

RODWELL, ERNEST GRAVENOR, O.B.E., F.C.H., late Indian State Railways (b. 11th April, 1881).—Joined the public wks. dep. as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1903; exec. engr., Oct., 1912; offg. engr. in-chief, Nushki exten. rly., April to June, 1919; offg. dep. agent, O. & R. Rly., April, 1921; O.B.E., April, 1921; offg. dep. chief engr., O. & R. Rly., April, 1924; confd., Jan., 1929; offg. ch. engr., E.B. rly., June, 1932; rettd., Apl., 1936.

ROE, HAROLD RILEY, C.I.E., late Indian Police (b. 15th Oct., 1883).—Joined the service, 16th Feb., 1904, and posted to United Prov.; asst. supt. of police, Sept., 1907; service under govt. of India, foreign dept., Oct., 1909, to Feb., 1911; asst. supt., Benares, July, 1912; supt., ditto, June, 1916; offg. dep. inspr. genl., March, 1930; confd., Dec., 1932; C.I.E., Jan., 1933; rettd., June, 1935.

ROGERS, ERIC MAXFIELD, Indian Police (supt.) (b. 2nd Sept., 1902).—Joined the service as asst. supt., United Provs., 25th Nov., 1922; offg. supt., April, 1926; confd., Jan., 1934; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1932; asst. to D.I.G., C.I.D., Oct., 1936.

ROGERS, Rev. ERIC WITHAM, Indian Eccles. Estab., United Provs. (junr. chaplain) (b. 17th Apl., 1898).—Apptd. chaplain on probn., 31st Mar., 1935; junr. chaplain, Mar., 1937.

ROGERS, FREDERICK COLIN, Lt.-Col., I.M.S. (rettd.) (b. 1st Nov., 1876).—Joined the service, 1st Sept., 1902; D.M.O., and medl. officer, cent. jail, Trichinopoly, Dec., 1923; rettd., Mar., 1931.

ROGERS, Rev. GEORGE THOMAS, M.A., Indian Eccles. Estab. (junr. chaplain) (b. 18th Nov., 1899).—Apptd. chaplain on probn., Bengal; junr. chaplain, Jan., 1935.

ROGERS, Sir LEONARD, K.C.S.I., C.I.E., M.D., F.R.S., F.R.C.P., F.R.C.S., Major-Genl. I.M.S. (rettd.) (b. 18th Jan., 1868).—First commn. dated 29th July, 1893; mil. employ to Nov., 1898; on depn. as imperial bacteriologist from Nov., 1898; dep. san. commr., Bengal, Jan., 1900; surgn., presy. gen. hosp., May, 1902, to July, 1905; prof. of pathology, med. college, Calcutta, Feb., 1906, and bacteriologist to govt.; C.I.E., Dec., 1911; knighted, June, 1914; rettd., March, 1921; member, medical board, India Office, Oct., 1922; presd., ditto, Nov., 1928, to Nov., 1933; K.C.S.I., Jan., 1932.

ROGERS, PHILIP GRAHAM, C.I.E., B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 3rd April, 1877).—Educ. at Christ's Hospital and Keble Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1900; arrived, 18th Dec., 1901, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; asst. commr., Assam, Nov., 1904; personal asst. to chief commr., April, 1905; under sec. to ditto, Aug., 1905; pte. sec. to Lieut.-Govr., Oct., 1905; asst. mag. and collr., E. Bengal and Assam, Jan., 1906; under sec. to govt., E. Bengal and Assam, Aug., 1908; transf. to Bombay as joint mag. and dep. collr., Feb., 1909; postmaster-gen., Central Prov., April, 1909; asst. commr., Assam, Nov., 1911; postmaster-gen., Bengal, July, 1913; ditto, Bengal and Assam, April, 1914; ditto, Central Provs., Oct., 1917; ditto, Punjab and N.W.F. Prov., April, 1918; dep. dir.-gen., posts and tels., May, 1920; postmaster-gen., Bombay, Dec., 1922; C.I.E., Jan., 1924; dep., dir. genl., post office, April, 1927; offg. dir.-genl., posts and tels., May, 1928; rettd., Feb., 1931.

ROGERS, THOMAS EDWARD, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., Bengal) (b. 28th Dec., 1912).—Educ. at Bedford Sch., and Emmanuel Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 16th Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Nov., 1937, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.

ROHATGI, D. P. (see Durga Prasad Rohatgi).

ROLLO, JAMES FREDERICK, Northern India Salt Rev. Dept. (asst. commr.) (b. 3rd Nov., 1884).—Joined the service, 20th Apl., 1908; asst. commr., Sept., 1926; asst. gen. manager, Sambhar, July, 1934; asst. commr., Kohat, Mar., 1935.

ROMER, HERBERT JOHN, M.B.E., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 19th Jan., 1879).—Joined the service, 19th June, 1894; asst. traffic supt., April, 1920; asst. transportation supt., Nov., 1922; M.B.E., June, 1925; offg. pers. asst. to ch. trans. supt., May, 1926; dep. transportation supt., Mar., 1933; rettd., Jan., 1937.

ROMESH CHANDRA, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (asst. exec. engr., Assam) (b. 17th Mar., 1897).—Joined the service, 14th Nov., 1921, as asst. exec. engr.

RONALDSHAY (EARL OF) see under ZETLAND (Marquess of).

RONSON, HARRY, Indian C.S. (under-secty., commerce dept., Govt. of India) (b. 14th Dec., 1906).—Educ. at Galtpool Secondary Sch. and Trinity Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 20th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., Jan., 1936; attaché to the Govt. of India, dept. of commerce, Mar., 1937; under-secty., ditto, May, 1937.

ROOKE, EDWARD A., late Indian Forest Service (b. 2nd Nov., 1875).—Held non-gazetted appt. from 1st April, 1896; on foreign service in Bastar state from 28th Jan., 1904; extra asst. consvr., Aug., 1909; joined the I.F.S. as dep. consvr., April, 1927; ret'd., July, 1930.

ROONEY, JOHN JOSEPH, M.B., B.Ch., Lt.-Col., I.M.S. (resdy. surg., Bushire) (b. 27th Jan., 1890).—Date of first commn., 25th Apl., 1921; in milty. employ to Apl., 1930; agency surg., Bushire, Apl., 1934; resdy, ditto, Oct., 1935.

ROPER, WILLIAM EDWARD CHARLES, B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Burma) (b. 26th June, 1902).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Burma, 1st Oct., 1924; exec. engr., Oct., 1933.

ROSAIR, HARRY BASIL, L.R.C.P., and S.I., L.A.H. and L.M. (Dub.), D.T.M., late Jail Dept., United Provs. (b. 1st May, 1882).—Apptd. offg. supt., central prisons, 2nd Mar., 1923; confd., Nov., 1927; ret'd., May, 1937.

ROSE, GEORGE WRIGHT NORTON, A.M.I.C.E., B.Sc., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 22nd April, 1884).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1906; on milty. duty from 14th April, 1915, to 19th Jan., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1924; offg. divl. supt., Sept., 1926; offg. dep. ch. engr., Jan., 1929; ret'd., May, 1933.

ROSE, HUGH, Indian State Rlys. (dept. supt. of stores) (b. 7th May, 1892).—Joined the service, 4th Mar., 1920, asst. supt. of catering, Burma rlys., May, 1924; dep. supt. of stores, Burma rlys., Oct., 1935.

ROSE, H. MAURICE, late Opium dept., United Provs. (b. 6th Feb., 1880).—Joined the service as prob. asst. opium agent, 16th April, 1901; confd., Feb., 1905; dist. opium officer, Dec., 1925; ret'd., Feb., 1935.

ROSE, HUGH ELLISHA, late Indian State Rlys. (b. 1st May, 1883).—Joined the service, 3rd Jan., 1906; junr. asst. signal engr., Apl., 1909; senr. ditto, Oct., 1922; dist. signal engr., Oct., 1925; offg. signal engr., April, 1928; transf. to E.B. rly., Nov., 1933; offg. dep. ch. engr. (signals), Feb., 1934; ret'd., July, 1937.

ROSE, JOHN CHARLES, Indian State Rlys. (dep. ch. comml. manager, E.I. Rly.) (b. 5th July, 1893).—Joined the service, 7th April, 1910; asst. supt., July, 1920; offg. asst. comml. manager, Jan., 1926; offg. dep. ch., ditto, March, 1926; confd., May, 1928.

ROSE, ROBERT FREDERICK, Indian Service of Engineers (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 19th Feb., 1884).—Joined the service as temp. engr., 27th April, 1907; asst. engr., Jan., 1923; apptd. to the I.S.E. as asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1927; exec. engr., Jan., 1932.

ROSE, REV. THOMAS PERCIVAL, M.A., Indian Eccles. Estabt. (junr. chaplain).—Apptd. chaplain on probn., Punjab, 2nd Dec., 1931; junr. chaplain, Dec., 1933.

ROSE, WILLIAM ROBERT CHARLES, late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 29th April, 1880).—Held various posts as temp. engr. from 26th March, 1904, to 18th May, 1927; asst. engr. (prov. service), May, 1927; apptd. to I.S.E. as asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1928; offg. exec. engr., Jan., 1928; ret'd., Nov., 1932.

ROSE MEYER, PATRICK MAURICE, Indian Audit Dept. (b. 9th Oct., 1892).—Joined the service, 11th Mar., 1912; asst. dir., army audit., S. Cמד., Jan., 1929; dep. govt. ext., B.B. and C.I. rly., Mar., 1935; dep. ch. auditor, E.B. rly., Apl., 1935.

ROSEVEARE, Major WILLIAM LEONARD' M.C., R.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Burma) (b. 11th Dec., 1895).—First commn., 16th Sept., 1914; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1924; exec. engr., Nov., 1927.

ROSS, SIR EDWARD DENISON, Kt., C.I.E., Ph.D., late Indian Educl. Service.—Educ. at Marlborough and Univ. Coll., London; prof. of Persian at the latter institution, 1896-1901; appt. principal of Calcutta Madrasah, 8th Nov., 1901; offr. in charge of records of govt. of India, and asst. sec., home dept., Jan., 1906; ditto and asst. sec., dept. of educl., Dec., 1910; C.I.E., June, 1912; ret'd., April, 1914; Kt., June, 1918; dir., School of Oriental Studies, since 1916; author of 'The Early Years of Shah Ismail', 'The Takhri-ii-Rashidi', 'The Heart of Asia' (with F. H. Skrine), 'Life and Times of Omar Khayyam,' &c.

ROSS, GEORGE MABYN, C.I.E., B.A., Indian Service of Engrs. (chief engr., N.W.F.P.) (b. 30th Apl., 1883).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1905; asst. engr., Jan., 1906; exec. engr., Oct., 1913; offg. supt. engr., June, 1926, Mar., 1927, and again, Oct., 1931; confd., Jan., 1932; offg. ch. engr., N.W.F.P., Mar., 1934; confd., July, 1935; C.I.E., May, 1937.

ROSS, GEORGE ROBERT THOMSON, M.A., D. Phil. (Edin.), late Indian Educl. Service (b. 1st Apl., 1874).—Arrived, 10th Oct., 1909, and served as prof. of philosophy, Rangoon; on mil. service, May to July, 1918; lecturer in philosophy, Univ. Coll., Rangoon; Fellow of Rangoon Univ.; ret'd., Oct., 1929.

ROSS, GEORGE WHITEHILL, C.I.E., D.S.O., Col. I.A. (b. 6th June, 1878).—First commn. dated 22nd Jan., 1898; in mil. emp. to July, 1903, when he was apptd. to the mil. accts. dept.; asst. sec., fin. dept., mil. fin. branch, Feb., 1911; asst. finl. adviser, 1913; addl. dep. fin. adviser, Feb., 1920; dep. mil. acctnt.-gen., mil. fin. branch; mil. acctnt.-gen. (prov.), June, 1926; ret'd., Dec., 1929; C.I.E., Jan., 1930.

ROSS, HENRY, C.I.E., O.B.E., M.B., F.R.C.S.I., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S., ret'd. (b. 29th June, 1877).—First commn., 26th July, 1902; apptd. addl. asst. dir.-gen., I.M.S., Oct., 1916; temp. dep. dir.-gen., Nov., 1917, to Jan., 1918; asst. dir.-gen., I.M.S. (stores), April, 1918; O.B.E., June, 1918; services placed at disposal of Indian Red Cross Society, Nov., 1922; C.I.E., Jan., 1923; civil surg., Nov., 1925; ret'd., June, 1932.

ROSS, HERBERT STEWART, B.A., Indian C.S. (magt. and collr., United Provs.) (b. 27th Dec., 1885).—Educ. at Christ Coll., Brecon, and Jesus Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1909; arrived in India, 26th Nov., 1910, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag.; jt. mag., Sept., 1916; on mil. duty from Aug., 1918, to Jan., 1919; asst. supt., Dehra Dun, April, 1922; offg. supt., ditto, April, 1922; offg. mag. and collr., March, 1925; confd., July, 1926; secty., bd. of rev., Jan., 1927; offg. commr., Feb., 1935; member, Madhe Sahaba enqy. cttee., Apl., 1937.

ROSS, RICHARD WILLIAM, B.A. (Lon.), late Indian Educl. Service (Madras) (b. 8th Oct., 1876).—Joined the service, 30th Sept., 1911; apptd. prinpl., teachers' coll., Rajahmundry, 3rd June, 1917; offg. prinpl., Muhammadan coll., Madras, July, 1925, and again July, 1927; offg. dist. educl. officer, Nov., 1925, and again Nov., 1927; offg. prinpl., teachers' coll., Saidapet, July, 1928; confd., Apl., 1929; ret'd., Oct., 1931.

ROSS, ROBERT LINDSAY, M.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 20th April, 1874).—Educ. at Edinburgh Univ. and Trin. Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1897; arrived, 7th Dec., 1898, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; under sec. to govt., judl. and genl. depts., Dec., 1904, to March, 1906; joint mag. and dep. collr., Jan., 1907; pte. sec. to lieut.-govr., Bengal, Dec., 1907, to July, 1908; regr., high court, appellate side, from April, 1910, to July, 1912; transfed. to Bihar and Orissa, April, 1912; dist. and sess. judge, July, 1912; judge, high ct., Patna, Feb., 1924; ret'd., July, 1932.

ROSS, WILLIAM CHARLES, Lieut.-Col., M.B., Ch.B., D.P.H., I.M.S. (ret'd.) (b. 3rd July, 1878).—First commn., dated 26th July, 1902; was in mil. employment up to May, 1905; offd. as dep. sanitary commr., Bengal, June, 1905; dep. sanitary commr., Bihar and Chota-Nagpur Circle, April, 1907; offg. sanitary commr., Bihar and Orissa, June, 1915; dir. of public health ditto, Aug., 1917; ret'd., Apl., 1930.

ROSSINGTON, MAURICE HERBERT, Indian C.S. (under-secty. home dept., govt. of Burma) (b. 31st July, 1908).—Educ. at the Royal Academical Institution, Belfast, and Univ. Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1931; arrived in India, Dec., 1932, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; under-secty., home dept., Apl., 1937.

ROSSITER, EDWARD MORGAN, Civil Aviation Directorate (technical offer., tempy.) (b. 23rd Oct., 1895).—Joined the service as tech. offer., 23rd Apl., 1936.

ROTHWELL, WALTER, late Indian State Ryis. (G.I.P. Ry.) (b. 31st July, 1886).—Joined the service, 21st July, 1911; asst. carr. and wagon supt., April, 1919; dist. ditto, Feb., 1923; works manager, May, 1925; offg. dep. ch. mech. engr., Nov., 1928; ret'd., May, 1932.

ROUGHTON, NOEL JAMES, C.I.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (commr., Central Provs.) (b. 25th Dec., 1885).—Educ. at Winchester, and New Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1908; arrived 22nd Nov., 1909, and served in the Central Provs. as asst., commr.; regr., judl. commr.'s court, July, 1913; under-sec. to chief commr., Jan.,

1918 to March, 1919; dep. commr. (provl.), Dec., 1920; confd., Nov., 1921; dir. of industries and regr. of co-op. societies, Central Provs., July, 1923; dep. sec. to govt. of India, commerce dept., June, 1925; finl. secty. to govt., C.P., April, 1928; C.I.E., Jan., 1933; offg. commr., Feb., 1933; confd., July, 1934; offg. ch. secty. to govt., U.P., May, 1933; member, govr.'s exec. council, Central Provs. (tempy.), Nov., 1934, and again, May, 1936; services placed at disposal of govt. of India, dept. of indus. and lab., Nov., 1936.

ROUPELL, KATHLEEN ZELIA, India Audit Office (higher clerical officer) (b. 11th Mar., 1890).—Apptd. clerical officer, 6th Jan., 1922; higher clerical officer, July, 1935.

ROUSE, SIR ALEXANDER MACDONALD, Kt. C.I.E., F.C.H., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 14th Sept., 1878).—Trained at the R.I.E. Coll.; joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1900; personal asst. to chief engr., and under sec. to govt., United Provs., Nov., 1907; exec. engr., and ditto, Oct., 1908; temply. transfed. to Delhi, Jan., 1912; supt. of works, Delhi, Aug., 1912; C.I.E., J. n., 1913; temp. suptg. engr., Delhi, Aug., 1916; suptg. engr., June, 1921; offg. chief engr. and sec. to govt., March to Nov., 1924, and from April, 1925; confd., Oct., 1926; Kt., Jan., 1930; ch. engr., central public wks. dept., Apl., 1930; ret'd., Aug., 1933.

ROUSE, WILLIAM PERCY MEADOWS, Indian Police (b. 24th Feb., 1901).—Joined the service as asst. supt., N.W.F.P., 17th Nov., 1926.

ROUTH, REGINALD ALAN, B.A., Indian Service of Engrs. (suptg. engr., Punjab) (b. 26th Sept., 1884).—Trained at R.I.E. Coll.; joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1906; exec. engr., Oct., 1915; offg. suptg. engr., March, 1928; confd., Aug., 1932.

ROUTLEDGE, BRYAN HOWARD, Indian Police (supt., Assam) (b. 14th Apl., 1903).—Joined the service, 25th Nov., 1922; deputed to Sardah Police training coll. in Bengal to 16th May, 1924; proby. asst. supt., May, 1924; confd., Nov., 1924; offg. supt., Oct., 1932; confd., Feb., 1933.

ROW, KODIKAL SANJIVA (see Sanjiva, Row, K.).

ROW, RAGHVENDRA, O.B.E., M.D., D.Sc. (Lond.), late Medical dept., Bombay (b. 16th Nov., 1871).—Apptd. prof., G.M. Coll., Bombay, 2nd July, 1926; K-i-H. medal, 1st class, Dec., 1911; O.B.E., Dec., 1919; ret'd., Dec., 1931.

ROWBOTHAM, CLAUDE JOHN, late Indian Forest Service (b. 7th July, 1884).—Joined the service, 9th Nov., 1907, as asst. consr.; on mil. service from Sept., 1916, to May, 1920; dep. consvr., Oct., 1922; offg. consvr., Aug., 1928; ret'd., July, 1932.

ROWE, ALBERT JOHN, Office of High Commr. for India (higher executive officer, accts. dept.) (b. 23rd Oct., 1892).—Apptd. second class clerk, India Office, 12th Nov., 1913, and attd. to acctnt.-gen.'s dept.; services lent to high commr. for India, from Oct., 1920; exec. officer, April, 1922; actg. higher exec. officer, April, 1925; confd., April, 1926.

ROWLAND, FRANCIS GEORGE, B.A., Indian C.S. (judge, high ct., Patna) (b. 14th Aug., 1883).—Educ. at Harrow and Balliol Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of, 1905; arrived, 29th Nov., 1906, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; transfed. to Bihar and Orissa, April, 1912; jt. mag. and dep. collr., April, 1913; attaché, legisl. dept., govt. of India, April, 1917; dist. and sess. judge, and ditto, July, 1917; offg. dep. sec., legisl. dept., govt. of India, Oct., 1917; addl. legal rembr., Bihar and Orissa, Jan., 1918; dist. and sess. judge, Nov., 1919; judicial commr., Nov., 1923; offg. judge, high ct., Patna, variously from June, 1929; addl. judge, ditto, variously from March, 1931; judge, high ct., Patna, Aug., 1936.

ROWLAND, JAMES WALTER, Indian Police (supt., Bombay) (b. 20th Apl., 1890).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 3rd Dec., 1909; on milty. duty from April, 1915, to Feb., 1919; supt. of police, Dec., 1922; offg. commr., Bombay, Feb., 1936.

ROWLAND, JOHN EDWARD MAURICE, Indian State Rlys. (chief rly. commr., Burma (b. 30th Apl., 1882).—Joined the service as asst. engr. (temp.), 24th May, 1904; ditto (perm.), July, 1909; dist. engr., Mar., 1919; offg. variously as ch. and dep. ch. engr. from June, 1927; confd. as dep. ch. engr., June, 1929; offg. ch. engr., May, 1933; and again, Dec., 1934; confd., Mar., 1935; offg. agent, Burma Rlys., Feb., 1935; confd., Oct., 1935; chief rly. commr., Apl., 1937.

ROWLAND, THEODORE, India Office (higher executive officer, military dept.) (b. 20th July, 1892).—Apptd. second class clerk, India Office, 6th May, 1912, and attd. to registry and record dept.; transfed. to mil. dept., Jan., 1917; on mil. service from Dec., 1915, to March, 1919; exec. officer, April, 1922; dep. reading clerk to council. Feb., 1926, to Feb., 1932; actg. hr. exec. officer, Jan.-July, 1932; confd., Mar., 1933.

ROWLANDS, ARCHIBALD, M.B.E.—Apptd. Financial Adviser (military finance), July, 1937.

ROWLAND-HILL, THOMAS CLEGG, Lt.-Col., V.D., late India Posts and Telegraphs.—Joined 9th Nov., 1894; on mil. service from 16th April, 1916; supt., Oct., 1917; dep. postmaster-gen., Pjab., June, 1921; rettd., July, 1928.

ROWLANDS, WILLIAM SHAW, B.A., Indian Educl. Service (prinpl., Robertson Coll., Jubbulpore) (b. 1st Mar., 1888).—Joined the service as prof., Jubbulpore Coll., Feb., 1912; prinpl., May, 1928.

ROWLANDSON, EDMUND JAMES, C.I.E., late Indian Police (b. 27th Oct., 1882).—Joined the service, 12th Nov., 1903, as prob.; asst. supt., July, 1906; supt., April, 1914; offg. asst. inspr.-gen., April, 1924; offg. dep. inspr.-gen., Mar., 1927; offg. commr. of police, Madras, July, 1929; confd., May, 1930; C.I.E., June, 1932; offg. inspr.-gen., Apl., 1933; rettd., Dec., 1935.

ROWNTREE, HAROLD KIRKBY, M.C., M.B., Lt.-Col., I.M.S. (civil surg., Punjab) (b. 27th Oct., 1887).—First commn. dated 27th July, 1912; in mil. employ up to 15th Oct., 1922; civil surg. (Punjab), Oct., 1922; ditto, Simla (East), May, 1925.

ROWNTREE, JOHN BATEMAN, Indian Forest Service (asst. consvr., Assam) (b. 5th Apl., 1906).—Joined the service as prob. asst. consvr., 11th Oct., 1929; confd., Oct., 1930.

ROXBURGH, JAMES, late India Office (b. 8th Apl., 1875).—Clerk, 2nd class, 30th Dec., 1895; minor staff clerk, Dec., 1911; services lent to mil. dept., March, 1915, to July, 1921; staff clerk, Feb., 1920; higher exec. officer, April, 1922; seconded for duty in finl. dept., Jan., 1934; rettd., Feb., 1936.

ROXBURGH, THOMAS JAMES YOUNG, C.I.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Bengal) (b. 2nd March, 1892).—Educ. at Merchant Taylors' Schl. and Magdalene Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1914; arrived in India, Dec., 1915, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; I.A.R.O., Aug., 1916, to Feb., 1919; jt. mag. and dep. collr., April, 1920; offg. chief presy. mag., Calcutta, June, 1923; confd., May, 1927; C.I.E., Jan., 1932; offg. secty. to govt., judd. dept., Bengal, Feb., 1935.

ROY (see also Ray).

ROY, AMULYA NATH, B.A., late India Posts and Tels. (Bihar and Orissa) (b. July, 1875).—Held non-gazetted appts. from 6th April, 1898; proby. supt., Sept., 1903; supt., Feb., 1906; dep. postmaster-genl., July, 1927; rettd., July, 1930.

ROY, BEJOY KUMAR, M.A., Indian Forest Service, M.A., B.Sc. (dep. consvr., Madras) (b. 4th Mar., 1896).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 11th Dec., 1920; dep. consvr., Dec., 1924.

ROY, CHANDRA BALI, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Central Prov.) (b. 9th Aug., 1894).—Joined the service, 16th Oct., 1916; asst. engr., Oct., 1917; asst. exec. engr., Aug., 1920; offg. exec. engr., Nov., 1924; confd., Oct., 1926.

ROY, SIR GANENDRA PRASAD, Kt., M.I.E.E., late Posts and Telegraph Dept.—Trained at R.I.E. Coll.; joined the telegraph service, 1st Oct., 1894, as asst. supt.; supt., Feb., 1909; ditto, and dep. postmr.-gen., April, 1914; supt., telegraph engrg., Oct., 1914; dir., ditto, Oct., 1916; offg. chief engr., telegraphs, March, 1924; knighted, July, 1926; rettd., April, 1927.

ROY, HEMENDRA MOHAN, Rai Bahadur, B.A., late Indian Audit Dept. (b. 23rd June, 1881).—Joined the service, 22nd June, 1904; dep. acct. genl., Burma, July, 1929; dep. acct.-genl., Burma, Apl., 1936; rettd., June, 1936; re-employed from Sept., 1936.

ROY, JAMES LEISHMAN, A.M.I.C.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 29th Apl., 1893).—Joined the service as asst. engr., Oct., 1915; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1924; under secty. to govt., irrigation bch., Aug., 1932; under secty. (construction) Punjab irrig. sectt., Jan., 1933; ditto (north), May, 1933.

ROY, KEITH COTTON, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., Bengal) (b. 26th July, 1912).—Educated at Wyggeston Grammar School, Leicester, University College, London, and School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, Dec., 1935; arrived in India, Jan., 1936, and served in Bengal as asst. mtr. and collr.

ROY, PARESH LAL, M.A., Indian State Rlys. (dist. traffic supt., E.B. Rly.) (b. 20th Dec., 1893).—Asst. traffic supt., Nov., 1919; dist. ditto, Jan., 1937.

ROY, SATYENDRA NATH, C.I.E., Indian C.S. (secty. to the govt. of India, dept. of Communications) (b. 23rd Sept., 1888). Educ. at Govt. Sch., Bankura, Bengal, Calcutta Univ., and Christ's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1913; arrived, 25th Nov., 1913, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; sec. to prov. committee to consider proposals of pub. serv. commn., Nov., 1917, to Jan., 1918; offg. under sec. to govt. of Bengal, gen. dept., Jan., 1918; ditto, finl. dept., Feb., 1918; employed under Indian def. force, Feb. to June, 1918; on spl. duty, genl. dept. of govt. of Bengal, June, 1918; under sec. to govt. of Bengal, general dept., July, 1918; dep. chairman, Howrah municipality, Oct., 1919, to Nov., 1920; offg. mag. and collr., April, 1921; offg. dep. sec., govt. of Bengal, pol. and appt. dept., Nov., 1925; magte. and coll., Sept., 1927; dep. secty., Indian central commee., Oct., 1928; dep. secty. to govt. of India, home dept., Apl., 1929; C.I.E., Jan., 1932; joint secty., Indian round table conf., London, 3rd session, Nov.-Dec., 1932; offg. addl. secty. to govt., Bengal, pol. dept., Apl., 1933; jt. secty. to the govt. of India, dept. of indus. and lab., July, 1936; offg. secty., ditto, Oct., 1936; secty., dept. of communications, Mar., 1937.

ROY, SURES CHANDRA, M.Sc., D.Sc., Meteorological Dept. (meteorologist) (b. 1st Mar., 1899).—Joined the service as meteorologist on probn., 7th Mar., 1927; confd., Mar., 1929; services placed at the disposal of the govt. of Burma with effect from Feb., 1937.

ROY, SUHRID KUMAR, B.Sc., Ph.D., F.G.S., Indian School of Mines (b. 1st Jan., 1895).—Joined the service as prof. of geology, 3rd Jan., 1928.

ROYDS, THOMAS, D.Sc., Meteorological Dept. (dir., Kodaikanal Observatory) (b. 11th Apl., 1884).—Joined the service as asst. dir., 28th Feb., 1911; dir., ditto, Feb., 1923.

RUDDELL, Rev. J. W. F., B.A., Ind. Eccles. Estabt. (junr. chaplain) (b. 8th Aug., 1896).—Apptd. chaplain, Bombay, on probn., 1st Oct., 1934; junior chaplain, Oct., 1936.

RULACH, OWEN HENRY GEORGE, late India Posts and Telegraphs.—Joined the service, and held non-gazetted appts. from 5th July, 1893; supt., Jan., 1900; dep. postmaster-genl., Oct., 1918; offg. postmaster-genl., Madras Circle, Dec., 1926; postmaster-genl., Bihar and Orissa, July, 1927; ret'd., Aug., 1928.

RUMBOLD, HORACE ALGERNON FRASER, B.A., India Office (actg. princpl., pol. dept.) (b. 27th Feb., 1906).—Educ. at Wellington and Christ Church, Oxford; apptd. asst. principal, Jan., 1929; pte. secty. to parly. under-secty. of state, Apl., 1930; ditto to perm. under-secty. of state, Dec., 1933; actg. princpl., Sept., 1934.

RUNDLETT, LESLIE ST. CLARE, A.C.G.I., A.M.I.C.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 26th Mar., 1891).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1915; on milty. service from 27th Sept., 1918, to 11th May, 1920; asst. exec. engr., May, 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1924; offg. supt. engr., May, 1933.

RUPCHAND BILARAM, B.A., LL.B., late Judl. Dept., Bombay (b. 15th May, 1878).—Apptd. addl. judl. commr. (temp.), June, 1923; confd., Nov., 1925; offg. judl. commr., Sind, Feb., 1933; addl. ditto, July, 1933; ret'd., 1938.

RUSBY, LIONEL STUART, Indian Police (supt., Bombay) (b. 6th Nov., 1896).—Joined the service 6th Mar., 1923; offg. supt., Mar., 1927; supt., Oct., 1932.

RUSHBROOK WILLIAMS, LAURENCE FREDERIC, C.B.E., M.A., B.Litt., F.R.Hist.S., M.R.A.S.—Educ. at Univ. Coll., Oxford; prof. of modern Indian history, Allahabad Univ., 1914 to 1919; dir., central bureau of infn., govt. of India, 1st June, 1919; official historian of Indian tour of H.R.H. the Prince of Wales, 1921-22; pte. sec. to Indian representative at Imperial Conference, 1923; C.B.E., June, 1923; ret'd., Dec., 1925; adviser to Chamber of Princes, India round table conf., London, Nov., 1930-Jan., 1931; 2nd Session, Sept.-Dec., 1931; 3rd session, Nov., 1932.

RUSHTON, HUGH DARRELL, Capt., I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 6th Nov., 1903).—First commn., 30th Aug., 1923; in milty. employ until 20th May, 1929; pers. asst. to resdt. at Hyderabad, 25th May, 1929; ditto to ch. commr., N.W.F.P., May, 1931; asst. pol. agent, Chitral, May, 1932; asst. commr., Nowshera, Oct., 1933; dist. and sess. judge, Dera Ismail Khan, Oct., 1935; addtl. ditto, Peshawar, July, 1936.

RUSHTON, KENNETH CHARLES, late Indian Police Service (Bombay) (b. 13th Oct., 1875).—Joined the service, 20th Jan., 1897; dist. supt., April, 1906; dep. inspr.-gen., May, 1921; awarded King's Police Medal, Jan., 1926; ret'd., Sept., 1930.

RUSSELL, ALEXANDER ALFRED, M.C., Major I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 5th Oct., 1898).—First commn. dated 30th Jan., 1917; in milty. employ prior to 20th April, 1924; supy. asst. commr., Peshawar, March, 1925; secty., Kabul legation, April, 1925; supy. asst. commr., Mardan, Dec., 1926; under secty. to ch. commr., N.W.F.P., Feb., 1927; asst. commr., Kohat, April, 1928; under secty. to resdt., Persian Gulf, May, 1928; offg. secty. to ditto, May, 1929; British trade agent, Gyanthe, &c., Nov., 1931; secty. to A.G.G. for Deccan states, Apl., 1934; ditto, states of W.I., Mar., 1935; dep. commr., Dera Ismail Khan, Nov., 1936; ditto, Hazara, Dec., 1937.

RUSSELL, ALEXANDER JAMES HUTCHINSON, C.B.E., K.H.P., M.A., M.D., B.Ch., D.P.H., Col., I.M.S. (public health commr. with the Govt. of India) (b. 30th Aug., 1882).—Joined the service, 27th July, 1907; in mil. employ from April, 1908, to Sept., 1912; surgeon-gen., hospl., Madras, Nov., 1912; prof. of hygiene and bacteriology, Medl. Coll., Madras, Dec., 1912; prof. of pathology, ditto, July, 1919; dir. of public health, Madras, Jan., 1922; C.B.E., June, 1925; offg. dep. dir.-genl., I.M.S., Jan., 1933; confd., July, 1933; public health commr. with the Govt. of India, Dec., 1933; hon. surg. to H.M. the King-Emperor, Aug., 1935.

RUSSELL, Sir (CHARLES) LENNOX (SOMERVILLE), Kt., late Indian C.S.—Educ. at Rugby and St. John's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1891; arrived, 1st Dec., 1893, and

served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; under sec., jud., &c., depts., July, 1898, to Jan., 1902; joint mag. and dep. collr., Feb., 1901; asst. to resdt. in Mysore, and sec. to chief commr., Coorg, Jan., 1902; under sec. to govt. of India, foreign dept., March, 1903; dep. sec., ditto, Oct., 1904; pol. agent, Quetta-Pishin, July to Nov., 1906; divl. and sess. judge, Derajat, Nov., 1907; resdt., Indore, July, 1909; ditto, Mewar, March, 1916; ditto, Baroda, March, 1918; ditto, Hyderabad, July, 1920; Kt., Jan., 1924: ret'd., Aug., 1926.

RUSSELL, EDWARD WILSON, A.M.I.C.E., V.D., Indian State Rlys. (dep. agent (works), G.I.P. Rly.) (b. 24th Oct., 1886).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 20th Jan., 1911; resdt. engr., April, 1914; on milty. service from 8th June, 1918, to 25th Feb., 1920; offg. divl. transpn. supt., May, 1930; confd., Mar., 1933; offg. dep. contr. of stores, Mar., 1933; offg. dep. agent (works), G.I.P. rly., Mar., 1934; confd., Apl., 1934.

RUSSELL, HAROLD GEORGE, O.B.E., Indian Police (b. 24th Feb., 1901).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Punjab, 25th Nov., 1922; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1928; offg. supt., Nov., 1932; O.B.E., June, 1936.

RUSSELL, JAMES MCCONNELL, Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Burma) (b. 28th July, 1909).—Educ. at Stranraer High School, Glasgow Univ., and Wadham College, Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1931; arrived in India, Dec., 1932, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; under-secty., fin. dept., Burma, Feb., 1935.

RUSSELL, JAMES WILLIAM, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., United Provs.) (b. 2nd May, 1899).—Joined the service, 25th Oct., 1921; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1922; offg. exec. engr., May, 1927; confd., Oct., 1931.

RUSSELL, JOSHUA FORBES, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Bengal) (b. 4th Feb., 1894).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 6th April, 1920; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1925; exec. engr., Oct., 1926.

RUSSELL, LAWRENCE WALTER, Indian Police (asst. supt., Bihar) (b. 6th Jan., 1912).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., Bihar and Orissa, 10th Nov., 1931; confd., Apl., 1933.

RUSSELL, ROBERT EDWIN, C.I.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (magte. and collr., Bihar) (b. 21st April, 1890).—Educ. at Campbell Coll., Belfast, and Trinity Coll., Dublin; apptd. after exam. of 1912; arrived, 13th Dec., 1913, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; on mil. service from Oct., 1915, to April, 1919; addl. under-sec. to govt., Bihar and Orissa, edn. and munpl. depts., April, 1919; offg. dep. commr., Oct., 1922; offg. sec. to govt. rev. dept., March, 1927; confd., July, 1928; magte. and collr., Nov., 1928; C.I.E., Jan., 1934; offg. ch. secty. to govt., Bihar and Orissa, Aug., 1934.

RUSSELL, STEVEN NOEL, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Orissa) (b. 24th Dec., 1908).—Educ. at King's School, Ely, and King's College, Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1931; arrived in India, Nov., 1932, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; under-secty. to Govt., pol. and appts. depts., Jan., 1936.

RUSSELL, THOMAS BRIAN, B.A., Indian C.S. (secty. to govt., local self govt. dept., Madras) (b. 15th Feb., 1888).—Educ. at Cork Gr. Sch., Univ. Coll., London, and Trinity Coll., Dublin; apptd. after exam. of 1911; arrived, 7th Dec., 1912, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; asst. censor, Madras, Oct., 1914, to Oct., 1915; asst. to agent to govt.-gen., Rajputana, and mag. of Abu, Nov., 1915; 1st asst. to resdt., Baroda, Aug., 1918; sub. collr. and jt. mag., July, 1919; offg. collr. and dist. mag., April, 1924; collr., C. & M. station, Bangalore, Oct., 1924; offg. collr. and dist. magte., June, 1930; confd., Nov., 1930; secty. to govt., local self govt. dept., Madras, Sept., 1934.

RUSSELL, SIR THOMAS GUTHRIE, K.C.I.E., B.Sc., A.M.I.C.E., Indian State Rlys. (ch. commr. of rlys., rly. bd.) (b. 19th Jan., 1887).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 21st Nov., 1913; resdt. engr., Sept., 1919; contr. of stores, Nov., 1923; dep. agent, June, 1925; offg. agent, May, 1927; ch. commr. of rlys., rly. bd., Oct., 1929; Kt., June, 1932; K.C.I.E., May, 1937.

RUSSELL-STRACEY, THOMAS PATRICK, late Indian Finance Dept.—Apptd. asst. sec. to the govt. of Punjab, fin. dept., 28th May, 1902; joined fin. dept., govt. of India, and apptd. asst. acctnt.-gen., Pnnjab, April, 1911; dep. acctnt.-gen., ditto, Aug., 1912; asst. acctnt.-gen., ditto, Oct., 1912; asst. acctnt.-gen., Bombay, July, 1913; ditto, Madras, May, 1914; dep. acctnt., gen., posts and telegraphs, Madras, Nov., 1916; ret'd., 1932.

RUST, NEVILLE ARTHUR, M.A., late Indian Educl. Service.—Joined the service, 30th June, 1907, and apptd. hd. master, Bareilly; inspr. of schools, Nov., 1908; regr., deptl. exams., United Provs., Oct., 1914, to Aug., 1916, and from Feb., 1920, to Feb., 1921; on mil. service, Aug., 1916, to Feb., 1920; ret'd., Jan., 1929.

RUTHERFORD, ROBERT EWART, V.D., Indian State Rlys. (divl. supt., E.I. Rly.) (b. 22nd Nov., 1886).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 3rd Nov., 1906; dist. supt., Sept., 1919; divl. supt., Feb., 1925; offg. ch. operating supt., Apl., 1929.

RUTHERFORD, THOMAS GEORGE, C.I.E., M.A., Indian C.S. (collr., Madras) (b. 25th Sept., 1886).—Educ. at George Watson's College (Edinburgh), Edinburgh and University Coll., London; apptd. after exam. of 1909; arrived in India, 1st Dec., 1910, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; sub. collr. and jt. mag., Sept., 1916; on mil. duty, from Nov., 1917, to Dec., 1919; special commr., agency operations, April, 1924; C.I.E., Jan., 1925; offg. collr. and dist. mag., Jan., 1925; collr. and dist. magte. (provl.), Aug., 1929; confd., Feb., 1930; offg. secty., p.w. and I. dept., Madras, Apl., 1934; offg. commr. of labour, Madras, Mar., 1935; offg. secty., home dept., Madras, June, 1936; offg. second secty., to govt., Madras, June, 1936; offg. inspr.-genl. of prisons, Madras, Nov., 1936.

RUTHNASWAMY, MARIA DOSS, C.I.E., Barr.-at-Law, Principal, Law College, Madras, June, 1928; Member, Madras Public Service Commission, Jan., 1930.

RUTLEDGE, Rev. JAMES WILLIAM RENWICK, M.A., Indian Eccl. Estabt. (b. 26th Aug., 1896) (junr. chaplain).—Apptd. chaplain on probation, Ch. of Scotland, Bombay, 10th Feb., 1928; junr. chaplain, Feb., 1930.

RUTNAM, DONALD ROSS, B.A., Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Central Provs.) (b. 19th Sept., 1901).—Educ. at Ceylon Univ. Coll., Colombo, and Trinity Hall, Cambridge; joined the service, 25th Oct., 1925; arrived, 31st Dec., 1925, and served in Bengal as asst. collr.; asst. commr., Central Provs., Aug., 1926; offg. dep. commr., Jan., 1929; on foreign serv. as admin., Bastar State, Mar., 1931; dep. commr. (prov.), Nov., 1937.

RUTLEDGE, HUGH, late Indian C.S. (United Provs.) (b. 24th Oct., 1884).—Educ. at Cheltenham Coll., and Pembroke Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1908; arrived, 29th Nov., 1909, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; city mag. (temp.), Lucknow, Oct., 1917; jt. mag. and ditto, April, 1918; again city mag., Lucknow, from July, 1918, to Sept., 1920; offg. dep. commr., Nov., 1921; mag. and collr., Oct., 1925; dep. commr., Oct., 1925; ret'd., Jan., 1932.

RUZZAK, SHAIK ABDUR, M.R.C.S. (Eng.), L.R.C.P., Lt.-Col., I.M.S. (ret'd.).—Joined the service, 29th Jan., 1901; D.M.O., supt. medl. school, and medl. offr., Borstal inst., Tanjore, Dec., 1923; ret'd., Nov., 1928.

RYALL, Rev. CHARLES RICHARD, LL.D., M.A., B.D., late Indian Eccl. Estabt. (Bombay) (b. 25th Feb., 1877).—Joined 29th April, 1910; junr. chaplain, April, 1913; senr. chaplain, Apl., 1926; ret'd., Oct., 1931.

RYALL, JAMES EDWARD, O.B.E., late Indian Police (b. 21st Oct., 1893).—Joined the service, 21st Oct., 1913; asst. supt., May, 1915; asst. dist. officer, frontier constabulary, Dec., 1919; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1921; dist. officer, frontier constabulary, Aug., 1922; personal asst. to inspr.-gen., Nov., 1922; supt., Oct., 1926; M.B.E., June, 1927; asst. inspr.-genl., govt. rly. police, Punjab, Nov., 1930; O.B.E., Jan., 1934; ret'd., Mar., 1936.

RYAN, CECIL CRAWFORD LINDSAY, Maj. I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 13th Dec., 1897).—First commn., dated 30th Jan., 1917; joined the pol. dept., 21st May, 1923; Vice-consul, Ahwaz, May, 1924; ditto, Duzdap, Oct., 1929; under-secty. to agent to govr.-genl., Punjab States, Dec., 1930; asst. to resdt., Kashmir, Nov., 1931; counsellor, British legation, Kabul, Apl., 1934; secty. to pol. resdt. in the Persian Gulf, Nov., 1935; H.M. consul-genl., French estates in India, May, 1937.

RYAN, G. C., Indian Police (b. 21st July, 1914).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bombay, on probn., 22nd Nov., 1934.

RYAN, PATRICK, late Posts and Tels. Dept. (b. 16th Jan., 1888).—Joined the service as divl. engr., wireless engrg., 22nd Dec., 1920; offg. dir. of wireless, April, 1925; ret'd., Jan., 1933.

SAADAT ALI KHAN, KHAN BAHADUR, AGHA, B.A., Indian Police (supt., Punjab) (b. 28th Nov., 1883).—Held non-gaz. appts. from 28th Nov., 1905; dep. supt., Jan., 1911; offg. supt., Feb., 1918; confd., Oct., 1931; Khan Bahadur, June, 1933.

SAADAT-UL-LAH KHAN, Indian Agricul. Service (dep. dir. of agricl.) (b. 14th Apl., 1898).—Joined the service as dep. dir. of agric., Madras, on probn., 24th Jan., 1922; confd., Nov., 1922; agricl. officer, Quetta, Aug., 1932.

SAADULLA, Sir MUHAMMAD, MAULVI SAIYID, Kt., M.A., B.L.—Member govr.'s exec. council, Assam, 1st Apl., 1929, to Mar., 1934; chairman of cttee. on public accts., 1933-34; chief minister, Assam, Apl., 1937.

SABHARWAL, LAKHPAT RAI, B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (assst. consvr., Bihar) (b. 18th Aug., 1895).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 5th March, 1919; pers. asst. to presdt., forest research inst., Mar., 1936.

SABIHUDDIN, KHAN SAHIB, B.A., Barr.-at-Law, Indian Posts and Tels. (dep. p.m.g.) (b. 16th May, 1886).—Joined the service as proby. supdt., 17th June, 1907; confd., Sept., 1909; dep. p.m.g., Aug., 1937.

SABINE, HAROLD EDWARD, Indian Police (supt., Bengal) (b. 12th July, 1894).—Joined the service, 6th Dec., 1920, as proby. asst. supt.; confd., May, 1923; addl. supt., Jan., 1926; supt., Aug., 1926.

SABNIS, BHASKAR DATTATRAYA, B.A., LL.B., late Judicial dept., Bombay (b. 30th May, 1876).—Held non-gazetted appts. from 17th Mar., 1903, to 11th Jan., 1909; sub-judge, Jan., 1909; judge, ct. of small causes, Poonah, Mar. 1930; ret'd., May, 1931.

SABNIS, TRIMBAK SITARAM, M.Sc., Indian Agric. Service (economic botanist to govl., United Provs.) (b. 8th June, 1890).—Joined the service, 19th May, 1923; economic botanist, June, 1923.

SABONADIERE, ALFRED, late Indian C.S.—Educ. at Charterhouse, and St. John's Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1885; arrived, 19th Jan., 1888, and served in the N.W. Prov. and Oudh as asst. commr., and asst. mag. and collr.; joint mag., March, 1893; dist. and sess. judge, Oct., 1898; ag. addl. judl. commr., Oudh, May to Sept., 1913; ret'd., Jan., 1917; served under National Health Insurance Commission (England), Dec., 1916, to Aug., 1919; lecturer in Indian law at Univ. Coll. and Sch. of Oriental Studies, London Univ. since Sept., 1919; reader in Indian Law, univ. of London, Oct., 1929; author of 'The Trial of Criminal Cases in India.'

SACHCHIDANAND, AKHAURI, M.Sc., Indian Police (asst. supt., Bihar) (b. 19th Mar., 1911).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bihar and Orissa, 4th Feb., 1935.

SACHDEV, MULK RAJ, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 12th Oct., 1903).—Educ. at Univ. of the Punjab and Sidney Sussex Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 5th Oct., 1928; arrived, Dec., 1928, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., Apl., 1933.

SACHSE, Sir FREDERIC ALEXANDER, C.S.I., C.I.E., late Indian C.S. (b. 27th Feb., 1878).—Educ. at Liverpool Coll., and Caius Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1901; arrived, 15th Dec., 1902, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; transf. to E. Bengal and Assam, Oct., 1905; settld. offr. and supt. of survey, Nov., 1908; joint mag. and

dept. collr., March, 1909; re-transfd. to Bengal. April, 1912; mag. and collr., Dec., 1914; dir. of land records, Bengal, Nov., 1918, to Feb., 1923; offg. commr., Nov., 1923, and Aug., 1925; offg. sec. to govt., rev. dept., Oct., 1926; confd., Feb., 1927; offg. commr., Feb., 1928; member, bd. of rev. in addn., Dec., 1928; C.I.E., Jan., 1930; member, bd. of rev., May, 1930; C.S.I., June, 1935; retd., Dec., 1937; knighted, Jan., 1938.

SADASHIVA RAU, KALLE RAMA RAU, B.A., Indian Finance Dept. (b. 16th July, 1884).—Joined the service, 3rd March, 1908; asst. acctnt.-gen., Madras, Nov., 1909; ditto, United Provs., Nov., 1915; dep. acctnt.-gen., Bengal, Jan., 1919; ditto, Madras, March, 1919; ditto, Bombay, Sept., 1924; ditto, Central Provs., April, 1925; offg. dep. dir., army audit, Jan., 1927; offg. acct.-genl., Central Provs., Mar., 1930; ch. auditor, E.B. Rly., etc., Mar., 1931; offg. dir., rly. clearing accts. office, Apl., 1933; acct.-genl., Madras, May, 1934; dir. of army audit, Dec., 1934; acct.-genl., p. and t., Nov., 1937.

SADASIVAM, PILLAI, DORAISWAMI, Rao Bahadur, B.A. (Madras), B.Sc. (Tech.), Manch., A.M.C.I. (Manch.), (dep. dir. purchase) (b. 15th June, 1886).—Joined the service, 10th June, 1920, as asst. dir. of industries, Madras (tempy.); apptd. asst. dir. of purchase, Indian Stores Dept., Dec., 1922; dep. ditto, July, 1935.

SADASIVAM, TUMULURU RAMAKRISHNIAH, B.A., Finance dept., govt. of India (b. 27th Nov., 1892).—Joined the service as probnr., 9th Feb., 1915; asst. contr., paper currency, Nov., 1916; asst. acct. genl., posts and tels., Madras, 24th June, 1921; asst. acct.-genl., C.P., Oct., 1921; asst. acct.-genl., posts and tels., Calcutta, Mar., 1922; dep. ditto, Oct., 1924; asst. dir. of army audit, W.C., Mar., 1926; ditto, S.C., May, 1927; audit officer, N.W.F.P., Feb., 1930; asst. acct.-genl., posts and tels., Delhi, Jan., 1931; dep. ditto, Jan., 1931; dep. acct.-genl., Bombay, Apl., 1931; attd. officer, office of dir., rly. audit, May, 1932; offg. dep. dir., rly. audit, Jan., 1933; offg. audit officer, L.B. and C.C., Apl., 1934; comptr., Sind, Apl., 1936; dep. dir.-genl., finance, posts and tels., Jan., 1937.

SADHU RAM, CHAUDHRI, B.A., Indian Police (supt.) (b. 24th July, 1899).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Punjab, 6th Oct., 1922; offg. supt., Feb., 1928; confd., Mar., 1934.

SADIK, HAMID GHULAM (see Hamid G. S.).

SADIQ ALI KHAN, AQAL, Indian Police (supt., United Provs.) (b. 21st Jan., 1886).—Joined the service, 1st Nov., 1910; apptd. to I.P. as supt., Apl., 1934.

SADULLAH KHAN, KHAN BAHADUR, late Indian Political Dept. (b. 29th Dec., 1880).—Joined the dept. as asst. commr., Peshawar, on 1st Jan., 1922; city magte., Peshawar, Apl., 1929; dist. judge, Hazara, May, 1930; asst. pol. agent in Southern States of C.I. and in Malwa, June, 1931; asst. commr., Tonk, Mar., 1932; dep. commr., Bannu, June, 1934; retd., Dec., 1935.

SAGREIYA, KAMPTE PRASAD, B.A. (Oxon), B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Central Provs.) (b. 10th Feb., 1904).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., Central Provs., 27th Oct., 1927; dep. consvr., Dec., 1931.

SAH, DEBI LAL (see Debi Lal Sah).

SAHAI, RAM CHANDRA (see Ram Chandra Sahai).

SAHAI, RAMESHWAR (see Rameshwar Sahai) SAHASRABUDHE, DATTATRAYA LAKSHMAN, M.Ag., M.Sc. Rai Bahadur, Indian Agric Service (agric. chemist to govt. of Bombay) (b. 1st Sept., 1881).—Held non-gazetted appts. from 3rd Jan., 1906, to 31st May, 1913; asst. prof. of chemistry, June, 1913; agric. chemist, March, 1926.

SAHAY, BHAGWAN, Indian C.S. (jt. mag., United Provinces) (b. 15th Feb., 1905).—Educ. at University of Allahabad and School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 9th Oct., 1929; arrived, 10th Nov., 1929, and served in the United Provinces as asst. mag. and coll.; jt. mag., Mar., 1931; dep. secty. to govt., U.P., indus. bch. (tempy.) May, 1936, and again, May, 1937.

SAHAY, JAYADEVA, M.A., Indian Police (supt., Orissa) (b. 2nd Jan., 1900).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bihar and Orissa, 30th April, 1923; offg. addl. supt., Feb., 1932; supt., May, 1936.

SAHAY, KULWANT, late Judl. Dept., Bihar and Orissa (b. 23rd Jan., 1873).—Apptd. addl. judge, high ct., Patna, Nov., 1923; judge, ditto, Dec., 1927; retd., Jan., 1934.

SAHAY, VISHNU, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (jt. mag., United Provs.) (b. 22nd Nov., 1901).—Educ. at Allahabad Univ. and Lincoln Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 23rd Oct., 1925; arrived, 7th Dec., 1925, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag.; offg. dep. commr., Apl., 1928; offg. mag. and collr., Jan., 1934; offg. regr., co-op. soc., U.P., Aug., 1934.

SAHIB, ABDUR RAHIM (see Abdur Rahim Sahib).

SAHIB, ELATT VILIAGATH AMU (see Amu Sahib, E. V.).

SAHIB KHAN NOON, MALIK, M.B.E., Punjab Civil Service (dep. commr.) (b. Nov., 1896).—Extra asst. commr., May, 1911; confd. Apl., 1913; M.B.E., Jan., 1919; dep. commr., June, 1935.

SAHIB, MUHAMMAD SIRAJUDDIN (see Muhammad S.S.).

SAHIB, SAIYID ABDUL QADIR (see Saiyid Abdul Qadir S.).

SAHIB, SHARIF MUHAMMAD ALI (see Sharif, M. A. S.).

SAHIBZADA, AHMED KHAN, M.B., Major, I.M.S. (agency surg.) (b. 15th Oct., 1891).—First commn. dated 1st March, 1922; in milty. employ to April, 1925; civil medl. officer, Bannu, April, 1925; ditto, Tochi Agency, April, 1928; ditto, N. Waziristan, Nov., 1929; civil surgeon, Hazara, Feb., 1933.

SAHNEY, NAUBAT RAI, LALA, B.A., LL.B., Indian Police (b. 29th June, 1901).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Punjab, 7th July, 1924; offg. supt., Sept., 1929, and again, Apl., 1933.

SAHNI, DAYA RAM (see Daya Ram Sahni).

SAHNI, NARSING DASS M., B.A., B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Madras) (b. 12th Oct., 1900).—Joined the service, 9th Nov., 1923; dep. consvr., Nov., 1927.

SAID, MUHAMMAD (see Muhammad Said).

SAID ULLAH KHAN, B.A. (Oxon), Barr., Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Punjab) (b. 15th July, 1896).—Educ. at Chief's Coll., Lahore, and Balliol Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 12th Dec., 1921; arrived, 2nd Oct., 1922, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., July, 1927; dep. commr. (provl.), Apl., 1929; confd., Nov., 1932.

SAID-UZ-ZAFAR KHAN, SAHIBZADA, M.B., late United Provs. medl. service (b. 14th Oct., 1876).—Joined the service, 19th April, 1905, as asst. surg.; prof., King George's medl. coll., July, 1914; civil surg., April, 1920; dean and prinpl., King George's medl. coll., May, 1926; on depts. to Bhopal State from Oct., 1927; ret'd., Oct., 1931.

SAIGAL, DEVI DAYAL (see Devi Dayal S.).

SAIN, KANWAR LALA (see Kanwar Sain, L.).

SAING, U BA, Barr., late Burma Commission (b. 9th Nov., 1881).—Apptd. addl. and sess. judge, Mar., 1921; dist. and sess. judge, Dec., 1922; ret'd., Nov., 1936.

ST. JOHN, CECIL HENRY, late Indo-European Telegraph Dept.—Held non-gazetted appts. from 1st April, 1891, to 28th Feb., 1918; asst. supt., May, 1918; supt., Feb., 1924; engr. and electrician, Sept., 1928; ret'd. Oct., 1929.

ST. JOHN, Sir HENRY BEAUCHAMP, K.C.I.E., C.B.E., Lt.-Col., I.A. (ret'd.) (b. 26th Aug., 1874).—First commn. dated 30th August, 1893; in mil. employ to May, 1899, when he was apptd. asst. commr. N.W.F. Prov.; asst. to a. g.-g. in Rajputana Nov., 1900; asst. to resdt. in Mewar, June, 1901, to Aug., 1901; asst. to a.g.-g. and chief commr., N.W.F. Prov., Nov., 1901, to April, 1905; asst. to a. g.-g. in Rajputana, Aug., 1905, to Jan., 1909; asst. to a. g.-g. in Baluchistan, May, 1910; special duty under govt. of India in for. dept., Sept., 1911; asst. sec. to govt. of India, for. dept., Oct., 1912; C.I.E., June, 1913; asst. pol. agent and asst. commr., Quetta-Pishin, April, 1915; pol. agent, and dep. commr. ditto, April, 1916; C.B.E., Jan., 1920; offg. resdt. W. Rajputana States, April, 1921; pol. agent, E. States of Rajputana, March, 1922; offg. agent to the govr.-genl., Punjab States, Feb., 1925; confd., Dec., 1925; agent to govr.-genl. and ch. commr. in Baluchistan, Nov., 1927; ret'd., Nov., 1930; K.C.I.E., Jan., 1930.

ST. JOHN, OLIVER CHARLES BEAUCHAMP, Capt. I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 22nd Oct., 1907).—First commn., 2nd Feb., 1928; in milty. employ prior to 1st June, 1931; under-secty. to A.G.G. in Baluchistan, June, 1931; offic. on spl. duty, govt. of India, in home dept. (temp.), May, 1933; asst. pte. secty. to H.E. the Viceroy, May, 1933; under training in the U.P., Nov., 1934; under-secty. to the A.G.G. in Baluchistan, June, 1935; asst. to the dep. A.G.G. in Baluchistan, July, 1935; asst. commr., Ajmer, Apl., 1936; on for. service in Alwar State, from 1st Sept., 1936, to 18th Nov., 1936; asst. commr., Ajmer, Nov., 1936; under-secty. to A.G.G., W.I. States Agency, Jan., 1937; pol. agent, Sabar Kantha Agency, Sept., 1937; under-secty. to the resdt. for the States of W.I., Oct., 1937.

SAIYID, ABDUS SALAM (see Abdus Salam Saiyid).

SAIYID ABDUL QADIR SAHIB, B.A., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Madras) (b. 15th Sept., 1885).—Joined the service, Dec., 1907; dep. consvr., Nov., 1925.

SAIYID, ABDULLAH ABU (see Abdullah, A. S.).

SAIYID ALI AMIR, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Bihar) (b. 1st Aug., 1895).—Joined the service, 20th Oct., 1919; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1929.

SAIYID AMINUDDIN, B.A., Barr., Indian C.S. (collr. and mag., Bombay) (b. 21st April, 1895).—Educ. at Aligarh Collegiate Sch., and Downing Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 14th Dec., 1921; arrived, 6th Jan., 1922, and served in Bombay as asst. collr., offg. collr. and dist. mag., March, 1926; confd., July, 1936.

SAIYID MUHAMMAD MASIH, BARR., Bengal Judl. Service (b. 23rd Oct., 1885).—Apptd. dist. and sess. judge, Jan., 1929; services placed at disposal of govt. of Assam, Feb., 1932.

SAIYID MUHAMMAD SHU'AIB RIZAWI, Khan Bahadur, Indian Police (supth., Bihar) (b. 11th Nov., 1885).—Joined the service as dep. supt., on probn., 2nd Jan., 1908; confd., Mar., 1909; supt., Sept., 1930.

SAIYID MUJIBUR RAB, M.B.E., M.A., Indian Police (supth., Bihar) (b. 1st Sept., 1899).—Joined the service, 1st Nov., 1922; offg. supt., Feb., 1930; confd., Nov., 1932; M.B.E., Jan., 1931.

SAJBA SHANKAR RANGNEKAR (see Rangnekar, S. S.).

SAKER, RICHARD KENNETH MAITLAND, Capt. I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 30th Dec., 1908).—First commn., 30th Aug., 1928; in milty. employ prior to 15th Nov., 1933; under training under the A.G.G., Gujerat States and resdt., Baroda, Nov., 1933; asst. magte. and collr., Meerut, June, 1934; under-secty. to A.G.G., Rajputana, Jan., 1936; under-secty. to the resdt. for Baroda and the Gujerat States, Nov., 1937.

SAKHI CHAND, B.A., Rai Bahadur, late Indian Police Service (Bihar and Orissa).—Joined the service, 25th Feb., 1902; dep. supt., Jan., 1907; supt., Sept., 1914; Kaisar-i-Hind medal, 1st class, Jan., 1921; offg. dep. inspr.-gen., April, 1926; ret'd., June, 1928.

SAKSENA, BHAGWATI PRASAD (see Bhagwati P. S.).

SAKSENA, PREM CHANDRA, Indian Police (b. 26th Dec., 1900).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., Central Provs., 3rd Sept., 1925; offg. dist. supt., March, 1928.

SAKSENA, RAM CHAND (see Ram Chand S.).

SALAHUDDIN AHMAD YUSUF, Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Bengal) (b. 28th Jan., 1902).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 4th Dec., 1925; dep. consvr., Nov., 1929.

SALAMAT ULLAH, HAJI MOHAMMAD, M.C., M.B., Lt.-Col., I.M.S., Jail Dept., United Provs. (inspr.-genl. of prisons) (b. 16th Dec., 1892).—Apptd. supt., central prison, Lucknow, 14th Feb., 1926; inspr.-genl. of prisons, United Provs., Feb., 1935.

SALAM-UL-HAQQ, B.A., Khan Bahadur, late India Posts and Tels. (b. 2nd Feb., 1875).—Held non-gazetted appts. from 1st Oct., 1896; supt., June, 1904; offg. dep. P.M.G., R.M.S., Western Circle, June, 1924; confd. Feb., 1925; dep. P.M.G., Nagpur, Nov., 1927; ret'd., Feb., 1930.

SALE, JOHN FORD, M.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 20th Feb., 1884).—Educ. at Rugby and Emmanuel Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1906; arrived, 30th Nov., 1907, and served in United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag., Apl., 1916; pte. sec. to lieut.-govr., United Provs., Nov., 1916, to July, 1917; mag. and collr., Mar., 1924; offg. commr., Apl., 1935; ret'd., Dec., 1937.

SALE, JOHN LEWIS, C.I.E., A.M.I.C.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 24th Aug., 1885).—Trained at R.I.E. Coll.; joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Jan., 1907; exec engr., Jan., 1915; on mil. duty from 15th April, 1915, to 30th Sept., 1919; offg. suptg. engr., Sept., 1922; C.I.E., Jan., 1930; suptg. engr., Central P.W.D., Oct., 1930; ret'd., Jan., 1934.

SALE, STEPHEN LEONARD, B.A., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Punjab) (b. 30th Sept., 1889).—Educ. at Marlborough and New Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1913; arrived, 30th Nov., 1914, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; on mil. duty from May to Aug., 1918; offg. dist. and sessions judge, Dec., 1922; provl. ditto, Sept., 1924; legal membr. and secty., legisl. dept., Sept., 1928; addl. judge, high ct., Lahore, June, 1934.

SALES, HAROLD SPENCE, late Indian State Railways (b. Mar., 1874).—Apptd., from covenanted est., bridge engr., N.W. Ry., 19th Sept., 1907; ditto, E.B. Ry., Aug., 1923; ret'd., Mar., 1929.

SALIG RAM, B.A., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 11th Dec., 1883).—Joined the service 25th Sept., 1907; asst. engr., Sept., 1908; exec engr., Sept., 1916; on deputation to T. E. Coll., Roorkee, from 1st June, 1927, to 12th Oct., 1928; ret'd., Oct., 1932.

SALIG RAM PATHAK, CHAUBE, M.A., late United Provs. C.S. (b. 21st May, 1878).—Joined the service as proby. dep. collr. 28th Aug., 1902; confd., Mar., 1904; magte. and collr., July, 1929; ret'd., May, 1933.

SALISBURY, ALAN JACK, B.A. (Oxon.), Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bihar) (b. 9th April, 1905).—Educ. at Christ's Hospital, St. John's Coll., Oxford, and School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 11th Oct., 1929; arrived, 8th Nov., 1929, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. mag. and collr., May, 1935.

SALISBURY, ARTHUR GEORGE, India Office (suptg. executive officer, acctnt.-gen.'s dept.) (b. 29th Oct., 1885).—Educ. at Elizabeth Coll., Guernsey; apptd. 2nd class clerk, 16th July, 1906; minor staff clerk, Oct., 1915; staff clerk (acting), April, 1920; confd., April, 1921; higher exec. officer, April, 1922; suptg. exec. officer, March, 1927; apptd. assessor of inc. tax, March, 1927.

SALISBURY, FRANCIS HUGH, M.B., Lt.-Col., I.M.S. (ret'd.), late Jail Dept., Bengal.—First commu. dated 1st Sept., 1906; in milty. employ to 22nd March, 1910; offg. supt. jail

dept., April, 1910; with home dept., govt. of India, from 21st Oct., 1914, to 11th Aug., 1920; offg. supt., Dacca Central Jail, Aug., 1920; ditto, Alipore Central Jail, March, 1922; reverted to milty. employ, Oct., 1927; ret'd., May, 1930.

SALISBURY, Rev. MARK, LL.D., Indian Eccles. Estab. (senr. chaplain, Punjab) (b. 16th Oct., 1883).—Apptd. chaplain on probation, 12th Nov., 1921; junr. chaplain, Dec., 1923; senr. chaplain, Dec., 1933.

SALMOND, HUBERT GEORGE, Indian State Rlys. (dep. agent (works), E.B. Rly.) (b. 3rd. Jan., 1889).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1911; in milty. employ from July, 1915, to June, 1919; exec. engr., Oct., 1923; dep. dir., civil engrg., rly. bd.; offg. dep. ch. engr., Oct., 1932; dep. agent, works, E.B. rly., Mar., 1933.

SALOWAY, REGINALD HARRY, Indian C.S. (jt. mag., United Provs.) (b. 26th Oct., 1905).—Educ. at Exeter School, and St. John's College, Cambridge; joined the service, 12th Oct., 1928; arrived, Nov., 1928, and served in the United Provs. as asst. collr. and mag.; asst. commr., Mar., 1930; offg. magte. and collr., May, 1933; offg. dep. commr., Sept., 1935; offg. secty., bd. of rev., U.P., Apl., 1936.

SALTER, MALCOLM GURNEY, B.A., Indian Educl. Service (princl., Daly coll., Indore) (b. 10th May, 1887).—Joined the service as asst. master, Daly coll., 26th Jan., 1913; on milty. duty from 5th Dec., 1916, to 29th Oct., 1919; princpl., Daly coll., July, 1930.

SALUSBURY, CHARLES VANNE, Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Punjab) (b. 15th Feb., 1887).—Educ. at Magdalen Coll. Sch., and Hertford Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1910; arrived in India, 27th Nov., 1911, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; city mag., Delhi, Sept., 1915; asst. coln. officer, Lower Bari Doab Canal colony, April, 1916; on spl. duty for Upper Chenab Canal colony work, Lahore, June, 1917; on spl. duty, Punjab civil sectt., Dec., 1917; on spl. duty on staff of lieut.-govr., March, 1918; dep. commr. (provl.), Feb., 1925; deputed to Bikaner State, Oct., 1929, to Mar., 1931; offg. secty. to govt., transf. depts., Punjab, May, 1932; offg. commr., May, 1934; and again, Apl., 1936; offg. secty. to govt., Punjab, elec. and indus. dept., Jan., 1936; rev. and div. commr., N.W.F.P., Nov., 1936.

SALUSBURY-TRELAWNY, JOHN MAITLAND, M.C., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 26th Jan., 1892).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1914; in milty. employ from April, 1915, to 25th March, 1919; exec. engr., Oct., 1923; ret'd., Oct., 1934.

SAMLER, WILLIAM HADLEY GOODLIKE, M.A., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Punjab) (b. 18th Apl., 1894).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 15th Dec., 1922; on depn. to Kashmir State from 31st Jan., 1924; dep. consvr., Oct., 1927.

SAMPSON, EPHRAIM OSWIN, M.B.E., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Bombay) (b. 14th Aug., 1886).—Held non-gazetted appts. from 1st April, 1907, to 23rd Dec., 1912; proby. extra asst. consvr., Dec., 1912; extra asst. consvr., Aug., 1915; asst. consvr., Feb., 1925; dep. consvr., Feb., 1926; M.B.E., June, 1935.

SAMS, SIR HUBERT ARTHUR, Kt., C.I.E., B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 3rd May, 1875).—Educ. at St. Paul's Sch. and Peterhouse, Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1898; arrived, 29th Dec., 1899, and served in the Punjab and N.W. Frontier Prov. as asst. commr.; postmaster-gen., E. Bengal and Assam, May, 1907; ditto, Bengal, April, 1908; ditto, Burma, May, 1911; ditto, Bombay, Oct., 1913; ditto, central circle, Oct., 1914; on depn. as dir., postal services, Indian Expedi. Force, Mesopotamia, from Aug., 1917, to May, 1919; C.I.E., March, 1919; postmr.-gen., Bombay, April, 1920; dep. dir.-gen. of post office, India, April, 1922; dir.-genl., posts and tels., April, 1927; Kt., June, 1931; ret'd., Mar., 1934.

SAMS, KENNETH ASHETON HULTON, late Indian C.S. (United Provs.) (b. 26th Oct., 1884).—Educ. at Charterhouse Sch. and Jesus Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1908; arrived, 29th Nov., 1909, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; on mil. service from April, 1918; reverted to civil duty, June, 1919; jt. mag., June, 1919; actg. dist. and sess. judge, March, 1920; sess. and sub. judge, March, 1924; ret'd., Mar., 1930.

SAMUEL, GEORGE, M.A., Indian C.S. (under-secty., defence dept., govt. of Burma (b. 26th Aug., 1908).—Educ. at Hamilton Academy, Glasgow Univ. and Balliol Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1932; arrived in India, Dec., 1933, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; under-secty., defence dept., Apl., 1937.

SAMUEL, JOHN AUGUSTUS, B.A., LL.B. (Cantab.), Barr. (dep. secty., legisl. dept., Bihar (b. 3rd Feb., 1887).—Joined the service as asst. to supt. and remembr. of legal affairs, 24th July, 1917; asst. secty., legisl. council, Jan., 1921; dep. secty., legisl. dept., April, 1924.

SANER, ROBERT MORTON, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., U.P.) (b. 30th Dec., 1911).—Educated at Westminster and Christ Church, Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1934; arrived in India, Oct., 1935, and served in the U.P. as asst. mag. and collr.

SANDEMAN, ALFRED PATRICK, O.B.E., Lt.-Col., I.A., late Burma Commission (b. 17th Mar., 1878).—Arrived in India, Oct., 1898, and rendered service in mil. dept.; asst. commr., July, 1905; on mil. duty from Aug., 1915, to May, 1919; dep. commr., Dec., 1917; offg. commr., May, 1928; ret'd., July, 1932.

SANDEMAN, RONALD FREDERICK, B.A., Dip., Forestry, Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Bombay) (b. 3rd Nov., 1897).—Joined the service, 10th Dec., 1923, as asst. consvr.; dep. consvr., Nov., 1925.

SANDERS, REV. HOROLD MARTIN, M.A. (Oxon.), B.A. (Lond.), Eccles. Dept., Central Provs. (junior chaplain) (b. 7th Jan., 1900).—Apptd. chaplain on probation, 3rd Feb., 1929; junr. chaplain, Jan., 1931.

SANDERS, JOHN HERNE, M.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 28th May, 1888).—Educ. at Cardiff Intermediate Sch., Univ. Coll., Cardiff, and Balliol Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1911; arrived, 21st Nov., 1912, and served in Bombay as asst. collr. and magte.; on mil. duty,

July, 1916, to Dec., 1918; jt. judge and addl. sess. judge, Jan., 1923; offg. judge and sess. judge, March, 1926; ret'd., Feb., 1929.

SANDERSON, GEORGE DURRANT, Indian Police (supt., Punjab) (b. 4th Feb., 1894).—Joined the service, 15th Nov., 1912; asst. supt., Nov., 1913; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1921; supt., May, 1924; dist. officer, frontier constabulary, Jan., 1925; pers. asst. to inspr.-genl., N.W.F.P., Jan., 1929; offg. dep. inspr.-genl., Apl., 1935.

SANDERSON, The Right Hon. Sir LANCELOT, P.C., Kt., K.C., Barr.—Educ. at Harrow and Trinity Coll., Cambridge (B.A., LL.B., 1885; M.A., 1895); called to Bar at Inner Temple, 1886; M.P., Appleby Division, Westmorland, 1910-15; recorder of Wigan, 1901-15; chief justice, high ct., Calcutta, Nov., 1915; member of Privy Council, 5th Nov., 1926; resigned, Nov., 1926.

SANDERSON, RICHARD WILSON, late Indian Police Service (b. 21st May, 1892).—Joined the service, 15th Nov., 1912; asst. supt., Nov., 1913; supt., March, 1924; dist. offr., frontier constabulary, Feb., 1927; ret'd., March, 1932.

SANDERSON, ROBERT, C.I.E., M.A. (Oxon.), late Indian Educ. Service (b. 6th Jan., 1881).—Joined the service, 20th Oct., 1909; inspr. of schools, March, 1915; on mil. service, Nov., 1917, to April, 1919; offg. inspr. of training institutions Oct., 1926; confd., Feb., 1930; offg. dir. public instrn., Mar., 1930; confd., July, 1931; C.I.E., June, 1935; ret'd., Jan., 1935.

SANDES, EDWARD WARREN CAULFIELD, D.S.O., M.C., Lt.-Col. R.E. (ret'd.) (b. 13th Feb., 1880).—First commn. dated 22nd Nov., 1899; in mil. employ to 4th Oct., 1910; prof., Roorkee, Oct., 1910; in mil. employ from 6th April, 1915, to 31st Jan., 1920; prof., Roorkee, Feb., 1920; prinpl., Thomason Coll., Oct., 1921; ret'd., Aug., 1931.

SANDES, JOHN DRUMMOND, M.D., Lt.-Col., I.M.S., ret'd. (b. 5th Mar., 1883).—Joined the service, 2nd Feb., 1907; in mil. employ to Apl. 1910; offd. as resdt. physician and surgn., med. coll. hospital, Calcutta, April, 1911, to April, 1913; offg. civil surgn., June to Aug., 1914; surgn. to the govr. of Bengal, April, 1917; prof. materia medica, and 2nd physician, med. coll. hosp., Calcutta, March, 1920; jail supt., Rajahahi, Nov., 1923; prof., medical coll., Calcutta, April, 1925; ret'd., Dec., 1935.

SANDYS, ULRIC CAPEL, V.D., Indian State Railways (dep. ch. comml. manager, E.I. Rly.), (b. 1st Dec., 1881).—Joined the service, 17th Aug., 1901; asst. traffic supt., April, 1905; dist. traffic supt., April, 1910; temp. dep. chief comml. manager, E.I. Rly., July, 1925; supt., ditto, Jan., 1928; offg. dep. ch. comml. manager, July, 1935; confd., Apl., 1936.

SANGAL, HARA NARAYAN, B.A., Indian State Rlys. (exec. engr., E.B. Rly.) (b. 21st Nov., 1886).—Asst. eng., Oct., 1917; asst. exec. engr., Aug., 1919; exec. engr. (provl.), Nov., 1935.

SANGHAM, LAL, M.B.B.S. (Punj.), F.R.C.S. (Eng.), L.R.C.P. (Lond.), D.O.M.S. (Lond.), Capt., I.M.A. (D.M.O., Madras).—(b. 25th Sept., 1901).—First commn., 13th May, 1931; in milty. employ until 13th Nov., 1934; dist. medl. offcr., Nov., 1934.

SANJANA, BEHRAM NAVROJI, B.A., LL.B., late Bombay C.S., Judl. Branch (b. 27th Oct., 1874).—Joined the service as sub-judge, 26th Oct., 1904; asst. judge and asst. sess. judge, July, 1923; jt. judge and addl. sess. judge, Sept., 1926; judge and sess. judge, Nov., 1927; retd., Oct., 1931.

SANJANA, BOMAN S., Dept. of Industries, Bihar (b. 18th Sept., 1887).—Apptd. profvr., Bihar coll. of engrg., 7th July, 1925.
