SANJANA, KAIKOBAD EDALJI JAMSHEDJI, B.A., Barr., Khan Bahadur, Central Provs. C.S. (dep. commr.) (b. 11th May, 1883).—Joined the service as extra asst. commr., 3rd Jan., 1908; offg. dep. commr., March, 1927; confd., Sept., 1928.

SANJIVA RAO, BENEAL, M.A., Indian Educl. Service (prinpl., Queen's Coll., Benares) (b. 12th Dec., 1883).—Joined the service as prinpl., Queen's inter. coll., 1st July, 1922.

SANJIVA ROW, KODIKAL, C.I.E., M.A., Indian Audit Dept. (addl. jt. secty., fin. dept., govt. of India) (b. 18th Mar., 1890).—Joined the service, 3rd Sept., 1914; pers. asst. to contr. of currency, Jan., 1925; supt. fin. dept., Dec., 1925; asst. secty. to the govt. of India, fin. dept., Dec., 1932; offg. budget officer, fin. dept., variously from Apl., 1931; confd., Mar., 1933; C.I.E., June, 1935; apptd. representative of the Govt. of India, applicn. ctee. for the Indo-Burma finl. award, Jan., 1936; dep. secty., fin. dept., govt. of India, Apl., 1936; addl. jt. secty., ditto, Apl., 1937.

SANJIVI PILLAI, TIRUPATTUR GANGADHARAM PILLAI, B.A. (Hons.), Rao Bahadur, Indian Police (dist. supt.) (b. 28th Dec., 1898).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Madras, 1st Sept., 1922; offg. dist. supt., Mar., 1929; confd., Sept., 1932.

SANKARA AYYAR, TINNEVELLY SELLAMIER, B.A., B.E. (b. 1st Dec., 1886).—Joined the service as asst. examr., 17th Aug., 1909; asst. acct.-genl., U.P., March, 1914; asst. auditor, N.W. Rly., June, 1918; dep. auditor, E.B. Rly., Oct., 1921; govt. examr. of accts., M. & S.M., & S.I. Ry., Nov., 1922; ditto, B. and N.W. & R. & K. Ry., July, 1924; divl. audit officer, N.W. Rly., Nov., 1924; dep. acct.-genl., posts and tels., March, 1925; offg. dep. auditor, N.W. Rly., Nov., 1926; asst. auditor, ditto, Dec., 1926; dep. ch. accts. officer, E. I. Rly., March, 1928; offg. dir. of finance, rly., bd., Nov., 1930; confd., May, 1931; dir., rly., bd., Apl., 1932; offg. finl. commr. of rlys., Oct., 1935.

SANKARA MENON, KIZHAKEPAT, B.A., Barr., Madras Civil Service (Judicial Branch) (b. 21st May, 1881).—Apptd. dist. and sess. judge, 27th June, 1921; offg. judge, high ct., Madras, Apl., 1935; Feb., 1936, and again, July, 1936.

SANKEY, GEOFFREY CHARLES, B.A., late Indian C.S. (Bengal) (b. 28th April, 1884).—Educ. at Rugby and Queen's Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1907; arrived, 23rd Nov., 1908, and served in E. Bengal and Assam as asst. mag. and collr., and asst. settl. offr.; asst. commr., Assam, April, 1912; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal, July, 1917; offg. judge, Assam, Aug. to Oct., 1917, and from Jan. 1919, to May, 1920; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Bengal, Nov., 1921; confd., Sept., 1922; retd., Aug., 1931.

SANSBURY, WILLIAM HENRY, India Office (higher clerical officer, public and judl. dept.) (b. 16th June, 1882).—Apptd. 2nd class clerk, 20th Nov., 1902; minor staff clerk, Jan., 1919; higher clerical officer, April, 1922.

SANSON, ADAM JOHN WALKER, M.C., Indian Police (supt., Bombay) (b. 28th May, 1897).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bombay, 11th Nov., 1923; offg. supt., Apl., 1929; confd., Mar., 1936; dep. commr., Bombay (divs.).

SANT PRAKASH SINGH, SARDAR, Indian Police (supt., Punjab) (b. 1st May, 1899).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 14th April, 1920; offg. supt., Nov., 1926; confd., May, 1929.

SANT RAM, LALA, Rai Bahadur, late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 5th May, 1880).—Joined the service, 7th Nov., 1904; asst. engr., Nov., 1904; exec. engr., Dec., 1912; offg. suptg. engr., March, 1928; confd., Feb., 1931; offg. ch. engr., and secty. to govt., p.w.d., Punjab, June, 1933; retd., May, 1935.

SANTOS, JOHN, B.A., Indian Finance Dept. (b. 19th Jan., 1890).—Joined the service, 2nd Nov., 1914; asst. acctnt.-gen., Sept., 1925; examr., outside audit, Bombay, June, 1926; offg. asst. secty., fin. dept., Apl., 1929; offg. under secty., ditto, Nov., 1932; dep. acct. genl., Bombay, Apl., 1933.

SANYAL, SHISHIR KUMAR, B.A., Indian Police (supt., Bihar) (b. 23rd Mar., 1888).—Joined the service, 26th Oct., 1908; promoted to I.P., as supt., Aug., 1934.

SANYAL, SUSIL KUMAR, M.A., B.Sc., Indian Police (b. 29th Nov., 1903).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., Central Provs., 26th May, 1927.

SAPRE, KESHAV ANANT, LL.B., late Bombay Civil Service (Judicial Branch) (b. 8th Oct., 1877).—Held non-gazetted appts. from 1st Apl., 1902, to 19th Apl., 1912; sub-judge, Apl., 1912; offg. asst. judge, Oct., 1927; offg. judge and sess. judge, June, 1929; asst. judge, Dec., 1930; retd., Oct., 1933.

SAPRU, ANAND NARAYAN, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag., United Provs.) (b. 31st March, 1901).—Educ. at Allahabad Univ. and Balliol Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 24th Oct., 1924; arrived, 23rd Dec., 1924, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr., jt. mag., July, 1927; offg. dep. commr., April, 1928; services at disposal of A.G.G., Punjab States, for employment in Patiala State. Apl., 1931; offg. mag. and collr., May, 1932; offg. excise commr., U.P., Mar., 1935, and inspr.-genl. of regn. in addn., Apl., 1935.

SAPRU, SIR TEJ., Bahadur, P.C., K.C.S.I., LL.D..—Educ. Agra Coll.; member United Provs. legl. council, 1916-20; law member of govt.-genl.'s exec. council, 1920-23; represented govt. of India at Imperial Conference, 1923; K.C.S.I., Jan., 1923; British-India delegate to Round Table conf., London, Nov., 1930-Jan., 1931; 2nd Session, Sept.-Dec., 1931; 3rd Session, Nov., 1932; P.C., Jan., 1934.

SARAN, REDHA KANTA (see Redha Kanta Saran).

SARDA SHANKAR BAJPAI (see Bajpai, S. S.).

SARDAR SINGH, M.A., Indian Police (b. 1st Feb., 1904).—Joined the service as asst. supt., United Provs., 27th May, 1927; offg. supt., Apl., 1933.

SARDARI LAL, MALHOTRA, Lala, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 2nd Dec., 1901).—Joined the service as apprentice engr., 24th Oct., 1924; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1925; exec. engr., Oct., 1934.

SARDHANA, MADAN GOPAL (see Madan, G. S.).

SARDESAI, VIDYADHAR NARHAR, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Bombay) (b. 28th July, 1905).—Educ. at University of Bombay and School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 11th Oct., 1929; arrived, Dec., 1929, and served as asst. collr., Bombay.

SARKAR, BASANTA BIHARI, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 5th Aug., 1901).—Educ. at Univ. of Calcutta, Univ. College, London, and Jesus College, Cambridge; joined the service, 18th Oct., 1926; arrived, Nov., 1926, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. magte. and dep. collr., Dec., 1927; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Mar., 1932; offg. mag. and collr., Sept., 1933.

SARKAR, BHABADEV, RAI BAHADUR, B.A., Bihar C.S. (mag. and collr.) (b. 16th May, 1883).—Joined the service, 18th April, 1903; dep. mag. and dep. collr., April, 1905; offg. mag. and collr., Mar., 1931; confd., July, 1934; secty., bd. of rev., June, 1934.

SARKAR, HIRENDRA NATH, B.A., Indian Police (asst. supt., Bengal) (b. 18th Jan., 1905).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., 1st May, 1928; confd., Sept., 1930; offg. addl. supt., Feb., 1934.

SARKAR, SIR JADU NATH, Kt., C.I.E., M.A., late Indian Educl. Service.—Joined the service, 30th June, 1898; prof. of history, Ravenshaw Coll., Cuttack, July, 1919; ditto, Patna coll., Oct., 1923; C.I.E., Jan., 1926; vice-chancellor, Calcutta Univ., 1926; Kt., June, 1929.

SARKAR, SUBODH CHANDRA, Judicial Dept., Bengal (judge, Calcutta small cause ct.) (b. 1st Sept., 1886).—Joined the service, 24th May, 1915; dist. and sess. judge, Apl., 1928; judge, Calcutta small cause ct., Jan., 1934.

SARMA, ANANTANARAYANA, A.N. (see Anantanarayana, S. A. N.).

SARMA, G. K., SESHADRI (see Seshadri Sarma, G. K.).

SARMA, TIRNOSTTIYUR RAMASWAMI AIYAR VRIIDHAGIRI, B.A., Indian Finance Dept. (b. 16th Nov., 1887).—Joined the service as asst. examr., 12th Aug., 1907; asst. audit officer, July, 1920; dept. acct.-genl. (posts and tels.), Sept., 1920; audit officer, Bombay Development Scheme, May, 1923; dep. auditor, O. & R. Rly., April, 1924; asst. auditor, E.I. Rly., Dec., 1925; govt. examr. of accts., June, 1926; offg. dep. auditor genl., N.W. Rly., March, 1928; dep. ch. accts. officer, N.W. Rly., Apl., 1929; offg. dep. auditor-genl., Apl., 1931; govt. exr. of accts., S. & S.M. & R.I. rlys., Dec., 1931; ch. auditor, rly. clearing accts., July, 1935.

SARRE, LIONEL W., Indian Police (asst. supt.) (b. 17th April, 1909).—Joined the service as probty. asst. supt., Bombay, 18th Jan., 1930; confd., Aug., 1931.

SARUP SINGH, BHAI, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 27th Apl., 1897).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 27th Nov., 1919; asst. exec. engr., Aug., 1922; exec. engr., Oct., 1928.

SASTRI, K. S. R. (see Ramaswami Sastri, K. S.).

SASTRI, S. KUPPUSWAMI (see Kuppuswami, Sastri S.).

SATARAWALA, DADABHAI RATANJI, B.A., late Indian Service of Engrs. (Bombay) (b. 6th Aug., 1876).—Joined the service, 15th April, 1901; exec. engr., April, 1910; offg. supt. engr., July, 1923; confd., May, 1926; offg. ch. engr., May, 1928; ret'd., Aug., 1931.

SATHE, DATTATRAYA LAXMUN, M.A., B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (consvr., Madras) (b. 27th May, 1889).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 14th March, 1914; dep. consvr., March, 1919; offg. consvr., Aug., 1933; confd., Jan., 1935.

SATHE, JAGANNATH LAKSHMAN, B.A., Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., United Provs.) (b. 20th April, 1886).—Educ. at Bombay Univ., and St. John's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1908; arrived, 8th Oct., 1910, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag., April, 1917; mag. and collr., Dec., 1924; employed as secy., bd. of rev., from Nov., 1923; offg. excise commr., April, 1927; confd., May, 1928; dir., bureau of statistics and economic research, Apl., 1932; secty., finance dept., United Provs., Apl., 1933.

SATHE, SHANKAR GOPAL, M.A., late Indian Educl. Service (Bombay) (b. 12th Oct., 1875).—Joined the service, 14th May, 1919; prof. of logic and moral philosophy, Deccan Coll., May, 1919; ditto, Elph. Coll., Bombay, Oct., 1924; ret'd., Oct., 1930.

SATHIANATHAN, WILLIAM RATNAM SAMUEL, Indian C.S. (sub-collr., Madras) (b. 15th March, 1900).—Educ. at Madras Univ., Peter-house Coll., Cambridge, and London Sch. of Oriental Studies; joined the service, 24th Oct., 1924; arrived, 15th Nov., 1924, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; sub-coll., March, 1928; dir. of land records, Madras Dec., 1931.

SATOW, CHARLES FRANCIS, A.M.I.C.E. late Indian State Rlys. (E.I. Rly.) (b. 4th Oct., 1881).—Joined the service as junr. engr., 28th Jan., 1905; resdt. engr., June, 1917; dist. engr., Oct., 1924; offg. divl. supt., Feb., 1925; ret'd., Jan., 1929.

SATTANATHAN, ARMUGA NAYAKAR, B.A. (Hons.), Imperial Customs Service (asst. collr.) (b. 15th May, 1905).—Joined the service, May, 1928; asst. collr. of customs, 1929.

SATYAWADI, SHEO CHARAN, M.A., Indian Customs Service (asst. collr. of customs b. 5th Nov., 1894).—Joined the service, 6th Oct., 1911; asst. collr., Oct., 1913; offg. coll. for customs, Chittagong; Mar., 1924; ditto, Rangoon, Nov., 1931; ditto, Calcutta, June, 1933.

SATYAMURTI, R., M.A., M.L. (dep. registrar, high ct., Madras) (b. 1st Sept., 1889).—Joined the service, Jan., 1919; dist. munisff., Oct., 1922; asst. regr., July, 1930; dep. regr., July, 1934; offg. master, variously from July, 1935.

SAUDAGAR SINGH, RAI BAHADUR, M.A., B.L., Bihar C.S. (dist. and sess. judge) (b. 3rd Jan., 1885).—Joined the service, 14th Jan., 1913; sub-judge, Nov., 1929; offg. dep. regr., high ct., Patna, June, 1930; offg. regr., ditto, Jan., 1932; dist. and sess. judge, Aug., 1935.

SAUDAT-UL-LAH KHAN, Indian Agricultural Service (b. 14th Apl., 1898).—Joined the service as dep. dir. of agric., Madras, 24th Jan., 1922; with govt. of Baluchistan as agricrl. officer, Quetta, Apl., 1930.

SAUMAREZ SMITH, WILLIAM HANBURY, Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., Bengal).—Educ. at Winchester and Trin. Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 11th Oct., 1934; arrived in India, 3rd Dec., 1934, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.

SAUNDERS, CHARLES HUMPHREY AUGUSTUS, Indian State Rlys. (exec. engr., G.I.P. Rly.) (b. 8th Mar., 1886).—Joined the service as temp. engr., 26th Sept., 1914; asst. engr., 27th Jan., 1917; on milty. service from 2nd Oct., 1917, to 2nd Oct., 1919; resdnt. engr., Oct., 1919; exec. engr., Sept., 1930.

SAUNDERS, Rt. Rev. CHARLES JOHN GODFREY, M.A., Bengal Eccles. Dept. (Bishop of Lucknow) (b. 15th Feb., 1888).—Joined the service, 23rd Feb., 1917; junr. chaplain, Feb., 1919; Bishop of Lucknow, July, 1928.

SAUNDERS, CYRIL SIVEWRIGHT, late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 23rd Jan., 1887).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1909; exec. engr., Oct., 1917; offg. suptg. engr., May, 1925, and again, March, 1926; ret'd., Aug., 1932.

SAUNDERS, HENRY HUME, O.B.E., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 23rd June, 1888).—Joined the service as asst. loco. supt., 21st Oct., 1913; in milty. employ from 7th Aug., 1915, to 31st March, 1920; offg. dist. loco. supt., April, 1920; offg. asst. agent, Feb., 1924; offg. works manager, loco., Oct., 1926; divl. rolling stock officer and offg. supt., mechanical workshops, March, 1928; offg. dep. ch. mechl. engr., Jan., 1930; offg. divl. supt. (mechl.), E.I. rly., Mar., 1935; O.B.E., June, 1935; dep. ch. mechl. engr., July, 1935; ret'd., Dec., 1936.

SAUNDERS, HOWARD FAUNTLEROY, M.A., Indian Educl. Service (dep. dir. of public instrn., Madras) (b. 15th Apl., 1885).—Joined the service, 21st March, 1919; inspr. of schools, Feb., 1922; dist. eduel. officer, Jan., 1923; addl. dep. dir. of public instrn., Nov., 1927; dep. dir., Feb., 1932; offg. inspr. of European schools, Feb., 1932; offg. dir. of public instrn., Dec., 1934.

SAUNDERS, JOHN ALFRED, B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 28th May, 1887).—Educ. at Mount St. Mary's Coll., Chesterfield, and Merton Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1909; arrived in India, 19th Nov., 1910, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; transfed. to Bihar and Orissa,

April, 1912, as asst. mag. and collr.; asst. settl. offr., Oct., 1913; jt. mag. and dep. collr. and ditto, April, 1917; settl. offr., N. Bihar, April, 1918; sec., Bihar and Orissa Legve. Council, April, 1922; offg. dist. and sess. judge, March, 1925; confd., Dec., 1927; offg. supt. and remembr. of legal affairs and secty. to govt., judl. dept., Mar., 1931; addl. judge, high ct., Patna, variously from July, 1933; offg. judge, ditto, July, 1934; and again, July, 1935; ret'd., Mar., 1938.

SAUNDERS, JOHN FREDERICK, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., Madras) (b. 21st April, 1910).—Educ. at Dunstable Grammar School and Selwyn College, Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1934, and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr.

SAUNDERS, LAWRENCE EDWARD, late Indian Police (b. 27th Aug., 1889).—Joined the service, Nov., 1909; asst. supt., Sept., 1919; supt., April, 1925; ret'd., Aug., 1935.

SAUNDERS, LIONEL PERCY, B.A., late Indian Educl. Service.—Arrived in India, 5th March, 1909, and served as profir. of logic and moral philosophy, Dacca Coll.; profir. of philosophy, Lahore, Jan., 1911; ditto, Rangoon, Dec., 1914; on mil. service, June to July, 1918; ret'd., June, 1928.

SAUNDERS, PERCY TUNSTALL, O.B.E., M.R.C.V.S., Indian Vety. Service (dir. of vety. services, Madras) (b. 8th Sept., 1884).—Apptd. prof. of surg., vety. coll., Madras, July, 1923; prinpl., Madras Vety. Coll., July, 1925; offg. dir. of vety. services, Madras, Oct., 1929; confd., Dec., 1930.

SAVAGE, GERALD ROBERT, Indian Police (b. 1st Aug., 1917).—Apptd. asst. supt., Punjab, on probn., Dec., 1937.

SAVARA, A. N. (see Amar Nath S.).

SAVARINATHAN, RAJARATNA, B.A., B.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 31st Oct., 1879).—Joined the service as temp. engr., 3rd June, 1908; asst. engr., Feb., 1920; asst. exec. engr., July, 1926; offg. exec. engr., July, 1926; confd., Oct., 1930; ret'd., Oct., 1934.

SAVIDGE, CECIL ARTHUR GRANT, M.A., Indian C.S., Indian Political Service (b. 20th May, 1905).—Educ. at Aberdeen Grammar School, University of Aberdeen and Emmanuel Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 9th Oct., 1929; arrived, 2nd Dec., 1929, and served in the Central Provinces as asst. commr.; asst. commr., Bannu, Apl., 1934; dep. commr., Bannu, Aug., 1935; asst. commr., Nowshera, Nov., 1935; ditto, Bannu, July, 1936; undersecty. to govt. of India, ext. affairs dept., Oct., 1937.

SAVOOR, SNANKAR RAO ULLAH, B.A., D.Sc., Indian Educl. Service (prinpl. govt. collr., Kumbakonam) (b. 14th Jan., 1893).—Joined the service as profir., presdy. coll., Madras, 18th Feb., 1921; prinpl., govt. coll., Kumbakonam, June, 1929; confd., Jan., 1936; offg. dep. dir. of public instrn., Apl., 1931.

SAVUR, SRINIVASA RAO, M.A., Ph.D., Meteorological Dept. (meteorologist) (b. 26th Mar., 1894).—Joined the service, 11th July, 1917; apptd. meteorologist on probn., 5th Apl., 1928; confd., Apl., 1930.

SAWHNEY, DHAN RAJ, late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 13th Dec., 1882).—Trained at R.I.E. Coll.; joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1906; exec. engr., Oct., 1914; supt. engr. (sub. temp.), Oct., 1923; in foreign service, Khaipur State, Dec., 1926, to June, 1931; ditto, Alwar State, Aug., 1931; supt. engr., Nov., 1934; ret'd., Dec., 1937.

SAWYER, WILLIAM HENRY, late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 26th June, 1877).—Joined the service 9th Feb., 1905; asst. engr., June, 1917; asst. exec. engr., March, 1919; exec. engr., Jan., 1925; ret'd., June, 1932.

SAYER, MICHAEL WYNNE, B.A., Indian Agric. Service (impl. agriculturist) (b. 10th Sept., 1885).—Joined the service as supy. agriculturist, 20th Mar., 1914; secty. sugar bureau (temp.), Mar., 1921; offg. impl. agriculturist, and jt. dir., May, 1934; confd., Jan., 1936.

SAYERS, FREDERICK, C.I.E., Indian Police (commr. of police, Madras) (b. 22nd July, 1885).—Joined the service, 3rd Dec., 1906; asst. supt., 1908; supt., Nov., 1916; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1927; offg. dep. inspr.-genl., June, 1929; and again, Mar., 1933; confd., Aug., 1933; offg. inspr.-genl., Oct., 1936; C.I.E., May, 1937; commr. of police, Apl., 1937.

SAYERS, RICHARD JOHN, Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Burma) (b. 12th Feb., 1899).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 13th Dec., 1923; dep. consvr., May, 1928.

SAYIED, ABDULLAH ABU (see Abdullah Abu, S.).

SCAMP, EDWARD, late Office of High Commr. for India (b. 27th Nov., 1881).—Apptd. clerk, 2nd class, 1st May, 1900; on mil. service from Sept., 1918; transf'd. to office of high commr. for India, Oct., 1920; higher exec. officer, April, 1922; ret'd., Nov., 1936.

SCHOFIELD, SIDNEY CHARLES APPS, India Office (higher executive officer, acctnt.-gen.'s dept.) (b. 7th Feb., 1883).—Educ. at Alley'n's Sch., Dulwich; apptd. clerk, 2nd class, acctnt.-gen.'s dept., 8th Nov., 1901; on mil. service from June, 1915, to July, 1919; services lent to office of chief commr., Baghdad, from July, 1919; resumed duty in acctnt.-gen.'s dept., Aug., 1920; staff clerk (actg.), Aug., 1920; confd., April, 1921; higher exec. officer, April, 1922; also assessor of income tax.

SCHUSTER, SIR GEORGE ERNEST, K.C.S.I., K.C.M.G., C.B.E., M.C. (b. 1881).—Educ. at Charterhouse (scholar), and New Coll., Oxford; barr.-at-law, 1905; served European War, 1914-18; ch. asst. to organiser of internatl. credits under League of Nations, 1921; member of advisory comm. to Treasury under Trade Facilities Act, 1921-2; chairman of advisory comm. to colonial secty. on E. African loans, 1926-28; K.C.M.G., 1926; financial secty., Sudan Govt., 1922-17; member, govr.-genl.'s exec. council, Nov., 1928; K.C.S.I., June, 1931; member of Ind. del. at Impl. Econ. conf., July, 1932; ditto, monetary and econ. conf., London, June, 1933; member, Ind. res. bank ctee., July, 1933; vice-presdt., govr.-genl.'s exec. council, Aug., 1933 to May, 1934.

SCHUTTE, WILLIAM MATTHEW M.B.E., A.M.I.Mech.E., M.R.A.S.E., late Indian Agric. Service (b. 14th Nov., 1878).—Joined the service as agric. engr., Bombay, 3rd Jan., 1913; M.B.E., Jan., 1933; ret'd., Nov., 1933.

SCOTLAND, PATRICK JAMES, M.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 16th March, 1898).—Educ. at Glasgow Academy, and Queen's Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 28th Oct., 1921; arrived, 2nd Dec., 1921, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; settlement officer, Nov., 1929; supt. of census, April, 1930; ret'd., June, 1935.

SCOTT, ANDREW BENNET, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., Bengal) (b. 25th Jan., 1913).—Educ. at Perse Sch., Cambridge, and St. Catharine's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 16th Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Nov., 1937, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.

SCOTT, ARCHIBALD GIFFORD, Indian Police (dep. inspr.-genl., Central Prov.) (b. 21st Apl., 1889).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., Dec., 1909; dist. supt., Sept., 1921; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1931; offg. dep. inspr.-genl., Feb., 1934; confd., Dec., 1935.

SCOTT, CHARLES ARTHUR, D.S.O., Capt., R.I.M., ret'd., late Marine Dept., Bengal (b. 22nd Sept., 1879).—Apptd. port officer, Calcutta, 14th Nov., 1927; ret'd., May, 1932.

SCOTT, CHARLES WINTER, O.B.E., D.F.C., B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (timber advisory officer, rly. bd.) (b. 7th Jan., 1892).—Joined the army in the summer of 1915, and reported his arrival at Rangoon on 13th Dec., 1919; asst. consvr., Feb., 1916; dep. consvr., Feb., 1921; O.B.E., June, 1932, forest economist, major products, Burma, July, 1933; jt. timber adviser, rly. and army depts., Oct., 1934; timber advisory officer, rly. bd., Sept., 1936.

SCOTT, DONALD CHARLES, O.B.E., Major, R.A.M.C. (b. 9th Dec., 1888).—First commn. dated 1st April, 1919; surg. to govr. of Bombay, 9th Dec., 1928, to Dec., 1933.

SCOTT, DONALD LANGHAM, Indian Posts and Tels. (presdy. P.M.) (b. 19th May, 1887).—Joined the service, 1st Mar., 1909; supt., 1st Dec., 1915; on depn. to Field Service, May, 1919, to 5th Aug., 1919; asst. p.m., Oct., 1920; postmaster, Oct., 1921; presdy. ditto, June, 1935.

SCOTT, ERNEST LYNCH, V.D., late Indian State Railways (N.W. Rly.) (b. 17th Apl., 1878).—Joined the service 2nd Oct., 1903, as asst. loco. supt., state rlys.; dist. loco. supt., April, 1911; dep. loco. supt., Oct., 1924; offg. dep. ch. mechanical engr., Oct., 1926; ret'd., Mar., 1932.

SCOTT, FRANCIS BURGESS, Lt.-Col., I.A., Survey of India (director) (b. 3rd Mar., 1885).—First commn. dated 21st Dec., 1904; apptd. to I.A., 16th Feb., 1909; proby. asst. supt., April, 1910; confd. Oct., 1912; offg. dep. supt., April, 1919; confd., Aug., 1924; supt., Oct., 1926; offg. dir., Apl., 1936; confd., Nov., 1937.

SCOTT, FRANCIS WILLIAM, B.A., Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Burma) (b. 9th Nov., 1886).—Educ. at Newcastle-under-Lyme High Sch., Jesus Coll., Cambridge, and Trinity Coll., Dublin; apptd. after exam. of 1910; arrived in India,

12th Dec., 1911, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., Nov., 1921; dep. commr. (provl. sub.), Aug., 1927; confd., May, 1928.

SCOTT, GEORGE EDWARD, O.B.E., B.E., B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (suptg. engr., Burma) (b. 10th Oct., 1884).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1908; exec. engr., Oct., 1916; O.B.E., June, 1919; offg. suptg. engr., June, 1926; confd., Apl., 1930; ch. public wks. officer, F.S.S., Apl., 1930; and again Mar., 1936.

SCOTT, HENRY DONALD MORTIMER, Indian Police (supt., Punjab) (b. 17th Feb., 1900).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 15th Jan., 1920; offg. supt., March, 1926; confd., July, 1932; King's police medal, Feb., 1937.

SCOTT HERBERT BODLEY, O.B.E., F.R.C.S.E., Lt.-Col., I.M.S., ret'd., late Burma Medl. Dept. (b. 14th Dec., 1882).—First commn. dated 1st Sept., 1906; in milty. employ to 25th Mar., 1910; spl. plague medl. officer, May, 1910; offg. police surg. and pathologist, Rangoon, July, 1912; on mil. service from 27th Oct., 1914, to 28th April, 1919; asst. medl. supt., Rangoon, Aug., 1920; O.B.E., Aug., 1920; civil surg., July, 1921; offg. medl. supt., Rangoon, Jan., 1922; surg., gen. hosp., Rangoon, Feb., 1926; reverted to milty. employ, Oct., 1934; ret'd., Apl., 1937.

SCOTT, IAN DIXON, B.A., Indian C.S. (b. 6th Mar., 1909).—Educ. at Queen's Royal Coll., Trinidad, Balliol Coll., Oxford, and School of Economics, London; apptd. after exam. of 1931; arrived in India, Nov., 1932, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; asst. commr., Bannu, Oct., 1935; asst. pol. agent, Chitral, Apl., 1936; asst. commr., Manshra, Nov., 1937.

SCOTT, JAMES ALEXANDER, O.B.E., Indian Police (supt., Punjab) (b. 2nd Dec., 1895).—Joined the service, 20th Nov., 1915; on mil. duty from 26th July, 1916, to 4th Feb., 1919; asst. supt., Dec., 1920; supt., Dec., 1924; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1926, princpl. police trainingsch., Dec., 1929; O.B.E., Jan., 1931; senr. supt., Delhi, Oct., 1936.

SCOTT, JAMES EDWARD, O.B.E., M.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 13th Feb., 1882).—Educ. at Inverness Coll., Glasgow University, and Christ Church Coll., Glasgow; apptd. after exam. of 1905; arrived, 26th Nov., 1906, and served in E. Bengal and Assam as asst. mag. and collr.; transfed. to Bihar and Orissa, April, 1912; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Sept., 1913; on censor duty, Bombay, from April, 1915, to Jan., 1916; acting supt., Mayurbhanj State, Feb., 1916, to April, 1917; served under govt. of India, Army dept., from June, 1917, to April, 1919; O.B.E., June, 1919; mag. and collr., Nov., 1919; pol. agent and commr., Orissa Feudatory States, Nov., 1927; commr., Dec., 1931; ret'd., Sept., 1937.

SCOTT, MURIEL ELENA, M.A., M.B.E., Indian Educl. Service (lecturer, teachers' training coll., Rangoon) (b. 18th June, 1888).—Joined the service as asst. lecturer on education, Univ. Coll., Rangoon, 2nd April, 1923; lecturer on education, ditto, Nov., 1926; lecturer, teachers' training coll., Rangoon, Apl., 1931.

SCOTT, SAMUEL GORDON AMAND, Indian Police (b. 25th Oct., 1914).—Apptd. asst. supt., Burma, on probn., 5th Dec., 1934.

SCOTT, WALTER LAWRENCE, C.I.E., M.A. B.Sc., Indian C.S. (member, board of rev., Assam) (b. 7th Aug., 1880).—Educ. at Canterbury Coll., New Zealand; apptd. after exam. of 1903; arrived, 12th Dec., 1904; and served in Bengal as asst. and collr.; transfed. to E. Bengal and Assam, Oct., 1905; jt. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1911; under-sec. to chief commr., Assam, April, 1912; asst. commr., Assam, Oct., 1912; ditto, and settlt. offr., Aug., 1913; dep. commr., Nov., 1919; dir. of land records, inspr.-genl. of registrn., etc., Assam, April, 1923; C.I.E., March, 1929; member, legisl. council, Sept., 1932; offg. ch. secty. to govt., Assam, Sept., 1932; offg. commr., Jan., 1934; offg. member, govr.'s exec. Council, Assam, June, 1935; confd., Sept., 1935; member, rev. tribunal, Apl., 1937.

SCOTT, WILLIAM HAY, late Indian Finance Dept. (b. 18th July, 1876).—Joined the service, 17th Jan., 1898, as asst. examr. of accts., p.w. dept.; dep. examr., April, 1901; examr., June, 1907; dep. auditor, N.W. Rly., June, 1918; ch. auditor, E.B. Rly., April, 1925; services placed at the disposal of the Railway Board from 26th Nov., 1925; acct.-genl., June, 1926; dir. of clearing house accts., Lahore, Dec., 1926; contr., rly. accts., Mar., 1929; ret'd., July, 1931.

SCOTT, WILLIAM HERBERT, V.D., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 11th Oct., 1877).—Joined the service, 10th Dec., 1896; asst. traffic supt., Jan., 1902; dist. ditto, Jan., 1906; dep. traffic manager, June, 1917; dep. transportation supt., Nov., 1922; offg. ch. ditto, June, 1928; ret'd., Sept., 1933.

SCOTT O'CONNOR, THOMAS ARTHUR LESLIE, C.I.E., late Indian Police Service (b. 16th Jan., 1878).—Joined the service 27th April, 1901, and posted to United Provs.; asst. supt., April, 1906; supt., Dec., 1912; awarded King's police medal, Feb., 1917; offg. dep. inspr.-genl., May, 1920; confd. as dep. inspr.-genl., March, 1925; C.I.E., June, 1929; ret'd., Apl., 1932.

SCOTT, HENRY HAROLD GORDON DILL, Indian State Rlys. (dist. loco. supt. E.B. rly.) (b. 25th Mar., 1888).—Joined the service, 15th Oct., 1913; dist. loco. supt., E.B. rly., Oct., 1927; offg. dep. ch. mechl. engr., Oct., 1934.

SCOTT-SCOTT, DOUGLAS, V.D., Indian State Rlys. (works manager) (b. 16th June, 1890).—Joined the service 11th Mar., 1921; asst. works manager, Dec., 1928; works manager, G.I.P. rly., Apl., 1935.

SCRIMSHAW, SYDNEY HENRY, Office of High Commr. for India (higher clerical officer, accts. dept.) (b. 9th Apl., 1891).—Apptd., 1st July, 1925; transfed. from the G.I.P. Rly Co.

SCRIVEN, GEORGE WILLIAM, Indian State Rlys. (exec. engr., E.I. Rly.) (b. 24th Sept., 1890).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st June, 1915; exec. engr., Oct., 1922.

SCROGGIE, HAROLD FORBES, Indian Police (supt., N.W.F.P.) (b. 14th Nov., 1899).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 15th March, 1921; offg. dist. officer, frontier constabulary, Jan., 1926; offg. supt., Nov., 1926; confd., Oct., 1931; dist. officer, frontier constab., Oct., 1934.

SCROGGIE, JOHN ADAM, O.B.E., Indian Police (supt., Punjab) (b. 27th Mar., 1895).—Joined the service 20th Nov., 1915; on milty. duty from 26th July, 1916, to 19th Jan., 1919; asst. supt., July, 1921; supt., Apl., 1925; O.B.E., Feb., 1937.

SCROGGIE, WILLIAM REITH JOHN, C.I.E., Col., I.M.S. (ret'd.) (b. 23rd Jan., 1876).—Joined the service, 29th Jan., 1902; C.I.E., Aug., 1918; D.M.O., medl. officer, central jail, Salem, Oct., 1923; offg. D.M.O., Nilgiris, April, 1924; reverted to milty. employ from 14th June, 1930; ret'd., Jan., 1933.

SCROOPE, ARTHUR EDGAR, B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 24th Jan., 1881).—Educ. at Clongowes Wood Sch., and Trinity Coll., Dublin; apptd. after exam. of 1903; arrived, 12th Dec., 1904, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; transf. to E. Bengal and Assam, Oct., 1905; re-transf. to Bengal, March, 1907; jt. mag. and dep. collr., April, 1911; transf. to Bihar and Orissa, April, 1912; dist. and sess. judge, Oct., 1918; supt. and remembr., legal affairs, and sec. to govt. of Bihar and Orissa, judicial dept., April, 1924; actg. judge, high ct., Patna, Jan., 1927; and again, March, 1931; addl. ditto, Nov., 1929; judge, high ct., Patna, Oct., 1932; ret'd., July, 1933.

SCRUBY, JOSEPH, Indian State Rlys. (dep. ch. engr., N.W. Rly.) (b. 26th Mar., 1887).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1910; I.A.R.O., 25th March, 1915; exec. engr., Oct., 1918; offg. dep. ch. engr., N.W. rly., Oct., 1932; and again, Oct., 1935; ditto, (probl. perm.), Oct., 1935; confid., Apl., 1936.

SEAL, BENOYENDRA NATH, B.A. (Cantab.), Barr., Indian Educl. Service (prof., Eiph. Coll., Bombay) (b. 14th Apl., 1892).—Joined the service, 25th March, 1922; prof. of English and logic, Gujarat coll., March, 1922; doing duty as prof. of English, Karnatak Coll., Dharwar, Oct., 1925; confid., Feb., 1926; prof., Blph. Coll., Bombay, June, 1930.

SEALE, HERBERT JOHN, A.M.I.E.E., Indian State Rlys. (electrical engr., G.I.P. Rly.) (b. 9th Apl., 1881).—Joined the service as asst. electrical supt., 16th Dec., 1912; asst. electrical engr., Nov., 1922; offg. electrical engr., June, 1926; confid., Dec., 1927.

SEALY, WILFRED ARTHUR PRINCE, Indian Police (dep. inspr. gen., Bihar) (b. 27th May, 1886).—Joined the service 2nd Dec., 1905, as asst. supt. of police; asst. to dep. inspr.-gen., Bengal, Sept., 1911; ditto, Bihar and Orissa, April, 1912; supt., Sept., 1914; and persl. asst. to inspr.-gen. of police, Bihar and Orissa, Oct., 1918; recd. King's police medal; offg., dep. inspr.-gen., June, 1926; confid., Feb., 1931.

SEAMAN, REV. ALFRED JONATHAN, M.A., Indian Eccles. Estab. (senr. chaplain, Bombay) (b. 14th Jan., 1886).—Apptd. chaplain on Probation, 1st Dec., 1920; junr. chaplain, Dec., 1922; senr. chaplain, May, 1932; offg. archdeacon, Apl., 1935.

SEAMAN, CHARLES KENNINGALE, M.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 2nd Nov., 1888).—Educ. at Bradfield, and Hertford Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1912; arrived, 3rd Dec., 1913,

and served in the Central Prov. as asst. commr., serving under govt. of India, army dept., from Sept. to Nov., 1918; under-sec. to chief commr., Dec., 1918, to Feb., 1920; dep. commr. (prov.), April, 1925; confid., Aug., 1925; excise commr., Oct., 1931; retired, Nov., 1937.

SEARLE, CARLETON STUART, M.C., Major I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 29th Nov., 1895).—First commn. dated 8th Aug., 1914; joined the pol. dept., 13th June, 1923; asst. pol. agent, Chilas, July, 1924; asst. commr., Kohat, Oct., 1926; ditto, D.I. Khan, Sept., 1928; ditto, Tank, Novr., 1929; dep. commr., Dera Ismail Khan, Sept., 1930; senr. sub-judge, Peshawar, Apl., 1931; jt. dep. commr., Peshawar, July, 1931; pol. agent, Khyber, Jan., 1934.

SEARLE, HUMPHREY FREDERIC, B.A., Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Burma) (b. 1st March, 1888).—Educ. at Bradfield, New Coll., Oxford, and Univ. Coll., London; apptd. after exam. of 1911; arrived, 2nd Dec., 1912, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; warden of Yenangyaung, Minbu and Singu oilfields, June, 1916; on mil. duty from Jan., 1918, to Sept., 1919; offg. settl. officer, May, 1920, to Jan., 1921, and from May, 1922; offg. dep. commr., Nov., 1926; confid., Feb., 1929; commr. of settlements and land records, Apl., 1932.

SEATON, EDWARD ALBERT, B.A., late Indian Forest Service (b. 3rd April, 1886).—Arrived 18th Dec., 1909, and served as asst. consvr., Dec., 1914; on mil. service, July, 1918, to March, 1919; name changed from 'Siltzler' by Deed Poll, May, 1927; ret'd., Aug., 1935.

SEGRAVE, SIR THOMAS GEORGE, Kt., C.B.E., Commander, R.N.R., late Office of High Commr. for India.—Educ. at St. Charles Coll., Bayswater, and on H.M.S. "Conway"; younger Brother of Trinity House, Dec., 1901; surveyor of shipping, India Office, 1st April, 1907; styled shipping surveyor and adviser from Jan., 1914; served in the U.S. Navy during the Hispano-American War, was twice mentioned in despatches, received the Special Service Medal, the Naval and Military Order of the Spanish-American War, the Hispano-American Medal with two clasps, and the thanks of Congress; attached to the transport service during the Boer War; received the U.S. Gold Medal for saving life, the Dutch Humane Societies' Medal with Orange Nassau Ribbon, and the thanks of the Queen of Holland and of the U.S. Congress for saving life at sea; elected to the Institute of Naval Architects, April, 1902; granted hon. rank of commander, R.N.R., Sept., 1914; O.B.E., Jan., 1918; temp. hon. capt., Royal Indian Marine, June, 1918; C.B.E., Jan., 1920; styled "Director of India Office Shipping" while engaged in management of India Office prize ships, May, 1920; Kt., June, 1923; ret'd., Nov., 1925.

SEIN, U CHU, B.A., late Burma Judicial Service (b. 20th Aug., 1879).—Apptd. asst. judge, 17th Sept., 1920; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Mar., 1929; ret'd., Aug., 1934.

SEIN, MAUNG BA, T.P.S., Indian State Rlys. (statistical officer) (b. 30th Aug., 1881).—Joined the service, 1st Aug., 1907; asst. engr., Burma Rlys., Apl., 1921; offg. statistical officer, Apl., 1925; confid., Mar., 1931.

SELL, Rev. CHARLES EDWARD, M.A., late Indian Eccl. Estabt. (b. 8th Aug., 1877).—Joined the service, 13th Oct., 1905; junr. chaplain, Oct., 1908; senr. chaplain, Oct., 1918; chaplain, Waziristan Force, 1st Feb. to 4th Dec., 1921; ret'd., June, 1931.

SELLS, ARTHUR CLEMENT, O.B.E., M.A. (Oxon), late Indian Educl. Service.—Joined the service, 15th Nov., 1899, as inspr. of schools; on special duty from Oct., 1910; principal, govt. coll., Jubbulpore, April, 1911; O.B.E., July, 1926; ret'd., May, 1928.

SELVAM, AROGYASWAMI THAMARSELVAN PANNIR, RAO BAHADUR, BARR.—Apptd. member of govr.'s exec.-council, Madras, 16th Aug., 1934.

SELWYN, JOHN SIDNEY AUGUSTUS, Indian Police (asst. supt., Punjab) (b. 17th Oct., 1908).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., Punjab, 20th Nov., 1928; transf. to N.W.F.P., Jan., 1930; confd., Nov., 1930; offg. dist. offcr., Frontier constably., July, 1932; confd., Nov., 1935.

SEN, AMARENDRA NATH, BARR., Bengal Judl. Service (b. 13th May, 1891).—Apptd. dist. and sess. judge, April, 1928.

SEN, BHIM (see Bhim Sen).

SEN, BHUPATI MOHAN, M.A. (Cantab.), M.Sc., Indian Educl. Service (princpl., Presdy. Coll., Calcutta) (b. 1st Apl., 1888).—Joined the service as prof., Dacca Coll., 9th July, 1915; prof., presdy. coll., Calcutta, Aug., 1923; princpl., ditto, Aug., 1931.

SEN, BINAY RANJAN, B.A. (Calcutta), Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., Bengal) (b. 1st Jan., 1898).—Educ. at Calcutta and Oxford (non-Coll.); joined the service, 31st Oct., 1922; arrived, 4th Dec., 1922, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; addl. dist. magte., Feb., 1928; offg. magte. and collr., Nov., 1929; addl. sec., pol., and appt. depts., Bengal, Nov., 1931; dep. secty., ditto, Nov., 1932; mag. and collr., Feb., 1936.

SEN, BIRENDRA CHANDRA, late Indian C.S. (Bihar and Orissa).—Educ. at Dacca Coll., Presidency Coll., and the Univ., Calcutta, and Univ. Coll., London; apptd. after exam. of 1891; arrived, 17th Nov., 1893, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; joint mag. and dep. collr., June, 1900; mag. and collr., April, 1906; transf. to Bihar and Orissa, April, 1912; commr., May, 1921; ret'd., Nov., 1928.

SEN, BROJENDRA KUMAR, B.A., India Posts and Tels. (dep. p.m.g.) (b. May, 1881).—Joined the service, 8th Feb., 1902; supt., Oct., 1908; asst. p.m.g., May, 1924; dep. p.m.g., Bihar and Orissa, Feb., 1934.

SEN, JATINDRA NATH, M.A., F.C.S., Ph.D. (Cal.), late Indian Agricultural Service (b. 9th Dec., 1880).—Held ministerial appts. from 9th June, 1905; 1st asst. to impl. agric. chemist, Dec., 1909; supy. agric. chemist, Feb., 1914; plant biological chemist, Apl., 1928; ret'd., Apl., 1932.

SEN, JYOTI LAL, M.C., M.B., Lt.-Col., I.M.S. (civil surg., Assam) (b. 22nd Oct., 1883).—First commn. dated 28th Jan., 1911; in mil. employ. to 12th July, 1922; civil surg., Nov., 1925.

SEN, KARUNAKETAN, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 19th Nov., 1911).—Educ. at Narainganj High English School, Bengal, Calcutta University, King's

College, London, and the School of Oriental Studies, London. Joined the service, 9th Oct., 1924; arrived in India, Nov., 1934, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1936.

SEN, KSHIROD CHANDRA, Rai Bahadur, B.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 28th Dec., 1879).—Joined the service, 22nd Jan., 1907; asst. engr., Jan., 1908; exec. engr., Jan., 1909; offg. suptg. engr., April, 1928; confd., Jan., 1933; ret'd., Dec., 1935.

SEN, KSHITIS CHANDRA, B.A., Indian C.S. (addtl. judge high ct. Bombay) (b. 5th Oct., 1888).—Educ. at Calcutta, and Trinity Hall, Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1912; arrived, 15th Nov., 1913, and served in Bombay as asst. magte. and collr.; asst. judge and addl. sess. judge, Nov., 1921; asst. remember. and sec. to legisl. council, Dec., 1923; offg. judge and sess. judge, May, 1926; and again, Jan., 1928; confd., Jan., 1929; jt. judge and addl. sess. judge, Nov., 1926; regtr., high ct., Bombay, April, 1928; offg. judge, high ct., Bombay, July, 1934, June, 1935, June, 1936, and Mar., 1937; offg. secty. to govt., legal dept., Bombay, Feb., 1935; confd., Dec., 1935; addtl. judge high ct., Bombay, Nov., 1937.

SEN, KUMUD KANTA, M.A., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 26th Nov., 1896).—Joined the service, 20th Feb., 1922; examr., outside audit dept., Bengal, Apl., 1936; dep. dir. rly. audit, Apl., 1937.

SEN, MANMATHA NATH, RAI BAHADUR, B.A., late Bihar and Orissa Civil Service (b. 15th July, 1880).—Joined the service as proby. dep. collr., 4th Aug., 1902; dep. magte. and dep. collr., May, 1903; offg. dep. commr., Feb., 1930; offg. secty. to govt., local self-govt. dept., Apl., 1931; mag. and collr., Jan., 1934; ret'd., July, 1935.

SEN, NAKUL, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 14th Aug., 1910).—Educated at Govt. High Schools, Delhi and Simla, University of Delhi and Magdalene College, Cambridge; joined the service, 6th Sept., 1935; arrived in India, Oct., 1935, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.

SEN, NALINI KANTA, M.A., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 27th Oct., 1895).—Joined the service, 26th Feb., 1920; asst. auditor, E.B. rly., May, 1921; divl. audit officer, N.W. rly., May, 1925; dep. acct.-genl., United Provs., Sept., 1932; asst. contr. of rly. accts., Dec., 1935; dep. acct. genl., Burma, July, 1936; offg. acct.-genl., Burma, Oct., 1936.

SEN, NARENDRA KUMAR, late Bengal Civil Service. (b. 5th Jan., 1881).—Joined the service as proby. dep. magte. and dep. collr., 12th Oct., 1903; confd., April, 1905; offg. magte. and collr., Feb., 1930; confd., June, 1931; ret'd. Jan. 1936.

SEN, NARENDRA NATH (see Narendra Nath, S.).

SEN, PHANINDRA LAL, RAI BAHADUR, M.A., B.L., late Bihar and Orissa Civil Service (b. 16th Jan., 1879).—Joined the service, 28th June, 1905; offg. munisf. Oct., 1906; confd., July, 1907; sub-judge, Aug., 1919; dist. and sess. judge, Oct., 1931; ret'd., Jan., 1934.

SEN, PRANAB KUMAR, Indian Police (b. 11th Nov., 1912).—Apptd. asst. supt., Bengal on probn., 12th Feb., 1937.

SEN, RAJENDRA NATH, M.A., M.Sc. (Leeds), late Indian Educl. Service (b. Aug., 1879).—Apptd. prof., presdy. coll., 10th April, 1920; offg. princpl., Krishnigar Coll., July, 1931; retd., July, 1934.

SEN, SACHINDRA NATH, M.Sc. (Cal. and London), Ph.D. (London), Meteorological Dept. (meteorologist) (b. 5th Dec., 1891).—Joined the service as meteorologist, 14th Sept., 1925.

SEN, SISIR KUMAR, Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 3rd Feb., 1903).—Educ. at Univ. of the Punjab, and King's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 20th Oct., 1927; arrived, Nov., 1927, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; addl. dist. and sess. judge, Apl., 1933; ditto, Assam, Jan., 1935.

SEN, SUKUMAR, B.A. (Calcutta), Ind. C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Bengal) (b. 2nd January, 1898).—Educ. at Calcutta and London University; joined the service, 30th Oct., 1922; arrived, 13th Dec., 1922, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; addl. dist. and sess. judge, Feb., 1928; dist. and sess judge, Nov., 1931; offg. ch. presy. mag., Calcutta, Apl., 1934.

SEN, SURENDRA NATH (see Surendra Nath Sen).

SENAPATI, NILAMANI, B.A., B.Sc., F.R.G.S., Indian C.S. (mag. and collr. Bihar) (b. 19th Feb., 1897).—Educ. at Ravenshaw Coll., Cuttack, Patna Coll., and Sidney Sussex Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 12th Dec., 1921; arrived, 15th Jan., 1922, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; asst. settlement officer, Nov., 1925; jt. mag., Jan., 1929; offg. mag. and collr., July, 1929; ditto (prov. subs.), Apl., 1936.

SEN GUPTA, ATUL CHANDRA, M.A., Indian Educl. Service (princpl., Morris Coll., Nagpur) (b. 14th Feb., 1887).—Held temp. appts. from 21st Aug., 1917, to 10th April, 1919; prof., Morris Coll., Nagpur (on probn.), Sept., 1920; confd. Sept., 1922; offg. princpl., ditto, July, 1932; confd., June, 1933.

SEN GUPTA, BIRENDRA NATH, M.Sc., Indian Audit Dept. (b. Jan., 1896).—Joined the service, 21st Sept., 1920; asst. dir. of audit, Defence Services, E.C., Apl., 1936.

SEN GUPTA, DEBENDRA NATH, B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Bengal) (b. 31st Dec., 1888).—Joined the service, 26th Jan., 1914; asst. engr., Jan., 1915; exec. engr., Jan., 1924.

SEN GUPTA, MANINDRA LAL, B.A., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Orissa) (b. 1st Sept., 1899).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 9th Nov., 1923; dep. consvr., July, 1930.

SEN GUPTA, MOHIT KUMAR, M.A., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 4th Apl., 1894).—Joined the service, 27th Feb., 1919; asst. acct. genl., Central Provs., July, 1925; dep. contr., Assam, May, 1929; dep. acct. genl., central revs., Sept., 1932; audit officer, Indian stores dept., Feb., 1933; and again, Oct., 1935; offg. dep. dir.-genl. (finance), posts and tels., May, 1935.

SENIOR, ARTHUR FAIRFAX, Indian Police (supt., Punjab) (b. 7th Aug., 1897).—Joined the service, 15th March, 1921; offg. supt., Feb., 1926; confd., May, 1927; on depn. at Met. Police Coll., London, from Feb., 1934.

SENNECK, FRANCIS HARRY, Indian C.S. (collr., Madras) (b. 30th Dec., 1887).—Educ. at Christ's Hospital and New Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1911; arrived, 23rd Nov., 1912, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; sub-collr. and jt. mag., Oct., 1917; offg. commr. of income tax, April, 1924; asst. commr. of income tax, Nov., 1925; offg. commr., inc. tax, Aug., 1926; confd., June, 1928; collr., May, 1931.

SEPHTON, RALPH, B.A., A.M.I.C.E., Indian State Rlys. (ch. engr., G.I.P. rly.) (b. 8th Nov., 1882).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 26th May, 1911; resdt. engr., Sept., 1912; in milty. employ from 24th Sept., 1914, to 27th April, 1920; dist. engr., June, 1922; engr.-in-ch., Bhore and Thall Ghats, Dec., 1926; offg. suptg. engr., Bombay Dist. works, Feb., 1927; dep. ch. engr., May, 1931; offg. ch. engr., G.I.P. rly., May, 1933; confd. (prov.), Feb., 1935.

SERRAILLIER, ANTONY RODGER, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., Madras) (b. 1st May, 1914).—Educ. at Brighton Coll., and Trinity Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 29th Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Nov., 1937, and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr.

SESHADRI, MEENAKSHISUNDARA, Indian C.S. (sub-collr., Madras) (b. 17th Jan., 1905).—Educ. at University of Madras and Brasenose Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 8th Oct., 1929; arrived, October, 1929, and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr.; sub-collr., Sept., 1932.

SESHADRI SARMA, GAVARPAT KRISHNA-SWAMI, B.A., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 6th Dec., 1892).—Joined the service, 4th May, 1914; asst. secty., govt. of India fin. dept., May, 1933; services placed at disposal of govt. of India, for. and pol. dept., Oct., 1935.

SESHAGIRI RAO, PAMIDI HANUMANTA, B.Sc., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 13th Jan., 1898).—Joined the service, 23rd Feb., 1922; on for. service under the Reserve Bank of India, Mar., 1935; dep. acct.-genl., Madras, Jan., 1938.

SESHU AYYAR, ERODE RAMASWAMY, M.A., Indian Finance Dept. (b. 26th Oct., 1892).—Joined the service, 2nd March, 1914; asst. acctnt.-gen., Burma, March, 1916; asst. acctnt.-gen., posts and tels., Calcutta, May, 1917; asst. acctnt.-gen., Central Provs., April, 1922; dep. acctnt.-gen., posts and tels., ditto, Sept., 1925; dep. govt. examr., accts., B.N. Rly., Mar., 1931; offg. dep. dir. rly. clearing accts. office, Nov., 1932; offg. dir., ditto, Mar., 1933; offg. dep. ch. accts. officer, E.I. rly., Feb., 1934.

SET, MAUNG (see Maung Set)

SETALVAD, SIR CHIMANLAL HARILAL, Kt., K.C.I.E., B.A., LL.B. (advocate-general, Bombay)—Apptd. addl. judge, Bombay high ct. June, 1920; member of govr.'s exec. council, Bombay, Jan., 1921, to June, 1923; K.C.I.E., June, 1924; apptd. member of Royal Commn. on Superior Civil Services in India, and resigned, Oct., 1923; delegate to Indian round table conf., London, Nov., 1930; Jan., 1931; 2nd Session, Sept.-Dec., 1931; apptd. advocate-general, Bombay, Dec., 1937.

SETH, JAGAT BIHARI, B.A., B.Sc., Indian Educl. Service (prof., govt. coll., Lahore) (b. 23rd Sept., 1893).—Joined the service, 21st Oct., 1921; prof., govt. coll., Lahore, April, 1922.

SETH, KUNJ BEHARILAL, M.A., B.Sc., LL.B., Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Central Provs.) (b. 20th Nov., 1895).—Educ. at Morris and Hislop Colls., Victoria Coll. of Science, Nagpur, and Brasenose Coll., Oxford; apptd. by nomination in India; joined the service, 12th Dec., 1921; arrived, 11th Jan., 1922, and served in Central Provs. as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., March, 1927; and again, Apl., 1932; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Mar., 1928; offg. senr. dep. regr., co-op. societies, Nov., 1934; dep. commr., Mar., 1937.

SETHI, DAULAT RAM, M.A., B.Sc., Indian Agric. Service (dir. of agric., Bihar) (b. 25th Apl., 1891).—Joined the service, 30th Oct., 1914; dep. dir. of agric., Nov., 1914; offg. dir. of agric., Apl., 1932; confd., Aug., 1934.

SETHI, RAM LAL, M.Sc., M.R.A.S., Indian Agric. Service (economic botanist to govt., United Provs.) (b. 20th Apl., 1894).—Joined the service as economic botanist, 19th Dec., 1921.

SETON, SIR MALCOLM COTTER CARISTON, K.C.B., M.A., late India Office (b. 13th Nov., 1872).—Educ. at Repton Sch., and Oriel Coll., Oxford (classical scholar); selected candidate, Indian Civil Service, Sept., 1895; junior clerk, judl. and publ. dept., India Office, May, 1898; resdt. clerk, Nov., 1898, to April, 1901; temporarily transf. for duty in the mil. dept., July, to Oct., 1900; priv. sec. to parly. under-sec. of state, March, 1901; senior clerk, finl. dept., Nov., 1902; judl. and publ. dept., March, 1907; asst. sec., ditto, March, 1910; sec. ditto, Oct., 1911; C.B., June, 1915; on deputn. to India in connection with the visit of the sec. of state, Oct., 1917, to May, 1918; K.C.B., Jan., 1919; actg. asst. under-sec. of state, Dec., 1918; asst. under-sec. of state, and clerk of the Council, Dec., 1919; dep. under-sec. of state, Aug., 1924; ret'd., Dec., 1933; author of 'The India Office' (Whitehall Series).

SETU RAO, KAIWAR, B.A., Indian C.S. (sub. collr., Madras) (b. 2nd July, 1911).—Educ. at the Hindu High School, Triplicane, University of Madras, University College, London, and Worcester College, Oxford; joined the service, 9th Oct., 1934; arrived in India, Nov., 1934, and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr.; sub collr., Feb., 1937.

SEWA RAM SINGH, SARDAR, B.A., LL.B., late Punjab Civil Service (b. 7th Aug., 1878).—Apptd. offg. dist. and sess. judge, Oct., 1921; confd., June, 1924; ret'd., Aug., 1933.

SEWARD, HERBERT GREGORY, Indian Police (b. 12th Nov., 1908).—Joined the service as asst. supt., United Provs., 24th Nov., 1928; confd., Nov., 1930.

SEWELL, ROBERT BERESFORD SEYMOUR, C.I.E., M.A., F.A.S.B., F.L.S., F.Z.S., Lt.-Col., I.M.S., late Zoological Survey of India (b. 5th Mar., 1880).—First commn. dated 1st Feb., 1908; surg.-naturalist, marine survey of India, 1910, 1913, 1919, and again, 1920-25; offg. prof. of biology, medical coll., Calcutta, 1911; in milty. employ, 1914-18; offg. supt., zoological survey of India, 1919; dir., ditto, July, 1925; C.I.E., Jan., 1933; ret'd., Mar., 1935; editor of the Fauna of India Series of publications.

SEYMOUR, ALMERIC HIGH, M.A., Indian C.S. (secty., govl., Burma defence dept.) (b. 23rd July, 1894).—Educ. at St. Edward's School, Oxford, and Worcester Coll., Oxford;

joined the service, 11th March, 1921; arrived, 20th April, 1921, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; asst. to commr., settlt. and land records, July, 1923; supt. of colonization in addn. from July to Nov., 1924; jt. registrar, co-op. societies dept., Jan., 1926; offg. dep. commr., Dec., 1929; confd., Jan., 1934; dep. secty., finance dept., Burma, Mar., 1932; offg. secty. to govt. of India, reforms office, July, 1933; secty., finance dept., Burma, Mar., 1934, and again, Jan., 1936; addl. secty. to govt., reforms office, Burma, Feb., 1936; offg. secty., ditto, June, 1936; secty., defence dept., Apl., 1937.

SEYS, STANLEY AUGUSTUS, M.C., India Office (higher exec. officer, accts. dept.) (b. 23rd Mar., 1890).—Served as sec. div. clerk, Scotch Edn. Office, April to Oct., 1911, and in office of engr. in-chief, G.P.O., from Oct., 1911; apptd. second class clerk, India Office, 25th Nov., 1912, and attd. to stores dept.; on mil. service from Aug., 1914, to Feb., 1919; transf. to office of high commr. for India, Oct., 1920; transf. to I.E. Tel. Dept., India Office, Feb., 1922; exec. officer, April, 1922; transf. to milty. dept., Jan., 1927; higher exec. officer and assessor of inc. tax, Jan., 1928.

SHADI LAL, SIR, RAI BAHADUR, Kt., P.C., M.A., Barr.-at-Law (b. 12th May, 1874).—Temp. addl. judge, chief court, Punjab, June to Aug., 1913, and again from March, 1914; acting judge, May, 1916; judge, Feb., 1917; judge, high ct., Punjab, April, 1919; chief justice, Punjab high court, May, 1920; knighted, Jan., 1921; member, capitation rate tribunal, Nov., 1932; ret'd., May, 1934.

SHAH, ABUL H SANAT MUHAMMAD ISMAIL, B.A., Indian Police (asst. supt., Bengal) (b. 13th Feb., 1905).—Apptd. proby. asst. supt., 12th June, 1927; confd., Sept., 1929; offg. supt., Feb., 1934.

SHAH, ASHA SAYED BAD, Capt., I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 23rd Jan., 1903).—First commn., 30th Aug., 1923; in milty. employ to 21st Jan., 1930; asst. commr., Peshawar, Apl., 1932; asst. pol. agent, N. Waziristan, Feb., 1933, and again, Nov., 1933; ditto, Mohmands, July, 1933; asst. commr., Thal, Apl., 1934; under-secy. to A.G.G., Punjab states, Mar., 1935; asst. pol. agent, Quetta, Pishin, Feb., 1936; pol. agent, ditto, June, 1937.

SHAH, AMBALAL NAROTHAMDAS, B.A., LL.B., Barr., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Central Provs.) (b. 29th Sept., 1896).—Educ. at Bombay Univ., and Queen's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 9th Nov., 1921; arrived in India, 11th Dec., 1921, and served in Central Provs. as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., May, 1925; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Apl., 1932; confd., June, 1934.

SHAH, BAGER ZAINULABIEDIN, M.R.C.S. (Eng.), L.R.C.P. (Lond.), Lt.-Col., I.M.S. (supt., Bombay) (b. 5th Apl., 1885).—First commn. dated 14th March, 1920, and served in the mil. dept. prior to 21st April, 1923; offg. civil surg., June, 1923; confd., Aug., 1927; supt. of Mahabeshwar, Oct., 1937.

SHAH, HAMID MUKHTAR, Khan Sahib, B.A., Indian Police (supt., Punjab) (b. 15th Mar., 1886).—Joined the service, 22nd May, 1909; apptd. to I.P. as supt., Apl., 1935.

SHAH, JAKUB (see Jakub, S.)
SHAH, JELAL MOOCHOO, M.B.E., M.R.C.S., L.R.C.P., Lt.-Col. I.M.S. (specialist in venereal disease, Bombay) (b. 17th Jan., 1886).—Served in milty. dept. prior to 16th Oct., 1922; M.B.E., Sept., 1921; offg. dy. asst. dir.-genl., I.M. Services, Oct., 1922; offg. pers. asst. to surg.-genl. with govt. of Bombay, June, 1924; confd., May, 1926; specialist in venereal disease, Apr., 1931.

SHAH, KUNWAR PRATAP BIKRAM (see Pratap Bikram Shah K.).

SHAH, MAQBUL (see Maqbul Shah).

SHAH MUHAMMAD SULAIMAN, SIR, Kt., LL.D., M.A., Barr. (judge, federal ct. of India) (b. 3rd Feb., 1886).—Apptd. offg. judge, high ct., Allahabad, from 15th April, 1920; judge, high ct., Allahabad, 30th May, 1923; offg. chief justice, ditto, April to Aug., 1928; Oct., 1929, and again, Mar., 1931; confd., Oct., 1932; Kt., June, 1929; member, Peshawar Riot enquiry ctee., 1930; vice-chancellor, Muslim univ., Aligarh, 1929 and 1930; member, capitation rate tribunal, Nov., 1932; judge, federal ct. of India, Oct., 1937.

SHAH, NATVERAL BALUBHAI, B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Sind) (b. 22nd Sept., 1900).—Joined the service as apprentice engr., 8th Oct., 1923; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1924; offg. exec. engr., June, 1933; confd., Oct., 1933.

SHAH, POPATLAL GOBINDLAL, M.A., B.Sc., Indian Finance Dept. (b. 9th Dec., 1888).—Joined the service, 10th March, 1914; asst. acctnt.-gen., Nov., 1917; dep. acctnt.-gen., Madras, April, 1926; asst. ditto, Bengal, Dec., 1926; audit officer, Calcutta, May, 1927; dep. acct.-genl., Bengal, Aug., 1927; ditto, Bihar and Orissa, Jan., 1928; ditto, Bombay, Apl., 1929; offg. acct.-genl., Bombay, June, 1930; dep. ch. accts. officer, G.I.P. Rly., Mar., 1933.

SHAH, SAIDY MAHMUD, KHAN BAHADUR, M.B.E., B.A., LL.B., late Indian Police Service (b. 31st Mar., 1878).—Joined the service, 2nd March, 1904; supt. of police, Aug., 1918; recd. King's police medal, Mar., 1929; ret'd., Mar., 1933; M.B.E., Jan., 1934.

SHAH, SHIVLAL PANACHAND, B.A., LL.B., Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., United Provs.) (b. 10th Nov., 1891).—Educ. at Bombay, and Jesus Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1915; arrived, 6th Dec., 1916, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag., July, 1918; dep. dir. of industries, United Provs., Oct., 1921, to Dec., 1924; offg. mag. and collr., March, 1923; confd., Dec., 1931; offg. dir. of industries, Sept., 1928; secty., central bd. of rev., Apl., 1930; regr., co-op. societies, and dir. of industries, U.P., Nov., 1932; offg. secty. to govt., United Provs., indus. and educ. depts., Apl., 1935; secty., local self-govt., and p. h. depts., Sept., 1937.

SHAH, SYED GHULAM HUSSAIN, Indian State Ry's. (divl. transptn. officer, N.W. Rly.) (b. 9th Aug., 1887).—Joined the service as asst. traffic supt., 12th July, 1909; dist. ditto, Aug., 1922; divl. comml. officer, Sept., 1928; offg. dep. ch. comml. mgr., N.W. rly., Nov., 1934.

SHAH, YAKUB (see Yakub, Shah).

SHAHA, HIRA LAL, M.A., Indian Police (b. 10th Feb., 1901).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bengal, 13th July, 1925; offg. supt., July, 1931.

SHAHAB-UD-DIN KHUDA BAKSH, late Indian Police (b. 1st Aug., 1879).—Joined the service, 2nd July, 1906; supt., Oct., 1925; ret'd., Aug., 1934.

SHAHAB-UD-DIN, MUHAMMAD (see Muhammad Shahab-ud-din).

SHAHANI JAVERMAL TAHILRAM, RAI BAHADUR, late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 28th Sept., 1879).—Held non-gazetted appts. from 23rd Jan., 1899, to 31st Dec., 1916; sub-engr., Jan., 1917; asst. engr., Feb., 1920; I.S.E. as asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1929; offg. exec. engr., Dec., 1931; confd., Sept., 1934; ret'd., Sept., 1934.

SHAIK, ABDUL KADIR SARFRAZ, M.A., late Indian Educ. Service (b. 16th July, 1879).—Joined the service, 5th Feb., 1921; prof. of Persian, Elph. Coll., Bombay, Feb., 1921; ditto, Deccan Coll., Poona, Oct., 1926; ret'd., July, 1934.

SHAIKH, ABDUL HAMID, Lt.-Col., I.M.S., Jail dept. United Provs. (supt.) (b. 5th Feb., 1890).—First commn., dated 22nd Feb., 1921; in milty. employ prior to 30th Sept., 1927; supt., Oct., 1927; dep. dir.-genl., I.M.S., Jan., 1937.

SHAIKH, MUHAMMAD ABDUL KARIM, M.A., LL.B., Bombay Civil Service, Judicial Branch (judge and sess. judge) (b. 28th Apl., 1885).—Held non-gazetted appts. from Nov., 1908, to Oct., 1911; sub-judge, Oct., 1911; offg. asst. judge, April, 1928; confd., Jan., 1930; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Mar., 1931; confd., Feb., 1934.

SHAIKH, MUHAMMAD NAZIR J., B.A., LL.B., Bombay Civil Service Judl. Branch (judge and sess. judge) (b. 20th Jan., 1886).—Held various judl. appts. from Dec., 1927; asst. judge, 26th May, 1929; offg. judge and sess. judge, Oct., 1929, June, 1930, and Dec., 1930; confd., Dec., 1933.

SHAIKH YAKUB VAZIR MUHAMMAD, Khan Bahadur, M.B.E., B.A., late Bombay Civil Service (b. 11th Apl., 1883).—Joined the service, 24th Nov., 1907; dist. dep. collr., Jan. 1910; in foreign service in Khairpur State from 1st Oct., 1925, to 10th July, 1926; offg. collr. and dist. mag., March, 1927; confd., Nov., 1929; pol. agent, Jawhar, Feb., 1933. ret'd., June, 1937.

SHAIN, MAUNG HLA, B.Sc., B.L., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Burma) (b. 22nd Oct., 1905).—Educ. at Rangoon University and London School of Oriental Studies; joined the service, 20th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930, and served in Burma as asst. commr.

SHALLOW, ARTHUR WILLIAM, Indian Police (supt., Bengal) (b. 25th Aug., 1887).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 2nd Dec., 1907; supt., Aug., 1915; offg. dep. inspr.-genl., June, 1929.

SHAM BIHARI MISRA, RAI BAHADUR, PANDIT, M.A., late United Provs. Civil Service.—Joined the service, 6th April, 1897, as dep. collr.; dep. commr., March, 1926; regr., co-operative societies; member of council of state, March, 1927; ret'd., Aug., 1928.

SHAM LAL, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., United Provs.) (b. 11th Jan., 1900).—Joined the service, 20th Oct., 1922; apprentice engr., Sept., 1923; asst. exec. engr., March, 1924; offg. exec. engr., Sept., 1928; confd., Oct., 1932.

SHAM LAL, RAI BAHADUR, P.M.S., Civil Surgeon, United Provs. (b. 26th Feb., 1886).—Civil surg., July, 1929.

SHAM SINGH, RAI BAHADUR, B.A., Indian Police (supt., United Provs.) (b. June, 1891).—Joined the service as proby. dep. supt., 1st Aug., 1913; confd., Nov., 1915; promoted to I.P.S. as supt., 1st Oct., 1930; awarded King's police medal, Feb., 1937.

SHAMALDHARI LAL, B.A. (Oxon), Indian C.S. (secty. to govt., educ. and dev. dept., Bihar) (b. 4th Oct., 1894).—Educ. at Calcutta Univ., and Exeter Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 25th Oct., 1919; arrived, 13th Jan., 1920, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; under-sec. to govt. fin. dept., June, 1924; under-sec. to govt. of India, dept. of industries and labour, Aug., 1925; offg. dep. sec., ditto, Nov., 1927; confd., April, 1928; jt. secy., comm. on labour, June, 1929; offg. magt. and collr., Mar., 1931; ditto (prov. subs.), Oct., 1933; dir. of industries and labour, Apl., 1933; secty. to govt., Bihar and Orissa, educ. and dev. dept., Apl., 1935; mag. and collr., Oct. 1935.

SHAMBHU DAYAL, MUNSHI, B.A., LL.B., late Judl. Dept., United Provinces (b. 1st Dec., 1878).—Joined the service, 8th Apl., 1907; sub-judge, Dec., 1918; judge, small cause ct., Apl., 1926; dist. and sess. judge, Feb., 1932; retd., Dec., 1933.

SHAMBHU NATH DUBE, DIWAN BAHADUR PANDIT, M.A., LL.B., late Judicial dept., United Provs. (b. Apl., 1876).—Joined the service as offg. munsif, 20th Jan., 1906; confd., May, 1908; sub-judge (s.p.t.), Nov., 1918; confd., June, 1919; temp. addl. dist. and sess. judge, Oct., 1927; confd., March, 1930; retd., Apl., 1931.

SHAMSHER SINGH, KANWAR, Indian Police (b. 23rd Oct., 1913).—Apptd. asst. supt., Punjab, on probn., 27th Jan., 1936.

SHAMSHER SINGH, KUNWAR, B.A., (Cantab.), Lt.-Col., I.M.S., retd. (b. 21st June, 1879).—First commn., dated 1st Sept., 1906; in milty. employ to 7th Nov., 1909, and again from Aug., 1914, to Sept., 1921; civil surg., Sept., 1921; retd., June, 1934.

SHAMSODDOHA, A. H. M. (see Abu Hamid Muhammad Shamsodoha).

SHAMSUDDIN AHMAD, Khan Bahadur, B.L., late Bengal C.S. (b. Apl., 1881).—Joined the service, 3rd Sept., 1906; dep., mag. and dep. collr., Jan., 1908; inspr.-genl. of regn., Bengal, June, 1931.

SHAMS-UL-HASAN, MUNSHI, B.A., LL.B., late United Provs. C.S..—Apptd. dist. and sess. Judge, Dec., 1934; retd., Apl., 1937.

SHANKAR, VIDYA, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Bombay) (b. 27th Feb., 1909).—Educated at Dayanand Anglo-Vedic College, Cawnpore, Allahabad University and St. John's College, Oxford; joined the service, 7th October, 1933; arrived in India, November, 1933, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.

SHANKS. GEORGE, M.D., Major, I.M.S. (retd.) (b. 14th Sept., 1884).—Joined the service, 22nd Sept., 1914; in mil. employ up to 4th May, 1921; prof. medl. coll., Calcutta (s.p.t.), May, 1921; retd., Aug., 1932.

SHANNON, GERALD CAIRNS, B.A., Barr.-at-Law, late Indian C.S. (b. 17th Oct., 1883).—Educ. at Bath Coll. and St. John's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1906; arrived, 22nd Nov., 1907, and served in Bombay as asst. collr. and mag., asst. settlt. offr. and asst. judge; on mil. duty, 1917-1919; jt. judge and addl. sess. judge, Dec., 1922; judge and sess. judge, March, 1926; retd., Feb., 1933.

SHANTI PRASAD, M.Sc., Indian Police (b. 16th July, 1909).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., United Provs., 16th Jan., 1933; confd., Jan., 1935.

SHAPURJI, NASARVANJI JAMSHEDJI RATNAGAR (see Ratnagar, S. N. J.).

SHARAN, RADHA KANTA, B.A., B.L., Inc. tax Dept. (asst. commr.) (b. 29th June, 1886).—Joined the service 11th Jan., 1909; dep. mag. and dep. coll., Aug., 1918; inc. tax officer, Apl., 1925, asst. commr., Bihar, Aug., 1932.

SHARAN, SINGH LAL RAM, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Central Provs.) (b. 20th March, 1906).—Educ. at Allahabad University and Jesus College, Oxford; joined the service, 6th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930, and served in the Central Provs. as asst. commr.; on for. service as settlement offcr., Chhattarpur State, Dec., 1937.

SHARANGPANI, PRABHAKAR SHRIDHAR, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Central Provs.) (b. 29th Jan., 1895).—Joined the service, 14th Sept., 1918; asst. engr., Sept., 1919; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1922; offg. exec. engr., May, 1926; confd., Sept., 1928.

SHARBAT KHAN, MIR, Khan Bahadur, C.I.E., late Indian Political Dept. (b. 1880).—Joined the service, 5th May, 1902; apptd. to the pol. dept., 2nd Sept., 1921; pol. agent, Zhob, Dec., 1921, and again, Dec., 1923; C.I.E., Jan., 1922; pol. agent, Chagai, June, 1922; ditto, Loralai, Apl., 1929; on depn. to Indian milty. college commee., Simla, May, 1931; pol. agent for Chagai, July, 1931; pol. agent and dep. commr., Sibi, Mar., 1932; retd., June, 1935.

SHAREEF, AHMED ALI SAHIB, B.A., Madras Civil Service (dep. collr.) (b. 3rd Feb., 1890).—Joined the service, 7th Mar., 1914; dep. collr., May, 1931.

SHARIF MUHAMMAD ALI SAHIB, B.A., Khan Bahadur, Indian Police (dist. supt., Madras) (b. 28th June, 1887).—Joined the prov. service as proby. dep. supt., 23rd Feb., 1912; confd., Mar., 1915; apptd. to I.P. as supt., 26th Mar., 1931; dep. commr., Feb., 1932.

SHARIFF, MUHAMMAD (see Muhammad Shariff).

SHARLING, ALFRED FRANCIS LESLIE, Bihar C.S. (dep. mag. and dep. coll.) (b. 1st Nov., 1886).—Joined the service, 4th Jan., 1906; dep. mag. and dep. collr., Apl., 1907; offg. dep. commr., Feb., 1932.

SHARMA, ASHA RAM, B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Bihar) (b. 3rd Nov., 1901).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 29th June, 1925; dep. consvr., Jan., 1931.

SHARMA, DVARIKA PRASHAD SINHA, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Orissa) (b. 26th Nov., 1866).—Educ. at Bihar National Coll., and London Univ.; joined the

service, 13th March, 1922; arrived, 5th April, 1922, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. magte. and collr., Mar., 1929, and again Aprl., 1932; confd., Oct., 1929.

SHARMA, LAKSHMI CHAND, Rai Bahadur, M.R.A.C., Barr., late Indian Agric. Service (b. 10th Dec., 1878).—Joined the service as asst. dir. of agric., 15th Aug., 1911; dept. dir. of agric., May., 1921; retd., Dec., 1933.

SHARMA, SALIG RAM, B.A., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 18th Sept., 1887).—Joined the service, 29th Sept., 1910; asst. engr., Sept., 1911; asst. exec. engr., April, 1921; retd., Sept., 1932.

SHARMA, SRIJAT DURGESWAR, B.A., B.L., Assam C.S. (dir. of land records, etc.) (b. 18th Feb., 1885).—Joined the service, 5th May, 1911; extra asst. commr., Sept., 1912; addl. dist. mag., July, 1934; dep. commr., Mar., 1935; dir. of land records, etc., Assam, Mar., 1936.

SHARP, ALEXANDER EASSON, B.Sc., M.I.C.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr. Sind) (b. 26th July, 1892).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1919; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1924; dep. secty., govt. of Sind p.w.d., Aprl., 1936.

SHARP, CHARLES ANDREW, M.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 10th Nov., 1906).—Educ. at Auckland Grammar School, New Zealand, Otago Univ., New Zealand, and St. John's Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1930; arrived in India, Dec., 1931, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; retd., Oct., 1934.

SHARP, FRANCIS EVERARD, Indian Police (supt., Bombay) (b. 5th Aprl., 1890).—Joined the service, 22nd Nov., 1909, as asst. supt.; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1921; supt. and dep. commr. of police, Nov., 1922; offg. dep. inspr.-genl., Nov., 1935.

SHARP, Sir HENRY, Kt., C.S.I., C.I.E., M.A. (Oxon), late Indian Educl. Service.—Apptd. princpl., Govt. Coll., Jubbulpore, Central Provs., 15th Oct., 1894; inspr. of sch., Dec., 1898; K.-i-H. medal, May, 1900; dir. of public instrn., E. Bengal and Assam, Feb., 1906; joint sec. to Govt. of India, dept. of educn., Dec., 1910; addl. member of govr.-genl.'s council, March, 1911; C.I.E., Dec., 1911; addl. member, govr.-gen.'s legisl. council, Jan., 1913; educ. commr. with the govt. of India, April, 1915, to April, 1920; C.S.I., Jan., 1916; offg. variously as sec. to govt. of India, dept. of educn. (in addn.), July, 1915, to Nov., 1919; confd. as sec., Nov., 1919; knighted, June, 1922; educ. commr. with govt. of India, July, 1922; retd.; sec. to the Statutory Commissions on Oxford and London; member of R.C. on Home Civil Service (1929); author of 'Rural Schools in the Central Provinces' and 'Progress of (Education in India, 1907-12 and 1912-17,' 'Sixth and Seventh Quinquennial Reviews.'

SHARP, SAMUEL HENRY, Indian State Rlys. (dep. ch. mechl. engr., G.I.P. Rly.) (b. 7th May, 1882).—Joined the service, 1st June, 1899; asst. carr. and wagon supt., Jan., 1919; works manager, May, 1925; offg. dep. transportation supt., March, 1928; offg. dep. ch. mechl. engr., May, 1930; confd., Aprl., 1935.

SHARPE, REGINALD TAAFFE, Barr.-at-Law (judge, high ct., Rangoon).—Apptd. July, 1937.

SHARPE, THOMAS ARTHUR, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Assam) (b. 14th Nov., 1913).—Educ. at Chesterfield Grammar Sch. and Emmanuel Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 15th Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Nov., 1937, and served in Assam as asst. commr.

SHARPE, WILLIAM MCCORMICK, B.A., D.S.O., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Bengal) (b. 11th June, 1893).—Educ. at Cookstown Academy, Coleraine Academical Inst., and Trinity Coll., Dublin; on mil. service from Oct., 1914; joined the service, 17th Feb., 1920; arrived, 11th May, 1920, and posted to Bengal; addl. dist. and sess. judge, Oct., 1924; and again, Sept., 1926; offg. registrar, high ct., appellate side, April, 1926; confd., Nov., 1928; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Nov., 1927; confd., Sept., 1929.

SHARPLES, CHARLES NORMAN, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr. of customs, Karachi) (b. 29th Aug., 1906).—Educ. at Blackpool Secondary Sch. and Selwyn Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 9th Oct., 1929; arrived, Nov., 1929, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; offg. asst. rev. offer., L.B. and C. constrn., Jan., 1934; offg. dep. commr., Mar., 1936; asst. collr. (Impl. Customs Service), Bombay, Dec., 1936; ditto, Karachi, Nov., 1937.

SHARPLEY, FORBES WILMOT, B.Sc., F.R.S.E., M.I.E.E., Indian School of Mines (b. 7th Jan., 1897).—Apptd. prof. of mechl. and electrical engrg. on probn., 28th Dec., 1926; confd., June, 1929.

SHASTRI, PRABHU DATTA (see Prabhu Datta, S.).

SHASTRY, TADEPALLY SHANKARA, Major, I.M.S. (D.M.O., Madras) (b. 1st Sept., 1889).—First commn., dated 1st Aug., 1914; in milty. employ till 29th Nov., 1923; offg. variously in civil appts. from Dec., 1923, to May, 1929; D.M.O., June, 1929.

SHATTOCK, JOHN SWITHUN HARVEY, B.A., Indian C.S. (under secty. to the Govt. of India defence dept.) (b. 21st Nov., 1907).—Educ. at Westminster and Christ Church, Oxford, and School of Oriental Studies, London; apptd. after exam. of 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1931, and served in Bengal as asst. magte. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. coll., Aprl., 1933; offg. under secty. to govt., Bengal, pol. and appts. dept., Aprl., 1934; asst. pte. secty. to govt. of Bengal, Nov., 1934; under secty. to the Govt. of India, defence dept.; secty., Indian Soldiers' Bd., Nov., 1936.

SHAVAX ARDESHIR, LAL, M.A., LL.B., (b. Nov., 1899).—Joined the service, June, 1930; 2nd Class sub. judge, Bombay, June, 1932, to Dec., 1934; dep. secty., legislative dept., Aprl., 1936.

SHAW, EDWARD BRIAN, B.A., late Indian C.S. (Assam) (b. 18th Nov., 1891).—Educ. at Westminster Sch. and Trinity Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1914, arrived, 4th Dec., 1915, and served in Assam as asst. commr.; on mil. duty (I.A.R.O.), Aug., 1916, to Dec., 1918; offg. depy. commr., July, 1923; retd., Feb., 1931.

SHAW, GEORGE ELLIOTT, B.Sc., F.I.C., F.C.S. (b. 4th Mar., 1872).—Joined the service as asst. quinologist, 16th Dec., 1905; govt. quinologist, Oct., 1917.

SHAW, GEORGE REID, A.M.I.C.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (chief engr. and secty., p.w.d., Assam) (b. 20th Sept., 1887).—Joined the service as asst. engr., Oct., 1911; asst. exec. engr., Feb., 1921; exec. engr., Oct., 1920; offg. suptg. engr., Jan., 1931, and again, Feb., 1933; confd., Mar., 1936; chief engr. and secty., p.w.d., Assam, Nov., 1936.

SHAW, HERBERT HUNTLEY, M.B.E., late United Provs. Civil Service (b. 21st Apl., 1877).—Joined the service as dep. collr., 23rd Oct., 1897; M.B.E., June, 1918; mag. and collr., Mar., 1926; retd., Apl., 1932.

SHAW, JAMES, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Orissa) (b. 13th Sept., 1902).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Bihar and Orissa, 1st Oct., 1926; offg. exec. engr., Jan., 1933; confd., Aug., 1936.

SHAW, JOHN, Burma Frontier Service (subt.) (b. 4th Sep., 1890).—Apptd. extra asst. commr. May, 1913, asst. supt. (B.F.S.) Nov., 1922. Supt. Oct. 1935.

SHAW, JOSEPH, M.A., Barr., Judicial Dept., Burma (judge, high court, Rangoon) (b. 4th Nov., 1886).—Apptd. asst. govt. advocate, Aug., 1918; addl. asst. sec., legis. council, Feb., 1920; offg. judge, small cause courts, July, 1920; asst. govt. advocate, Dec., 1922; judge, small cause cts., March, 1924; chief judge, ditto, May, 1926; acting judge, high ct., Rangoon, variously from Nov., 1932; puisne judge, Jan., 1938.

SHAW, WILLIAM, Assam C.S. (dep. commr.) (b. 5th Apl., 1889).—Joined the service, 4th Mar., 1909; dep. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1911; extra asst. commr., Dec., 1919; dep. commr., July, 1933.

SHEARER, JAMES GREIG, M.A., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Bihar) (b. 9th Jan., 1893).—Educ. at Dundee High Sch., Edinburgh Univ., and Christ Church, Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1916; arrived, 20th Dec., 1917, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; under-sec. to govt., pol., &c., dept., Aug., 1920; offg. mag. and collr., April, 1924, and Feb., 1925; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Nov., 1925, and again, May, 1927; offg. mag. and collr., Feb., 1926; addl. dist. and sess. judge, Jan., 1927; offg. dist. and sess. judge, June, 1929; confd., Apl., 1932; offg. regr., Patna high ct., Apl., 1934.

SHEARER, JOHN BURT, B.A. (Oxon.), M.A. (Glas.), Indian C.S. (dep. secty., fin. dept., Govt. of India) (b. 28th Dec., 1904).—Educ. at The Acad., Greenock, University of Glasgow and Trinity Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 21st Oct., 1929; arrived, Nov., 1929, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; under-secty. to govt., Punjab, home and pol. depts., Jan., 1931; under-secty. to govt. of India, finance dept., Apl., 1933; first secty., central bd. of rev., May, 1935; dep. secty., finance dept., Govt. of India, Apl., 1937.

SHEBBEARE, EDWARD OSWALD, Indian Forest Service (ch. consvr., Central Provs.) (b. 8th Mar., 1884).—Arrived, 5th Nov., 1906, and served as asst. consvr.; dep. consvr., Nov., 1919; offg. consvr., Oct., 1924; confd., Jan., 1929; ch. consvr., United Provs. Nov. 1935; ditto, Central Provs., Jan., 1937.

SHEEHY, JOHN FRANCIS, B.A., Indian C.S. (member central bd. of revenue) (b. 12th Oct., 1889).—Educ. at St. Tarlath's Coll., Tuam; Natl. Univ. of Ireland (St. Patrick's Coll., Maynooth, and Univ. Coll., Galway); apptd. after exam. of 1913; arrived, 20th Oct., 1914, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; on mil. duty from Oct., 1917, to Jan., 1920; sec., dev. commn., Rangoon, March, 1922; dep. sec. to govt. (in addn.), April, 1924; asst. commr., inc. tax, Dec., 1926; offg. commr., Oct., 1928; confd., June, 1930; member central bd. of rev., and ex-officio jt. secty. govt. of India, fin. dept. (cent. revs.), Apl., 1937.

SHEEHY, MICHAEL JOSEPH, B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Burma) (b. 20th Sept., 1893).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1920; asst. exec. engr., Feb., 1921; exec. engr., Nov., 1926.

SHEEPSHANKS, EDWARD, B.A., Indian C.S. (commr., Punjab) (b. 23rd Oct., 1884).—Educ. at Winchester and Pembroke Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1908; arrived, 3rd Dec., 1909, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; offg. asst. collr. of customs, Calcutta, March, 1914; sec., municipal cttee., Amritsar, Oct., 1914; attached to dept. of commerce and industry, govt. of India, Feb., 1915; asst. wheat commr., Bombay, May to Sept., 1915; on mil. duty from Oct., 1917, to Dec., 1918; dep. commr. (prov.), May, 1924; ditto (perm.), April, 1926; offg. commr., Apl., 1932, and again, Mar., 1933; confd. Dec., 1936.

SHEIKH, MOIZZUDDIN, B.A., Indian State Rlys. (divl. comml. officer) (b. 25th Aug., 1890).—Joined the service, 15th June, 1912; asst. dist. traffic supt., May, 1922; divl. transptn. (traffic comml.) officer, Mar., 1931.

SHELDON, NORMAN LINDSAY, C.I.E., Ph.D., F.I.C., late Dept. of Explosives (b. 4th Nov., 1876).—Joined the service, 16th Aug., 1903, as chemist, cordite factory; mangr., govt. cordite factory, Dec., 1915; supt., govt. acetone factory, Jan., 1929; chief inspr. of explosives, March, 1920; C.I.E., Jan., 1932; retd., Sept., 1932.

SHELLY, JAMES, M.C., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., United Provs.) (b. 17th Nov., 1894).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 27th Nov., 1919; asst. exec. engr., April, 1922; offg. exec. engr., Oct., 1926; confd., Oct., 1927; pers. asst. to ch. engr., Nov., 1935.

SHELSWELL, OSCAR HENRY CLIVE, Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Madras) (b. 22nd May, 1894).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 15th March, 1921; dep. consvr., March, 1922; persl. asst. to ch. consvr., May, 1926.

SHEOADHAR SINGH, P.M.S. Civil Surgeon, United Provs. (b. 12th Oct., 1884), Civil Surg., May, 1927.

SHEO SINGH BEDI, SARDAR BAHADUR, BAWA, Indian Service of Engineers (exec. engr.) (b. June, 1886).—Joined the service as temp. engr. 21st Dec., 1908; asst. engr., Jan., 1923; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1931; exec. engr., Sep., 1936.

SHEPHERD, GEORGE EDWARD, O.B.E., late India Office (b. 2nd May, 1875).—Clerk, 2nd class, registry and record dept., 4th Sept. 1893; transfid. to judl. and public dept., Nov., 1905; junr. clerk, Apl., 1914; principal, Apl., 1921; O.B.E., June, 1934; retd., Oct., 1936.

SHEPHERD, JAMES FORREST, M.B., Ch.B. (Aberd.), M.Ch. (Liv.), Major, I.M.S. (D.M.O., Madras) (b. 3rd Dec., 1899).—First commn. 29th Feb., 1924; in milty. employ until 3rd Feb., 1934; dist. medl. officr., Mar., 1934; confd. in civil dept. with effect from June, 1936.

SHEPHERD, W. I., O.B.E., late Income Tax Dept., Bihar and Orissa (b. 11th Aug., 1877).—Joined the service, 20th April, 1897; O.B.E., June, 1919; supt. of income tax, Jan., 1922; offg. asst. commr., ditto, June, 1925; confd., Oct., 1925; rettd., Aug., 1932.

SHEPHERD, WILLIAM SKINNER, M.A., late Indian Forest Service (b. 11th Nov., 1890).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 15th Dec., 1913; on milty. service from 1st June, 1915, to 4th June, 1920; dep. consvr., Dec., 1918; rettd., Oct., 1936.

SHEPPARD, ARTHUR LEWIN, M.B., F.R.C.S., Lt.-Col., I.M.S., rettd., late Burma Medl. Dept. (b. 30th Apl., 1882).—First commn. dated 29th Jan., 1910; civil surg., Jan., 1923; surg., genl. hosp., Rangoon, Mar., 1931; medl. supt., ditto, Mar., 1934; rettd., Apl., 1937.

SHERIDAN, SIR PHILIP CAHILL, Kt., C.M.G., late Indian State Railways—Held appt. of general traffic manager, East Indian rly.; apptd. member of the railway board, 31st Dec., 1923; rettd., Kt., June, 1929.

SHERRY, WALTER CAMPBELL, Office of High Commr. for India (executive officer, store dept.) (b. 12th July, 1885).—Educ. at Dorchester Gr. Sch.; apptd. 2nd class clerk, 31st Aug., 1904; transfd. to office of high commr. for India, Oct., 1920; exec. officer, April, 1922.

S H E T E, VENKATESH GOPAL, L.C.E., M.I.E. (Ind.), M.R.San.I., A.M.San.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 26th July, 1882).—Joined the provl. service as asst. engr., June, 1913; asst. exec. engr., Aug., 1919; exec. engr., June, 1922; offg. suptg. engr., Apl., 1931; rettd., July, 1937.

SHIELD, HENRY SOPWITH, late Indian C.S. (b. 2nd Nov., 1884).—Educ. at St. Paul's Sch., and Christ Church Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1907; arrived, 24th Nov. 1908, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; estate collr., Sivaganga estate, Oct., 1914; sub-collr., and jt. mag., and ditto, July, 1915; commr. for income tax for Madras, June, 1922; offg. collr. and dist. mag., Nov., 1922; ditto, Feb., 1923; ditto, Nov., 1924; ditto, Feb., 1925; ditto, Dec., 1925; collr. and dist. magte. (provl. sub.), Oct., 1927; confd., May, 1928; rettd., Dec., 1933.

SHIELS, DR. T. DRUMMOND, M.C., M.P. Parly. Under-Secty. of State, June-Dec., 1929.

SHILLIDY, GEORGE ALEXANDER, C.I.E., Indian Police (inspr.-genl., Bombay) (b. 7th Mar., 1886).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 22nd Nov., 1906; supt. of police, Dec., 1916; recd. King's police medal, Jan., 1922; offg. dep. inspr.-genl., April, 1927; ditto, Mar., 1929; confd., Apl., 1932; C.I.E., Jan., 1931; offg. inspr.-genl., Oct., 1935; confd., May, 1936.

SHILLIDY, JOHN ARMSTRONG, C.S.I., B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 6th June, 1882).—Educ. at Campbell Coll., Belfast, and Trinity Coll., Dublin; apptd. after exam. of 1905; arrived 23rd Nov., 1906, and served in Bombay as asst. collr. and mag.; acting asst. commr.
