in Sind, March to Aug., 1914; municipal commr., Ahmedabad, Nov., 1915, to Sept., 1917; asst. commr. Sind, and Sindhi translator to govt., Sept., 1917; dep. sec. to govt., home dept., Nov., 1922; offg. collr. and pol. agent, Dec., 1925; retrenchment offr., Poona, May, 1926; on special duty for framing rules under the C.S. Delegation Rules, 1926, April, 1927; offg. jt. sec. to govt. of India, home dept., July, 1927; secty. to govt. of India, dept. of indus. and labour, Oct., 1929; C.S.I., Jan., 1932; rettd., Mar., 1936.

SHINDE, PANDURANG KRISHNARAO, B.A., A.M.I.C.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Bombay) (b. 2nd Dec., 1883).—Joined the service, 1st Feb., 1921, as asst. engr.; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1921; exec. engr., June, 1924.

SHIRLEY, GEOFFREY STANHOPE, Indian Forest Service (consvr., Burma) (b. 19th July, 1888).—Arrived, 28th Dec., 1910, and served as asst. consvr.; dep. consvr., Dec., 1915; on mil. service, Aug., 1918, to Feb., 1919; offg. consvr., Nov., 1929; confd., June, 1935.

SHIRRAS, GEORGE FINDLAY, M.A., F.S.S., Indian Educl. Service (principal, Gujarat Coll., Ahmedabad) (b. 16th July, 1885).—Educ. at Robert Gordon's Coll., Aberdeen, and Univ. of Aberdeen; apptd. to Indian educl. service as profsr. of economics, Dacca Coll., 10th April, 1909; on special duty under govt. of India, finl. dep., May, 1910, to April, 1913; on special duty in office of dir. of public instrn., Bengal, Oct., 1913; ditto, March, 1914; dir. of statistics, govt. of India, from April, 1914; member of Bengal statistical commee., Feb., 1918; member of Board of Agriculture in India, 1918; dir., Bombay Labour Office, April, 1921; member, legisl. council, 1921, and again in 1924; supy. profsr. of economics, Gujarat Coll., Ahmedabad, March, 1926; offg. prinpl., Gujarat Coll., June, 1926; confd., Feb., 1930; author of 'Some Aspects of Indian Commerce and Industry,' 'Indian Finance and Banking,' and articles on finance.

SHIRREFF, ALEXANDER GRIERSON, B.A., Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., United Provs.) (b. 29th April, 1883).—Educ. at Merchant Taylors' Sch., and St. John's Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1906; arrived, 9th Dec., 1907, and served in United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; regr., ct. of judl. commr., Oudh, Feb., 1913, to July, 1915; jt. mag., Jan., 1916; under-sec. to govt., United Provs., April, 1916; on mil. duty (I.A.R.O.), July, 1918, to April, 1919; offg. dep. commr., April, 1919, to Nov., 1921; offg. mag. and collr., Nov., 1921; confd., Dec., 1923; offg. commr., Mar., 1935.

SHIVDASANI, HIRANAND RUPCHAND, B.A., Barr., Indian C.S. (jt. mag., United Provs.) (b. 9th Aug., 1904).—Educ. at Univ. of Bombay and School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 28th Sept., 1928; arrived, Oct., 1928, and served in the United Provs. as asst. collr. and mag.; offg. mag. and collr., May, 1933.

SHIVDASANI, RAMCHAND TEKCHAND, B.A., Indian C.S. (joint mag., United Provs.) (b. 14th Nov., 1898).—Educ. at Bombay Univ. and London Univ. (School of Economics); joined the service, 25th Oct., 1923; arrived, 11th Dec.,

1923, and served in United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag., May, 1927; offg mag. and collr., May, 1932; offg. excise commr., Oct., 1933; offg. inspr.-genl. of regn. (in addn.), 1933; offg. dir. of indus., U.P., Feb., 1935.

SHIVESHWARKAR, SADANAND WAMAM, Indian C.S. (asst. magte. and collr., United Provs.) (b. 1st Mar., 1912).—Educ. at Savantvadi High Sch., Bombay Univ. and Sidney Sussex Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 14th Jan., 1937; arrived in India, Feb., 1937, and served in U.P. as asst. magte. and collr.

SHOOBERT, WILFRED HAROLD, Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Central Provs.) (b. 7th June, 1896).—Educ. at St. Paul's Sch., and Christ Church, Oxford; joined the service, 25th Oct., 1920; arrived, 4th Dec., 1920, and served in Central Provs. as asst. commr.; services placed at disposal of Assam Labour Board from April, 1923, to March, 1924; offg. dep. commr., Nov., 1925; confd., Nov., 1933; provl. supt., census operations, Apl., 1930; offg. commr. of settlements, etc., C.P., Mar., 1934; and again, Apr., 1936; services placed at disp. of govt. of India, indus. and lab., Mar., 1937.

SHORT, REV. GEORGE MURRAY DAVIDSON, M.A., Indian Eccl. Estabt. (senr. chaplain, ch. of Scotland, Madras) (b. 21st Dec., 1890).—Joined the service as junr. chaplain, 19th Dec., 1924; in milty. employ from Feb., 1925, to Mar., 1926; senr. chaplain, Dec., 1935.

SHORT, VIVIAN AUGUSTUS, C.I.E., late Indian Police (b. 30th Sept., 1883).—Joined the service, 19th Nov., 1904; supt. of police, Feb., 1913; dist. offr., frontier constabulary, Peshawar, April, 1919; personal asst. to inspr.-gen., N.W.F. Prov., April, 1920; comdt., frontier constabulary, Nov., 1926; C.I.E., Jan., 1933; retcd., Jan., 1936.

SHORTT, HENRY EDWARD, M.D., Ch.B. (Aberd.), D.T.M.&H. (Lond.), D.Sc. (Aberd.), Lt.-Col., I.M.S., Medical Research Dept., Madras (dir., King Inst., Guindy) (b. 15th Apl., 1887).—First commn., 30th July, 1910; in milty. employ until 29th Aug., 1921; worked in various medl. research depts.; dir., King Inst., Guindy, Dec., 1934; confd., as dir., King Inst., Aug., 1936.

SHORTT, NORMAN ROBERT, Indian State Rlys. (dist. loco. supt., E.B. Rly.) (b. 14th July, 1883).—Asst. loco. supt., junr. scale, 16th Oct., 1928; dist. loco. supt., senr. scale, Feb., 1937.

SHOUT, FRANCIS FREDERICK, M.A., late India Posts and Telegraphs (b. 18th Oct., 1879).—Joined the service as supt., 12th March, 1904; asst. dir.-genl., Oct., 1918; retcd., Mar., 1929.

SHOVELLER, HAROLD LANGLEY, A.C.A., Income tax dept., Bombay (senr. income tax officer) (b. 16th Jan., 1884).—Appointed to income tax dept. of the central board of revenue, 29th Oct., 1919; senior income tax officer, Bombay, 1st April, 1922; offg. asst. commr. of inc. tax, Bombay city, April, 1927.

SHRI SHRIDHAR NEHRU (see Nehru, S. S.).

SHRINAGESH, JAYAVANT MALLANNAH, Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 1st Jan., 1905).—Educ. at West Buckland School, Barnstaple, and Trinity Coll., (Cambridge); joined the service, 2nd Oct., 1928; arrived, Oct.,

1928, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr., offg. dep. commr., Oct., 1932, and again, Mar. 1933; addl. ditto, July, 1933.

SHRIVASTAVA, NIRMAL CHANDRA, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Central Provs.) (b. 1st Sept., 1913).—Educ. at Patwardhan High School, Nagpur, Nagpur University and School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 21st Sept., 1936; arrived in India, Oct., 1936, and served in the Central Provinces as asst. commr.

SHROFF, SARVA DAMAN, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Madras) (b. 6th Nov., 1887).—Joined the service, 21st May, 1913; asst. engr., Oct., 1916; asst. sany. engr., March, 1917; asst. exec. engr., May, 1922; exec. engr., Oct., 1925.

SHUCKBURGH, Sir JOHN EVELYN, K.C.M.G., C.B., M.A., late India Office. —Educ. at Eton, and King's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. junior clerk, store dept., India Office, Oct., 1900; transf. to judl. and public dept., March, 1901; joint editor, 'India Office List,' Oct., 1901; private sec. to permanent under-sec. of state, July, 1902; senr. clerk, political dept., March, 1906; editor, telegraphic codes, Aug., 1907, to Nov., 1912; asst. sec., political dept., Oct., 1912; sec., political dept., March, 1917; C.B., June, 1918; services lent to Colonial Office as acting asst. under-sec. of state from 17th Feb., 1921; K.C.M.G., Jan., 1922; transf. to estabt. of the Colonial Office, March, 1924.

SHUJA-UD-DIN KHAN, B.A., late Indian Posts and Tels. (b. 20th May, 1879).—Held non-gazetted appts. from 24th Feb., 1900; supy. inspr., Oct., 1904; dep. inspr., Oct., 1906; supt., June, 1907; dep. P.M.G., United Prov., July, 1930; ditto, Bombay, May, 1932; retcd., May, 1934.

SHUKUL, BADRI PRASAD, B.A., Indian Police (dist. supt., Central Provs.) (b. 2nd May, 1885).—Joined the service as dep. supt., Feb., 1908; dist. supt., Oct., 1925.

SHUKUL, PANDIT RAGHUBAR DAYAL (see Raghubar, D. S. P.).

SHULDHAM, WALTER FRANK QUANTOCK, Major, I.A., retcd., late Indian Political Dept. (b. 17th June, 1892).—First commn. dated 29th Aug., 1914; in milty. employ to 24th May, 1920; 2nd asst. to pol. resident in Persian Gulf, Jan., 1921; under-sec. to agent to govr.-genl. in C.I., June, 1923; asst. commr., Ajmer-Merwara, May, 1925; under-sec. to Resident, Hyderabad, Nov., 1927; secty. to agent to govr.-genl., C.I., May, 1928; on foreign service in Jaipur State, Feb., 1931; retcd., Mar., 1935.

SHYAM SUNDER PRASAD, Indian Forest Service (asst. commr., Bihar) (b. 1st Mar., 1903).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., Bihar and Orissa, 3rd Dec., 1926.

SI, U KA, B.A., Indian Civil Service (asst. commr., Burma) (b. 4th April, 1902).—Educ. at Calcutta and Rangoon Univs., and Sidney Sussex Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 29th Oct., 1925; arrived, 7th Dec., 1925, and served in Burma as asst. cmmr.; under-sec. to govt., local govt. dept., Nov., 1928; offg. dep. commr., July, 1932.

SIDESHWARI PRASAD VARMA, C.I.E., M.Sc., Indian Finance Dept. (b. 28th Mar., 1890).—Joined the service, 18th Mar., 1914; asst. acctnt.-genl., United Provs., Nov., 1916; asst. auditor, N.W. Rly., Sept., 1918; ditto, O. & R. Rly., Nov., 1921; dep. acctnt.-gen., rly., Oct., 1922; asst. auditor-genl., Jan., 1923; dep. acctnt.-gen., Central Revenues, Oct., 1923; on spl. duty for revision of postal and tel. codes, May, 1924; offg. finl. advr., posts and tel., May, 1928; services placed at disposal of Baroda durbar, Nov., 1929-May, 1930; ditto, rly. bd., May, 1930; dep. finl. adviser, posts and tels., Nov., 1930; offg. finl. adviser, posts and tels., Mar., 1931; member, standing finance ctee., Benares Hindu univ., Mar., 1933; finl. adviser, posts and tels., Apl., 1933; C.I.E., Jan., 1936. finance officer, posts and tels., July, 1936; attd. offer. in A.G.'s dept., U.P., Apl., 1937.

SIEVWRIGHT, ANDREW GEORGE HUME, M.B.E., late Salt Dept., Bombay (b. 19th Feb., 1885).—Held non-gazetted appts., acting and perm., from 1st Jan., 1905, to 31st Oct., 1911; asst. collr., Nov., 1911; M.B.E., June, 1919; on milty. duty from 23rd Jan., 1918; ret'd., Apl., 1930.

SIFTON, Sir JAMES DAVID, K.C.S.I., K.C.I.E., B.A. (Oxon.), late Indian C.S. (b. 17th Apl., 1878).—Educ. at St. Paul's Sch., and Magdalen Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1901; arrived, 27th Nov., 1902, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr. and asst. settlmt. offer.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Mar., 1911; transfdr. to Bihar and Orissa, Apl., 1912; mag. and collr., Nov., 1915; sec. to govt., finl. and munpl. depts., Aug., 1917; C.S.I., Mar., 1919; C.I.E., Jan., 1921; dep. commr., Dec., 1923; offg. chief sec. to govt., Bihar and Orissa, June, 1923, and from March, 1925; confd. as chief sec., Dec., 1925; member, exec. council, Bihar and Orissa, May, 1927; offg. govr., ditto, Jan., 1929; and again, June, 1930; K.C.I.E., June, 1931; K.C.S.I., March, 1932; govr., Bihar and Orissa, April, 1932; govr., Bihar, Apl., 1936, to Mar., 1937; ret'd., Nov., 1937.

SIKANDER HYAT KHAN, KHAN BAHADUR, Major, Sardar, Sir, K.B.E.—Apptd. temp. member of govt.'s. exec. council, Punjab, 3rd Aug., 1929; confd., Apl., 1930; vice-presdt, ditto, Oct., 1932; actg. govr. of the Punjab, July-Oct., 1932; and again Feb., 1934; K.B.E., Jan., 1933; dep. govr., res. bank of India, Feb., 1935; temp. member, govr.'s. exec. council, Punjab, Oct., 1936; Premier, legis. cl., Punjab, Apl., 1937.

SIL, JANINDRA MOHAN, B.A., B.Sc., Meteorological Dept. (meteorologist) (b. 1st Oct., 1897).—Joined the service as meteorologist on probn., 17th Oct., 1927; confd., Oct., 1929.

SILVER, CECIL HERBERT, India Office (administrative officer, for political intelligence) (b. 28th Jan., 1886).—Educ. at Whitgift Sch.; apptd. clerk, 2nd class, 15th March, 1907, and employed in the registry and record dept.; transfdr. to judl. and public dept., May, 1914; resdt. clerk, Dec., 1916, to Aug., 1920; minor staff clerk, Jan., 1919; joint editor, India Office List, Nov., 1920, to May, 1926; acting staff clerk, April, 1921; administrative officer, April, 1922; sec. to Indian delegation to 4th Internl. Labour Conference, Geneva, Oct.,

1922; sec. to Indian delegation to International Passport Conference, Geneva, May, 1926; admin. offer. for pol. intell., June, 1937.

SILVESTER, COLIN NORMAN, Indian State Rlys. (works manager, E.B. rly.) (b. 25th Sept., 1895).—Joined the service, 10th Apl., 1920; asst. rolling stock officer, Dec., 1925; works manager, E.B. rly. (prov.), Aug., 1934.

SIMCOCK, ERIC, Office of High Commr. for India (higher exec. officer, general dept.) (b. 15th July, 1895).—Apptd. 2nd class clerk, 5th Aug., 1914; on mil. service from Oct., 1915; transfdr. to office of high commr. for India, Oct., 1920; higher exec. officer, June, 1927.

SIMMONS, CHARLES EDWARDS, Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Assam) (b. 29th Jan., 1889).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 20th Dec., 1913; in mil. employ from 20th Oct., 1915, to 11th Jan., 1921; dep. consvr., Jan., 1921; on deputation to the forest college, Dehra Dun, as instructor from Dec., 1921; offg. consvr., Sept., 1936.

SIMMONS, EDWARD CLARE, Indian Forest Service (b. 26th Jan., 1899) (dep. consvr., Burma). Joined the service as asst. consvr., 24th Dec., 1923; dep. consvr., May, 1928.

SIMMS, JOHN GERALD, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. coll., Bombay) (b. 6th Sept., 1904).—Educ. at Winchester and New Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 18th Oct., 1929; arrived, Nov., 1929, and served in Bombay as asst. coll.

SIMPSON, ALEXANDER ALLEN, M.A., late Indian Educl. Service (United Provs.) (b. 2nd Feb., 1881).—Joined the service, 10th March, 1915; head master, govt. high school, Cawnpore, Jan., 1916; prinpl., training coll., Allahabad, Oct., 1925; ret'd., Dec., 1932.

SIMPSON, EDWARD SKINNER, Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Bengal) (b. 31st Oct., 1897).—Joined the service, 3rd Sept., 1923; arrived in India, 2nd Nov., 1923, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Nov., 1928; confd., Nov., 1932; regr., high ct., Calcutta, appellate side, Mar., 1935.

SIMPSON, FRANK DOUGLAS, M.A., late Indian C.S. (United Provs.) (b. 13th Oct., 1870).—Educ. at Aberdeen Univ., and Exeter Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1893; arrived, 10th Dec., 1894, and served in the N.W. Prov. and Oudh as asst. commr. and asst. mag. and collr.; joint mag., Dec., 1901; addl. judge, Nov., 1908; dist. and sess. judge, Oct., 1911; offg. addl. judl. commr., April, 1922; dist. judge, June, 1927; ret'd., Dec., 1929.

SIMPSON, JOHN ALEXANDER, M.A., India Office (actg. jt. secty., mil. dept.) (b. 25th Nov., 1892).—Educ. at Robert Gordon's Coll., Aberdeen, and Aberdeen University; apptd. junr. clerk, 15th Sept., 1919, and attd. to pol. dept.; resdt. clerk, April, 1920, to March, 1921; served with 14th Bn. Co. of London Regt. (London Scottish), Sept., 1915, to Feb., 1917, 4th Bn. Gordon Hlrs., March to Aug., 1917, and 124th Baluchistan Infy., Sept., 1917, to Aug., 1919; principal, April, 1921; dep. clerk of council, June, 1931; actg. joint sec., mil. dept., Jan.-July, 1932; and again, Sept., 1934.

SIMPSON, Sir JOHN HOPE, K.B.E., C.I.E., B.A., late Indian C.S.—Educ. at foreign schs. and at Balliol Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1887; arrived, 30th Oct., 1889; and served in

the N.W. Prov. and Oudh as asst. mag. and collr.; joint mag., Nov., 1895; asst. commr., July, 1898; dep. commr., Dec., 1901; joint secy. board of revenue, Jan., 1903; regr., co-operative credit societies, Nov., 1904, to June, 1907; C.I.E., Jan., 1913; offg. supt., Port Blair, and chief commr. of the Andamans and Nicobar Islands, April to Oct., 1914, and from May, 1916; ret'd., Dec., 1916; M.P. for Taunton Divn., Nov., 1922, to Oct., 1924; chairman, Colonies Cttee., 1924; Kt., June, 1925; K.B.E., Feb., 1937.

SIMPSON, SIR MAURICE GEORGE, Kt., C.S.I., M.I.E.E., late India Office and India Tel. Dept. (b. 3rd Nov., 1866).—Trained at R.I.E. Coll.; apptd. asst. supt., 1st Oct., 1887; supt., Feb., 1901; electrical engr. in-chief, April, 1910; ret'd. from India Tel. Dept., Dec., 1914; apptd. asst. to dir. in-chief, Indo-European telegraphs, Jan., 1915; dir. in-chief, ditto, July, 1923, to Mar., 1931; C.S.I., June, 1928; Kt., Jan., 1931.

SIMPSON, PATRICK, late Survey of India (b. 12th Feb., 1881).—Joined the service, 20th Nov., 1901; extra asst. supt., Oct., 1916; supt., Sept., 1932; ret'd., Feb., 1936.

SIMPSON, REGINALD HUGH, Indian Police (b. 14th Aug., 1912).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt. of police, Bombay, Nov., 1933.

SIMPSON, ROBERT ROWELL, C.I.E., M.Sc. (Durham), late Dept. of Mines in India (b. 27th Aug., 1876).—Joined the service, 13th Nov., 1901; inspr. of mines, May, 1906; offg. chief inspr., May, 1920; confd., Jan., 1921; C.I.E., June, 1930; ret'd., Oct., 1932.

SIMPSON, SYDNEY, Indian State Rlys. (ch. elec. engr., N.W. rly.) (b. 3rd May, 1885).—Joined the service, 24th Mar., 1927; offg. senr. elec. engr., N.W. rly., Mar., 1931; dep. ch. mech. engr. (elec.), E.B. rly., Nov., 1931; offg. ch. elec. engr., N.W. rly., May, 1935; confd., Nov., 1936.

SIMPSON, WILFRID JAMES, M.B., Lt.-Col., I.M.S., ret'd. (b. 4th Feb., 1885).—First commn., dated 1st Feb., 1908; agency surg., Gilgit, Oct., 1919; ditto, Hazara, March, 1923; ditto, Bhopal, March, 1925; again, Sept., 1929; resdy. surg. and C.M.O. in C.I., June, 1929; agency surg., Bhopal, Sept., 1929; resy. surg., Mewar; offg. resdt., Mewar, in addn., Aug., 1934; ret'd., May, 1935.

SIMS, ARTHUR MITFORD, B.Sc., Indian State Rys. (exec. engr., N.W. Rly.) (b. 31st Mar., 1889).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1911; on mil. duty from 30th March, 1916, to 8th Nov., 1918; exec. engr., Oct., 1920; offg. dep. ch. engr. (bridges), July, 1934; offg. dep. agent, N.W. rly., Apl., 1936.

SIMS, EDWARD ALFRED, Indian State Rlys. (dist. traffic supt., E.B. rly.) (b. 3rd March, 1892).—Joined the service as asst. traffic supt., 3rd Nov., 1914; dist. traffic supt., Dec., 1922; member and secty., rly. rates advisory cttee., May, 1933; offg. traffic manager, Burma rlys., June, 1937.

SIMS, FREDERICK, Public Works Dept., Bihar (b. 4th Feb., 1894).—Joined the service as electrical engr., 17th Oct., 1927.

SINCLAIR, MALCOLM CECIL, Capt., I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 25th Sept., 1899).—First commn., dated 1st Oct., 1918; in milty. employ. to 7th Sept., 1920; asst. resident, Aden, Oct., 1924;

2nd asst. to resident in Kashmir, April, 1927; asst. resdt., Kolhapur, Mar., 1930; asst. commr., Manshera, Apl., 1931; dep. commr., Hazara, Apl., 1932; dep. commr., Bannu, Sept., 1932; civil secty. to ch. commr., Aden, Sept., 1935.

SINCLAIR, SAMUEL CHRISTINA, O.B.E., B.A., India Posts and Tels. (p.m.g.) (b. 2nd Dec., 1882).—Joined the service as supt., 1st May, 1907; in milty. employ. from 20th Oct., 1914, to 13th June, 1922; O.B.E., Jan., 1923; asst. dir. genl., post office, Mar., 1929; dep. P.M.G., Madras, Mar., 1932; ditto, Bengal and Assam, July, 1932; p.m.g. Aug. 1936.

SINCLAIR, WILLIAM, late Indian Service of Engrs. (United Provs.) (b. 31st May, 1874).—Joined the service, 4th April, 1895; in mil. employ. from 25th Sept., 1918, to 21st March, 1919; asst. engr., March, 1919; asst. exec. engr., Aug., 1919; offg. exec. engr., Dec., 1925; ret'd., May, 1929.

SINGH, AJIT (see Ajit Singh).

SINGH, BADAN (see Badan S.).

SINGH, BAKSHI (see Bakshi S.).

SINGH, BALWANT SHIHN (see Balwant Singh Shihn).

SINGH, BANAPHAR JANAKIRAM (see Janakiram Singh, B.).

SINGH, BAWA JEWAN (see Bawa Jewan Singh).

SINGH, BAWA KARTAR (see Bawa Kartar Singh).

SINGH, BAWA RAMNICK (see Bawa Ramnick Singh).

SINGH, BHAI LEHNA (see Lehna Singl Bhai).

SINGH, BRAJ BHUSHAN (see Braj Brushan, S.).

SINGH, BUDH BAWA (see Budh S. B.).

SINGH, BUDHI (see Budhi, S.).

SINGH, DALIP (see Dalip Singh).

SINGH, DALJIT (see Daljit Singh).

SINGH, DARSHAN (see Darshan Singh).

SINGH, DEVI (see Devi Singh).

SINGH, GURBACHAN (see Gurbachan, Singh).

SINGH, GURBAKSH (see Gurbakhsh, S.).

SINGH, GURDIAL SUNDER (see Gurdial, S. Singh).

SINGH, GURMUKH (see Gurmukh Singh).

SINGH, HARI (see Hari Singh).

SINGH, JAGDEO, GAREWAL S. (see Jagdeo, S. G. S.).

SINGH, JHUNNA (see Jhunna Singh).

SINGH, JIWAN AMRIK (see Jiwan, A. S.).

SINGH, KAPUR (see Kapur, S.).

SINGH, KARAN (see Karan Singh).

SINGH, KARTAR (see Kartar Singh).

SINGH, KHARAK (see Kharak Singh).

SINGH, KUNWAR BALBIR (see Balbir Singh, Kunwar).

SINGH, KUNWAR SHAMSHER (see Shamsher Singh, Kunwar).

SINGH, LAIQ (see Laiq Singh).

SINGH, LAL RAM SHARAN (see Sharan Singh, Lal Ram).

SINGH, LALLAN PRASAD, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., Bihar) (b. 1st July, 1912).—Educ. at Queen's Intermediate College, Benares, Allahabad University and School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 21st Sept., 1936; arrived in India, Nov., 1936, and served in Bihar as asst. mag. and collr.

SINGH, MAHARAJ KUNWAR (see Mahara Kunwar Singh).

SINGH, MALIK ANUP, M.B., Lt.-Col., I.M.S., Jail Dept., Bengal (insp. genl.) (b. 22nd Sept., 1891).—First commn., 1st Nov., 1920; supt., central jail, Midnapore, Oct., 1929; ditto, presby. jail, Jan., 1931; offg. inspr.-genl. of Prisons, Bengal, Apl., 1934; and again, Nov., 1936; confd., May, 1937.

SINGH, MAN (see Man Singh).

SINGH, MOHAN (see Mohan Singh).

SINGH, NATHA (see Natha Singh).

SINGH, NAWAB (se Nawab Sing.).

SINGH, NEHPAL (see Nehpal Singh).

SINGH, PARTAB (see Partab Singh).

SINGH, PRABH (see Prabh Singh).

SINGH, PRITAM, BRAR (see Pritam Singh, B.).

SINGH, RACHPAL (see Rachpal S.).

SINGH, RAGHBIR (see Raghbir Singh).

SINGH, RAJ NARAYAN (see Raj Narayan S.).

SINGH, RAM (see Ram Singh).

SINGH, RIPDAMAN (see Ripdaman, S.).

SINGH, SANT PRAKASH (see Sant Prakash, S.).

SINGH, SARDAR (see Sardar Singh).

SINGH, SARUP (see Sarup Singh).

SINGH, SEWA RAM (see Sewa Ram S.).

SINGH, SHAM (see Sham Singh).

SINGH, SHEO ADHAR (see Sheo Adhar Singh).

SINGH SITAL (see Sital Singh).

SINGH, SUCHA, Indian C.S. (jt. mag., United Provs.) (b. 3rd April, 1903).—Educ. at King's Coll., London; joined the service, 18th Oct., 1927; arrived, Nov., 1927, and served in the United Provs. as asst. commr.; jt. mag., Mar., 1930; exec. officer, improvement trust, Cawnpore, May, 1936.

SINGH, SUNDAR (see Sundar Singh).

SINGH, TARA (see Tara Singh).

SINGH, TARLOK (see Tarlok Singh).

SINGH, TEJA (see Teja, Singh).

SINGH, TRIBHUBAN PRASAD (see Tribhuban Prasad Singh).

SINGHA, JAI RAJ (see Jai Raj Singha).

SINGHAM, JOSEPH ROBERT THURAI, A.K.C., Madras P.W. Dept. (b. 5th Mar., 1877).—Joined the service, 13th Aug., 1907; dep. sanitary engr., 5th March, 1922; offg. sany. engr., Mar., 1929.

SINGLE, HERBERT STANLEY, M.A., late Indian Forest Service (b. 6th Mar., 1893).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 22nd Dec., 1921; lecturer in forestry, Univ. Coll., Rangoon, May, 1924; dep. consvr., Oct., 1925; ret'd., May, 1933.

SINGLETON, PATRICK WILLIAM, Impl. Customs Service (collr.) (b. 1st Feb., 1884).—Joined the service, 5th April, 1905, as asst. opium agent (prob.); asst. opium agent, Nov., 1907; asst. collr. of customs, July, 1912; offg. collr., Rangoon, Jan., 1935; confd., July, 1937.

SINHA, ALAKH KUMAR, O.B.E., M.A., Indian Police (supth., Bihar) (b. 29th June, 1884).—Joined the service, 21st Feb., 1908; asst. supt., Jan., 1920; supt., Apl., 1924; O.B.E., June, 1926; offg. dep. inspr.-genl., Mar., 1936.

SINHA, AVADH KISHOR PRASHAD, Rai Baha. durr., Indian Police (supth., Bihar) (b. 16th Nov., 1896).—Joined the service, 2nd Jan. 1921; promoted to I.P. as supt., Feb., 1935.

SINHA, BABU NIRSU NARAYAN, M.A., B.L. (member, govr.'s exec. council, Bihar).—Apptd. presdt., Bihar and Orissa legisl. council, 21st Jan., 1931; member, govr.'s exec. council, Bihar and Orissa, Jan., 1934; actg. vice-presdt., ditto, Oct., 1934.

SINHA, KALI PRASHAD, M.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bihar) (b. 1st March, 1897).—Educ. at Calcutta University and Queen's Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 1st Feb., 1924; arrived, 1st Feb., 1924, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. mag. and collr., Mar., 1930; offg. addl. dist. and sess. judge, May, 1932; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Feb., 1933.

SINHA, MADAN MOHAN (see Madan M. S.).

SINHA, MITHILESH KUMAR, B.A., Indian Police (b. 30th Sept., 1903).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bihar and Orissa, 23rd April, 1928.

SINHA, RAMA AKHANDALESHVAR PRASHAD, Indian Police (b. 29th Jan., 1913).—Apptd. asst. supt., Bihar, on probn., 27th Jan., 1936.

SINHA, RAMANI MOHAN, B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Bengal) (b. 19th Jan., 1886).—Joined the service, 25th Jan., 1910, and held non-gazetted appt. prior to 1st Feb., 1920; asst. engr., Feb., 1920; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1928; exec. engr., Jan., 1933.

SINHA, ROMANI MOHAN, Indian State Rlys. (dep. ch. engr. (Signals)) (b. 22nd Mar., 1892).—Joined the service as asst. signal engr., 1st Nov., 1919; dist. signal engr., E.I. Rly., Mar., 1931; offg. dep. ch. engr. (signals), E.I. Rly., Nov., 1934; confd., Feb., 1935.

SINHA, SUDHIR KUMAR, Indian Police (b. Jan., 1910).—Apptd. prob. asst. supt., Bengal, 1st March, 1932.

SINHA, Honble. SUSHIL KUMAR, B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 9th June, 1895).—Educ. at Balliol Coll., Oxford, and Pembroke Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 24th Oct., 1919; arrived, 19th Jan., 1920, and posted to Bengal; offg. mag. and collr., March, 1924; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Jan., 1927; confd., June, 1931; offg. ch. pres. mag., Calcutta, June, 1931; confd., Sept., 1933; ret'd., Apl., 1937.

SINTON, JOHN ALEXANDER, V.C., O.B.E., Lt.-Col., I.M.S. (dir., malaria survey of India, Kasauli) (b. 2nd Dec., 1884).—First commn., 29th July, 1911; in milty. employ until 8th Feb., 1921, when apprd. bacteriological officer, Pasteur inst., Kasauli; dir. malaria survey of India, Apl., 1932.

SIRAJUDDIN AHMAD, B.Sc., LL.B., Indian Police (b. 1st Nov., 1901).—Joined the service as asst. supt., United Provs., 29th June, 1925; offg. supt., May, 1929, and again, Mar., 1933.

SIRAJ-UD-DIN, KHAN BAHADUR, Shaikh late Punjab Civil Service (b. 9th Sept., 1874).—Joined the service as extra asst. commr., 21st Jan., 1900; dep. commr. April, 1926; ret'd., Sept., 1929.

SIRCAR, Sir NRIPENDRA NATH, K.C.S.I., Barr., Bengal Judicial Dept. (member, govr.-genl.'s exec. council).—Apptd. advocate-genl., Bengal, Dec., 1928; Kt., June, 1931; delegate to Indian round table conf., London, 3rd session, Nov.-Dec., 1932; member, govr.-genl.'s exec. council, May, 1934; K.C.S.I., Jan., 1936.

SITAL PRASAD, B.Sc., Inc. tax Dept. (asst. commr.) (b. 7th May, 1892).—Apptd. asst. commr., United Provs., June, 1934.

SITAL SINGH, M.A., Sardar Bahadur, Indian Finance Dept. (b. 10th Mar., 1886).—Joined the service, 21st Nov., 1910, and held non-gazetted appt.; offg. supt., Jan., 1918; reverted to non-gazetted appt. from 2nd Mar., 1918; offg. supt., Jan., 1920; confd., Mar., 1922; asst. sec., Oct., 1922; offg. under secty., Apl., 1929; dep. acct.-genl., central revs., Dec., 1932; ditto, Punjab (works), Apl., 1936.

SITZLER, EDWARD ALBERT—Name changed by Deed Poll to SEATON, q.v.

SITZLER, HENRY FERDINAND, B.A., late Indian C.S. (Burma) (b. 4th March, 1883).—Educ. at Malvern, and Univ. Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1906; arrived, 25th Nov., 1907, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; dep. commr., May, 1918; offg. excise commr., June, 1925; offg. secty. to govt., judl. dept., Dec., 1928; ret'd., June, 1930; ditto Punjab, (Works) April, 1936

SIVARAMA KRISHNAN, RAMANATH, B.A., Indian C.S. (sub-collr., Madras) (b. 19th Oct., 1899).—Educ. at Madras Univ., and Jesus Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 27th Oct., 1924; arrived, 8th Dec., 1924, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; sub-collr. and jt. magte., July, 1927; sub-collr., Jan., 1928.

SIVARAMAN, BALARAM, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Orissa) (b. 10th Jan., 1912).—Educ. at Christian College School, Madras, University of Madras and the School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 11th Oct., 1934; arrived in India, Nov., 1934, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.

SIVA RAMAN, MANAKKAL SUNDARALINGAM IYER, Indian C.S. (sub-collr., Madras) (b. 9th May, 1907).—Educ. at Madras University and London School of Oriental Studies; joined the service, 10th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; sub-collr., Sept., 1932.

SIVASANKAR, TUMKAR, Indian C.S. (sub. collr. and jt. mag., Madras) (b. 14th Oct., 1902).—Educ. at University of Mysore, Victoria Univ., Manchester, and Balliol Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 21st Oct., 1927; arrived, Dec., 1927, and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr.; sub-collr. and jt. magte., July, 1929; offg. dep. commr. of excise, Madras, Apl., 1934.

SIVASANKARA MENON, KUMAR PADMA, B.A., Indian C.S., Indian Political Service (b. 18th Oct., 1898).—Educ. at Madras Univ. and Christ Church Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 1st Nov., 1922; arrived, 13th Dec., 1922, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; under sec. to resdt., Hyderabad, Feb., 1925; under sec. to C.C. and A.G.G. in N.W.F.P., May, 1927; dist. judge, Peshawar, Apl., 1929; agent to the govt. of India in Ceylon, Oct., 1929; dist. and sess. judge, Peshawar, Aug., 1934; offg. addl. dep. secty. to the govt. of India, dept. of educn., health and lands, June, 1935; confd., Oct., 1935; offg. dep. secty., ditto, Sept., 1935; addl. dep. secty. to the govt. of India for and pol. dept., Apl., 1936; ditto, external affairs dept., Apl., 1937; relief commr. for Baluchistan in addn., Apl., 1936; pol. agent, Zhob, Nov., 1937.

SIVASWAMI AIYAR, Sir PAZHAMANHERI SUNDARAM AIYAR, K.C.S.I., C.I.E., B.A., B.L.—Vakil, High Court of Judicature, Madras, 9th Oct., 1907; advocate-gen., Madras, Jan., 1908; C.I.E., Jan., 1908; member of exec. council, Madras, Feb., 1912, to Feb., 1917; C.S.I., June, 1912; K.C.S.I., June, 1915; vice-chancellor of Madras Univ., 1916-18; vice-chancellor of Hindu Univ., Benares, 1918-19; elected member of Indian legisl. assembly, 1920.

SKEMP, FRANK WHITTINGHAM, M.A., Indian C.S. (judge, high ct., Lahore) (b. 13th Dec., 1880).—Educ. at Owens Coll., Manchester; apptd. after exam. of 1903; arrived, 10th Dec., 1904, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; dist. and sess. judge, Nov., 1923; addl. judge, high ct., Lahore, March, 1927; actg. ditto. April, 1927; addl. ditto, from Nov., 1928; confd., Oct., 1933.

SKINNER, ARTHUR FREDERICK, Office of High Commr. for India (higher executive officer, store dept. (b. 28th May, 1887)).—Apptd. 2nd class clerk, 22nd Sept., 1906; on mil. service from Dec., 1916, to Feb., 1919; transfed. to office of high commr. for India, Oct., 1920; exec. officer, April, 1922; actg. higher exec. officer, June, 1929; confd., Nov., 1932.

SKINNER, JAMES MACGREGOR, M.B., Lt.-Col., I.M.S., ret'd. (b. 14th Apl., 1880).—Joined the service, 1st Feb., 1906; surg., 1st Dist., Madras, and supt., Rayapuram medl. school, Feb., 1927; offg. 2nd physician, gen-hosp., Madras, Feb., 1926; confd., June, 1929; ret'd., Apl., 1935.

SKINNER, PHILIP ERNEST FREEMAN, late Indian C.S. (b. 6th Mar., 1904).—Educ. at Charterhouse and King's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 10th Oct., 1927; arrived, 12th Dec., 1927, and served in the Central Provs. as asst. commr.; under secty. to govt., C.P., Oct., 1931; offg. dep. commr., May, 1933; ret'd., Mar., 1936.

SKRINE, CLARMONT PERCIVAL, O.B.E., B.A., Indian C.S., Indian Political Service (b. 28th Feb., 1888).—Educ. at Winchester, New College, Oxford, and University College, London; apptd. after exam. of 1911; arrived, 25th Nov., 1912, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; temp. asst. pol. agent and asst. commr., Sibi, Oct., 1915; H.B.M.'s vice-consul at Kerman, Oct., 1916; H.B.M.'s consul for Kerman and Persian Baluchistan, Dec., 1917; prob., pol. dept., Jan., 1918; under sec. to govt. of India, for. and pol. dept., Jan., 1920; pol. agent, Quetta, April, 1921; H.M.'s consul-general, Kashgar, July, 1922; sec. to agent to govr.-gen., Punjab States, July, 1926; H.B.M.'s Consul for Sistan and Kain, April, 1927; pol. agent and dep. commr., Sibi, Mar., 1929; pol. agent, Kalat, Mar., 1932; and again, Dec., 1934; rev. and judl. commr. in Baluchistan, Aug., 1934; O.B.E., Nov., 1935; offg. resdt., Madras States, Nov., 1936.

SLADE, MEAD, Indian C.S. (collr. of customs), (b. 24th Jan., 1894).—Educ. at Ilminster Sch., and University Coll., London; on mil. service from Sept., 1914, to Oct., 1923; joined the service, 29th Oct., 1923, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; and asst. to commr. of settlmnt. and land records, May, 1925; offg. dep. commr., Feb., 1927; confd., July, 1932; asst. collr., customs, Calcutta, April, 1928; offg. collr., ditto, May, 1930; ditto, Rangoon, Nov., 1932; ditto, Bombay, Feb., 1934; offg. jt. secty. to the govt. of India, dept. of commerce, June, 1936; temp. jt. secty., ditto, Mar., 1937; member, council of state, Mar., 1937.

SLADEN, JOSEPH MAURICE, Indian C.S. (collr. and magte. Bombay) (b. 22nd Feb., 1896).—Educ. at Winchester and New Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 27th Oct., 1920; arrived, 2nd Dec., 1920, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; offg. asst. pte. sec. to govr., May to Nov., 1922; offg. collr. and dist. magte., and pol. agent, March, 1925; asst. commr. in Sind and Sindhi translator to govt., March, 1928; jt. secty., Indian round table conf., London, 2nd Session, Sept.-Dec., 1931; minister, Khairpur state, May, 1932; collr., Mar., 1936.

SLADEN, REGINALD JOHN LAMBERT, F.R.C.S., D.P.H., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 24th July, 1877).—Joined the service as dist. surg., G.I.P. Rly., 2nd May, 1902; offg. principal medl. and health officer, May, 1923, and again, Aug., 1925; services transferred to E.B. Rly., March, 1926; offg. ch. medl. officer, March, 1926; offg. prinpl. medl. and health officer, G.I.P. Rly., March, 1928; confd., July, 1929; retd., Mar., 1934.

SLATER, ALFRED FRANK MURRAY, Lt.-Col., I.A. (retd.), late Indian Police Service (Burma) (b. 26th Sept., 1882).—First commn. dated 4th May, 1901; in mil. employ prior to Aug., 1909; asst. supt., Aug., 1909; dist. supt., Nov., 1911; on mil. service from 20th Dec., 1914, to 15th March, 1916, and from 12th Nov., 1918, to 12th April, 1919; dep. inspr.-gen., Jan., 1924; retd., June, 1931.

SLATER, OWEN, M.C., Lt.-Col. R.E., Survey of India (supt.) (b. 19th June, 1890).—First commn. dated 23rd July, 1910; asst. supt. (proby), 20th Apl., 1920; confd., Oct., 1922; supt., May, 1928.

SLATER, SAMUEL HENRY, C.M.G., C.I.E., late Indian C.S. (b. 12th Jan., 1880).—Educ. at King Edward VII Gr. Sch., Louth, and Oxford Univ.; apptd. after exam. of 1903; arrived, 28th Nov., 1904, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; under-sec. to govt., local and munpl. dept., May, 1910; ditto, pol. dept., May, 1910; under-sec. to govt. of India, dept. of comm. and ind., April, 1913; on special duty to S. Africa under comm. and ind. dep., Dec., 1913, to April, 1914; temp. employed in rev. and stat. dept., India Office, from May to Oct., 1916; sub-collr. and jt. mag., July, 1916; temp. dep. sec., comm. and ind. dept., govt. of India, Nov., 1916; spl. duty, comm. and industry dept., Dec., 1916, to June, 1917; on mil. duty from Feb., 1918, to

March, 1919; finl. sec., Mesopotamian administration, March, 1919, to May, 1922; C.I.E., June, 1919; on foreign service under Iraq civil administration, Sept., 1922, to Feb., 1925; C.M.G., June, 1923; collr. and dist. mag., March, 1925; offg. sec. to govt., pub. wks. dept., May, 1926; commr. of labour, July, 1927; collr. and dist. magte., Apl., 1930; secty. to govt., Madras, dev. dept., Feb., 1932; retd., Sept., 1935.

SLATTERY, JOHN, O.B.E., late Indian Police (b. 26th June, 1886).—Joined the service, 22nd Nov., 1906; asst. supt., Nov., 1907; supt., Sept., 1914; asst. inspr.-gen., rly. police, Jan., 1924; O.B.E., June, 1927; offg. dep. inspr.-gen., Mar., 1928; offer. on spl. duty, central bd. of rev., May, 1929; dep.-inspr.-genl., Punjab (prov. subs), July, 1932; confd., June, 1933; offg. inspr.-genl., N.W.F.P., June, 1933; retd., May, 1937; chairman, pub. serv. commn., Punjab and N.W.F. Prov., May, 1937.

SLESSER, WILLIAM DUNCAN VIVIAN, M.A., Indian Police (supt., Punjab) (b. 28th Oct., 1887).—Joined the service, 18th Dec., 1908; asst. supt., Oct., 1909; on mil. duty from 24th Aug., 1916, to 24th March, 1919; supt., March, 1919.

SLOAN, TENNANT, C.S.I., C.I.E., M.A., Indian C.S. (b. 9th Nov., 1884).—Educ. at Glasgow Academy and Glasgow Univ.; apptd. after exam. of 1908; arrived, 25th Nov., 1909, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag.; under-sec. to govt. Jan., 1915; asst. supt., Dehra Dun. April, 1917; city mag., Lucknow, July, 1917; temp. addl. under-sec. to govt. of India, home dept., Sept., 1917; spl. duty, home dept., Nov., 1917; offg. under-sec. to govt. of India, home dept., May, 1918; on deputn. to England, May to Oct., 1919; dep. sec. to govt., United Provs., March, 1921; offg. dep. sec. to govt. of India, home dept., March, 1924; jt. sec., ditto, April, 1925; secty. to govt., rev. and public wks. dept. (B. and R.), U.P., March, 1929; C.I.E., Jan., 1930; services placed at disposal of Govt. of India, Home dept., May, 1932; jt. secty. to the Govt. of India, home dept., Apl., 1933; offg. secty., ditto, June, 1935; C.S.I., Jan., 1936.

SLOCOMBE, CHARLES, late India Office (b. 16th Sept., 1872).—Clerk, 2nd class, acctnt.-genl.'s dept., 22nd July, 1892; transf. to Indo-European Telegraph Dept., June, 1900; staff clerk, May, 1917; clerk for special duties, March, 1920; re-transferred to acct.-genl.'s dept., Jan., 1932; retd., Sept., 1932.

SLOSS, DUNCAN JOHN, C.B.E., M.A., late Indian Educl. Service (b. 20th June, 1881).—Joined the service, 10th June, 1920; prof., Oct., 1920; principl., University Coll., Rangoon, June, 1925; C.B.E., June, 1925; retd., Dec., 1936.

SMALL, GERALD AGNEW, B.A., Indian Educl. Service (dir. of public instrn., Assam) (b. 31st Aug., 1886).—Joined the service, 21st April, 1911; inspr. of schools, July, 1911; on mil. service from April, 1916, to May, 1920; offg. dir. public instrn., June, 1928; confd., Oct., 1931.

SMART, COLIN N. B., Indian State Railways (exec. engr., G.I.P. rly.) (b. 18th Feb., 1885).—Joined the service, 7th Jan., 1921; resdt. engr., G.I.P. rly., Jan., 1926; statistical officer, Mar., 1932.

SMART, ROBERT BROUGHTON, B.A., Indian Police (asst. supt.) (b. 9th Apl., 1907).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., Burma, 17th Jan., 1930; confd., Jan., 1932.

SMART, WILFRID WILMOT, C.I.E., B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 10th Jan., 1876).—Educ. at Dulwich Sch., and New Coll., Oxford; apptd after exam. of 1899; arrived, 16th Nov., 1900, and served in Bombay as asst. collr. and mag., and forest settlt. offr., settlmt. offr., Baluchistan, Oct., 1905, to April, 1907; collr. and dist. mag., Feb., 1920; actg. commr. in Sind and controller of prices in Sind, Sept., 1920; supt. of stamps, Karachi, Feb., 1921; offg. commr., April, 1928; confd., Jan., 1929; C.I.E., June, 1935; ret'd., Nov., 1935.

SMELLIE, BENJAMIN ALEXANDER, B.A., LL.B., Central Provs. C.S. (dep. commr.) (b. 26th Mar., 1890).—Joined the service as extra asst. commr. on probn., 18th May, 1914; confd., July, 1915; ditto and under-secty. to Govt., May, 1928; offg. dep. commr., Mar., 1930; confd., Feb., 1933.

SMELLIE, JOHN HUGH, D.S.O., O.B.E., late Indian State Railways (N.W. Rly.) (b. 15th Feb., 1874).—Joined the service, 27th Sept., 1907, as dist. loco. supt., after having previously served on the Kalka Simla Railway; on mil. duty with Indian expedy. force 'B' from Oct. to Dec., 1914, and from Nov., 1915, to Sept., 1918; loco. supt. (offg.), Nov., 1919; O.B.E., Dec., 1919; chief mechanical engr., Sept., 1925; ret'd., Feb., 1929.

SMITH, ARCHIBALD CLIFFORD, Indian Police (princl., p.t. school, Burma) (b. 9th Oct., 1894).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., 7th Feb., 1921; dist. supt., June, 1924; awarded King's police medal, 1937; princpl., p.t. school, Dec., 1936.

SMITH, BERTRAM GILBERT, O.B.E., Indian State Rlys. (divl. supt., E.I. Rly.) (b. 4th April, 1883).—Joined the service as asst. traffic supt., 18th May, 1908; dist. traffic supt., Sept., 1917; on mil. service from 28th Feb., 1916, to 9th Oct., 1919; O.B.E., 3rd June, 1918; officer on sp. duty, Rly. Board, July, 1925; temp. dep. agent, E.I. Rly., Feb., 1926; offg. divl. supt., March, 1928; confd., Apl., 1929.

SMITH, CECIL CURTIS HAROLD, Major, I.A. Indian Political Service (b. 22nd Aug., 1898).—First commn. dated 26th Nov., 1915; in milty. employ up to 5th April, 1925; asst. pol. agent, Chilas, July, 1926; asst. commr., Thal, Sept., 1930; asst. commr., Thal sub-divn., Apl., 1931; dep. commr., Kohat, Nov., 1932; pol. agent, Kurram, June, 1935.

SMITH, CHARLES HAROLD, O.B.E., M.D., Lt.-Col., I.M.S. (b. 19th June, 1883).—First commn., 31st July, 1909; O.B.E., June, 1919; offg. agency surg. on deputation to Rewa State as supt. medl. dept., from 18th Apl., 1922; agency surg., Bundelkhand, Jan., 1928; legation surg., Nepal, Apl., 1929.

SMITH, DANIEL RICHARD, Major, I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 18th Jan., 1897).—First commn. dated 4th June, 1915; in milty. employ prior to May, 1923; asst. pol. agent, Bahrein, June, 1924; vice-consul, Duzdap, Nov., 1924; asst. for Mekran to pol. agent in Kalat, Feb., 1927; pol. agent, Chagai, May, 1929; British trade agent at Gyantse and asst. to pol. offr. in Sikkim, Sept., 1929; under-secy. to agent to govr.-genl., Rajputana, March, 1930; officer on special duty, Mirpir, June, 1932; pte. secty. to Maharajah of Rewa, Oct., 1932; pol. agent, Harasti and Tonk, Oct., 1933; asst. to resdt., Kashmir, Mar., 1934; pol. agent, Sabar Kantha Agency, Oct., 1937.

SMITH, EDWIN CHARLES ALLAN, L.R.F.P.S., L.R.C.P. & S., D.P.H., Lt.-Col., I.M.S. (civil surg., Bombay) (b. 16th Nov., 1887).—First commn., 1st July, 1921; offg. asst. dir. of public health, Rangoon, Aug., 1926; offg. supt., central mental hosp., Yeravda, Nov., 1928; confd., Aug., 1929.

SMITH, EDWIN DENSHAM, Indian Police (supt., United Provs.) (b. 3rd Feb., 1886).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 25th Nov., 1906; supt., June, 1920; offg. asst. inspr.-genl., rly. police, June, 1931.

SMITH, EGERTON, M.A., late Indian Educl. Service (b. 7th Feb., 1886).—Joined the service, 25th Jan., 1910; prof., Dacca Coll., Jan., 1910; prin., Krishnagar Coll. Oct., 1923; ret'd., July, 1930.

SMITH, ERIC CONRAN, C.I.E., Indian C.S. (collr., Madras) (b. 3rd Dec., 1890).—Educ. at Dulwich Coll., and Corpus Christi, Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1914; arrived in India, 1st Nov., 1915, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; temply. empd. in judl. and public dept., India Office, from April, to June, 1919; pte. sec. to govr. of Madras, April, 1921; C.I.E., June, 1924; on foreign service as commr. for Corpn. of Madras, Oct., 1928; secty., local self-govt. dept., Madras, Oct., 1931; collr. (prov. subs.), Feb., 1933; addl. jt. secty. to govt. of India in the reforms office, Oct., 1934; collr., Dec., 1934; offg. pte. secty. to Viceroy, June, 1935; member, council of state, Apl., to May, 1936; jt. secty., govt. of India, reforms office, Mar., 1937.

SMITH, FRANCIS HERBERT, M.A., Indian Eccles. Estabt. (United Provs.) (b. 31st July, 1876).—Apptd. chaplain on probation, 25th March, 1910; junr. chaplain, March, 1913, senr. chaplain, March, 1923; ret'd., June, 1930.

SMITH, FRANCIS WILLIAM HEAD, C.I.E., India Office (sec., services and general dept.) (b. 18th Aug., 1886).—Educ. at Tonbridge, and Christ Church, Oxford; apptd. junior clerk, India Office, 2nd Nov., 1909, and attached to fin. dept.; resdt. clerk, Dec., 1911, to Dec., 1912; asst. sec. to Rl. Commn. on Indian fin. and currency, May, 1913, to Feb., 1914; reading clerk to council, July, 1913, to April, 1914; transf. to public works dept., April, 1914; senr. clerk, May, 1917; services temporarily lent to military dept., Dec., 1914; actg. asst. sec., public works dept., Jan., 1920; confd., March, 1921; actg. joint sec., military dept., May, 1923; dep. clerk of the Council, April, 1924; sec. to Rl. Commn. on Agric. in India, 1926-28; actg. secty., services and general dept., 1st Dec., 1928; confd., June, 1929; C.I.E., March, 1929.

SMITH, FRANK LOVELL, Indian C.S. (jt. mag., United Provs.) (b. 15th Sept., 1904).—Educ. at Perse School, Cambridge, and Peterhouse Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 18th Oct., 1927; arrived, Dec., 1927, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; dep. supt. of census opcrns., U.P., Mar., 1931; offg. addl. dist. and sess. judge, Sept., 1935.

SMITH, FREDERICK WILLIAM JAMES, Office of High Commr. for India (executive officer, store dept.) (b. 25th Dec., 1893).—Apptd. 2nd class clerk, India Store Depot, 6th Aug., 1914; on mil. service from Jan., 1916, to Feb., 1919; transf. to office of high commr. for India, Oct., 1920; exec. officer, April, 1922.

SMITH, G. CORLEY, M.B.E., Commerce Dept., Govt. of India (asst. secty.) (b. 12th June, 1895).—Joined the service, 1st Apl., 1913; supt., commerce dept., Nov., 1928; offg. asst. secty., commerce dept., Sept., 1930; confd., June, 1932; offg. admin. officer, central p.w. d., Apl., 1933; and again, Apl., 1935.

SMITH, GEOFFREY WILLIAM JOHN, Indian Police (asst. supt.) (b. 30th March, 1913).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., Assam, Nov., 1932; confd. Nov., 1934.

SMITH, Ven. GEORGE CECIL AUGUSTUS, M.A., late Indian Eccl. Estab. (b. 15th Dec., 1876).—Joined the service as chaplain, 26th Dec., 1905; senr. chaplain, 26th Dec., 1918; archdeacon, Feb., 1928; retd., July, 1931.

SMITH, GEORGE McIVER CAMPBELL, C.M.G., M.B., Lt.-Col., I.M.S. (ret'd.) (b. 13th May, 1869). First commn. dated 27th July, 1892; apptd med. adviser, Patiala State, June, 1903; offg. civil surg., Punjab, Feb., 1904; confd., June, 1909; temp. reverted to mil. duty, Jan., 1916; C.M.G., June, 1919; retd., Sept., 1921; addl. member, medl. bd., India Office, Dec., 1928; member, ditto, Jan., 1931 to May, 1934.

SMITH, HARRY PERCIVAL, B.A., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Assam) (b. 26th May, 1893).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 22nd March, 1921; dep. consvr., Dec., 1923; on deputation to Andamans from Jan., 1926, to May, 1929.

SMITH, Sir HENRY MONCRIEFF, Kt., C.I.E., B.A. (Cantab.), late Indian C.S. (b. 23rd Dec., 1873).—Educ. at Sidney Sussex Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1896; arrived, 3rd Dec., 1897, and served in the N.W. Provs. as asst. commr. and asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag., April, 1907; addl. sess. judge, July, 1908; sess. and sub-judge, June, 1913; offg. sec. to govt., April, 1914; attaché, legislative dept., govt. of India, from Sept., 1915; dep. sec. to govt. of India, legislative dept., Oct., 1915; dist. and sess. judge, and ditto, Jan., 1916; C.I.E., Jan., 1920; joint sec. to govt. of India, legis. dept., Jan., 1920; sec. to ditto, Jan., 1921; Kt., Jan., 1923; president, council of state, Dec., 1924, to Dec., 1932; retd., Dec., 1932.

SMITH, Sir HENRY SCOTT, Kt., Indian C.S. (ret'd.).—Educ. at Trinity Coll., Stratford-on-Avon, and Keble Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1884; arrived, 4th Dec., 1886, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; dist. judge, June, 1894; divl. judge, March, 1902; dist. and sess. judge, Nov., 1913; temp. addl. judge, chief et., Punjab, Jan., 1914; judge, do.,

April, 1915; judge, high ct., Punjab, April, 1919; Kt., June, 1924; actg. chief justice, high ct., Punjab, June, 1924; retd., May, 1925.

SMITH, HENRY WRAY SANDES, B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (suptg. engr., Burma) (b. 13th Apl., 1884).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1906; exec. engr., Oct., 1914; offg. suptg. engr., Sept., 1926; confd., July, 1929.

SMITH, HERBERT CECIL, B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Burma) (b. 27th Jan., 1893).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 21st Dec., 1915; dep. consvr., Jan., 1922; offg. consvr., Feb., 1936.

SMITH, HERBERT ST. CLAIR, M.B.E., late Bombay C.S. (b. 9th June, 1880).—Held non-gazetted appts. from 5th Sept., 1898, to 22nd Aug., 1908; dep. collr., Aug., 1908; offg. dep. sec. to govt., dev. dept., etc., Jan., 1922; offg. dep. sec. to govt., dev. dept., May, 1925; retd., June, 1935; M.B.E., Jan., 1936.

SMITH, IAN WILLIAM KNIGHTON. B.A., B.E., Indian State Rlys. (ch. engr., E.I. Rly.) (b. 13th Oct., 1882).—Joined the service as junr. engr., 4th Sept., 1909; asst. engr., Jan., 1919; resdt. engr., Dec., 1923; offg. supt., way and works, May, 1925; offg. dep. ch. engr., March, 1927; dep. ch. engr. (provl.), July, 1929; confd., Nov., 1931; offg. ch. engr., June, 1935; confd., August, 1935.

SMITH, Sir JAMES COWLISHAW, Kt., C.I.E., B.A., LL.B., late Indian C.S. (United Provs.) (b. 14th April, 1873).—Educ. at Derby, and Calus Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1895; arrived, 7th Dec., 1896; and served in the N.W.P. and Oudh as asst. commr., asst. mag. and collr., and asst. settmt. officer; joint mag., Nov., 1905; dep. commr., Dec., 1913; mag. and collr., Nov., 1914; C.I.E., June, 1921; offg. commr., June, 1922; confd., Dec., 1924; offg. member, bd. of rev., Dec., 1928; confd. July, 1930; temp. member, govr's exec. council, United Provs., Oct., 1930, and again, July, 1931; retd., Dec., 1931; Kt., Jan., 1932.

SMITH, JOHN EDWARD, Indian Police (b. 14th Oct., 1907).—Joined the service as asst. supt., United Provs., 14th Dec., 1927; offg. supt., May, 1934.

SMITH, Sir JOSEPH BENJAMIN GEORGE, Kt., C.I.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 14th Feb., 1878).—Joined the service, 18th Aug., 1898; asst. engr. (provl. service), Aug., 1899; exec. engr., July, 1910; suptg. engr., Nov., 1920; chief engr. and sec. to govt., P.W.D., irrigation branch, March, 1926; C.I.E., June, 1927; Kt., June, 1932; retd., Feb., 1933.

SMITH, LESLIE EVAN, late Indian Forest Service (b. 28th July, 1898).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 27th Dec., 1924; dep. consvr., Dec., 1929; retd., Feb., 1936.

SMITH, NORMAN PERCIVAL ARTHUR, Indian Police (supt., Bombay) (b. 30th Nov., 1892).—Joined the service, Nov., 1912; supt. of police, June, 1924; offg. dep. dir., intel. bureau, June, 1933; offg. dep. inspr.-genl., Nov., 1935; cent. intell. offcr., Bombay Presdy., Mar., 1936.

SMITH, RALPH JEANRENAUD, Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Bombay) (b. 7th Sept., 1895).—Joined the service, 4th Dec., 1923, as asst. consvr.; dep. consvr., Nov., 1924.

SMITH, RICHARD HUGH, B.Sc., late Indian Service of Engrs. (Madras) (b. 22nd July, 1886).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1909; exec. engr., Oct., 1917; ret'd., Jan., 1931.

SMITH, Rev. RICHARD MARMADUKE LANGDALE, B.A., Indian Eccles. Estab. (senr. chaplain, Madras) (b. 29th Oct., 1884).—Joined the service, 1st April, 1915; junr. chaplain, April, 1918; senr. chaplain, April, 1928.

SMITH, ROBERT GEORGE, Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 28th July, 1907).—Apptd. asst. exec. engr., United Provs., 8th Feb., 1931; confd., Feb., 1933.

SMITH, SAMUEL McLEOD, late Bihar and Orissa Civil Service (b. 16th Jan., 1879).—Joined the service, 5th Feb., 1903; dep. mag. and coll., Apl., 1907; diwan, Gangpur State, Apl., 1921; ditto, Mayurbhanj State, Jan., 1922; offg. dep. commr., Nov., 1929; magte. and collr., Mar., 1931; ret'd. Jan., 1934.

SMITH, THOMAS WILLIAM, late Office of High Commr. for India.—Apptd. 2nd class clerk, India store depot, 23rd May, 1888 supervisor, June, 1914; transf'd. to office of high commr. for India, Oct., 1920; higher exec. officer, April, 1922; prinpl. exec. officer, March, 1926; ret'd., Apl., 1929.

SMITH, VICTOR WILLIAM, O.B.E., late Indian Police (b. 6th Aug., 1891).—Joined the service, Nov., 1911; asst. supt., May, 1913; O.B.E., Jan., 1921; supt., Nov., 1923; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1924; on spl. duty, Home Dept., from Nov., 1925; pers. asst. to genl., inspr.-Punjab, Nov., 1926; ret'd. Aug., 1933.

SMITH, WALTER ROBERT GEORGE, C.I.E., Indian Police (commr. of police, Bombay) (b. 5th Nov., 1887).—Joined the service, 11th Dec., 1908, as asst. supt.; supt. of police, Mar., 1921; dep. commr. of police, Bombay, Feb., 1932; offg. dep. inspr.-genl., Mar., 1932; offg. commr. of police, Bombay, July, 1933; confd., Apl., 1935; awarded King's Police medal, Jan., 1933; C.I.E., May, 1937.

SMITH, WELBORN OWSTON, M.A., F.R.H.S., late Indian Educl. Service.—Joined the service as prof., Patna, 23rd Sept., 1914; prinpl., G.B.B. Coll., Muzaffarpur, Oct., 1916; prinpl., Holkar Coll., Indore, Dec., 1917; offg. prinpl., Ravenshaw Coll., Cuttack, Nov., 1923; prof. of history, ditto, Jan., 1925; ret'd., Oct., 1928.

SMITH, WILFRED ARTHUR, O.B.E., India Posts and Tels. (dep. P.M.G., Madras) (b. 30th Dec., 1882).—Joined the service as proby. supt., 11th May, 1905; confd., Jan. 1907; on field postal service on N.W. frontier, May, 1919, to Aug., 1920; offg. dep. P.M.G., July, 1928; confd., Feb., 1929; dep. P.M.G., Madras, Apl., 1933.

SMITH, WILLIAM ERLAM, M.A. (Oxon), Indian Educl. Service (prof. of chemistry, presdy. coll., Madras) (b. 16th July, 1881).—Apptd. acting prof. of natural sciences, Rangoon Coll., 3rd Sept., 1906; prof. of chemistry, presdy. coll., Madras, Oct., 1907; on mil. service, from Sept., 1915, to March, 1920; offg. dir. of public instrn., Madras, Jan., 1930, and again, Nov., 1932.

SMITH, WILLIAM FREDERICK, A.M.I.C.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 5th Aug., 1880).—Joined the service as temp. engr., 19th Jan., 1903; asst. engr., Jan., 1923; apptd. to the I.S.E. as asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1927; exec. engr., Jan., 1932; ret'd., May, 1934.

SMITH, WILLIAM ROSE, B.Sc., Indian State Railways (exec. engr., G.I.P. rly.) (b. 19th May, 1886).—Joined the service, 17th Sept., 1909; resdt. engr., G.I.P. rly., Mar., 1923; exec. engr., May, 1932.

SMITH-PEARSE, THOMAS LAWRENCE HOWARTH, B.A., Indian Educl. Service (principal, Rajkumar Coll., Raipur) (b. 15th July, 1893).—Educ. at Marlborough and St. John's Coll., Oxford; vice-principal, Rajkumar Coll., Raipur, Feb., 1921; prinpl., ditto, July, 1931.

SMITHERMAN, FRANK, Indian Police (assst. supt., Burma) (b. 13th Oct., 1913).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt. of police, Burma, Nov., 1933; confd., Nov., 1935.

SMYTH, ARCHIBALD ADAMS, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr.) (b. 12th June, 1902).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Madras, Sept., 1925; offg. exec. engr., Aug., 1931; confd., Sept., 1934; awarded K.-i.-H. medal, cl. II, Jan., 1936.

SMYTH, DAVID ALEXANDER, C.B.E., Indian Police (dep. inspr.-genl., Central Provs.) (b. 24th Nov., 1886).—Joined the service, Dec., 1907; asst. dist. supt., Dec., 1909; dist. supt., Feb., 1917; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1925; offg. dep. inspr.-gen., June, 1926; confd., June, 1928; offg. inspr.-genl., Apl., 1933; and May, 1935; C.B.E., June, 1935.

SMYTH, JOHN WILLIAM, C.S.I., C.I.E., M.A. Indian C.S. (commr., Poona) (b. 13th May, 1880).—Educ. at Hymer's Coll. Hull, and Clare Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1903; arrived, 25th Nov., 1904 and served in Sind as asst. collr. and mag.; dep. commr., Upper Sind frontier, July, 1911; asst. commr. Sind, and Sindhi translator to govt., Sept., 1912; dep. commr., Upper Sind Frontier, July, 1916; offg. collr. and district mag., Oct., 1921; ditto and pol. agent, Feb., 1922; collr. and dist. mag., March, 1926; sec. to govt., rev. dept., Oct., 1926; member, legisl. council, 1927; C.I.E., Jan., 1932; ch. commr., Andaman & Nicobar Islands, Dec., 1931; commr., Poona, June, 1936; C.S.I.; May, 1937.

SMYTH, Sir SAMUEL ANDREW, K.C.I.E., C.S.I., B.A., late Indian C.S. (Burma) (b. 18th March, 1877).—Educ. at London-derry Sch., and Queen's Coll., Belfast; apptd. after exam. of 1900; arrived, 10th Dec., 1901, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; under-sec. to govt., Nov., 1905, to Nov., 1908; dep. commr., Feb., 1915; on spl. duty in sectt.; offg. sec. to govt., Sept., 1917; offg. chief sec. to govt., Nov. to Dec., 1917; offg. commr., May, 1919; C.S.I., Jan., 1924; commr. (s.p.t.), Aug., 1923; confd., May, 1924; offg. finl. commr., March, 1925; confd., April, 1926; member, exec. council, Burma, May, 1928; K.C.I.E., Jan., 1931; ret'd., March, 1931; delegate to Burma round table conf., London, Dec., 1931.

SMYTH, SAMUEL, Major, I.M.S. (b. 10th June, 1899).—Date of first commn., 4th Aug., 1927; apptd. civil surgeon (offg.), Aprl., 1934; O.S.D., Mayo Hosp., Lahore, Mar., 1937

SMYTH, WILLIAM JOHN, B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 2nd May, 1869).—Educ. at Bath Coll., and Balliol Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1892; arrived, 1st Jan., 1894, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; dep. commr., March, 1906; ret'd., Jan., 1929.

SMYTHIES, EVELYN ARTHUR, B.A., Indian Forest Service (consvr., United Provs.) (b. 19th Mar., 1885).—Joined the service, 11th Dec., 1908, as asst. consr.; dep. consr., Jan., 1914; offg. consr., Aprl., 1926; confd., Aprl., 1929.

SNADDEN, WILLIAM GEORGE, late Indian Police (b. 23rd Aprl., 1889).—Apptd. dist. supt., Burma, 1st Dec., 1925; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1932; ret'd., June, 1936.

SNELL, OF PLUMSTEAD, Baron, HENRY SNELL, C.B.E. Parly. under-secty. of State for India, Mar.-Aug., 1931; delegate to Indian round table conf., 2nd Session, Sept.-Dec., 1931.

SNELSON, EDWARD ALEC ABBOTT, Indian C.S. (asst. commr. Central Provinces) (b. 31st Oct., 1904).—Educ. at St. Olave's Grammar School, Caius Coll., Cambridge, and School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 9th Oct., 1929; arrived, 9th Nov., 1929, and served in the Central Provinces as asst. commr.; sub-judge, Dec., 1931.

SNOW, CHARLES ALFRED, M.A. (Oxon). late Indian Educational Service (Burma) (b. 31st July, 1879).—Arrived in India, 1st Feb., 1905; on mil. service, Aprl., 1915, to May, 1919; asst. dir. of public instruction, May, 1921; dir. of public instrn., Aug., 1923; ret'd., July, 1931.

SOAMES, GEOFFREY EWART, C.I.E., B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 11th Jan., 1881).—Educ. at Eastbourne Coll., and Merton Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1904; arrived, 2nd Dec., 1905, and served in E. Bengal and Assam as asst. mag. and collr.; under-sec. to govt., fin. and munpl. dept., Nov., 1909; under-sec. to govt. of India, home dept., May to Nov., 1911; under-sec. to chief commr., Assam, Aprl., 1912; asst. commr., Assam, Aug., 1915; dep. commr., Jan., 1921; second sec. to govt. of Assam, Aprl., 1923; offg. chief sec. to govt. of Assam, Feb., 1925; confd., Oct., 1925; C.I.E., June, 1927; ch. secty. to govt. of Assam, Oct., 1931; ret'd., June, 1933.

SOARES, ALEXANDER DUARANTE, M.B., B.S., M.R.C.S., L.R.C.P., Indian State Ryls. (dist. medl. officer, G.I.P. rly.) (b. 25th Jan., 1895).—Joined the service, 8th June, 1923; dist. medl. officer, G.I.P. rly., Aprl., 1929.

SOBHAN, KONDKAR FAZLE (see Khondkar Fazle Sobhan).

SODHI, HARBHAJAN SINGH, B.A., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Central Provs.) (b. 24th May, 1899).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 9th Nov., 1923; dep. consvr., Nov., 1927.

SODHI, NARENDRA SINGH, M.C., L.R.C.P., D.T.M., Col., I.M.S. (inspr.-genl. of civil hosp., Burma) (b. 9th Aug., 1882).—First commn., 1st Sept., 1905; in mil. employ till June, 1910, when he was apptd. asst. plague med. offr.,

Punjab; dist. plague med. offr., July, 1910; plague med. offr., June, 1911; on mil. duty, Sept., 1914, to July, 1918; civil surgeon, Punjab, 1921; dep. inspr. of civil hosp., Nov., 1925; offg. inspr.-genl., Punjab, Nov., 1933; ditto, Burma, Aprl., 1935; confd., Aug., 1935.

SOE, MAUNG AUNG, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Burma) (b. 27th Mar., 1906).—Educ. at Rangoon Univ. and Wadham Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 12th Oct., 1931; arrived in India, Nov., 1931, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; under secty., fin. dept., Burma, Aprl., 1936.

SOHONI, VISHRANATH VISHNU, B.A., M.Sc. (Bombay), Meteorological Dept. (meteorologist) (b. 6th Sept., 1898).—Joined the service as meteorologist, 12th Mar., 1922.

SOKHEY, SAHIBSINGH, M.A., B.Sc., M.D. (Edin.), D.T.M. & H. (Eng.), Lt.-Col., I.M.S. (b. 15th Dec., 1887).—Joined, 26th July, 1913; in milty. employ to 7th Aug., 1925; apptd. supernumerary offr., Haflkine Inst., Bombay, Aug., 1925; offg. asst. dir., ditto, Feb., 1926; offg. dir., ditto, March, 1928; and again, Oct., 1932.

SOLOMAN, SAMUEL, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bihar) (b. 20th Sept., 1904).—Educ. at Clifton College, and King's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 17th Oct., 1927; arrived, Nov., 1927, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. dist. and sess. judge, May, 1933; offg. publicity officer, Bihar and Orissa, Mar., 1935.

SOLOMON, WILLIAM EWART GLADSTONE, late Indian Educl. Service (b. 24th Mar., 1880).—Apptd. princpl. and decorative artist and archtl. sculptor, Sir J. J. School of Art and Industries, Bombay, 25th Nov., 1919; designation changed to dir., ditto, Aprl., 1929; 1st class K-i-H. medal, Jan., 1924; ret'd., Mar., 1937.

SOM NATH, KAPUR LALA, Indian Service of Engrs. (asst. exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 10th Oct., 1908).—Joined the service as apprentice engr., 17th July, 1931; apptd. to I.S.E. as asst. exec. engr., July, 1932.

SONAM WANGFEL LADEN LA, Sardar Bahadur (see I. I. L. S. W.).

SONDHI, GURU DATT, B.A. (Cantab), M.A. (Pb.), Barr., Indian Educl. Service (b. 10th Dec., 1890).—Apptd. prof. of economics, govt. coll., Lahore, 17th Sept., 1917.

SONDHI, RAM LALL (see Ram Lall, S.).

SONDHI, SUNDAR DAS, M.C., M.B., Lt.-Col., I.M.S., Jail Dept., Punjab (supt.) (b. 25th Aprl., 1890).—First commn. dated 9th Nov., 1917; in milty. employ prior to 25th March, 1927; supt., Aprl., 1927.

SOOD, MANOHAR LAL (see Manohar Lal Sood).

SOOFI, MAHMOOD ALI, M.Sc., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Punjab) (b. 20th Mar., 1901).—Educ. at Punjab Univ., and Christ Church, Oxford; joined the service, 31st Oct., 1925; arrived, 7th Dec., 1925, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr., a'dd. dist. and sess. judge, Oct., 1930; offg. dist. and sess. judge, variously from May, 1932; confd., Nov., 1936.

SORBY, WILLIAM JOHN WOODCRAFT, Indian State Ryls. (divl. mech. engr., N.W. Rly.) (b. 3rd Aprl., 1893).—Asst. loco. supt., junr. scale, 2nd Oct., 1920; divl. mech. engr., senr. scale, Oct., 1936.

SORLEY, HERBERT TOWER, M.A., Indian C.S. (secty. to govt., genl. and educn. depts., Bombay) (b. 12th April, 1892).—Educ. at Grammar School, Aberdeen, Aberdeen University, Christ's College, Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1914; arrived, 9th Dec., 1915, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; offg. dep. commr. of salt and excise, June, 1923; criminal tribes settlt. officer, Bombay Presy. (offg.), March, 1925; offg. collr. and dist. mag., May, 1926; offg. dep. commr., March, 1927; offg. collr. of salt rev., Bombay, Feb., 1929; offg. prov. supt. of census, Bombay presdy.; collr., Apl., 1933; secty. to govt., genl. and educn. depts., Bombay, Mar., 1936.

SOTHERS, DONALD BEVAN, B.A., Indian Forest Service (consvr., Bombay) (b. 11th Mar., 1889).—Joined the service, 25th Nov., 1912, as asst. consvr.; on duty as asst. censor from 2nd Dec., 1914, to 11th Jan., 1919; I.A.R.O., from 23rd April, 1915; asst. contr., famine fodder, Jan. to April, 1919; dep. consvr., April, 1919; offg. consvr., May, 1928; and again, March, 1932; confd., Aug., 1933; offg. ch. consvr., Bombay, June, 1935.

SOUSA, AUGUSTUS, F.R.C.S., F.S.Sc. D.P.H., late Public Health dept., United Provs. (b. 3rd Oct., 1875).—Joined the service, 1st March, 1914; dep. santy. commr., Lucknow, Feb., 1917; dir. of epidemiology, Oct., 1921; asst. dir. of public health, Aug., 1922; Kaisar-i-Hind Medal, 1st Class, Jan., 1924; ret'd., Apl., 1931.

SOUTER, SIR CHARLES ALEXANDER, K.C.I.E., C.S.I., late Indian C.S. (b. 13th June, 1877).—Educ. at Arbroath High Sch., Edinburgh Univ., and Caius Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1900; arrived, 25th Dec., 1901, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; asst. sec. to govt., May, 1906; under-sec., rev. dept., March, 1909; sub-collr. and jt. mag., May, 1910; offg. commr., Coorg, June to Dec., 1916; commr. of Coorg, Dec., 1918, to Dec., 1923; collr. and dist. mag., Jan., 1924; offg. secty. to govt., public wks. dept., March, 1928; 3rd member, bd. of rev. (prov. perm.), Mar., 1930; offg. 2nd ditto, May, 1930; confd., Aug., 1933; C.S.I., Jan., 1933; 1st member, bd. of rev. (prov. subs.), Oct., 1933; member govr.'s exec. council, Madras, Jan., 1935; K.C.I.E., Jan., 1936; ret'd., Apl., 1937.

SOUTHERN, REV. GERALD HOLTE BRACE-BRIDGE, M.A., Indian Eccles. Estabt. (United Provs.) (senr. chaplain) (b. 1st Nov., 1889); apptd. chaplain on probation, 11th May, 1922; junr. chaplain, May, 1924; senr. chaplain, Jan., 1932.

SOUTHORN, ANDREW HERBERT, Indian C.S. (sub-collr., Madras) (b. 2nd Feb., 1909).—Educated at St. Edwards School, Oxford, and Hertford College, Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1931; arrived in India, Nov., 1932, and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr; sub-collr., Sept., 1934.

SPACKMAN, WILLIAM COLLIS, M.B., Lt.-Col., I.M.S. (civil surg., Bombay) (b. 23rd Sept., 1889).—First commn. 26th July, 1913; offg. civil surg., March, 1924; confd., Dec., 1927; offg. prof., G.M. Coll., and supt., Bai Motlibai and Sir D. M. Petit hospitals, Bombay, July, 1927, Mar., 1930, and again, Nov., 1932.

SPALDING, HERBERT HENRY, V.D., late Indian State Railways (Eastern Bengal) (b. 6th Jan., 1874).—Joined the service, 20th Sept., 1897, as asst. loco. supt.; dist. traffic supt., April, 1907; dep. loco. and carr. supt., Jan., 1914; loco. and carr. supt., May, 1922; ret'd., Jan., 1929.

SPARGO, FREDERICK WILSON, B.A., B.Sc., Barr., Indian C.S. (dist. and sessions judge, Burma) (b. 30th Oct., 1888).—Educ. at William Ellis Sch., Gospel Oak, London, London Univ., and St. John's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1911; arrived, 10th Dec., 1912, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; on mil. service, Nov., 1917, to Oct., 1919; offg. dist. and sessions judge, March, 1923; confd., Dec., 1923; offg. judge, high ct. Rangoon, Mar., 1936; and again, Nov., 1936.

SPARKE, HARRY CHARLES, late Indian State Railways (b. 6th Sept., 1877).—Joined the service, 8th Jan., 1897; asst. traffic supt., Jan., 1899; dist. supt., April, 1907; on special duty with the rly. board, Aug., 1914, to Jan., 1915; offg. dep. agent, N.W. rly., April, 1916; on milty. duty with I.A.R.O. from Feb., 1917, to March, 1918 (temp. lt.-col., Feb., 1917); dep. traffic manager, N.W. Rly., Aug., 1917; temp. junr. dep. agent, ditto, April, 1918; offg. traffic manager, E. Ben. Ry., March, 1919; confd., Nov., 1924; offg. dir. traffic, rly. board, April, 1926; member, rly. rates advisory comee., May, 1928; ret'd., Feb., 1933.

SPARKE, WALTER, V.D., late Indian State Ryis. (b. 29th Aug., 1878).—Joined the service as apprentice engr., 14th Sept., 1899; asst. engr., Jan., 1901; dist. engr., May, 1911; ret'd., Nov., 1934.

SPEECHLY, ALBERT GEORGE, late Indian Posts and Tels. (b. 10th Jan., 1881).—Held non-gazetted posts from 1st Feb., 1898; on depn. with E. Persian Cordon F.F., Sept., 1918, to May, 1920; ch. supt., Calcutta tel. office, Oct., 1932; ret'd., Jan., 1936.

SPEECHLEY, EDWARD, A.M.I.C.E., late Indian State Ryis. (b. 26th July, 1880).—Joined the service as junr. engr., 16th April, 1910; asst. engr., Jan., 1919; resdt. engr., Feb., 1920; exec. engr., March, 1926; ret'd., Apl., 1936.

SPENCE, GEORGE HEMMING, C.S.I., C.I.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (sec. govt. of India, legisl. dept.) (b. 6th Nov., 1888).—Educ. at Marlborough and Trinity Coll., Oxford, apptd. after exam. of 1911; arrived, 23rd Nov., 1912, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; asst. settlt. offr., Oct., 1917; addl. dist. mag., Delhi, Jan. to Nov., 1918; temp. under-sec. to govt., May, 1919; spl. duty under for. and pol. dept., govt. of India, from June, 1919; under-sec. to govt. of India, reforms office, Dec., 1919; addl. dep. sec. to govt. of India, legislative dept., Dec., 1920; offg. dep. sec., ditto, April, 1923; confd., Nov., 1925; C.I.E., Jan., 1931; secty., council of state, Nov., 1933; and Jan., 1935; offg. secty. to the govt. of India, legisl. dept., June, 1934; and again, Nov., 1935; confd., Apl., 1936; secty. to the Govr.-genl.'s exec. council, in addn., Aug., 1936; C.S.I., Feb., 1937.

SPENCER, ARDESHER BARJORJI, late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 17th Nov., 1879).—Joined the service, 30th April, 1903; asst. engr., April, 1904; exec. engr., Oct., 1913; offg. suptg. engr., Aug., 1926, and July, 1927; suptg. engr. (provl. perm.), Dec., 1931; confd., Nov., 1932; retd., Nov., 1934.

SPENCER, JOHN EDWARD, late Indian Police (b. 5th Feb., 1892).—Joined the service as prob. asst. supt., 4th Dec., 1911; confd., May, 1914; supt., Sept., 1923; offg. asst. to inspr.-genl., March, 1927; confd., Nov., 1927; retd., Aug., 1934.

SPILLER, THOMAS REUBEN, M.A., Indian Educl. Service (inspr. of sch., Bihar and Orissa), (b. 9th Dec., 1889).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1920; prinpl., New Coll., Patna, Oct., 1923; headmaster, Zila Sch., June, 1927; offg. prinpl., Patna training coll., May, 1933; inspr. of sch., Bihar and Orissa, Apl., 1933; offg. headmaster Ranchi Zila Sch., Oct., 1933.

SPILSBURY, LIONEL BRUCE, late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 2nd Sept., 1881).—Trained at the R.I.E. Coll.; joined the service, 1st Oct., 1902, as asst. engr., United Provs.; exec. engr., Oct., 1910; offg. suptg. engr., Nov., 1921; confd., Aug., 1923; retd., July, 1933.

SPITTELER, ARTHUR ERNEST, Indian Police (b. 29th Oct., 1913).—Apptd. asst. supt., Madras, on probn., 24th Jan., 1936.

SPOONER, Rev. HAROLD F., M.B.E., M.C., late Indian Eccles. Estabt. (Punjab).—Apptd. chaplain on probation, 8th April, 1911; juni. chaplain, April, 1914; on mil. duty from 15th July, 1915, to 30th Sept., 1918; M.B.E., June, 1919; senr. chaplain, April, 1924; retd., Nov., 1928.

SPRATT, NOEL NEWTON, India Office (higher clerical officer, mil. dept.) (b. 23rd Dec., 1891).—Apptd. 2nd class clerk, 9th March, 1914; on mil. service from Nov., 1916, to July, 1919; higher clerical officer, April, 1922.

SPRAWSON, Sir CUTHBERT ALLEN, Kt., C.I.E., M.D., M.R.C.P., Maj.-Genl., I.M.S., retd., (b. 1st Mar., 1877).—First commn. dated 28th June, 1900; prof. of physiology, King George's Medl. Coll., Lucknow, July, 1911; prof. of medicine, ditto, July, 1913; on mil. duty from June, 1917; C.I.E., March, 1919; principal, King George's Medl. Coll., Lucknow, Nov., 1921; prof., ditto, Oct., 1923; inspr.-genl. of civil hosps., Mar., 1929; surg.-genl. with govt. of Madras, Apl., 1930; apptd. hon. physician to the King, Feb., 1933; offg. dir.-genl., I.M.S., Oct., 1933; confd., Nov., 1933; presdt., medl. council of India, Feb., 1934; member, council of state, Apl., 1936; served on N.W. Frontier of India, Waziristan, 1901-02, medal and clasp; knighted, June, 1936; retd., Mar., 1937.

SPRAY, WILLIAM ALFRED, Indian State Ryis. (colliery manager, E.I. Ry.) (b. 27th Feb., 1889).—Joined the service as asst. colliery manager, 13th Aug., 1919; offg. variously as colliery manager from Oct., 1919; confd., Sept., 1926.

SPRINGFIELD, ERNEST, Indian Police (supt., Bengal) (b. 3rd Nov., 1900).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bengal, 7th Dec., 1922; offg. supt., May, 1929; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1934; supt., July, 1934.

SPURGEON, CHRISTOPHER EDWARD, late Indian State Railways (b. 24th May, 1879).—Joined the service, 8th Sept., 1904, as asst.

loco. supt., state ryis.; dist. loco. supt., Apl., 1911; divl. rolling stock officer, Oct., 1924; offg. dep. chief mechanical engr., Feb., 1926; offg., supt., mechanical workshop, N.W. Ry., Oct., 1926; offg. ch. mechanical engr., Nov., 1927; confd., Feb., 1929; retd., May, 1934.

SQUIRE, GILES FREDERICK, B.A. (Oxon), Indian C.S., Indian Political Service (b. 12th Oct., 1894).—Educ. at Marlborough and Christ Church, Oxford; joined the service, 23rd Aug., 1920; arrived, 3rd Dec., 1920, and se. ved in Cent. Provs. as asst. commr.; apptd. to pol. dept., govt. of India, on probation as first asst. to resdt. of Baroda, April, 1924; confd., March, 1925; sec. to agent to gov.-genl. in Central India, April, 1926; under-sec. to agent to gov.-genl. in Central India, Nov., 1926; secty. to agent to gov.-genl., Punjab States, Dec., 1927; ditto, W.I. States, Oct., 1929; asst. to pol. agent in Kalat, Nov., 1933; pol. agent, Kalat, Apl., 1934; ditto, Sibi, Dec., 1935; offg. rev. and judl. commr., Baluchistan, Mar., 1936; consul genl. for Khorasan, Nov., 1936.

SQUIRES, HOWARD JOHN, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 3rd Sept., 1906).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Burma, 21st Oct., 1928.

SRIHARI RAO NAYUDU, BANDI VENKATA, Diwan Bahadur, B.A., B.C., Registration Dept., Madras (inspr.-genl.) (b. 19th Feb., 1887).—Held non-gazetted appt., offg. dep. collr., Feb., 1920; confd., May, 1923; offg. 3rd presdy. magte., Apl., 1928; offg. 4th ditto, July, 1928; offg. asst. secty., bd. of rev., May, 1929; 3rd presdy. magte., Mar., 1930; 2nd ditto, Oct., 1930; inspr.-genl. of registration, Feb., 1931.

S RINARAYAN, RAI BAHADUR, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., United Provs.) (b. 3rd Mar., 1894).—Joined the service, 28th Sept., 1916; asst. engr., Sept., 1917; personal asst. to ch. engr. and under-sec. to govt., Aug., 1925; exec. engr., Jan., 1926; services placed at disposal of inspr.-gen. of police, from Apl., 1926, to July, 1929; on depn. to Improvement Trust Cawnpore, as ch. engr., Mar., 1932; Rai Bahadur, Jan., 1934.

SRINIVASA RAO, CADAPANATHAM, RAO BAHADUR, M.A., late India Posts and Tels., (Madras) (b. 1875).—Joined the service as proby. supt., 1st Aug., 1898; supt. Feb., 1904; dep.-postmaster-genl., Aug., 1920; retd., July, 1930.

SRINIVASA RAO, CHIKBALLAPUR VENKATA, Indian Audit Dept. (b. 12th Nov., 1889).—Joined the service, 17th March, 1914; asst. acct.-genl., Burma, Nov., 1915; asst. comptr., Assam, Dec., 1915; asst. comptr., India treasuries, Nov., 1916; currency officer, Rangoon, May, 1919; asst. acct.-genl., Burma, July, 1919; dep. acct.-genl., posts and tels., Madras, Jan., 1924; on spl. duty in fin. dept., March, 1925; offg. dep. contr. of rly. accts., Mar., 1933; addl. dep. dir. (fin.) rly. bd., Jan., 1935; offg. finl. adviser, posts and tels., May, 1935; offg. dep. ch. accts. officer, Burma ryis., Mar., 1936; offg. ch. ditto, Apl., 1936; on. for service as acct.-genl., Burma, Apl., 1937.

SRINAVASAN, KALYANA CHENNAKESAVA, M.A., F.C.S., Indian Finance Dept. (b. 26th Apl., 1896).—Joined the service, 24th March, 1921; Asst. Auditor, E.B. Ry., Aug., 1922 on depn. with Govt. of India in connection

with accounts for dairy farms, Feb., 1923; Secty., rly. rates advisory cttee., May, 1926; divl. audit officer, Karachi, June, 1928; Govt. exr. of accts., B.N. Rly., Mar., 1929; dy. ch. auditor, G.I.P. Rly., May, 1930; dy. govt. exr., B.B. and C.I. Rlys., Apl., 1931; on spl. duty under contr. of rly. accts., 1936.

SRINIVASAN, KUPPUSWAMI, B.A., Indian C.S. (sub-collr., Madras) (b. 1st May, 1907).—Educ. at University Coll., London, and School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 12th Oct., 1931; arrived in India, Nov., 1931, and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr.; sub-collr., Jan., 1934.

SRINAVASAN, MANDAYAM MADUMBAL, B.A., Indian Forest Service (b. 15th Jan., 1907).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., Assam., 10th Nov., 1931.

SRIRAMULU NAYUDU, BUNDY, Indian Police (dist. supt.) (b. 4th July, 1885).—Joined the service, 2nd Jan., 1907; promoted to I.P. as dist. supt., Mar., 1932.

SRIVASTAV, JASODA NAND, Rai Sahib, P.M.S., Civil Surgeon, United Provs. (b. Dec., 1884).—Civil surg., Apl., 1928.

SRIVASTAVA, SIR BISHISHWAR NATH, O.B.E., B.A., LL.B., Judicial Dept., United Provs. (ch. justice, ch. ct., Lucknow) (b. 21st Nov., 1881).—Apptd. judge, ch. ct., Lucknow, 14th July, 1926; actg. ch. justice, ch. ct., Oudh July, 1936; confd., Oct., 1937; Kt., Jan., 1938.

SRIVASTAVA, RAM CHANDRA, O.B.E., B.Sc., Industries Dept., United Provs. (dep. dir.) (b. 10th Sept., 1891).—Apptd. dep. dir. of industries, United Provs., 1st Sept., 1928; services placed at disposal of Impl. Council of Agricultural Research, for employment as sugar technologist, July, 1930; dir., Impl. Inst. of sugar technology, Cawnpore, Oct., 1936; confd., Oct., 1937; O.B.E., Jan., 1938.

SRIVASTAVA, SHYAM MOHAN, M.Sc., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and collr., United Provs.) (b. 13th July, 1910).—Educ. at K.P. Intermediate College, Allahabad; University of Allahabad and Jesus College, Oxford; joined the service, 6th Oct., 1934; arrived in India Nov., 1934, and served in the United Provinces as asst. mag. and collr., jt. magte., Nov., 1936.

STACE, RALPH EDWARD, Lt.-Col., R.E. (ret'd.) (b. 9th Dec., 1881).—Apptd. dep. mint master, April, 1919; offg. mint master, Calcutta, April to Nov., 1920, and Nov., 1921, to April, 1922; junior mint master, Bombay, May, 1923; mint master, ditto, July, 1926; ret'd., Sept., 1931.

STAGG, MONTAGU, Col., R.E., O.B.E., mint master, Calcutta (b. 4th Nov., 1885).—Apptd. dep. mint master, Bombay, 11th May, 1920; O.B.E., Jan., 1920; dep. mint master, Calcutta, March, 1921; offg. mint master, Calcutta, from April, 1921; confd., Feb., 1926.

STAI, BERTIE MUNRO, C.S.I., Indian C.S., attd. Indian Finance Dept. (finl. commr. rlys.) (b. 14th Aug., 1892).—Educ. at St. Andrews, and Trinity Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1916; arrived, 18th Dec., 1917, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; I.A.R.O., May, 1918, to January, 1919; offg. under-sec., govt. of Bengal, pol. and appts. dept., March, 1921; ditto, fin. dept., Nov., 1921; transf. to Indian audit and accts. list, Nov., 1922; dep. acctnt.-gen., Punjab, May, 1924;

offg. acctnt.-gen., Bihar and Orissa, Nov., 1924; dep. acctnt.-gen., Bengal, Nov., 1925; finl. advr., P.W.D., and jt. sec. to govt. of Punjab, fin. dept., March, 1926; secty., hydro-electric branch enquiry commee., Oct., 1929, secty. to govt., P.W.D. (electricity), Punjab; Apl., 1933; addl. finl. adviser, milty. finance, July, 1934; finl. adviser, milty. finance, Mar., 1935; also relief commr., Baluchistan and jt. secty., govt. of India, for. and pol. dept., June, 1935; C.S.I., June, 1936; on spl. duty in for. and pol. dept., Sept., 1936; member, frontier watch and ward cttee., Nov., 1936; finl. commr., rlys., Apl., 1937.

STAINTON, VERNON BRUCE, B.A., Indian C.S. (dep. secty., home dept., govt. of Punjab) (b. 31st Mar., 1904).—Educ. at Harrow, and Hertford Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 10th Oct., 1928; arrived, Nov., 1928, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., Jan., 1932, and again, Jan., 1933; confd., Nov., 1936; dep. secty. to govt., home dept., Nov., 1937.

STALEY, HENRY SAMBLE, M.A., Indian Educl. Service (inspr. of schools, Central Provs.) (b. 20th May, 1886).—Joined the service, 27th March, 1915; inspr. of schools, April, 1916; offg. dep. dir. of public instrn., April, 1926; offg. prinpl., Spence training coll., Jubbulpore, July, 1934.

STALLARD, PHILIP LECHMERE, M.A., M.R.C.S., L.R.C.P., D.P.H., D.T.M., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 20th May, 1880).—Joined the service as dist. surg., 14th May, 1909; offg. principal medl. and health officer, March, 1927; dist. medl. officer, April, 1929; ret'd., Mar., 1932.

STALLARD, ROBERT HUMPHRY, O.B.E., Major, R.E. (ret'd.), late Indian State Rlys. (b. 12th Nov., 1884).—Joined the service as asst. engr., July, 1910; on milty. duty from 22nd Oct., 1914, to 29th Nov., 1919; O.B.E., June, 1919; exec. engr., Dec., 1919; offg. dep. agent, E.B. Rly., Oct., 1926; on foreign service with M. & S. M. rly. as dep. agent, April, 1929; ret'd., June, 1930.

STALLARD, WILLIAM LEONARD O'BRIAN, Indian Police (assst. supt., Orissa) (b. 29th Aug., 1908).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., Bihar and Orissa, 28th Dec., 1928; confd., Apl., 1930; A.D.C. to govr., Orissa, Apl., 1936.

STAMPE, SIR WILLIAM LEONARD, Kt., C.I.E., late Indian Service of Engrs.
